authors_text: Minkyu Choi,Yizhen Zhang,Kuan Han,Xiaokai Wang,Zhongming Liu
title: Human Eyes Inspired Recurrent Neural Networks are More Robust Against Adversarial Noises
title_zh: 受人眼启发的循环神经网络对对抗性噪声具有更强的鲁棒性
abstract: Humans actively observe the visual surroundings by focusing on salient objects and ignoring trivial details. However, computer vision models based on convolutional neural networks (CNN) often analyze visual input all at once through a single feed-forward pass. In this study, we designed a dual-stream vision model inspired by the human brain. This model features retina-like input layers and includes two streams: one determining the next point of focus (the fixation), while the other interprets the visuals surrounding the fixation. Trained on image recognition, this model examines an image through a sequence of fixations, each time focusing on different parts, thereby progressively building a representation of the image. We evaluated this model against various benchmarks in terms of object recognition, gaze behavior and adversarial robustness. Our findings suggest that the model can attend and gaze in ways similar to humans without being explicitly trained to mimic human attention, and that the model can enhance robustness against adversarial attacks due to its retinal sampling and recurrent processing. In particular, the model can correct its perceptual errors by taking more glances, setting itself apart from all feed-forward-only models. In conclusion, the interactions of retinal sampling, eye movement, and recurrent dynamics are important to human-like visual exploration and inference.
summary: Humans actively observe the visual surroundings by focusing on salient objects and ignoring trivial details. However, computer vision models based on convolutional neural networks (CNN) often analyze visual input all at once through a single feed-forward pass. In this study, we designed a dual-stream vision model inspired by the human brain. This model features retina-like input layers and includes two streams: one determining the next point of focus (the fixation), while the other interprets the visuals surrounding the fixation. Trained on image recognition, this model examines an image through a sequence of fixations, each time focusing on different parts, thereby progressively building a representation of the image. We evaluated this model against various benchmarks in terms of object recognition, gaze behavior and adversarial robustness. Our findings suggest that the model can attend and gaze in ways similar to humans without being explicitly trained to mimic human attention, and that the model can enhance robustness against adversarial attacks due to its retinal sampling and recurrent processing. In particular, the model can correct its perceptual errors by taking more glances, setting itself apart from all feed-forward-only models. In conclusion, the interactions of retinal sampling, eye movement, and recurrent dynamics are important to human-like visual exploration and inference.
abstract_zh: 人类通过关注显着物体并忽略琐碎细节来主动观察视觉环境。然而，基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的计算机视觉模型通常通过单个前馈通道一次性分析所有视觉输入。在这项研究中，我们受人脑启发，设计了一个双流视觉模型。该模型具有类似视网膜的输入层，并包括两个流：一个确定下一个焦点（注视），而另一个则解释注视周围的视觉效果。该模型经过图像识别训练，通过一系列注视来检查图像，每次关注不同的部分，从而逐步构建图像的表示。我们根据物体识别、注视行为和对抗鲁棒性方面的各种基准评估了该模型。我们的研究结果表明，该模型可以以类似于人类的方式进行关注和凝视，而无需经过明确的训练来模仿人类的注意力，并且由于其视网膜采样和循环处理，该模型可以增强针对对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。特别是，该模型可以通过更多的目光来纠正其感知错误，从而将自己与所有仅前馈模型区分开来。总之，视网膜采样、眼球运动和循环动力学的相互作用对于类人视觉探索和推理非常重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受人类视觉机制启发的双流神经网络模型，通过模拟人眼的注视机制提升对抗噪声下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积神经网络（CNN）采用单次前馈处理图像，缺乏人类视觉系统对关键区域的动态关注能力，导致对抗样本攻击下表现脆弱。
AI.method: 设计包含视网膜输入层的双流架构：一束预测注视点（fixation），另一束解析注视区域，通过序列化多点采样与循环处理构建图像表征。
AI.result: 模型在物体识别、眼动行为和对抗鲁棒性基准测试中表现优异，可自主模拟人类注视模式，并通过多次采样修正感知错误，优于纯前馈模型。
AI.conclusion: 视网膜采样、眼动控制与循环机制的协同作用，是实现类人视觉探索与鲁棒推理的关键要素。

authors_text: Cagatay Isil,Deniz Mengu,Yifan Zhao,Anika Tabassum,Jingxi Li,Yi Luo,Mona Jarrahi,Aydogan Ozcan
title: Super-resolution image display using diffractive decoders
title_zh: 使用衍射解码器的超分辨率图像显示
abstract: High-resolution synthesis/projection of images over a large field-of-view (FOV) is hindered by the restricted space-bandwidth-product (SBP) of wavefront modulators. We report a deep learning-enabled diffractive display design that is based on a jointly-trained pair of an electronic encoder and a diffractive optical decoder to synthesize/project super-resolved images using low-resolution wavefront modulators. The digital encoder, composed of a trained convolutional neural network (CNN), rapidly pre-processes the high-resolution images of interest so that their spatial information is encoded into low-resolution (LR) modulation patterns, projected via a low SBP wavefront modulator. The diffractive decoder processes this LR encoded information using thin transmissive layers that are structured using deep learning to all-optically synthesize and project super-resolved images at its output FOV. Our results indicate that this diffractive image display can achieve a super-resolution factor of ~4, demonstrating a ~16-fold increase in SBP. We also experimentally validate the success of this diffractive super-resolution display using 3D-printed diffractive decoders that operate at the THz spectrum. This diffractive image decoder can be scaled to operate at visible wavelengths and inspire the design of large FOV and high-resolution displays that are compact, low-power, and computationally efficient.
summary: High-resolution synthesis/projection of images over a large field-of-view (FOV) is hindered by the restricted space-bandwidth-product (SBP) of wavefront modulators. We report a deep learning-enabled diffractive display design that is based on a jointly-trained pair of an electronic encoder and a diffractive optical decoder to synthesize/project super-resolved images using low-resolution wavefront modulators. The digital encoder, composed of a trained convolutional neural network (CNN), rapidly pre-processes the high-resolution images of interest so that their spatial information is encoded into low-resolution (LR) modulation patterns, projected via a low SBP wavefront modulator. The diffractive decoder processes this LR encoded information using thin transmissive layers that are structured using deep learning to all-optically synthesize and project super-resolved images at its output FOV. Our results indicate that this diffractive image display can achieve a super-resolution factor of ~4, demonstrating a ~16-fold increase in SBP. We also experimentally validate the success of this diffractive super-resolution display using 3D-printed diffractive decoders that operate at the THz spectrum. This diffractive image decoder can be scaled to operate at visible wavelengths and inspire the design of large FOV and high-resolution displays that are compact, low-power, and computationally efficient.
abstract_zh: 波前调制器的空间带宽积 (SBP) 有限，​​阻碍了大视场 (FOV) 上图像的高分辨率合成/投影。我们报告了一种支持深度学习的衍射显示设计，该设计基于联合训练的电子编码器和衍射光学解码器对，以使用低分辨率波前调制器合成/投影超分辨率图像。数字编码器由经过训练的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 组成，可快速预处理感兴趣的高分辨率图像，以便将其空间信息编码为低分辨率 (LR) 调制模式，并通过低 SBP 波前调制器进行投影。衍射解码器使用薄透射层处理这种 LR 编码信息，这些薄透射层使用深度学习构建，以全光学合成并在其输出视场投影超分辨率图像。我们的结果表明，这种衍射图像显示可以实现约 4 的超分辨率因子，证明 SBP 增加了约 16 倍。我们还使用在太赫兹光谱下运行的 3D 打印衍射解码器，通过实验验证了这种衍射超分辨率显示器的成功。这种衍射图像解码器可以缩放以在可见波长下运行，并激发紧凑、低功耗和计算效率高的大视场和高分辨率显示器的设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于衍射解码器的超分辨率图像显示方法，通过电子编码器和衍射光学解码器的联合训练，利用低分辨率调制器实现高分辨率图像投影。
AI.motivation: 传统波前调制器的带宽空间积（SBP）限制了大视场高分辨率图像的合成与投影，亟需突破硬件限制的新型显示方案。
AI.method: 设计由卷积神经网络（CNN）构成的电子编码器，将高分辨率图像预处理为低分辨率调制图案；结合深度学习优化的衍射解码器，通过多层透射结构实现光子级超分辨率图像合成。
AI.result: 实验验证显示系统实现约4倍超分辨率（SBP提升16倍），并在太赫兹波段通过3D打印衍射解码器验证了方案可行性，可扩展至可见光领域。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为紧凑型、低功耗、大视场高分辨率显示提供了新思路，推动了计算光学与深度学习融合的显示技术发展。

authors_text: Samira Vafay Eslahi,Jian Tao,Jim Ji
title: ERNAS: An Evolutionary Neural Architecture Search for Magnetic Resonance Image Reconstructions
title_zh: ERNAS：磁共振图像重建的进化神经架构搜索
abstract: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is one of the noninvasive imaging modalities that can produce high-quality images. However, the scan procedure is relatively slow, which causes patient discomfort and motion artifacts in images. Accelerating MRI hardware is constrained by physical and physiological limitations. A popular alternative approach to accelerated MRI is to undersample the k-space data. While undersampling speeds up the scan procedure, it generates artifacts in the images, and advanced reconstruction algorithms are needed to produce artifact-free images. Recently deep learning has emerged as a promising MRI reconstruction method to address this problem. However, straightforward adoption of the existing deep learning neural network architectures in MRI reconstructions is not usually optimal in terms of efficiency and reconstruction quality. In this work, MRI reconstruction from undersampled data was carried out using an optimized neural network using a novel evolutionary neural architecture search algorithm. Brain and knee MRI datasets show that the proposed algorithm outperforms manually designed neural network-based MR reconstruction models.

However, the scan procedure is relatively slow, which causes patient discomfort and motion artifacts in images. Accelerating MRI hardware is constrained by physical and physiological limitations. A popular alternative approach to accelerated MRI is to undersample the k-space data. While undersampling speeds up the scan procedure, it generates artifacts in the images, and advanced reconstruction algorithms are needed to produce artifact-free images. Recently deep learning has emerged as a promising MRI reconstruction method to address this problem. However, straightforward adoption of the existing deep learning neural network architectures in MRI reconstructions is not usually optimal in terms of efficiency and reconstruction quality. In this work, MRI reconstruction from undersampled data was carried out using an optimized neural network using a novel evolutionary neural architecture search algorithm. Brain and knee MRI datasets show that the proposed algorithm outperforms manually designed neural network-based MR reconstruction models.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像（MRI）是可以产生高质量图像的无创成像方式之一。然而，扫描过程相对较慢，这会导致患者不适和图像中的运动伪影。加速 MRI 硬件受到物理和生理限制的限制。加速 MRI 的一种流行替代方法是对 k 空间数据进行欠采样。虽然欠采样加快了扫描过程，但它会在图像中产生伪影，并且需要先进的重建算法来生成无伪影的图像。最近，深度学习已成为解决这一问题的一种有前景的 MRI 重建方法。然而，在 MRI 重建中直接采用现有的深度学习神经网络架构在效率和重建质量方面通常并不是最佳的。在这项工作中，使用优化的神经网络利用新颖的进化神经架构搜索算法对欠采样数据进行 MRI 重建。大脑和膝盖 MRI 数据集表明，所提出的算法优于手动设计的基于神经网络的 MR 重建模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于进化神经架构搜索（ERNAS）的MRI重建方法，通过优化神经网络结构提升重建质量与效率。
AI.motivation: 传统MRI扫描速度慢导致伪影，现有深度学习方法在效率和重建质量上存在不足，需自动优化网络架构以解决此问题。
AI.method: 采用进化算法进行神经网络架构搜索，优化MRI重建模型的结构设计。
AI.result: 在脑部和膝部MRI数据集上，ERNAS优于手动设计的神经网络重建模型。
AI.conclusion: 进化神经架构搜索能有效提升MRI重建的效率和图像质量，为加速MRI提供新思路。

However, the scan procedure is relatively slow, which causes patient discomfort and motion artifacts in images. Accelerating MRI hardware is constrained by physical and physiological limitations. Recently deep learning has emerged as a promising MRI reconstruction method to address this problem. However, straightforward adoption of the existing deep learning neural network architectures in MRI reconstructions is not usually optimal in terms of efficiency and reconstruction quality. authors_text: Jongwoo Ko,Bongsoo Yi,Se-Young Yun
title: A Gift from Label Smoothing: Robust Training with Adaptive Label Smoothing via Auxiliary Classifier under Label Noise
title_zh: 标签平滑的礼物：在标签噪声下通过辅助分类器进行自适应标签平滑的稳健训练
comment: THE 37TH AAAI CONFERENCE ON ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE (AAAI-23)
comments: THE 37TH AAAI CONFERENCE ON ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE (AAAI-23)
abstract: As deep neural networks can easily overfit noisy labels, robust training in the presence of noisy labels is becoming an important challenge in modern deep learning. While existing methods address this problem in various directions, they still produce unpredictable sub-optimal results since they rely on the posterior information estimated by the feature extractor corrupted by noisy labels. Lipschitz regularization successfully alleviates this problem by training a robust feature extractor, but it requires longer training time and expensive computations. Motivated by this, we propose a simple yet effective method, called ALASCA, which efficiently provides a robust feature extractor under label noise. ALASCA integrates two key ingredients: (1) adaptive label smoothing based on our theoretical analysis that label smoothing implicitly induces Lipschitz regularization, and (2) auxiliary classifiers that enable practical application of intermediate Lipschitz regularization with negligible computations. We conduct wide-ranging experiments for ALASCA and combine our proposed method with previous noise-robust methods on several synthetic and real-world datasets. Experimental results show that our framework consistently improves the robustness of feature extractors and the performance of existing baselines with efficiency. Our code is available at https://github.com/jongwooko/ALASCA.
summary: As deep neural networks can easily overfit noisy labels, robust training in the presence of noisy labels is becoming an important challenge in modern deep learning. While existing methods address this problem in various directions, they still produce unpredictable sub-optimal results since they rely on the posterior information estimated by the feature extractor corrupted by noisy labels. Lipschitz regularization successfully alleviates this problem by training a robust feature extractor, but it requires longer training time and expensive computations. Motivated by this, we propose a simple yet effective method, called ALASCA, which efficiently provides a robust feature extractor under label noise. ALASCA integrates two key ingredients: (1) adaptive label smoothing based on our theoretical analysis that label smoothing implicitly induces Lipschitz regularization, and (2) auxiliary classifiers that enable practical application of intermediate Lipschitz regularization with negligible computations. We conduct wide-ranging experiments for ALASCA and combine our proposed method with previous noise-robust methods on several synthetic and real-world datasets. Experimental results show that our framework consistently improves the robustness of feature extractors and the performance of existing baselines with efficiency. Our code is available at https://github.com/jongwooko/ALASCA.
abstract_zh: 由于深度神经网络很容易过度拟合噪声标签，因此在存在噪声标签的情况下进行稳健训练正成为现代深度学习中的一个重要挑战。虽然现有方法从各个方向解决了这个问题，但它们仍然会产生不可预测的次优结果，因为它们依赖于被噪声标签破坏的特征提取器估计的后验信息。 Lipschitz 正则化通过训练鲁棒的特征提取器成功缓解了这个问题，但它需要更长的训练时间和昂贵的计算。受此启发，我们提出了一种简单而有效的方法，称为 ALASCA，它可以在标签噪声下有效地提供鲁棒的特征提取器。 ALASCA 集成了两个关键要素：(1) 基于我们的理论分析的自适应标签平滑，标签平滑隐式地引发 Lipschitz 正则化；(2) 辅助分类器，能够以可忽略的计算量实现中间 Lipschitz 正则化的实际应用。我们对 ALASCA 进行了广泛的实验，并将我们提出的方法与之前在几个合成和真实数据集上的抗噪声方法相结合。实验结果表明，我们的框架持续有效地提高了特征提取器的鲁棒性和现有基线的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/jongwooko/ALASCA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ALASCA的方法，通过自适应标签平滑和辅助分类器，在标签噪声环境下实现高效鲁棒的特征提取器训练。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖于受噪声标签污染的特征提取器的后验信息，导致子优结果，而Lipschitz正则化虽有效但计算成本高，需更高效解决方案。
AI.method: ALASCA结合两部分：基于理论分析的自适应标签平滑（隐含Lipschitz正则化）及辅助分类器（实现低计算量的中间Lipschitz正则化）。
AI.result: 在多个合成和真实数据集上，ALASCA显著提升特征提取器鲁棒性及现有基线方法性能，且计算效率高。
AI.conclusion: ALASCA通过自适应标签平滑与辅助分类器的结合，有效解决了标签噪声下的鲁棒训练问题，兼具效率与性能优势。

search_text: A Gift from Label Smoothing: Robust Training with Adaptive Label Smoothing via Auxiliary Classifier under Label Noise 标签平滑的礼物：在标签噪声下通过辅助分类器进行自适应标签平滑的稳健训练 As deep neural networks can easily overfit noisy labels, robust training in the presence of noisy labels is becoming an important challenge in modern deep learning. While existing methods address this problem in various directions, they still produce unpredictable sub-optimal results since they rely on the posterior information estimated by the feature extractor corrupted by noisy labels. Lipschitz regularization successfully alleviates this problem by training a robust feature extractor, but it requires longer training time and expensive computations. Motivated by this, we propose a simple yet effective method, called ALASCA, which efficiently provides a robust feature extractor under label noise. ALASCA integrates two key ingredients: (1) adaptive label smoothing based on our theoretical analysis that label smoothing implicitly induces Lipschitz regularization, and (2) auxiliary classifiers that enable practical application of intermediate Lipschitz regularization with negligible computations. We conduct wide-ranging experiments for ALASCA and combine our proposed method with previous noise-robust methods on several synthetic and real-world datasets. Experimental results show that our framework consistently improves the robustness of feature extractors and the performance of existing baselines with efficiency. authors_text: Leslie Ching Ow Tiong,Hyuk Jun Yoo,Na Yeon Kim,Kwan-Young Lee,Sang Soo Han,Donghun Kim
title: Machine vision for vial positioning detection toward the safe automation of material synthesis
title_zh: 用于小瓶定位检测的机器视觉，以实现材料合成的安全自动化
abstract: Although robot-based automation in chemistry laboratories can accelerate the material development process, surveillance-free environments may lead to dangerous accidents primarily due to machine control errors. Object detection techniques can play vital roles in addressing these safety issues; however, state-of-the-art detectors, including single-shot detector (SSD) models, suffer from insufficient accuracy in environments involving complex and noisy scenes. With the aim of improving safety in a surveillance-free laboratory, we report a novel deep learning (DL)-based object detector, namely, DenseSSD. For the foremost and frequent problem of detecting vial positions, DenseSSD achieved a mean average precision (mAP) over 95% based on a complex dataset involving both empty and solution-filled vials, greatly exceeding those of conventional detectors; such high precision is critical to minimizing failure-induced accidents. Additionally, DenseSSD was observed to be highly insensitive to the environmental changes, maintaining its high precision under the variations of solution colors or testing view angles. The robustness of DenseSSD would allow the utilized equipment settings to be more flexible. This work demonstrates that DenseSSD is useful for enhancing safety in an automated material synthesis environment, and it can be extended to various applications where high detection accuracy and speed are both needed.
summary: Although robot-based automation in chemistry laboratories can accelerate the material development process, surveillance-free environments may lead to dangerous accidents primarily due to machine control errors. Object detection techniques can play vital roles in addressing these safety issues; however, state-of-the-art detectors, including single-shot detector (SSD) models, suffer from insufficient accuracy in environments involving complex and noisy scenes. With the aim of improving safety in a surveillance-free laboratory, we report a novel deep learning (DL)-based object detector, namely, DenseSSD. For the foremost and frequent problem of detecting vial positions, DenseSSD achieved a mean average precision (mAP) over 95% based on a complex dataset involving both empty and solution-filled vials, greatly exceeding those of conventional detectors; such high precision is critical to minimizing failure-induced accidents. Additionally, DenseSSD was observed to be highly insensitive to the environmental changes, maintaining its high precision under the variations of solution colors or testing view angles. The robustness of DenseSSD would allow the utilized equipment settings to be more flexible. This work demonstrates that DenseSSD is useful for enhancing safety in an automated material synthesis environment, and it can be extended to various applications where high detection accuracy and speed are both needed.
abstract_zh: 尽管化学实验室中基于机器人的自动化可以加速材料开发过程，但无监控的环境可能主要由于机器控制错误而导致危险事故。物体检测技术在解决这些安全问题方面可以发挥至关重要的作用；然而，最先进的探测器，包括单次探测器（SSD）模型，在涉及复杂和嘈杂场景的环境中精度不足。为了提高无监控实验室的安全性，我们报告了一种新型的基于深度学习（DL）的物体检测器，即 DenseSSD。对于检测小瓶位置这一最重要且最常见的问题，DenseSSD 基于涉及空瓶和装满溶液的小瓶的复杂数据集，实现了超过 95% 的平均精度 (mAP)，大大超过了传统检测器；如此高精度对于最大限度地减少故障引起的事故至关重要。此外，DenseSSD 对环境变化高度不敏感，在溶液颜色或测试视角变化的情况下仍能保持高精度。 DenseSSD 的稳健性将使所使用的设备设置更加灵活。这项工作表明，DenseSSD 对于增强自动化材料合成环境中的安全性非常有用，并且可以扩展到需要高检测精度和速度的各种应用。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于深度学习的机器视觉系统DenseSSD，用于自动化材料合成实验室中安瓶定位检测，以提高安全性。
AI.motivation: 现有目标检测技术在复杂实验室环境中准确性不足，可能导致因机器控制错误引发的安全事故。
AI.method: 提出新型深度学习检测器DenseSSD，针对安瓶定位问题进行优化，提升复杂场景下的检测精度和环境适应性。
AI.result: DenseSSD在包含空瓶和溶液瓶的复杂数据集上达到95%以上的mAP，且对溶液颜色和视角变化具有高鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: DenseSSD有效提升了自动化材料合成的安全性，可扩展至需高精度与速度的其他检测场景。

ai_content.tldr: 开发一种基于深度学习的机器视觉系统DenseSSD，用于自动化材料合成实验室中安瓶定位检测，以提高安全性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有目标检测技术在复杂实验室环境中准确性不足，可能导致因机器控制错误引发的安全事故。
ai_content.method: 提出新型深度学习检测器DenseSSD，针对安瓶定位问题进行优化，提升复杂场景下的检测精度和环境适应性。
ai_content.result: DenseSSD在包含空瓶和溶液瓶的复杂数据集上达到95%以上的mAP，且对溶液颜色和视角变化具有高鲁棒性。
ai_content.conclusion: DenseSSD有效提升了自动化材料合成的安全性，可扩展至需高精度与速度的其他检测场景。

search_text: Machine vision for vial positioning detection toward the safe automation of material synthesis 用于小瓶定位检测的机器视觉，以实现材料合成的安全自动化 Although robot-based automation in chemistry laboratories can accelerate the material development process, surveillance-free environments may lead to dangerous accidents primarily due to machine control errors. Object detection techniques can play vital roles in addressing these safety issues; however, state-of-the-art detectors, including single-shot detector (SSD) models, suffer from insufficient accuracy in environments involving complex and noisy scenes. With the aim of improving safety in a surveillance-free laboratory, we report a novel deep learning (DL)-based object detector, namely, DenseSSD. For the foremost and frequent problem of detecting vial positions, DenseSSD achieved a mean average precision (mAP) over 95% based on a complex dataset involving both empty and solution-filled vials, greatly exceeding those of conventional detectors; such high precision is critical to minimizing failure-induced accidents. Additionally, DenseSSD was observed to be highly insensitive to the environmental changes, maintaining its high precision under the variations of solution colors or testing view angles. The robustness of DenseSSD would allow the utilized equipment settings to be more flexible. This work demonstrates that DenseSSD is useful for enhancing safety in an automated material synthesis environment, and it can be extended to various applications where high detection accuracy and speed are both needed. 尽管化学实验室中基于机器人的自动化可以加速材料开发过程，但无监控的环境可能主要由于机器控制错误而导致危险事故。物体检测技术在解决这些安全问题方面可以发挥至关重要的作用；然而，最先进的探测器，包括单次探测器（SSD）模型，在涉及复杂和嘈杂场景的环境中精度不足。为了提高无监控实验室的安全性，我们报告了一种新型的基于深度学习（DL）的物体检测器，即 DenseSSD。对于检测小瓶位置这一最重要且最常见的问题，DenseSSD 基于涉及空瓶和装满溶液的小瓶的复杂数据集，实现了超过 95% 的平均精度 (mAP)，大大超过了传统检测器；如此高精度对于最大限度地减少故障引起的事故至关重要。此外，DenseSSD 对环境变化高度不敏感，在溶液颜色或测试视角变化的情况下仍能保持高精度。 DenseSSD 的稳健性将使所使用的设备设置更加灵活。这项工作表明，DenseSSD 对于增强自动化材料合成环境中的安全性非常有用，并且可以扩展到需要高检测精度和速度的各种应用。 开发一种基于深度学习的机器视觉系统DenseSSD，用于自动化材料合成实验室中安瓶定位检测，以提高安全性。 Leslie Ching Ow Tiong,Hyuk Jun Yoo,Na Yeon Kim,Kwan-Young Lee,Sang Soo Han,Donghun Kim cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Maurice Jakesch,Jeffrey Hancock,Mor Naaman
title: Human heuristics for AI-generated language are flawed
title_zh: 人工智能生成语言的人类启发法存在缺陷
comment: ef:Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences 120, no. 11 (2023): e2208839120
comments: ef:Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences 120, no. 11 (2023): e2208839120
abstract: Human communication is increasingly intermixed with language generated by AI. Across chat, email, and social media, AI systems suggest words, complete sentences, or produce entire conversations. AI-generated language is often not identified as such but presented as language written by humans, raising concerns about novel forms of deception and manipulation. Here, we study how humans discern whether verbal self-presentations, one of the most personal and consequential forms of language, were generated by AI. In six experiments, participants (N = 4,600) were unable to detect self-presentations generated by state-of-the-art AI language models in professional, hospitality, and dating contexts. A computational analysis of language features shows that human judgments of AI-generated language are hindered by intuitive but flawed heuristics such as associating first-person pronouns, use of contractions, or family topics with human-written language. We experimentally demonstrate that these heuristics make human judgment of AI-generated language predictable and manipulable, allowing AI systems to produce text perceived as "more human than human." We discuss solutions, such as AI accents, to reduce the deceptive potential of language generated by AI, limiting the subversion of human intuition.
summary: Human communication is increasingly intermixed with language generated by AI. Across chat, email, and social media, AI systems suggest words, complete sentences, or produce entire conversations. AI-generated language is often not identified as such but presented as language written by humans, raising concerns about novel forms of deception and manipulation. Here, we study how humans discern whether verbal self-presentations, one of the most personal and consequential forms of language, were generated by AI. In six experiments, participants (N = 4,600) were unable to detect self-presentations generated by state-of-the-art AI language models in professional, hospitality, and dating contexts. A computational analysis of language features shows that human judgments of AI-generated language are hindered by intuitive but flawed heuristics such as associating first-person pronouns, use of contractions, or family topics with human-written language. We experimentally demonstrate that these heuristics make human judgment of AI-generated language predictable and manipulable, allowing AI systems to produce text perceived as "more human than human." We discuss solutions, such as AI accents, to reduce the deceptive potential of language generated by AI, limiting the subversion of human intuition.
abstract_zh: 人类交流越来越多地与人工智能生成的语言混合在一起。在聊天、电子邮件和社交媒体中，人工智能系统会建议单词、完成句子或生成整个对话。人工智能生成的语言通常不会被识别出来，而是呈现为人类编写的语言，这引发了人们对新形式的欺骗和操纵的担忧。在这里，我们研究人类如何辨别口头自我表达（最个人化和最重要的语言形式之一）是否是由人工智能生成的。在六项实验中，参与者 (N = 4,600) 无法检测到由最先进的人工智能语言模型在专业、酒店和约会环境中生成的自我呈现。对语言特征的计算分析表明，人类对人工智能生成语言的判断受到直观但有缺陷的启发法的阻碍，例如将第一人称代词、缩写的使用或家庭主题与人类书面语言相关联。我们通过实验证明，这些启发式方法使人类对人工智能生成的语言的判断是可预测和可操作的，从而使人工智能系统能够生成被认为“比人类更人性化”的文本。我们讨论人工智能口音等解决方案，以减少人工智能生成的语言的欺骗性，限制对人类直觉的颠覆。

AI.tldr: 研究人类如何识别AI生成的自我陈述，发现人类依赖错误的启发式方法，导致判断失误
AI.motivation: 随着AI生成语言的普及，其可能被用于欺骗，需了解人类识别能力的局限性
AI.method: 通过六个实验，分析4600名参与者对AI生成自我陈述的判断，并计算语言特征
AI.result: 参与者无法识别AI生成的自我陈述，错误依赖如第一人称代词等启发式方法
AI.conclusion: 提出如AI口音等解决方案，减少AI生成语言的欺骗性，避免误导人类判断

authors_text: Markus Hiller,Rongkai Ma,Mehrtash Harandi,Tom Drummond
title: Rethinking Generalization in Few-Shot Classification
title_zh: 重新思考少样本分类中的泛化
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022. Code available at https://github.com/mrkshllr/FewTURE
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022. Code available at https://github.com/mrkshllr/FewTURE
abstract: Single image-level annotations only correctly describe an often small subset of an image's content, particularly when complex real-world scenes are depicted. While this might be acceptable in many classification scenarios, it poses a significant challenge for applications where the set of classes differs significantly between training and test time. In this paper, we take a closer look at the implications in the context of $\textit{few-shot learning}$. Splitting the input samples into patches and encoding these via the help of Vision Transformers allows us to establish semantic correspondences between local regions across images and independent of their respective class. The most informative patch embeddings for the task at hand are then determined as a function of the support set via online optimization at inference time, additionally providing visual interpretability of `$\textit{what matters most}$' in the image. We build on recent advances in unsupervised training of networks via masked image modelling to overcome the lack of fine-grained labels and learn the more general statistical structure of the data while avoiding negative image-level annotation influence, $\textit{aka}$ supervision collapse. Experimental results show the competitiveness of our approach, achieving new state-of-the-art results on four popular few-shot classification benchmarks for $5$-shot and $1$-shot scenarios.
summary: Single image-level annotations only correctly describe an often small subset of an image's content, particularly when complex real-world scenes are depicted. While this might be acceptable in many classification scenarios, it poses a significant challenge for applications where the set of classes differs significantly between training and test time. In this paper, we take a closer look at the implications in the context of $\textit{few-shot learning}$. Splitting the input samples into patches and encoding these via the help of Vision Transformers allows us to establish semantic correspondences between local regions across images and independent of their respective class. The most informative patch embeddings for the task at hand are then determined as a function of the support set via online optimization at inference time, additionally providing visual interpretability of `$\textit{what matters most}$' in the image. We build on recent advances in unsupervised training of networks via masked image modelling to overcome the lack of fine-grained labels and learn the more general statistical structure of the data while avoiding negative image-level annotation influence, $\textit{aka}$ supervision collapse. Experimental results show the competitiveness of our approach, achieving new state-of-the-art results on four popular few-shot classification benchmarks for $5$-shot and $1$-shot scenarios.
abstract_zh: 单个图像级注释只能正确描述图像内容的一小部分，特别是在描述复杂的现实世界场景时。虽然这在许多分类场景中可能是可以接受的，但对于训练和测试时间之间的类集显着不同的应用程序来说，这提出了重大挑战。在本文中，我们仔细研究了 $\textit{few-shot Learning}$ 背景下的含义。将输入样本分割成补丁并通过视觉变换器的帮助对它们进行编码，使我们能够在跨图像的局部区域之间建立语义对应关系，并且独立于它们各自的类别。然后，通过推理时的在线优化，将手头任务的信息最丰富的补丁嵌入确定为支持集的函数，此外还提供图像中“$\textit{最重要的东西}$”的视觉可解释性。我们通过蒙版图像建模建立在无监督网络训练的最新进展的基础上，以克服细粒度标签的缺乏，并学习更一般的数据统计结构，同时避免负面图像级注释影响，$\textit{aka}$监督崩溃。实验结果表明了我们方法的竞争力，在 5 美元镜头和 1 美元镜头场景的四种流行的少镜头分类基准上取得了新的最先进结果。

AI.tldr: 本文针对少样本分类中因类别差异导致的泛化问题，提出基于视觉Transformer的局部语义对应方法，并通过在线优化选择关键特征区域。
AI.motivation: 传统图像级注释无法完整描述复杂场景内容，导致训练与测试类别差异时模型泛化能力不足，亟需新的少样本学习方法应对这一挑战。
AI.method: 将图像分割为块并用Vision Transformer编码，建立跨图像的局部语义对应关系；通过在线优化选择支持集中最相关的块嵌入，结合掩码图像建模实现无监督训练以避免监督崩溃。
AI.result: 在四个主流少样本分类基准中，5-shot和1-shot场景均达到新状态-of-the-art性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过局部语义对应与在线优化机制，结合无监督预训练，有效提升了少样本分类的泛化能力，为解决类别分布差异问题提供了新思路。

search_text: Rethinking Generalization in Few-Shot Classification 重新思考少样本分类中的泛化 Single image-level annotations only correctly describe an often small subset of an image's content, particularly when complex real-world scenes are depicted. While this might be acceptable in many classification scenarios, it poses a significant challenge for applications where the set of classes differs significantly between training and test time. In this paper, we take a closer look at the implications in the context of $\textit{few-shot learning}$. Splitting the input samples into patches and encoding these via the help of Vision Transformers allows us to establish semantic correspondences between local regions across images and independent of their respective class. The most informative patch embeddings for the task at hand are then determined as a function of the support set via online optimization at inference time, additionally providing visual interpretability of `$\textit{what matters most}$' in the image. We build on recent advances in unsupervised training of networks via masked image modelling to overcome the lack of fine-grained labels and learn the more general statistical structure of the data while avoiding negative image-level annotation influence, $\textit{aka}$ supervision collapse. Experimental results show the competitiveness of our approach, achieving new state-of-the-art results on four popular few-shot classification benchmarks for $5$-shot and $1$-shot scenarios. 单个图像级注释只能正确描述图像内容的一小部分，特别是在描述复杂的现实世界场景时。虽然这在许多分类场景中可能是可以接受的，但对于训练和测试时间之间的类集显着不同的应用程序来说，这提出了重大挑战。在本文中，我们仔细研究了 $\textit{few-shot Learning}$ 背景下的含义。将输入样本分割成补丁并通过视觉变换器的帮助对它们进行编码，使我们能够在跨图像的局部区域之间建立语义对应关系，并且独立于它们各自的类别。然后，通过推理时的在线优化，将手头任务的信息最丰富的补丁嵌入确定为支持集的函数，此外还提供图像中“$\textit{最重要的东西}$”的视觉可解释性。我们通过蒙版图像建模建立在无监督网络训练的最新进展的基础上，以克服细粒度标签的缺乏，并学习更一般的数据统计结构，同时避免负面图像级注释影响，$\textit{aka}$监督崩溃。实验结果表明了我们方法的竞争力，在 5 美元镜头和 1 美元镜头场景的四种流行的少镜头分类基准上取得了新的最先进结果。 本文针对少样本分类中因类别差异导致的泛化问题，提出基于视觉Transformer的局部语义对应方法，并通过在线优化选择关键特征区域。 Markus Hiller,Rongkai Ma,Mehrtash Harandi,Tom Drummond cs.CV

authors_text: Ruchita Bhadre,Prathamesh Yeole
title: Deployment of AGRI-BOT in Greenhouse Administration
title_zh: AGRI-BOT 在温室管理中的部署
abstract: Modern agriculture is constantly evolving to increase production despite unfavorable environmental conditions. A promising approach is 'greenhouse cultivation' providing a microclimate to the cultivated plants to overcome unfavorable climate. However, massive-sized greenhouses develop non-uniform micro-climate throughout the complex requiring high degree of human supervision. We propose deploying an Agri-Bot to create and maintain positive ecological conditions in the greenhouse, reducing labor costs and increasing production. The prototype will contain two primary systems, the navigation system and the data analytics system. The navigation system will be controlled by an Arduino, and data analytics will be handled using an ESP8266 microchip. Numerous sensors for measuring the greenhouse parameters will be mounted on the robot. It will follow a predefined path, while taking readings at checkpoints. The microchip will collect and process data from sensors, transmit to the cloud, and give commands to the actuators. The soil and climate parameters like temperature, humidity, light intensity, soil moisture, pH will be measured periodically. When the parameters are not within a specified range, the Agri-Bot will take corrective actions like switching on blowers/heaters, starting irrigation etc. If external intervention is required, eg., fertilizer, it will indicate accordingly. Deploying such an Agri-Bot for monitoring and controlling microclimate in large-scale greenhouses can mitigate labor costs while increasing productivity. In spite of an initial cost, it can provide a high return on investment by providing flexibility, low power consumption and easy management to help greenhouse be water efficient, provide evenly dispersed and controlled sunlight intensity, temperature and humidity.

Deploying such an Agri-Bot for monitoring and controlling microclimate in large-scale greenhouses can mitigate labor costs while increasing productivity. In spite of an initial cost, it can provide a high return on investment by providing flexibility, low power consumption and easy management to help greenhouse be water efficient, provide evenly dispersed and controlled sunlight intensity, temperature and humidity.
abstract_zh: 尽管环境条件不利，现代农业仍在不断发展以提高产量。一种有前途的方法是“温室栽培”，为栽培植物提供小气候，以克服不利的气候。然而，大型温室在整个建筑群中形成不均匀的微气候，需要高度的人工监督。我们建议部署农业机器人来创造和维持温室中积极的生态条件，降低劳动力成本并提高产量。该原型将包含两个主要系统：导航系统和数据分析系统。导航系统将由 Arduino 控制，数据分析将使用 ESP8266 微芯片进行处理。机器人上将安装许多用于测量温室参数的传感器。它将遵循预定义的路径，同时在检查点读取读数。微芯片将收集和处理来自传感器的数据，传输到云端，并向执行器发出命令。将定期测量土壤和气候参数，如温度、湿度、光照强度、土壤湿度、pH 值。当参数不在指定范围内时，Agri-Bot 将采取纠正措施，例如打开鼓风机/加热器、开始灌溉等。如果需要外部干预（例如施肥），它会相应地进行指示。部署此类农业机器人来监测和控制大型温室中的微气候可以降低劳动力成本，同时提高生产率。尽管初始成本较高，但它可以通过提供灵活性、低功耗和易于管理来提供高投资回报，以帮助温室节水，提供均匀分散和受控的阳光强度、温度和湿度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AGRI-BOT的机器人系统，用于在大规模温室中自动监测和控制微气候条件。
AI.motivation: 由于大规模温室中微气候不均匀，需要大量人工监督，因此需要一种自动化解决方案以降低人工成本并提高生产效率。
AI.method: 该系统由导航系统和数据分析系统组成，使用Arduino控制导航，ESP8266微芯片处理数据，传感器测量温室参数，并在云上传输数据以执行纠正操作。
AI.result: AGRI-BOT能够自动调节温度、湿度、光照强度、土壤湿度和pH值，从而改善温室环境并提高生产效率。
AI.conclusion: 部署AGRI-BOT可以降低人工成本，提高温室生产效率，同时提供灵活、低功耗和易于管理的解决方案。

authors_text: Christin Jose,Joseph Wang,Grant P. Strimel,Mohammad Omar Khursheed,Yuriy Mishchenko,Brian Kulis
title: Latency Control for Keyword Spotting
title_zh: 关键字识别的延迟控制
abstract: Conversational agents commonly utilize keyword spotting (KWS) to initiate voice interaction with the user. For user experience and privacy considerations, existing approaches to KWS largely focus on accuracy, which can often come at the expense of introduced latency. To address this tradeoff, we propose a novel approach to control KWS model latency and which generalizes to any loss function without explicit knowledge of the keyword endpoint. Through a single, tunable hyperparameter, our approach enables one to balance detection latency and accuracy for the targeted application. Empirically, we show that our approach gives superior performance under latency constraints when compared to existing methods. Namely, we make a substantial 25\% relative false accepts improvement for a fixed latency target when compared to the baseline state-of-the-art. We also show that when our approach is used in conjunction with a max-pooling loss, we are able to improve relative false accepts by 25 % at a fixed latency when compared to cross entropy loss.
summary: Conversational agents commonly utilize keyword spotting (KWS) to initiate voice interaction with the user. For user experience and privacy considerations, existing approaches to KWS largely focus on accuracy, which can often come at the expense of introduced latency. To address this tradeoff, we propose a novel approach to control KWS model latency and which generalizes to any loss function without explicit knowledge of the keyword endpoint. Through a single, tunable hyperparameter, our approach enables one to balance detection latency and accuracy for the targeted application. Empirically, we show that our approach gives superior performance under latency constraints when compared to existing methods. Namely, we make a substantial 25\% relative false accepts improvement for a fixed latency target when compared to the baseline state-of-the-art. We also show that when our approach is used in conjunction with a max-pooling loss, we are able to improve relative false accepts by 25 % at a fixed latency when compared to cross entropy loss.
abstract_zh: 会话代理通常利用关键字识别 (KWS) 来发起与用户的语音交互。出于用户体验和隐私方面的考虑，现有的 KWS 方法主要关注准确性，这通常会以引入延迟为代价。为了解决这种权衡问题，我们提出了一种控制 KWS 模型延迟的新方法，该方法可以推广到任何损失函数，而无需明确了解关键字端点。通过单个可调节的超参数，我们的方法使人们能够平衡目标应用程序的检测延迟和准确性。根据经验，我们表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法在延迟限制下提供了卓越的性能。也就是说，与最先进的基线相比，我们在固定延迟目标上实现了 25% 的相对错误接受改进。我们还表明，当我们的方法与最大池化损失结合使用时，与交叉熵损失相比，我们能够在固定延迟下将相对错误接受提高 25%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种控制关键词检测（KWS）模型延迟的新方法，通过单一可调超参数平衡检测延迟与准确率。
AI.motivation: 现有KWS方法过度追求准确性而忽视延迟问题，导致用户体验和隐私保护不足，需解决准确率与延迟的权衡问题。
AI.method: 设计通用延迟控制框架，通过可调超参数动态调整模型延迟，无需依赖关键词端点信息，适配任意损失函数。
AI.result: 在固定延迟目标下，误接受率较基线方法降低25%；结合最大池化损失时，相较交叉熵损失进一步提升25%的误接受率表现。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在延迟约束下显著优于现有技术，为KWS系统提供了灵活的准确率-延迟权衡方案，具有广泛适用性。

Empirically, we show that our approach gives superior performance under latency constraints when compared to existing methods. Namely, we make a substantial 25\% relative false accepts improvement for a fixed latency target when compared to the baseline state-of-the-art. We also show that when our approach is used in conjunction with a max-pooling loss, we are able to improve relative false accepts by 25 % at a fixed latency when compared to cross entropy loss. 会话代理通常利用关键字识别 (KWS) 来发起与用户的语音交互。出于用户体验和隐私方面的考虑，现有的 KWS 方法主要关注准确性，这通常会以引入延迟为代价。为了解决这种权衡问题，我们提出了一种控制 KWS 模型延迟的新方法，该方法可以推广到任何损失函数，而无需明确了解关键字端点。通过单个可调节的超参数，我们的方法使人们能够平衡目标应用程序的检测延迟和准确性。根据经验，我们表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法在延迟限制下提供了卓越的性能。也就是说，与最先进的基线相比，我们在固定延迟目标上实现了 25% 的相对错误接受改进。我们还表明，当我们的方法与最大池化损失结合使用时，与交叉熵损失相比，我们能够在固定延迟下将相对错误接受提高 25%。 本文提出一种控制关键词检测（KWS）模型延迟的新方法，通过单一可调超参数平衡检测延迟与准确率。 Christin Jose,Joseph Wang,Grant P. Strimel,Mohammad Omar Khursheed,Yuriy Mishchenko,Brian Kulis eess.AS,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Markus Hiller,Mehrtash Harandi,Tom Drummond
title: On Enforcing Better Conditioned Meta-Learning for Rapid Few-Shot Adaptation
title_zh: 关于实施更好的条件元学习以实现快速的少样本适应
abstract: Inspired by the concept of preconditioning, we propose a novel method to increase adaptation speed for gradient-based meta-learning methods without incurring extra parameters. We demonstrate that recasting the optimization problem to a non-linear least-squares formulation provides a principled way to actively enforce a $\textit{well-conditioned}$ parameter space for meta-learning models based on the concepts of the condition number and local curvature. Our comprehensive evaluations show that the proposed method significantly outperforms its unconstrained counterpart especially during initial adaptation steps, while achieving comparable or better overall results on several few-shot classification tasks -- creating the possibility of dynamically choosing the number of adaptation steps at inference time.
summary: Inspired by the concept of preconditioning, we propose a novel method to increase adaptation speed for gradient-based meta-learning methods without incurring extra parameters. We demonstrate that recasting the optimization problem to a non-linear least-squares formulation provides a principled way to actively enforce a $\textit{well-conditioned}$ parameter space for meta-learning models based on the concepts of the condition number and local curvature. Our comprehensive evaluations show that the proposed method significantly outperforms its unconstrained counterpart especially during initial adaptation steps, while achieving comparable or better overall results on several few-shot classification tasks -- creating the possibility of dynamically choosing the number of adaptation steps at inference time.
abstract_zh: 受预处理概念的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的方法来提高基于梯度的元学习方法的适应速度，而不会产生额外的参数。我们证明，将优化问题重新转换为非线性最小二乘公式提供了一种原则性的方法，可以根据条件数和局部曲率的概念，为元学习模型主动实施 $\textit{well-conditioned}$ 参数空间。我们的综合评估表明，所提出的方法显着优于其无约束对应方法，尤其是在初始适应步骤中，同时在几个小样本分类任务上实现了可比较或更好的总体结果——创造了在推理时动态选择适应步骤数量的可能性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需额外参数的方法，通过重构优化问题为非线性最小二乘问题，改善元学习的参数空间条件，从而加速少量样本下的模型适应过程。
AI.motivation: 现有基于梯度的元学习方法在初始适应阶段收敛速度慢，且难以动态调整适应步骤数量，影响实际应用效率。
AI.method: 受预处理思想启发，将元学习优化问题转化为非线性最小二乘问题，利用条件数和局部曲率概念主动约束参数空间的良态性。
AI.result: 在多个少量样本分类任务中，该方法在初始适应阶段显著优于无约束方法，整体性能相当或更优，并支持推理时动态选择适应步数。
AI.conclusion: 通过优化参数空间条件，该方法有效提升了元学习的适应速度，为实际应用中灵活控制适应步骤提供了理论依据和实现可能。

authors_text: Jongmin Lee,Yoonwoo Jeong,Minsu Cho
title: Self-Supervised Learning of Image Scale and Orientation
title_zh: 图像比例和方向的自监督学习
comment: Presented in BMVC 2021, code is available on https://github.com/bluedream1121/self-sca-ori
comments: Presented in BMVC 2021, code is available on https://github.com/bluedream1121/self-sca-ori
abstract: We study the problem of learning to assign a characteristic pose, i.e., scale and orientation, for an image region of interest. Despite its apparent simplicity, the problem is non-trivial; it is hard to obtain a large-scale set of image regions with explicit pose annotations that a model directly learns from. To tackle the issue, we propose a self-supervised learning framework with a histogram alignment technique. It generates pairs of image patches by random rescaling/rotating and then train an estimator to predict their scale/orientation values so that their relative difference is consistent with the rescaling/rotating used. The estimator learns to predict a non-parametric histogram distribution of scale/orientation without any supervision. Experiments show that it significantly outperforms previous methods in scale/orientation estimation and also improves image matching and 6 DoF camera pose estimation by incorporating our patch poses into a matching process.
summary: We study the problem of learning to assign a characteristic pose, i.e., scale and orientation, for an image region of interest. Despite its apparent simplicity, the problem is non-trivial; it is hard to obtain a large-scale set of image regions with explicit pose annotations that a model directly learns from. To tackle the issue, we propose a self-supervised learning framework with a histogram alignment technique. It generates pairs of image patches by random rescaling/rotating and then train an estimator to predict their scale/orientation values so that their relative difference is consistent with the rescaling/rotating used. The estimator learns to predict a non-parametric histogram distribution of scale/orientation without any supervision. Experiments show that it significantly outperforms previous methods in scale/orientation estimation and also improves image matching and 6 DoF camera pose estimation by incorporating our patch poses into a matching process.
abstract_zh: 我们研究学习为感兴趣的图像区域分配特征姿势（即比例和方向）的问题。尽管看起来很简单，但问题并不简单。很难获得具有模型直接学习的明确姿势注释的大规模图像区域集。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个具有直方图对齐技术的自监督学习框架。它通过随机重新缩放/旋转生成图像块对，然后训练估计器来预测它们的缩放/方向值，以便它们的相对差异与所使用的重新缩放/旋转一致。估计器学习在没有任何监督的情况下预测尺度/方向的非参数直方图分布。实验表明，它在尺度/方向估计方面显着优于以前的方法，并且通过将我们的补丁姿势合并到匹配过程中，还改进了图像匹配和 6 DoF 相机姿势估计。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过自监督学习为图像感兴趣区域分配特征姿态（尺度和方向）。
AI.motivation: 显式标注大规模图像区域姿态的数据难以获取，传统方法依赖标注数据存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出基于直方图对齐的自监督框架，通过随机缩放/旋转生成图像块对，训练估计器预测尺度/方向值使其与变换参数一致。
AI.result: 在尺度/方向估计任务中显著优于先前方法，并通过融合块姿态提升了图像匹配和6自由度相机姿态估计性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法无需监督即可学习有效姿态表示，为视觉任务提供了通用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Jianfeng Xiang,Jiaolong Yang,Yu Deng,Xin Tong
title: GRAM-HD: 3D-Consistent Image Generation at High Resolution with Generative Radiance Manifolds
title_zh: GRAM-HD：利用生成辐射流形生成高分辨率的 3D 一致图像
comment: ICCV2023 camera ready version (more results and method comparisons). Project page: https://jeffreyxiang.github.io/GRAM-HD/
comments: ICCV2023 camera ready version (more results and method comparisons). Project page: https://jeffreyxiang.github.io/GRAM-HD/
abstract: Recent works have shown that 3D-aware GANs trained on unstructured single image collections can generate multiview images of novel instances. The key underpinnings to achieve this are a 3D radiance field generator and a volume rendering process. However, existing methods either cannot generate high-resolution images (e.g., up to 256X256) due to the high computation cost of neural volume rendering, or rely on 2D CNNs for image-space upsampling which jeopardizes the 3D consistency across different views. This paper proposes a novel 3D-aware GAN that can generate high resolution images (up to 1024X1024) while keeping strict 3D consistency as in volume rendering. Our motivation is to achieve super-resolution directly in the 3D space to preserve 3D consistency. We avoid the otherwise prohibitively-expensive computation cost by applying 2D convolutions on a set of 2D radiance manifolds defined in the recent generative radiance manifold (GRAM) approach, and apply dedicated loss functions for effective GAN training at high resolution. Experiments on FFHQ and AFHQv2 datasets show that our method can produce high-quality 3D-consistent results that significantly outperform existing methods. It makes a significant step towards closing the gap between traditional 2D image generation and 3D-consistent free-view generation.
summary: Recent works have shown that 3D-aware GANs trained on unstructured single image collections can generate multiview images of novel instances. The key underpinnings to achieve this are a 3D radiance field generator and a volume rendering process. However, existing methods either cannot generate high-resolution images (e.g., up to 256X256) due to the high computation cost of neural volume rendering, or rely on 2D CNNs for image-space upsampling which jeopardizes the 3D consistency across different views. This paper proposes a novel 3D-aware GAN that can generate high resolution images (up to 1024X1024) while keeping strict 3D consistency as in volume rendering. Our motivation is to achieve super-resolution directly in the 3D space to preserve 3D consistency. We avoid the otherwise prohibitively-expensive computation cost by applying 2D convolutions on a set of 2D radiance manifolds defined in the recent generative radiance manifold (GRAM) approach, and apply dedicated loss functions for effective GAN training at high resolution. Experiments on FFHQ and AFHQv2 datasets show that our method can produce high-quality 3D-consistent results that significantly outperform existing methods. It makes a significant step towards closing the gap between traditional 2D image generation and 3D-consistent free-view generation.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，在非结构化单图像集合上训练的 3D 感知 GAN 可以生成新颖实例的多视图图像。实现这一目标的关键基础是 3D 辐射场发生器和体积渲染过程。然而，由于神经体积渲染的计算成本较高，现有方法要么无法生成高分辨率图像（例如高达 256X256），要么依赖 2D CNN 进行图像空间上采样，这会危及不同视图之间的 3D 一致性。本文提出了一种新颖的 3D 感知 GAN，它可以生成高分辨率图像（高达 1024X1024），同时保持体渲染中严格的 3D 一致性。我们的动机是直接在 3D 空间中实现超分辨率以保持 3D 一致性。我们通过在最近的生成辐射流形 (GRAM) 方法中定义的一组 2D 辐射流形上应用 2D 卷积来避免昂贵的计算成本，并应用专用损失函数来进行高分辨率的有效 GAN 训练。在 FFHQ 和 AFHQv2 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法可以产生高质量的 3D 一致结果，显着优于现有方法。它朝着缩小传统 2D 图像生成和 3D 一致的自由视图生成之间的差距迈出了重要一步。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GRAM-HD的3D感知生成对抗网络，能够在高分辨率下生成具有严格3D一致性的多视角图像。
AI.motivation: 现有的方法要么无法生成高分辨率图像，要么使用2D卷积进行图像空间上采样，这会破坏不同视角之间的3D一致性。本文旨在通过在3D空间中直接进行超分辨率生成来保持3D一致性。
AI.method: 该方法基于生成辐射流形（GRAM）方法定义的一组2D辐射流形，并在这些流形上应用2D卷积，同时使用专门的损失函数进行高分辨率的GAN训练。
AI.result: 在FFHQ和AFHQv2数据集上的实验表明，该方法生成的高质量3D一致性结果显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文的方法在传统2D图像生成和3D一致性自由视图生成之间迈出了重要一步。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GRAM-HD的3D感知生成对抗网络，能够在高分辨率下生成具有严格3D一致性的多视角图像。
ai_content.motivation: 现有的方法要么无法生成高分辨率图像，要么使用2D卷积进行图像空间上采样，这会破坏不同视角之间的3D一致性。本文旨在通过在3D空间中直接进行超分辨率生成来保持3D一致性。

search_text: GRAM-HD: 3D-Consistent Image Generation at High Resolution with Generative Radiance Manifolds GRAM-HD：利用生成辐射流形生成高分辨率的 3D 一致图像 Recent works have shown that 3D-aware GANs trained on unstructured single image collections can generate multiview images of novel instances. The key underpinnings to achieve this are a 3D radiance field generator and a volume rendering process. However, existing methods either cannot generate high-resolution images (e.g., up to 256X256) due to the high computation cost of neural volume rendering, or rely on 2D CNNs for image-space upsampling which jeopardizes the 3D consistency across different views. This paper proposes a novel 3D-aware GAN that can generate high resolution images (up to 1024X1024) while keeping strict 3D consistency as in volume rendering. Our motivation is to achieve super-resolution directly in the 3D space to preserve 3D consistency. We avoid the otherwise prohibitively-expensive computation cost by applying 2D convolutions on a set of 2D radiance manifolds defined in the recent generative radiance manifold (GRAM) approach, and apply dedicated loss functions for effective GAN training at high resolution. Experiments on FFHQ and AFHQv2 datasets show that our method can produce high-quality 3D-consistent results that significantly outperform existing methods. It makes a significant step towards closing the gap between traditional 2D image generation and 3D-consistent free-view generation. 最近的研究表明，在非结构化单图像集合上训练的 3D 感知 GAN 可以生成新颖实例的多视图图像。实现这一目标的关键基础是 3D 辐射场发生器和体积渲染过程。然而，由于神经体积渲染的计算成本较高，现有方法要么无法生成高分辨率图像（例如高达 256X256），要么依赖 2D CNN 进行图像空间上采样，这会危及不同视图之间的 3D 一致性。本文提出了一种新颖的 3D 感知 GAN，它可以生成高分辨率图像（高达 1024X1024），同时保持体渲染中严格的 3D 一致性。我们的动机是直接在 3D 空间中实现超分辨率以保持 3D 一致性。我们通过在最近的生成辐射流形 (GRAM) 方法中定义的一组 2D 辐射流形上应用 2D 卷积来避免昂贵的计算成本，并应用专用损失函数来进行高分辨率的有效 GAN 训练。在 FFHQ 和 AFHQv2 数据集上的实验表明，我们的方法可以产生高质量的 3D 一致结果，显着优于现有方法。它朝着缩小传统 2D 图像生成和 3D 一致的自由视图生成之间的差距迈出了重要一步。 本文提出了一种名为GRAM-HD的3D感知生成对抗网络，能够在高分辨率下生成具有严格3D一致性的多视角图像。 Jianfeng Xiang,Jiaolong Yang,Yu Deng,Xin Tong cs.CV

authors_text: Yury Makarychev,Naren Sarayu Manoj,Max Ovsiankin
title: Streaming Algorithms for Ellipsoidal Approximation of Convex Polytopes
title_zh: 凸多面体椭球逼近的流算法
abstract: We give efficient deterministic one-pass streaming algorithms for finding an ellipsoidal approximation of a symmetric convex polytope. The algorithms are near-optimal in that their approximation factors differ from that of the optimal offline solution only by a factor sub-logarithmic in the aspect ratio of the polytope.
summary: We give efficient deterministic one-pass streaming algorithms for finding an ellipsoidal approximation of a symmetric convex polytope. The algorithms are near-optimal in that their approximation factors differ from that of the optimal offline solution only by a factor sub-logarithmic in the aspect ratio of the polytope.
abstract_zh: 我们给出了有效的确定性单遍流算法来寻找对称凸多面体的椭圆体近似。该算法接近最优，因为它们的近似因子与最佳离线解的近似因子仅相差多面体纵横比的次对数因子。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的确定性单次流算法，用于对称凸多面体的椭球近似。
AI.motivation: 在流数据处理场景下，传统离线算法难以处理大规模数据，需设计高效近似方法以平衡计算资源与近似精度。
AI.method: 基于流算法框架，通过单次数据遍历维护椭球参数，利用凸多面体的几何特性控制近似误差。
AI.result: 算法近似因子与最优离线方案仅相差多面体纵横比的次对数因子，达到近似最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为大规模凸多面体近似问题提供了高效流算法解决方案，推动了流计算在计算几何领域的应用。

authors_text: Yuta Saito,Thorsten Joachims
title: Fair Ranking as Fair Division: Impact-Based Individual Fairness in Ranking
title_zh: 公平排名作为公平划分：排名中基于影响力的个人公平性
comment: accepted at KDD2022, a few minor updates from the camera ready version
comments: accepted at KDD2022, a few minor updates from the camera ready version
abstract: Rankings have become the primary interface in two-sided online markets. Many have noted that the rankings not only affect the satisfaction of the users (e.g., customers, listeners, employers, travelers), but that the position in the ranking allocates exposure -- and thus economic opportunity -- to the ranked items (e.g., articles, products, songs, job seekers, restaurants, hotels). This has raised questions of fairness to the items, and most existing works have addressed fairness by explicitly linking item exposure to item relevance. However, we argue that any particular choice of such a link function may be difficult to defend, and we show that the resulting rankings can still be unfair. To avoid these shortcomings, we develop a new axiomatic approach that is rooted in principles of fair division. This not only avoids the need to choose a link function, but also more meaningfully quantifies the impact on the items beyond exposure. Our axioms of envy-freeness and dominance over uniform ranking postulate that for a fair ranking policy every item should prefer their own rank allocation over that of any other item, and that no item should be actively disadvantaged by the rankings. To compute ranking policies that are fair according to these axioms, we propose a new ranking objective related to the Nash Social Welfare. We show that the solution has guarantees regarding its envy-freeness, its dominance over uniform rankings for every item, and its Pareto optimality. In contrast, we show that conventional exposure-based fairness can produce large amounts of envy and have a highly disparate impact on the items. Beyond these theoretical results, we illustrate empirically how our framework controls the trade-off between impact-based individual item fairness and user utility.
summary: Rankings have become the primary interface in two-sided online markets. Many have noted that the rankings not only affect the satisfaction of the users (e.g., customers, listeners, employers, travelers), but that the position in the ranking allocates exposure -- and thus economic opportunity -- to the ranked items (e.g., articles, products, songs, job seekers, restaurants, hotels). This has raised questions of fairness to the items, and most existing works have addressed fairness by explicitly linking item exposure to item relevance. However, we argue that any particular choice of such a link function may be difficult to defend, and we show that the resulting rankings can still be unfair. To avoid these shortcomings, we develop a new axiomatic approach that is rooted in principles of fair division. This not only avoids the need to choose a link function, but also more meaningfully quantifies the impact on the items beyond exposure. Our axioms of envy-freeness and dominance over uniform ranking postulate that for a fair ranking policy every item should prefer their own rank allocation over that of any other item, and that no item should be actively disadvantaged by the rankings. To compute ranking policies that are fair according to these axioms, we propose a new ranking objective related to the Nash Social Welfare. We show that the solution has guarantees regarding its envy-freeness, its dominance over uniform rankings for every item, and its Pareto optimality. In contrast, we show that conventional exposure-based fairness can produce large amounts of envy and have a highly disparate impact on the items. Beyond these theoretical results, we illustrate empirically how our framework controls the trade-off between impact-based individual item fairness and user utility.
abstract_zh: 排名已成为双边在线市场的主要界面。许多人指出，排名不仅影响用户（例如客户、听众、雇主、旅行者）的满意度，而且排名中的位置将曝光度（从而经济机会）分配给排名的项目（例如文章、产品、歌曲、求职者、餐馆、酒店）。这引发了项目公平性的问题，并且大多数现有作品都通过明确地将项目暴露与项目相关性联系起来来解决公平性问题。然而，我们认为，这种链接功能的任何特定选择可能都难以辩护，并且我们表明最终的排名仍然可能是不公平的。为了避免这些缺点，我们开发了一种植根于公平分配原则的新公理方法。这不仅避免了选择链接功能的需要，而且还更有意义地量化了对曝光之外的项目的影响。我们的无嫉妒和对统一排名的支配性公理假设，对于公平的排名政策，每个项目都应该比任何其他项目更喜欢自己的排名分配，并且任何项目都不应该因排名而处于不利地位。为了根据这些公理计算公平的排名政策，我们提出了一个与纳什社会福利相关的新排名目标。我们表明，该解决方案保证了其无嫉妒性、对每个项目的统一排名的主导地位以及帕累托最优性。相比之下，我们表明传统的基于曝光的公平性会产生大量的嫉妒，并对项目产生截然不同的影响。除了这些理论结果之外，我们还凭经验说明了我们的框架如何控制基于影响的单个项目公平性和用户效用之间的权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于公平分配原则的排名方法，通过考虑项目的影响而非仅曝光度，实现更公平的个体公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有基于曝光度的公平性方法难以准确量化项目的真实影响，可能导致不公平。作者旨在通过公平分配理论构建更稳健的公平排名框架。
AI.method: 引入 envy-freeness 和 dominance 轴ioms，提出基于纳什社会福利的排名目标函数，避免依赖曝光-相关性映射。
AI.result: 新方法保证 envy-freeness、优于均匀排名及帕累托最优，而传统方法易产生 envy 和差异影响。实验证明其能平衡公平性与用户效用。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过理论保证和实证验证，为排名公平性提供了更符合个体影响的解决方案，优于传统曝光导向方法。

authors_text: Sophie Choe
title: Quantum computing overview: discrete vs. continuous variable models
title_zh: 量子计算概述：离散变量模型与连续变量模型
abstract: In this Near Intermediate-Scale Quantum era, there are two types of near-term quantum devices available on cloud: superconducting quantum processing units (QPUs) based on the discrete variable model and linear optics (photonics) QPUs based on the continuous variable (CV) model. Quantum computation in the discrete variable model is performed in a finite dimensional quantum state space and the CV model in an infinite dimensional space. In implementing quantum algorithms, the CV model offers more quantum gates that are not available in the discrete variable model. CV-based photonic quantum computers provide additional flexibility of controlling the length of the output vectors of quantum circuits, using different methods of measurement and the notion of cutoff dimension.
summary: In this Near Intermediate-Scale Quantum era, there are two types of near-term quantum devices available on cloud: superconducting quantum processing units (QPUs) based on the discrete variable model and linear optics (photonics) QPUs based on the continuous variable (CV) model. Quantum computation in the discrete variable model is performed in a finite dimensional quantum state space and the CV model in an infinite dimensional space. In implementing quantum algorithms, the CV model offers more quantum gates that are not available in the discrete variable model. CV-based photonic quantum computers provide additional flexibility of controlling the length of the output vectors of quantum circuits, using different methods of measurement and the notion of cutoff dimension.
abstract_zh: 在近中尺度量子时代，云上有两种类型的近期量子器件：基于离散变量模型的超导量子处理单元（QPU）和基于连续变量（CV）模型的线性光学（光子学）QPU。离散变量模型中的量子计算是在有限维量子态空间中进行的，而CV模型中的量子计算是在无限维空间中进行的。在实现量子算法时，CV 模型提供了更多离散变量模型所没有的量子门。基于 CV 的光子量子计算机使用不同的测量方法和截止维度的概念，为控制量子电路的输出向量的长度提供了额外的灵活性。

AI.tldr: 本文概述了量子计算中的离散变量模型与连续变量模型，比较了两者在量子态空间、量子门集及输出控制方面的差异。
AI.motivation: 在近中期量子计算阶段，超导和光子量子设备分别基于离散/连续变量模型，需明确两者特性以指导算法开发与硬件应用。
AI.method: 通过理论分析对比离散变量模型（有限维量子态）与连续变量模型（无限维量子态）的数学框架、可用量子门及测量方法。
AI.result: 连续变量模型提供更多独特量子门，支持动态调整输出向量长度，且通过截断维度实现灵活控制，扩展了量子算法实现方式。
AI.conclusion: 连续变量模型在灵活性和扩展性上具优势，未来研究需进一步探索其与离散变量模型的协同应用及优化方法。

authors_text: Weisong Sun,Chunrong Fang,Yuchen Chen,Quanjun Zhang,Guanhong Tao,Tingxu Han,Yifei Ge,Yudu You,Bin Luo
title: An Extractive-and-Abstractive Framework for Source Code Summarization
title_zh: 源代码摘要的提取和抽象框架
comment: Accepted to ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (TOSEM)
comments: Accepted to ACM Transactions on Software Engineering and Methodology (TOSEM)
abstract: (Source) Code summarization aims to automatically generate summaries/comments for a given code snippet in the form of natural language. Such summaries play a key role in helping developers understand and maintain source code. Existing code summarization techniques can be categorized into extractive methods and abstractive methods. The extractive methods extract a subset of important statements and keywords from the code snippet using retrieval techniques, and generate a summary that preserves factual details in important statements and keywords. However, such a subset may miss identifier or entity naming, and consequently, the naturalness of generated summary is usually poor. The abstractive methods can generate human-written-like summaries leveraging encoder-decoder models from the neural machine translation domain. The generated summaries however often miss important factual details. To generate human-written-like summaries with preserved factual details, we propose a novel extractive-and-abstractive framework. The extractive module in the framework performs a task of extractive code summarization, which takes in the code snippet and predicts important statements containing key factual details. The abstractive module in the framework performs a task of abstractive code summarization, which takes in the entire code snippet and important statements in parallel and generates a succinct and human-written-like natural language summary. We evaluate the effectiveness of our technique, called EACS, by conducting extensive experiments on three datasets involving six programming languages. Experimental results show that EACS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art techniques in terms of all three widely used metrics, including BLEU, METEOR, and ROUGH-L.
summary: (Source) Code summarization aims to automatically generate summaries/comments for a given code snippet in the form of natural language. Such summaries play a key role in helping developers understand and maintain source code. Existing code summarization techniques can be categorized into extractive methods and abstractive methods. The extractive methods extract a subset of important statements and keywords from the code snippet using retrieval techniques, and generate a summary that preserves factual details in important statements and keywords. However, such a subset may miss identifier or entity naming, and consequently, the naturalness of generated summary is usually poor. The abstractive methods can generate human-written-like summaries leveraging encoder-decoder models from the neural machine translation domain. The generated summaries however often miss important factual details. To generate human-written-like summaries with preserved factual details, we propose a novel extractive-and-abstractive framework. The extractive module in the framework performs a task of extractive code summarization, which takes in the code snippet and predicts important statements containing key factual details. The abstractive module in the framework performs a task of abstractive code summarization, which takes in the entire code snippet and important statements in parallel and generates a succinct and human-written-like natural language summary. We evaluate the effectiveness of our technique, called EACS, by conducting extensive experiments on three datasets involving six programming languages. Experimental results show that EACS significantly outperforms state-of-the-art techniques in terms of all three widely used metrics, including BLEU, METEOR, and ROUGH-L.
abstract_zh: （来源）代码摘要旨在以自然语言的形式自动生成给定代码片段的摘要/注释。此类摘要在帮助开发人员理解和维护源代码方面发挥着关键作用。现有的代码摘要技术可以分为抽取法和抽象法。提取方法使用检索技术从代码片段中提取重要语句和关键字的子集，并生成保留重要语句和关键字中的事实细节的摘要。然而，这样的子集可能会丢失标识符或实体命名，因此生成的摘要的自然度通常很差。抽象方法可以利用神经机器翻译领域的编码器-解码器模型生成类似人类编写的摘要。然而，生成的摘要常常会遗漏重要的事实细节。为了生成保留事实细节的类似人类书写的摘要，我们提出了一种新颖的提取和抽象框架。框架中的提取模块执行提取代码摘要的任务，该任务接收代码片段并预测包含关键事实细节的重要语句。框架中的抽象模块执行抽象代码摘要的任务，它并行接收整个代码片段和重要语句，并生成简洁的、类似人类书写的自然语言摘要。我们通过对涉及六种编程语言的三个数据集进行广泛的实验来评估我们的技术（称为 EACS）的有效性。实验结果表明，EACS 在所有三种广泛使用的指标（包括 BLEU、METEOR 和 ROUGH-L）方面均显着优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合抽取式与生成式的框架EACS，用于生成更准确且自然的源代码摘要。
AI.motivation: 现有抽取式方法生成的摘要缺乏自然性，生成式方法则可能丢失关键事实细节，需融合两者优势以提升摘要质量。
AI.method: 设计EACS框架，包含抽取模块（识别关键语句）与生成模块（结合完整代码与关键语句生成摘要），并行处理以保留事实细节与自然语言表达。
AI.result: 在三个编程语言数据集上，EACS在BLEU、METEOR和ROUGH-L指标上均显著优于现有最佳方法。
AI.conclusion: EACS框架有效结合抽取与生成技术，在代码摘要任务中实现了事实准确性与语言自然性的平衡。

authors_text: Sayna Ebrahimi,Sercan O. Arik,Tomas Pfister
title: Test-Time Adaptation for Visual Document Understanding
title_zh: 视觉文档理解的测试时适应
abstract: For visual document understanding (VDU), self-supervised pretraining has been shown to successfully generate transferable representations, yet, effective adaptation of such representations to distribution shifts at test-time remains to be an unexplored area. We propose DocTTA, a novel test-time adaptation method for documents, that does source-free domain adaptation using unlabeled target document data. DocTTA leverages cross-modality self-supervised learning via masked visual language modeling, as well as pseudo labeling to adapt models learned on a \textit{source} domain to an unlabeled \textit{target} domain at test time. We introduce new benchmarks using existing public datasets for various VDU tasks, including entity recognition, key-value extraction, and document visual question answering. DocTTA shows significant improvements on these compared to the source model performance, up to 1.89\% in (F1 score), 3.43\% (F1 score), and 17.68\% (ANLS score), respectively. Our benchmark datasets are available at \url{https://saynaebrahimi.github.io/DocTTA.html}.
summary: For visual document understanding (VDU), self-supervised pretraining has been shown to successfully generate transferable representations, yet, effective adaptation of such representations to distribution shifts at test-time remains to be an unexplored area. We propose DocTTA, a novel test-time adaptation method for documents, that does source-free domain adaptation using unlabeled target document data. DocTTA leverages cross-modality self-supervised learning via masked visual language modeling, as well as pseudo labeling to adapt models learned on a \textit{source} domain to an unlabeled \textit{target} domain at test time. We introduce new benchmarks using existing public datasets for various VDU tasks, including entity recognition, key-value extraction, and document visual question answering. DocTTA shows significant improvements on these compared to the source model performance, up to 1.89\% in (F1 score), 3.43\% (F1 score), and 17.68\% (ANLS score), respectively. Our benchmark datasets are available at \url{https://saynaebrahimi.github.io/DocTTA.html}.
abstract_zh: 对于视觉文档理解（VDU），自监督预训练已被证明可以成功生成可转移的表示，然而，在测试时使此类表示有效适应分布变化仍然是一个尚未探索的领域。我们提出了 DocTTA，一种新颖的文档测试时适应方法，它使用未标记的目标文档数据进行无源域适应。 DocTTA 通过屏蔽视觉语言建模以及伪标记来利用跨模态自我监督学习，以在测试时将 \textit{source} 域上学习的模型调整为未标记的 \textit{target} 域。我们使用现有公共数据集为各种 VDU 任务引入新的基准，包括实体识别、键值提取和文档视觉问答。与源模型性能相比，DocTTA 在这些方面表现出显着改进，（F1 分数）、3.43\%（F1 分数）和 17.68\%（ANLS 分数）分别提高了 1.89\%。我们的基准数据集可在 \url{https://saynaebrahimi.github.io/DocTTA.html} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DocTTA的测试时自适应方法，用于在无标签目标文档数据下进行视觉文档理解的领域自适应。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督预训练在视觉文档理解中表现良好，但如何在测试时有效适应分布偏移仍是一个未被探索的问题。
AI.method: DocTTA通过跨模态自监督学习（掩码视觉语言建模）和伪标签技术，在无源域数据的情况下实现目标域的模型自适应。
AI.result: 在实体识别、键值提取和文档视觉问答任务中，DocTTA分别提升了1.89%（F1）、3.43%（F1）和17.68%（ANLS）的性能。
AI.conclusion: DocTTA有效解决了测试时领域自适应问题，并提供了新的基准数据集以支持未来研究。

search_text: Test-Time Adaptation for Visual Document Understanding 视觉文档理解的测试时适应 For visual document understanding (VDU), self-supervised pretraining has been shown to successfully generate transferable representations, yet, effective adaptation of such representations to distribution shifts at test-time remains to be an unexplored area. We propose DocTTA, a novel test-time adaptation method for documents, that does source-free domain adaptation using unlabeled target document data. DocTTA leverages cross-modality self-supervised learning via masked visual language modeling, as well as pseudo labeling to adapt models learned on a \textit{source} domain to an unlabeled \textit{target} domain at test time. We introduce new benchmarks using existing public datasets for various VDU tasks, including entity recognition, key-value extraction, and document visual question answering. DocTTA shows significant improvements on these compared to the source model performance, up to 1.89\% in (F1 score), 3.43\% (F1 score), and 17.68\% (ANLS score), respectively. Our benchmark datasets are available at \url{https://saynaebrahimi.github.io/DocTTA.html}. 对于视觉文档理解（VDU），自监督预训练已被证明可以成功生成可转移的表示，然而，在测试时使此类表示有效适应分布变化仍然是一个尚未探索的领域。我们提出了 DocTTA，一种新颖的文档测试时适应方法，它使用未标记的目标文档数据进行无源域适应。 DocTTA 通过屏蔽视觉语言建模以及伪标记来利用跨模态自我监督学习，以在测试时将 \textit{source} 域上学习的模型调整为未标记的 \textit{target} 域。我们使用现有公共数据集为各种 VDU 任务引入新的基准，包括实体识别、键值提取和文档视觉问答。与源模型性能相比，DocTTA 在这些方面表现出显着改进，（F1 分数）、3.43\%（F1 分数）和 17.68\%（ANLS 分数）分别提高了 1.89\%。我们的基准数据集可在 \url{https://saynaebrahimi.github.io/DocTTA.html} 获取。 本文提出了一种名为DocTTA的测试时自适应方法，用于在无标签目标文档数据下进行视觉文档理解的领域自适应。 Sayna Ebrahimi,Sercan O. Arik,Tomas Pfister cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Ting-Han Fan,Ta-Chung Chi,Alexander I. Rudnicky,Peter J. Ramadge
title: Training Discrete Deep Generative Models via Gapped Straight-Through Estimator
title_zh: 通过间隙直通估计器训练离散深度生成模型
comment: Accepted at the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2022. The first two authors contributed equally
comments: Accepted at the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2022. The first two authors contributed equally
abstract: While deep generative models have succeeded in image processing, natural language processing, and reinforcement learning, training that involves discrete random variables remains challenging due to the high variance of its gradient estimation process. Monte Carlo is a common solution used in most variance reduction approaches. However, this involves time-consuming resampling and multiple function evaluations. We propose a Gapped Straight-Through (GST) estimator to reduce the variance without incurring resampling overhead. This estimator is inspired by the essential properties of Straight-Through Gumbel-Softmax. We determine these properties and show via an ablation study that they are essential. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed GST estimator enjoys better performance compared to strong baselines on two discrete deep generative modeling tasks, MNIST-VAE and ListOps.
summary: While deep generative models have succeeded in image processing, natural language processing, and reinforcement learning, training that involves discrete random variables remains challenging due to the high variance of its gradient estimation process. Monte Carlo is a common solution used in most variance reduction approaches. However, this involves time-consuming resampling and multiple function evaluations. We propose a Gapped Straight-Through (GST) estimator to reduce the variance without incurring resampling overhead. This estimator is inspired by the essential properties of Straight-Through Gumbel-Softmax. We determine these properties and show via an ablation study that they are essential. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed GST estimator enjoys better performance compared to strong baselines on two discrete deep generative modeling tasks, MNIST-VAE and ListOps.
abstract_zh: 虽然深度生成模型在图像处理、自然语言处理和强化学习方面取得了成功，但由于其梯度估计过程的高方差，涉及离散随机变量的训练仍然具有挑战性。蒙特卡罗是大多数方差减少方法中使用的常见解决方案。然而，这涉及耗时的重采样和多重函数评估。我们提出了一个间隙直通（GST）估计器来减少方差，而不会产生重采样开销。该估计器的灵感来自于直通 Gumbel-Softmax 的基本属性。我们确定这些特性，并通过消融研究表明它们是必不可少的。实验表明，与两个离散深度生成建模任务（MNIST-VAE 和 ListOps）的强基线相比，所提出的 GST 估计器具有更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为间隔直通估计器（GST）的方法，用于降低离散深度生成模型训练中的梯度估计方差。
AI.motivation: 离散随机变量的梯度估计存在高方差问题，传统蒙特卡洛方法虽能降低方差但计算成本高，需耗时重采样和多次函数评估。
AI.method: 设计GST估计器，借鉴直通Gumbel-Softmax的核心特性，并通过消融实验证明其关键性质的有效性。
AI.result: GST在MNIST-VAE和ListOps任务中均优于现有先进方法，验证了其性能优势。
AI.conclusion: GST成功平衡了方差降低与计算效率，为离散深度生成模型训练提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Justin Whitehouse,Zhiwei Steven Wu,Aaditya Ramdas,Ryan Rogers
title: Brownian Noise Reduction: Maximizing Privacy Subject to Accuracy Constraints
title_zh: 布朗降噪：在精度约束下最大化隐私
abstract: There is a disconnect between how researchers and practitioners handle privacy-utility tradeoffs. Researchers primarily operate from a privacy first perspective, setting strict privacy requirements and minimizing risk subject to these constraints. Practitioners often desire an accuracy first perspective, possibly satisfied with the greatest privacy they can get subject to obtaining sufficiently small error. Ligett et al. have introduced a "noise reduction" algorithm to address the latter perspective. The authors show that by adding correlated Laplace noise and progressively reducing it on demand, it is possible to produce a sequence of increasingly accurate estimates of a private parameter while only paying a privacy cost for the least noisy iterate released. In this work, we generalize noise reduction to the setting of Gaussian noise, introducing the Brownian mechanism. The Brownian mechanism works by first adding Gaussian noise of high variance corresponding to the final point of a simulated Brownian motion. Then, at the practitioner's discretion, noise is gradually decreased by tracing back along the Brownian path to an earlier time. Our mechanism is more naturally applicable to the common setting of bounded $\ell_2$-sensitivity, empirically outperforms existing work on common statistical tasks, and provides customizable control of privacy loss over the entire interaction with the practitioner. We complement our Brownian mechanism with ReducedAboveThreshold, a generalization of the classical AboveThreshold algorithm that provides adaptive privacy guarantees. Overall, our results demonstrate that one can meet utility constraints while still maintaining strong levels of privacy.
summary: There is a disconnect between how researchers and practitioners handle privacy-utility tradeoffs. Researchers primarily operate from a privacy first perspective, setting strict privacy requirements and minimizing risk subject to these constraints. Practitioners often desire an accuracy first perspective, possibly satisfied with the greatest privacy they can get subject to obtaining sufficiently small error. Ligett et al. have introduced a "noise reduction" algorithm to address the latter perspective. The authors show that by adding correlated Laplace noise and progressively reducing it on demand, it is possible to produce a sequence of increasingly accurate estimates of a private parameter while only paying a privacy cost for the least noisy iterate released. In this work, we generalize noise reduction to the setting of Gaussian noise, introducing the Brownian mechanism. The Brownian mechanism works by first adding Gaussian noise of high variance corresponding to the final point of a simulated Brownian motion. Then, at the practitioner's discretion, noise is gradually decreased by tracing back along the Brownian path to an earlier time. Our mechanism is more naturally applicable to the common setting of bounded $\ell_2$-sensitivity, empirically outperforms existing work on common statistical tasks, and provides customizable control of privacy loss over the entire interaction with the practitioner. We complement our Brownian mechanism with ReducedAboveThreshold, a generalization of the classical AboveThreshold algorithm that provides adaptive privacy guarantees. Overall, our results demonstrate that one can meet utility constraints while still maintaining strong levels of privacy.
abstract_zh: 研究人员和从业者如何处理隐私与效用之间存在脱节。研究人员主要从隐私第一的角度出发，制定严格的隐私要求，并最大限度地降低这些限制下的风险。从业者通常希望获得准确性第一的视角，可能满足于在获得足够小的误差的情况下获得最大的隐私。利吉特等人。引入了“降噪”算法来解决后一种观点。作者表明，通过添加相关的拉普拉斯噪声并根据需要逐步减少它，可以产生一系列越来越准确的私有参数估计，同时只需为发布的噪声最小的迭代支付隐私成本。在这项工作中，我们将降噪推广到高斯噪声的设置，引入了布朗机制。布朗机制的工作原理是首先添加与模拟布朗运动的最终点相对应的高方差高斯噪声。然后，根据从业者的判断，通过沿着布朗路径追溯到更早的时间，噪声逐渐减少。我们的机制更自然地适用于有界 $\ell_2$ 敏感度的常见设置，在经验上优于常见统计任务的现有工作，并在与从业者的整个交互过程中提供对隐私丢失的可定制控制。我们用ReducedAboveThreshold 来补充我们的布朗机制，这是经典AboveThreshold 算法的推广，提供自适应隐私保证。总体而言，我们的结果表明，人们可以满足实用程序限制，同时仍保持较高的隐私水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Brownian机制的差分隐私方法，在满足准确性约束的前提下最大化隐私保护。
AI.motivation: 研究人员和实践者对隐私-效用权衡的处理方式存在分歧，现有噪声减少算法难以兼顾高斯噪声场景下的隐私控制与准确性需求。
AI.method: 通过模拟布朗运动路径添加高方差高斯噪声，允许按需沿路径回溯逐步降低噪声，并结合ReducedAboveThreshold算法实现自适应隐私保障。
AI.result: 在常见统计任务中表现优于现有方法，适用于有界ℓ₂敏感度场景，提供全流程可定制的隐私损失控制。
AI.conclusion: 布朗运动机制能够在满足实用性约束的同时维持强隐私保护，为隐私计算提供了更灵活的解决方案。

Overall, our results demonstrate that one can meet utility constraints while still maintaining strong levels of privacy. 研究人员和从业者如何处理隐私与效用之间存在脱节。研究人员主要从隐私第一的角度出发，制定严格的隐私要求，并最大限度地降低这些限制下的风险。从业者通常希望获得准确性第一的视角，可能满足于在获得足够小的误差的情况下获得最大的隐私。利吉特等人。引入了“降噪”算法来解决后一种观点。作者表明，通过添加相关的拉普拉斯噪声并根据需要逐步减少它，可以产生一系列越来越准确的私有参数估计，同时只需为发布的噪声最小的迭代支付隐私成本。在这项工作中，我们将降噪推广到高斯噪声的设置，引入了布朗机制。布朗机制的工作原理是首先添加与模拟布朗运动的最终点相对应的高方差高斯噪声。然后，根据从业者的判断，通过沿着布朗路径追溯到更早的时间，噪声逐渐减少。我们的机制更自然地适用于有界 $\ell_2$ 敏感度的常见设置，在经验上优于常见统计任务的现有工作，并在与从业者的整个交互过程中提供对隐私丢失的可定制控制。我们用ReducedAboveThreshold 来补充我们的布朗机制，这是经典AboveThreshold 算法的推广，提供自适应隐私保证。总体而言，我们的结果表明，人们可以满足实用程序限制，同时仍保持较高的隐私水平。 本文提出一种名为Brownian机制的差分隐私方法，在满足准确性约束的前提下最大化隐私保护。 Justin Whitehouse,Zhiwei Steven Wu,Aaditya Ramdas,Ryan Rogers cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.DS,stat.ML

authors_text: Gennaro Notomista
title: Resilience and Energy-Awareness in Constraint-Driven-Controlled Multi-Robot Systems
title_zh: 约束驱动控制的多机器人系统中的弹性和能量意识
abstract: In the context of constraint-driven control of multi-robot systems, in this paper, we propose an optimization-based framework that is able to ensure resilience and energy-awareness of teams of robots. The approach is based on a novel, frame-theoretic, measure of resilience which allows us to analyze and enforce resilient behaviors of multi-robot systems. The properties of resilience and energy-awareness are encoded as constraints of a convex optimization program which is used to synthesize the robot control inputs. This allows for the combination of such properties with the execution of coordinated tasks to achieve resilient and energy-aware robot operations. The effectiveness of the proposed method is illustrated in a simulated scenario where a team of robots is deployed to execute two tasks subject to energy and resilience constraints.
summary: In the context of constraint-driven control of multi-robot systems, in this paper, we propose an optimization-based framework that is able to ensure resilience and energy-awareness of teams of robots. The approach is based on a novel, frame-theoretic, measure of resilience which allows us to analyze and enforce resilient behaviors of multi-robot systems. The properties of resilience and energy-awareness are encoded as constraints of a convex optimization program which is used to synthesize the robot control inputs. This allows for the combination of such properties with the execution of coordinated tasks to achieve resilient and energy-aware robot operations. The effectiveness of the proposed method is illustrated in a simulated scenario where a team of robots is deployed to execute two tasks subject to energy and resilience constraints.
abstract_zh: 在多机器人系统的约束驱动控制的背景下，我们提出了一种基于优化的框架，能够确保机器人团队的弹性和能量意识。该方法基于一种新颖的框架理论弹性度量，使我们能够分析和实施多机器人系统的弹性行为。弹性和能量意识的属性被编码为用于合成机器人控制输入的凸优化程序的约束。这允许将这些属性与协调任务的执行相结合，以实现弹性和能量感知的机器人操作。该方法的有效性在模拟场景中得到了证明，其中部署了一组机器人来执行受能量和弹性约束的两项任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于优化的框架，用于在约束驱动控制的多机器人系统中实现弹性和能源意识。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时满足多机器人系统在复杂约束下的弹性需求与能源效率优化。
AI.method: 通过构建框架理论的弹性度量，将弹性和能源意识转化为凸优化问题的约束条件，合成机器人控制输入。
AI.result: 在模拟场景中验证了方法有效性，机器人团队能在满足能量和弹性约束的前提下完成协调任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功整合了任务协调与系统弹性、能源效率，为多机器人控制提供了新思路。
