authors_text: Runzhi He,Hao He,Yuxia Zhang,Minghui Zhou
title: Automating Dependency Updates in Practice: An Exploratory Study on GitHub Dependabot
title_zh: 实践中自动化依赖更新：GitHub Dependabot 的探索性研究
abstract: Dependency management bots automatically open pull requests to update software dependencies on behalf of developers. Early research shows that developers are suspicious of updates performed by dependency management bots and feel tired of overwhelming notifications from these bots. Despite this, dependency management bots are becoming increasingly popular. Such contrast motivates us to investigate Dependabot, currently the most visible bot on GitHub, to reveal the effectiveness and limitations of state-of-art dependency management bots. We use exploratory data analysis and a developer survey to evaluate the effectiveness of Dependabot in keeping dependencies up-to-date, interacting with developers, reducing update suspicion, and reducing notification fatigue. We obtain mixed findings. On the positive side, projects do reduce technical lag after Dependabot adoption and developers are highly receptive to its pull requests. On the negative side, its compatibility scores are too scarce to be effective in reducing update suspicion; developers tend to configure Dependabot toward reducing the number of notifications; and 11.3% of projects have deprecated Dependabot in favor of other alternatives. The survey confirms our findings and provides insights into the key missing features of Dependabot. Based on our findings, we derive and summarize the key characteristics of an ideal dependency management bot which can be grouped into four dimensions: configurability, autonomy, transparency, and self-adaptability.
summary: Dependency management bots automatically open pull requests to update software dependencies on behalf of developers. Early research shows that developers are suspicious of updates performed by dependency management bots and feel tired of overwhelming notifications from these bots. Despite this, dependency management bots are becoming increasingly popular. Such contrast motivates us to investigate Dependabot, currently the most visible bot on GitHub, to reveal the effectiveness and limitations of state-of-art dependency management bots. We use exploratory data analysis and a developer survey to evaluate the effectiveness of Dependabot in keeping dependencies up-to-date, interacting with developers, reducing update suspicion, and reducing notification fatigue. We obtain mixed findings. On the positive side, projects do reduce technical lag after Dependabot adoption and developers are highly receptive to its pull requests. On the negative side, its compatibility scores are too scarce to be effective in reducing update suspicion; developers tend to configure Dependabot toward reducing the number of notifications; and 11.3% of projects have deprecated Dependabot in favor of other alternatives. The survey confirms our findings and provides insights into the key missing features of Dependabot. Based on our findings, we derive and summarize the key characteristics of an ideal dependency management bot which can be grouped into four dimensions: configurability, autonomy, transparency, and self-adaptability.
abstract_zh: 依赖关系管理机器人会自动打开拉取请求以代表开发人员更新软件依赖关系。早期研究表明，开发人员对依赖管理机器人执行的更新持怀疑态度，并对来自这些机器人的大量通知感到厌倦。尽管如此，依赖管理机器人正变得越来越流行。这种对比促使我们研究 Dependabot（目前 GitHub 上最引人注目的机器人），以揭示最先进的依赖管理机器人的有效性和局限性。我们使用探索性数据分析和开发人员调查来评估 Dependabot 在保持依赖项最新、与开发人员交互、减少更新怀疑和减少通知疲劳方面的有效性。我们得到的结果好坏参半。从积极的一面来看，项目确实减少了采用 Dependabot 后的技术滞后，并且开发人员非常容易接受其拉取请求。不利的一面是，它的兼容性分数太少，无法有效减少更新怀疑；开发人员倾向于配置 Dependabot 以减少通知数量； 11.3% 的项目已弃用 Dependabot，转而选择其他替代方案。该调查证实了我们的发现，并提供了对 Dependabot 缺失的关键功能的见解。根据我们的研究结果，我们推导出并总结了理想的依赖管理机器人的关键特征，这些特征可以分为四个维度：可配置性、自主性、透明度和自适应性。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了GitHub上Dependabot依赖管理机器人的实际效果与局限性，通过数据分析和开发者调查评估其更新依赖项、减少通知疲劳等方面的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管依赖管理机器人日益流行，但开发者对其更新效果和通知机制存在疑虑，需研究其实际效能与改进方向。
AI.method: 采用探索性数据分析和开发者问卷调查，评估Dependabot在更新依赖、开发者互动、减少更新疑虑及通知疲劳方面的表现。
AI.result: Dependabot采用后项目技术滞后减少且开发者接受其PR，但兼容性评分不足、开发者倾向减少通知频率，11.3%项目已弃用Dependabot。
AI.conclusion: 理想依赖管理机器人需具备可配置性、自主性、透明性和自适应性，以解决现有工具的不足。

authors_text: Rui Liu,Berrak Sisman,Björn Schuller,Guanglai Gao,Haizhou Li
title: Accurate Emotion Strength Assessment for Seen and Unseen Speech Based on Data-Driven Deep Learning
title_zh: 基于数据驱动的深度学习对看见和看不见的语音进行准确的情绪强度评估
comment: To appear in INTERSPEECH 2022. 5 pages, 4 figures. Substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.03156
comments: To appear in INTERSPEECH 2022. 5 pages, 4 figures. Substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.03156
abstract: Emotion classification of speech and assessment of the emotion strength are required in applications such as emotional text-to-speech and voice conversion. The emotion attribute ranking function based on Support Vector Machine (SVM) was proposed to predict emotion strength for emotional speech corpus. However, the trained ranking function doesn't generalize to new domains, which limits the scope of applications, especially for out-of-domain or unseen speech. In this paper, we propose a data-driven deep learning model, i.e. StrengthNet, to improve the generalization of emotion strength assessment for seen and unseen speech. This is achieved by the fusion of emotional data from various domains. We follow a multi-task learning network architecture that includes an acoustic encoder, a strength predictor, and an auxiliary emotion predictor. Experiments show that the predicted emotion strength of the proposed StrengthNet is highly correlated with ground truth scores for both seen and unseen speech. We release the source codes at: https://github.com/ttslr/StrengthNet.
summary: Emotion classification of speech and assessment of the emotion strength are required in applications such as emotional text-to-speech and voice conversion. The emotion attribute ranking function based on Support Vector Machine (SVM) was proposed to predict emotion strength for emotional speech corpus. However, the trained ranking function doesn't generalize to new domains, which limits the scope of applications, especially for out-of-domain or unseen speech. In this paper, we propose a data-driven deep learning model, i.e. StrengthNet, to improve the generalization of emotion strength assessment for seen and unseen speech. This is achieved by the fusion of emotional data from various domains. We follow a multi-task learning network architecture that includes an acoustic encoder, a strength predictor, and an auxiliary emotion predictor. Experiments show that the predicted emotion strength of the proposed StrengthNet is highly correlated with ground truth scores for both seen and unseen speech. We release the source codes at: https://github.com/ttslr/StrengthNet.
abstract_zh: 在情感文本到语音和语音转换等应用中需要对语音进行情感分类和评估情感强度。提出基于支持向量机(SVM)的情感属性排序函数来预测情感语音语料库的情感强度。然而，经过训练的排名函数并不能推广到新的领域，这限制了应用范围，特别是对于域外或看不见的语音。在本文中，我们提出了一种数据驱动的深度学习模型，即 StrengthNet，以提高对已见和未见语音的情绪强度评估的泛化性。这是通过融合来自各个领域的情感数据来实现的。我们遵循多任务学习网络架构，其中包括声学编码器、强度预测器和辅助情绪预测器。实验表明，所提出的 StrengthNet 的预测情感强度与已见和未见语音的地面真实分数高度相关。我们在以下位置发布源代码：https://github.com/ttslr/StrengthNet。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种数据驱动的深度学习模型StrengthNet，用于提升已见和未见语音情感强度评估的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统基于SVM的情感强度排序方法难以泛化到新领域或未见语音，限制了实际应用范围。
AI.method: 构建多任务学习框架StrengthNet，融合多领域情感数据，包含声学编码器、强度预测器和辅助情感预测器。
AI.result: 实验表明StrengthNet在已见和未见语音的情感强度预测与真实评分高度相关，且开源了代码实现。
AI.conclusion: StrengthNet通过多任务学习有效提升了情感强度评估的泛化能力，为跨领域语音情感分析提供了可行方案。

search_text: Accurate Emotion Strength Assessment for Seen and Unseen Speech Based on Data-Driven Deep Learning 基于数据驱动的深度学习对看见和看不见的语音进行准确的情绪强度评估 Emotion classification of speech and assessment of the emotion strength are required in applications such as emotional text-to-speech and voice conversion. The emotion attribute ranking function based on Support Vector Machine (SVM) was proposed to predict emotion strength for emotional speech corpus. However, the trained ranking function doesn't generalize to new domains, which limits the scope of applications, especially for out-of-domain or unseen speech. In this paper, we propose a data-driven deep learning model, i.e. StrengthNet, to improve the generalization of emotion strength assessment for seen and unseen speech. This is achieved by the fusion of emotional data from various domains. We follow a multi-task learning network architecture that includes an acoustic encoder, a strength predictor, and an auxiliary emotion predictor. Experiments show that the predicted emotion strength of the proposed StrengthNet is highly correlated with ground truth scores for both seen and unseen speech. We release the source codes at: https://github.com/ttslr/StrengthNet. 在情感文本到语音和语音转换等应用中需要对语音进行情感分类和评估情感强度。提出基于支持向量机(SVM)的情感属性排序函数来预测情感语音语料库的情感强度。然而，经过训练的排名函数并不能推广到新的领域，这限制了应用范围，特别是对于域外或看不见的语音。在本文中，我们提出了一种数据驱动的深度学习模型，即 StrengthNet，以提高对已见和未见语音的情绪强度评估的泛化性。这是通过融合来自各个领域的情感数据来实现的。我们遵循多任务学习网络架构，其中包括声学编码器、强度预测器和辅助情绪预测器。实验表明，所提出的 StrengthNet 的预测情感强度与已见和未见语音的地面真实分数高度相关。我们在以下位置发布源代码：https://github.com/ttslr/StrengthNet。 本文提出一种数据驱动的深度学习模型StrengthNet，用于提升已见和未见语音情感强度评估的泛化能力。 Rui Liu,Berrak Sisman,Björn Schuller,Guanglai Gao,Haizhou Li cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Pranav Atreya,Joydeep Biswas
title: State Supervised Steering Function for Sampling-based Kinodynamic Planning
title_zh: 基于采样的运动动力学规划的状态监督转向函数
comment: 11 pages, 7 figures. In Proceedings of AAMAS 2022
comments: 11 pages, 7 figures. In Proceedings of AAMAS 2022
abstract: Sampling-based motion planners such as RRT* and BIT*, when applied to kinodynamic motion planning, rely on steering functions to generate time-optimal solutions connecting sampled states. Implementing exact steering functions requires either analytical solutions to the time-optimal control problem, or nonlinear programming (NLP) solvers to solve the boundary value problem given the system's kinodynamic equations. Unfortunately, analytical solutions are unavailable for many real-world domains, and NLP solvers are prohibitively computationally expensive, hence fast and optimal kinodynamic motion planning remains an open problem. We provide a solution to this problem by introducing State Supervised Steering Function (S3F), a novel approach to learn time-optimal steering functions. S3F is able to produce near-optimal solutions to the steering function orders of magnitude faster than its NLP counterpart. Experiments conducted on three challenging robot domains show that RRT* using S3F significantly outperforms state-of-the-art planning approaches on both solution cost and runtime. We further provide a proof of probabilistic completeness of RRT* modified to use S3F.
summary: Sampling-based motion planners such as RRT* and BIT*, when applied to kinodynamic motion planning, rely on steering functions to generate time-optimal solutions connecting sampled states. Implementing exact steering functions requires either analytical solutions to the time-optimal control problem, or nonlinear programming (NLP) solvers to solve the boundary value problem given the system's kinodynamic equations. Unfortunately, analytical solutions are unavailable for many real-world domains, and NLP solvers are prohibitively computationally expensive, hence fast and optimal kinodynamic motion planning remains an open problem. We provide a solution to this problem by introducing State Supervised Steering Function (S3F), a novel approach to learn time-optimal steering functions. S3F is able to produce near-optimal solutions to the steering function orders of magnitude faster than its NLP counterpart. Experiments conducted on three challenging robot domains show that RRT* using S3F significantly outperforms state-of-the-art planning approaches on both solution cost and runtime. We further provide a proof of probabilistic completeness of RRT* modified to use S3F.
abstract_zh: 基于采样的运动规划器（例如 RRT* 和 BIT*）在应用于运动动力学运动规划时，依靠转向函数来生成连接采样状态的时间最优解决方案。实现精确的转向功能需要时间最优控制问题的解析解，或者非线性编程 (NLP) 求解器来求解给定系统运动动力学方程的边值问题。不幸的是，分析解决方案不适用于许多现实世界领域，并且 NLP 求解器的计算成本过高，因此快速且最优的运动动力学运动规划仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。我们通过引入状态监督转向函数（S3F）来解决这个问题，这是一种学习时间最优转向函数的新方法。 S3F 能够比 NLP 对应物更快地生成接近最优的转向函数解决方案。在三个具有挑战性的机器人领域进行的实验表明，使用 S3F 的 RRT* 在解决方案成本和运行时间方面均显着优于最先进的规划方法。我们进一步提供了修改为使用 S3F 的 RRT* 的概率完整性证明。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于状态监督的转向函数（S3F），用于解决采样型运动规划中时间最优解生成的计算效率与最优性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖解析解或非线性规划求解器计算转向函数，但解析解在复杂领域不可行，而NLP求解器计算成本过高，导致实时性差。
AI.method: 设计S3F通过监督学习直接学习时间最优转向函数，替代传统解析或NLP方法，显著提升计算速度。
AI.result: 实验表明，结合S3F的RRT*在三个机器人任务中，相较现有方法在解的质量和运行时间上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: S3F有效平衡了运动规划的计算效率与最优性，并证明了改进后RRT*的概率完备性。

authors_text: Chang Gao,Shu-Fu Shih,J. Paul Finn,Xiaodong Zhong
title: A Projection-Based K-space Transformer Network for Undersampled Radial MRI Reconstruction with Limited Training Subjects
title_zh: 基于投影的 K 空间变压器网络，用于训练对象有限的欠采样径向 MRI 重建
abstract: The recent development of deep learning combined with compressed sensing enables fast reconstruction of undersampled MR images and has achieved state-of-the-art performance for Cartesian k-space trajectories. However, non-Cartesian trajectories such as the radial trajectory need to be transformed onto a Cartesian grid in each iteration of the network training, slowing down the training process and posing inconvenience and delay during training. Multiple iterations of nonuniform Fourier transform in the networks offset the deep learning advantage of fast inference. Current approaches typically either work on image-to-image networks or grid the non-Cartesian trajectories before the network training to avoid the repeated gridding process. However, the image-to-image networks cannot ensure the k-space data consistency in the reconstructed images and the pre-processing of non-Cartesian k-space leads to gridding errors which cannot be compensated by the network training. Inspired by the Transformer network to handle long-range dependencies in sequence transduction tasks, we propose to rearrange the radial spokes to sequential data based on the chronological order of acquisition and use the Transformer to predict unacquired radial spokes from acquired ones. We propose novel data augmentation methods to generate a large amount of training data from a limited number of subjects. The network can be generated to different anatomical structures. Experimental results show superior performance of the proposed framework compared to state-of-the-art deep neural networks.
summary: The recent development of deep learning combined with compressed sensing enables fast reconstruction of undersampled MR images and has achieved state-of-the-art performance for Cartesian k-space trajectories. However, non-Cartesian trajectories such as the radial trajectory need to be transformed onto a Cartesian grid in each iteration of the network training, slowing down the training process and posing inconvenience and delay during training. Multiple iterations of nonuniform Fourier transform in the networks offset the deep learning advantage of fast inference. Current approaches typically either work on image-to-image networks or grid the non-Cartesian trajectories before the network training to avoid the repeated gridding process. However, the image-to-image networks cannot ensure the k-space data consistency in the reconstructed images and the pre-processing of non-Cartesian k-space leads to gridding errors which cannot be compensated by the network training. Inspired by the Transformer network to handle long-range dependencies in sequence transduction tasks, we propose to rearrange the radial spokes to sequential data based on the chronological order of acquisition and use the Transformer to predict unacquired radial spokes from acquired ones. We propose novel data augmentation methods to generate a large amount of training data from a limited number of subjects. The network can be generated to different anatomical structures. Experimental results show superior performance of the proposed framework compared to state-of-the-art deep neural networks.
abstract_zh: 深度学习与压缩感知相结合的最新发展能够快速重建欠采样 MR 图像，并在笛卡尔 k 空间轨迹方面实现了最先进的性能。然而，在网络训练的每次迭代中，径向轨迹等非笛卡尔轨迹都需要转换为笛卡尔网格，减慢了训练过程，给训练带来不便和延迟。网络中非均匀傅里叶变换的多次迭代抵消了深度学习快速推理的优势。当前的方法通常要么在图像到图像网络上工作，要么在网络训练之前对非笛卡尔轨迹进行网格化，以避免重复的网格化过程。然而，图像到图像网络无法确保重建图像中k空间数据的一致性，并且非笛卡尔k空间的预处理导致网格化误差无法通过网络训练来补偿。受 Transformer 网络处理序列转换任务中的远程依赖性的启发，我们建议根据采集的时间顺序将径向辐条重新排列为顺序数据，并使用 Transformer 从已采集的径向辐条预测未采集的径向辐条。我们提出了新颖的数据增强方法，从有限数量的受试者中生成大量训练数据。该网络可以生成不同的解剖结构。实验结果表明，与最先进的深度神经网络相比，所提出的框架具有优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于投影的K空间Transformer网络，用于在有限训练样本下重建欠采样径向MRI图像。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在处理非笛卡尔径向轨迹时需反复进行网格化操作，导致训练效率低下且引入网格误差，同时图像到图像网络无法保证K空间数据一致性。
AI.method: 将径向轨迹按采集时序转化为序列数据，利用Transformer预测缺失的径向径线；设计新型数据增强方法从少量样本生成大量训练数据。
AI.result: 实验表明该框架在重建性能上优于现有深度神经网络方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了非笛卡尔轨迹重建中的网格化问题和数据一致性难题，在有限训练样本下实现了更优的MRI重建效果。

result: 实验表明该框架在重建性能上优于现有深度神经网络方法。
conclusion: 该方法有效解决了非笛卡尔轨迹重建中的网格化问题和数据一致性难题，在有限训练样本下实现了更优的MRI重建效果。
search_text: A Projection-Based K-space Transformer Network for Undersampled Radial MRI Reconstruction with Limited Training Subjects 基于投影的 K 空间变压器网络，用于训练对象有限的欠采样径向 MRI 重建 The recent development of deep learning combined with compressed sensing enables fast reconstruction of undersampled MR images and has achieved state-of-the-art performance for Cartesian k-space trajectories. However, non-Cartesian trajectories such as the radial trajectory need to be transformed onto a Cartesian grid in each iteration of the network training, slowing down the training process and posing inconvenience and delay during training. Multiple iterations of nonuniform Fourier transform in the networks offset the deep learning advantage of fast inference. Current approaches typically either work on image-to-image networks or grid the non-Cartesian trajectories before the network training to avoid the repeated gridding process. However, the image-to-image networks cannot ensure the k-space data consistency in the reconstructed images and the pre-processing of non-Cartesian k-space leads to gridding errors which cannot be compensated by the network training. Inspired by the Transformer network to handle long-range dependencies in sequence transduction tasks, we propose to rearrange the radial spokes to sequential data based on the chronological order of acquisition and use the Transformer to predict unacquired radial spokes from acquired ones. We propose novel data augmentation methods to generate a large amount of training data from a limited number of subjects. The network can be generated to different anatomical structures. Experimental results show superior performance of the proposed framework compared to state-of-the-art deep neural networks. 深度学习与压缩感知相结合的最新发展能够快速重建欠采样 MR 图像，并在笛卡尔 k 空间轨迹方面实现了最先进的性能。然而，在网络训练的每次迭代中，径向轨迹等非笛卡尔轨迹都需要转换为笛卡尔网格，减慢了训练过程，给训练带来不便和延迟。网络中非均匀傅里叶变换的多次迭代抵消了深度学习快速推理的优势。当前的方法通常要么在图像到图像网络上工作，要么在网络训练之前对非笛卡尔轨迹进行网格化，以避免重复的网格化过程。然而，图像到图像网络无法确保重建图像中k空间数据的一致性，并且非笛卡尔k空间的预处理导致网格化误差无法通过网络训练来补偿。受 Transformer 网络处理序列转换任务中的远程依赖性的启发，我们建议根据采集的时间顺序将径向辐条重新排列为顺序数据，并使用 Transformer 从已采集的径向辐条预测未采集的径向辐条。我们提出了新颖的数据增强方法，从有限数量的受试者中生成大量训练数据。该网络可以生成不同的解剖结构。实验结果表明，与最先进的深度神经网络相比，所提出的框架具有优越的性能。 本文提出一种基于投影的K空间Transformer网络，用于在有限训练样本下重建欠采样径向MRI图像。 Chang Gao,Shu-Fu Shih,J. Paul Finn,Xiaodong Zhong eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Shuhao Zheng,Junliang Luo,Erqun Dong,Can Chen,Xue Liu
title: SPENDER: A Platform for Secure and Privacy-Preserving Decentralized P2P E-Commerce
title_zh: SPENDER：安全且保护隐私的去中心化 P2P 电子商务平台
abstract: The blockchain technology empowers secure, trustless, and privacy-preserving trading with cryptocurrencies. However, existing blockchain-based trading platforms only support trading cryptocurrencies with digital assets (e.g., NFTs). Although several payment service providers have started to accept cryptocurrency as a payment method for tangible goods (e.g., Visa, PayPal), customers still need to trust and hand over their private information to centralized E-commerce platforms (e.g., Amazon, eBay). To enable trustless and privacy-preserving trading between cryptocurrencies and real goods, we propose SPENDER, a smart-contract-based platform for Secure and Privacy-PresErviNg Decentralized P2P E-commeRce. The design of our platform enables various advantageous features and brings unlimited future potential. Moreover, our platform provides a complete paradigm for designing real-world Web3 infrastructures on the blockchain, which broadens the application scope and exploits the intrinsic values of cryptocurrencies. The platform has been built and tested on the Terra ecosystem, and we plan to open-source the code later.
summary: The blockchain technology empowers secure, trustless, and privacy-preserving trading with cryptocurrencies. However, existing blockchain-based trading platforms only support trading cryptocurrencies with digital assets (e.g., NFTs). Although several payment service providers have started to accept cryptocurrency as a payment method for tangible goods (e.g., Visa, PayPal), customers still need to trust and hand over their private information to centralized E-commerce platforms (e.g., Amazon, eBay). To enable trustless and privacy-preserving trading between cryptocurrencies and real goods, we propose SPENDER, a smart-contract-based platform for Secure and Privacy-PresErviNg Decentralized P2P E-commeRce. The design of our platform enables various advantageous features and brings unlimited future potential. Moreover, our platform provides a complete paradigm for designing real-world Web3 infrastructures on the blockchain, which broadens the application scope and exploits the intrinsic values of cryptocurrencies. The platform has been built and tested on the Terra ecosystem, and we plan to open-source the code later.
abstract_zh: 区块链技术支持安全、无需信任且保护隐私的加密货币交易。然而，现有的基于区块链的交易平台仅支持用数字资产（例如NFT）交易加密货币。尽管一些支付服务提供商已经开始接受加密货币作为有形商品的支付方式（例如 Visa、PayPal），但客户仍然需要信任并将其私人信息移交给集中式电子商务平台（例如 Amazon、eBay）。为了实现加密货币和实物之间的去信任和隐私保护交易，我们提出了 SPENDER，一个基于智能合约的平台，用于安全和隐私保护的去中心化 P2P 电子商务。我们平台的设计实现了各种优势功能，并带来无限的未来潜力。此外，我们的平台为在区块链上设计现实世界的 Web3 基础设施提供了完整的范例，从而扩大了应用范围并挖掘了加密货币的内在价值。该平台已经在Terra生态系统上构建和测试，我们计划稍后开源代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SPENDER平台，旨在实现加密货币与实物商品间安全、隐私保护的去中心化P2P电子商务。
AI.motivation: 现有区块链平台仅支持加密货币与数字资产交易，而用户购买实物商品仍需依赖中心化平台，导致隐私泄露与信任问题。
AI.method: 基于智能合约技术构建SPENDER平台，并在Terra生态系统中进行实现与测试。
AI.result: 成功构建并验证了平台可行性，计划后续开源代码以推动实际应用。
AI.conclusion: SPENDER为Web3基础设施提供了完整范例，拓展了加密货币在现实场景中的应用价值与潜力。

authors_text: Henry K. Dambanemuya,Eunseo Choi,Darren Gergle,Emőke-Ágnes Horvát
title: Beyond Words: An Experimental Study of Signaling in Crowdfunding
title_zh: 超越言语：众筹信号的实验研究
abstract: Increasingly, crowdfunding is transforming financing for many people worldwide. Yet we know relatively little about how, why, and when funding outcomes are impacted by signaling between funders. We conduct two studies of N=500 and N=750 participants involved in crowdfunding to investigate the effect of certain characteristics of ``crowd signals'' on the decision to fund. We find that, under a variety of conditions, contributions of heterogeneous amounts arriving at varying time intervals are significantly more likely to be selected than homogeneous contribution amounts and times. The impact of signaling is strongest among participants who are susceptible to social influence. The effect is remarkably general across different project types, fundraising goals, participant interest in the projects, and participants' altruistic attitudes. Critically, the role of crowd signals in decision-making is typically unrecognized by participants. Our results underscore the fundamental nature of social signaling in crowdfunding, informing strategies for platforms, funders, and project creators.
summary: Increasingly, crowdfunding is transforming financing for many people worldwide. Yet we know relatively little about how, why, and when funding outcomes are impacted by signaling between funders. We conduct two studies of N=500 and N=750 participants involved in crowdfunding to investigate the effect of certain characteristics of ``crowd signals'' on the decision to fund. We find that, under a variety of conditions, contributions of heterogeneous amounts arriving at varying time intervals are significantly more likely to be selected than homogeneous contribution amounts and times. The impact of signaling is strongest among participants who are susceptible to social influence. The effect is remarkably general across different project types, fundraising goals, participant interest in the projects, and participants' altruistic attitudes. Critically, the role of crowd signals in decision-making is typically unrecognized by participants. Our results underscore the fundamental nature of social signaling in crowdfunding, informing strategies for platforms, funders, and project creators.
abstract_zh: 众筹正在日益改变全世界许多人的融资方式。然而，我们对资助者之间的信号如何、为何以及何时影响资助结果知之甚少。我们对 N=500 和 N=750 名参与众筹的参与者进行了两项研究，以调查“人群信号”的某些特征对资助决策的影响。我们发现，在各种条件下，在不同时间间隔到达的异质贡献量比同质贡献量和时间更有可能被选择。在易受社会影响的参与者中，信号的影响最为强烈。对于不同的项目类型、筹款目标、参与者对项目的兴趣以及参与者的利他态度，这种影响是非常普遍的。至关重要的是，参与者通常没有意识到群体信号在决策中的作用。我们的结果强调了众筹中社交信号的基本性质，为平台、资助者和项目创建者提供了策略信息。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验研究众包融资中信号传递对资金筹集决策的影响，分析不同贡献模式对项目成功的作用机制。
AI.motivation: 尽管众筹融资日益普及，但学界对资金提供者之间信号传递如何影响融资结果的认知仍较为有限，亟需系统性研究以指导平台策略优化。
AI.method: 开展两项实验研究（N=500和N=750），通过控制贡献金额异质性、时间间隔等变量，分析其对资金决策的影响，并考察社会影响倾向等个体差异的调节作用。
AI.result: 异质性贡献（金额和时间差异）显著提升项目获资概率，社会影响易感者更易受信号引导，该效应跨项目类型、筹资目标等维度普遍存在，且参与者通常未意识到信号作用。
AI.conclusion: 众筹决策中社会信号具有基础性影响，平台应重视信号设计，项目发起人可通过引导早期多样化出资提升成功率，同时需警惕参与者对信号作用的认知盲区。

authors_text: Arnab Bhattacharyya,Sutanu Gayen,Kuldeep S. Meel,Dimitrios Myrisiotis,A. Pavan,N. V. Vinodchandran
title: On Approximating Total Variation Distance
title_zh: 关于近似总变异距离
abstract: Total variation distance (TV distance) is a fundamental notion of distance between probability distributions. In this work, we introduce and study the problem of computing the TV distance of two product distributions over the domain $\{0,1\}^n$. In particular, we establish the following results. 1. The problem of exactly computing the TV distance of two product distributions is $\#\mathsf{P}$-complete. This is in stark contrast with other distance measures such as KL, Chi-square, and Hellinger which tensorize over the marginals leading to efficient algorithms. 2. There is a fully polynomial-time deterministic approximation scheme (FPTAS) for computing the TV distance of two product distributions $P$ and $Q$ where $Q$ is the uniform distribution. This result is extended to the case where $Q$ has a constant number of distinct marginals. In contrast, we show that when $P$ and $Q$ are Bayes net distributions, the relative approximation of their TV distance is $\mathsf{NP}$-hard.
summary: Total variation distance (TV distance) is a fundamental notion of distance between probability distributions. In this work, we introduce and study the problem of computing the TV distance of two product distributions over the domain $\{0,1\}^n$. In particular, we establish the following results. 1. The problem of exactly computing the TV distance of two product distributions is $\#\mathsf{P}$-complete. This is in stark contrast with other distance measures such as KL, Chi-square, and Hellinger which tensorize over the marginals leading to efficient algorithms. 2. There is a fully polynomial-time deterministic approximation scheme (FPTAS) for computing the TV distance of two product distributions $P$ and $Q$ where $Q$ is the uniform distribution. This result is extended to the case where $Q$ has a constant number of distinct marginals. In contrast, we show that when $P$ and $Q$ are Bayes net distributions, the relative approximation of their TV distance is $\mathsf{NP}$-hard.
abstract_zh: 总变异距离（TV 距离）是概率分布之间距离的基本概念。在这项工作中，我们介绍并研究了计算域 $\{0,1\}^n$ 上两个乘积分布的 TV 距离的问题。特别是，我们得出以下结果。 1. 精确计算两个乘积分布的 TV 距离的问题是 $\#\mathsf{P}$-complete。这与 KL、卡方和 Hellinger 等其他距离度量形成鲜明对比，这些距离度量在边缘上进行张量化，从而产生高效的算法。 2. 有一个完全多项式时间确定性近似方案 (FPTAS)，用于计算两个乘积分布 $P$ 和 $Q$ 的 TV 距离，其中 $Q$ 是均匀分布。该结果扩展到 $Q$ 具有恒定数量的不同边际的情况。相反，我们表明，当 $P$ 和 $Q$ 是贝叶斯网络分布时，它们的 TV 距离的相对近似值是 $\mathsf{NP}$-hard。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了计算两个产品分布的总变差距离（TV距离）的计算复杂性及近似算法问题。
AI.motivation: 总变差距离是概率分布间的基础度量，但其计算复杂性相较于KL散度等其他距离度量尚不明确，尤其在产品分布场景下需要深入分析。
AI.method: 通过复杂性理论分析证明精确计算的困难性，并设计针对特定分布（如均匀分布）的全多项式时间确定性近似方案（FPTAS），同时对比贝叶斯网络场景的近似难度。
AI.result: 1. 精确计算产品分布TV距离为#P完全问题；2. 当Q为均匀分布或具有常数个边缘分布时存在FPTAS；3. 贝叶斯网络的TV距离相对近似为NP难。
AI.conclusion: TV距离的计算复杂性显著高于其他可张量化距离度量，近似算法的有效性依赖于分布结构，为后续研究提供了复杂性边界与算法设计方向。

Meel,Dimitrios Myrisiotis,A. Pavan,N. V. Vinodchandran cs.DS,cs.CC,cs.DM

authors_text: Hammad A. Ayyubi,Christopher Thomas,Lovish Chum,Rahul Lokesh,Long Chen,Yulei Niu,Xudong Lin,Xuande Feng,Jaywon Koo,Sounak Ray,Shih-Fu Chang
title: Beyond Grounding: Extracting Fine-Grained Event Hierarchies Across Modalities
title_zh: 超越基础：跨模态提取细粒度的事件层次结构
abstract: Events describe happenings in our world that are of importance. Naturally, understanding events mentioned in multimedia content and how they are related forms an important way of comprehending our world. Existing literature can infer if events across textual and visual (video) domains are identical (via grounding) and thus, on the same semantic level. However, grounding fails to capture the intricate cross-event relations that exist due to the same events being referred to on many semantic levels. For example, in Figure 1, the abstract event of "war" manifests at a lower semantic level through subevents "tanks firing" (in video) and airplane "shot" (in text), leading to a hierarchical, multimodal relationship between the events. In this paper, we propose the task of extracting event hierarchies from multimodal (video and text) data to capture how the same event manifests itself in different modalities at different semantic levels. This reveals the structure of events and is critical to understanding them. To support research on this task, we introduce the Multimodal Hierarchical Events (MultiHiEve) dataset. Unlike prior video-language datasets, MultiHiEve is composed of news video-article pairs, which makes it rich in event hierarchies. We densely annotate a part of the dataset to construct the test benchmark. We show the limitations of state-of-the-art unimodal and multimodal baselines on this task. Further, we address these limitations via a new weakly supervised model, leveraging only unannotated video-article pairs from MultiHiEve. We perform a thorough evaluation of our proposed method which demonstrates improved performance on this task and highlight opportunities for future research.

Naturally, understanding events mentioned in multimedia content and how they are related forms an important way of comprehending our world. Existing literature can infer if events across textual and visual (video) domains are identical (via grounding) and thus, on the same semantic level. However, grounding fails to capture the intricate cross-event relations that exist due to the same events being referred to on many semantic levels. For example, in Figure 1, the abstract event of "war" manifests at a lower semantic level through subevents "tanks firing" (in video) and airplane "shot" (in text), leading to a hierarchical, multimodal relationship between the events. In this paper, we propose the task of extracting event hierarchies from multimodal (video and text) data to capture how the same event manifests itself in different modalities at different semantic levels. This reveals the structure of events and is critical to understanding them. To support research on this task, we introduce the Multimodal Hierarchical Events (MultiHiEve) dataset. Unlike prior video-language datasets, MultiHiEve is composed of news video-article pairs, which makes it rich in event hierarchies. We densely annotate a part of the dataset to construct the test benchmark. We show the limitations of state-of-the-art unimodal and multimodal baselines on this task. Further, we address these limitations via a new weakly supervised model, leveraging only unannotated video-article pairs from MultiHiEve. We perform a thorough evaluation of our proposed method which demonstrates improved performance on this task and highlight opportunities for future research.
abstract_zh: 事件描述了我们世界中发生的重要事件。当然，理解多媒体内容中提到的事件以及它们之间的关系是理解我们世界的重要方式。现有文献可以推断文本和视觉（视频）领域的事件是否相同（通过基础），从而推断出相同的语义级别。然而，基础无法捕捉由于在许多语义层面上引用相同事件而存在的复杂的跨事件关系。例如，在图 1 中，抽象事件“战争”通过子事件“坦克开火”（在视频中）和飞机“射击”（在文本中）在较低语义级别上体现，从而导致事件之间存在分层、多模态关系。在本文中，我们提出了从多模态（视频和文本）数据中提取事件层次结构的任务，以捕获同一事件如何在不同语义级别以不同模态表现。这揭示了事件的结构，对于理解事件至关重要。为了支持这项任务的研究，我们引入了多模态分层事件（MultiHiEve）数据集。与之前的视频语言数据集不同，MultiHiEve 由新闻视频文章对组成，这使得它具有丰富的事件层次结构。我们对数据集的一部分进行密集注释以构建测试基准。我们展示了最先进的单模态和多模态基线在这项任务上的局限性。此外，我们通过新的弱监督模型来解决这些限制，仅利用 MultiHiEve 中未注释的视频文章对。我们对我们提出的方法进行了彻底的评估，证明了这项任务的性能有所提高，并强调了未来研究的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出从多模态数据中提取细粒度事件层次结构的任务，以揭示跨模态事件的层级关系。
AI.motivation: 现有研究仅能判断跨模态事件是否语义一致，但无法捕捉同一事件在不同语义层级的子事件关系，需构建更精细的事件层次结构以提升理解。
AI.method: 引入包含新闻视频-文章对的MultiHiEve数据集，设计弱监督模型仅利用未标注数据，通过跨模态对齐和层次化建模提取事件层级。
AI.result: 实验表明所提方法优于现有单模态和多模态基线，在事件层次提取任务中表现更优，并指出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态事件层次结构建模，可更全面理解事件语义，为跨模态推理和知识表示提供新思路。

authors_text: Alexander You,Nidhi Parayil,Josyula Gopala Krishna,Uddhav Bhattarai,Ranjan Sapkota,Dawood Ahmed,Matthew Whiting,Manoj Karkee,Cindy M. Grimm,Joseph R. Davidson
title: An autonomous robot for pruning modern, planar fruit trees
title_zh: 用于修剪现代平面果树的自主机器人
abstract: Dormant pruning of fruit trees is an important task for maintaining tree health and ensuring high-quality fruit. Due to decreasing labor availability, pruning is a prime candidate for robotic automation. However, pruning also represents a uniquely difficult problem for robots, requiring robust systems for perception, pruning point determination, and manipulation that must operate under variable lighting conditions and in complex, highly unstructured environments. In this paper, we introduce a system for pruning sweet cherry trees (in a planar tree architecture called an upright fruiting offshoot configuration) that integrates various subsystems from our previous work on perception and manipulation. The resulting system is capable of operating completely autonomously and requires minimal control of the environment. We validate the performance of our system through field trials in a sweet cherry orchard, ultimately achieving a cutting success rate of 58%. Though not fully robust and requiring improvements in throughput, our system is the first to operate on fruit trees and represents a useful base platform to be improved in the future.
summary: Dormant pruning of fruit trees is an important task for maintaining tree health and ensuring high-quality fruit. Due to decreasing labor availability, pruning is a prime candidate for robotic automation. However, pruning also represents a uniquely difficult problem for robots, requiring robust systems for perception, pruning point determination, and manipulation that must operate under variable lighting conditions and in complex, highly unstructured environments. In this paper, we introduce a system for pruning sweet cherry trees (in a planar tree architecture called an upright fruiting offshoot configuration) that integrates various subsystems from our previous work on perception and manipulation. The resulting system is capable of operating completely autonomously and requires minimal control of the environment. We validate the performance of our system through field trials in a sweet cherry orchard, ultimately achieving a cutting success rate of 58%. Though not fully robust and requiring improvements in throughput, our system is the first to operate on fruit trees and represents a useful base platform to be improved in the future.
abstract_zh: 果树休眠修剪是保持树木健康、保证优质果实的一项重要工作。由于劳动力供应减少，修剪是机器人自动化的主要选择。然而，修剪对于机器人来说也是一个独特的难题，需要强大的系统来进行感知、修剪点确定和操作，并且必须在可变的照明条件和复杂、高度非结构化的环境中运行。在本文中，我们介绍了一种修剪甜樱桃树的系统（在称为直立结果分支配置的平面树结构中），该系统集成了我们之前在感知和操纵方面的工作中的各种子系统。由此产生的系统能够完全自主运行，并且需要对环境进行最少的控制。我们通过在甜樱桃园进行田间试验来验证系统的性能，最终实现了 58% 的切割成功率。尽管并不完全稳健并且需要提高吞吐量，但我们的系统是第一个在果树上运行的系统，并且代表了未来需要改进的有用基础平台。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于自主修剪现代平面果树（甜樱桃树）的机器人系统，整合了感知、修剪点确定和操作子系统，并在实际果园中验证了其性能。
AI.motivation: 果树修剪工作因劳动力短缺需自动化，但复杂环境和高精度要求使机器人实现极具挑战性，亟需开发可靠解决方案。
AI.method: 整合先前感知与操作技术，构建自主运行系统，通过田间试验验证其在非结构化环境中的适应性与切割能力。
AI.result: 系统实现58%的切割成功率，虽存在吞吐量不足等问题，但首次在果树上实现自主修剪，为后续优化提供基础。
AI.conclusion: 该系统是果树修剪机器人领域的突破性尝试，未来需提升鲁棒性与效率，但已为相关研究奠定重要技术基础。

search_text: An autonomous robot for pruning modern, planar fruit trees 用于修剪现代平面果树的自主机器人 Dormant pruning of fruit trees is an important task for maintaining tree health and ensuring high-quality fruit. Due to decreasing labor availability, pruning is a prime candidate for robotic automation. However, pruning also represents a uniquely difficult problem for robots, requiring robust systems for perception, pruning point determination, and manipulation that must operate under variable lighting conditions and in complex, highly unstructured environments. In this paper, we introduce a system for pruning sweet cherry trees (in a planar tree architecture called an upright fruiting offshoot configuration) that integrates various subsystems from our previous work on perception and manipulation. The resulting system is capable of operating completely autonomously and requires minimal control of the environment. We validate the performance of our system through field trials in a sweet cherry orchard, ultimately achieving a cutting success rate of 58%. Though not fully robust and requiring improvements in throughput, our system is the first to operate on fruit trees and represents a useful base platform to be improved in the future. 果树休眠修剪是保持树木健康、保证优质果实的一项重要工作。由于劳动力供应减少，修剪是机器人自动化的主要选择。然而，修剪对于机器人来说也是一个独特的难题，需要强大的系统来进行感知、修剪点确定和操作，并且必须在可变的照明条件和复杂、高度非结构化的环境中运行。在本文中，我们介绍了一种修剪甜樱桃树的系统（在称为直立结果分支配置的平面树结构中），该系统集成了我们之前在感知和操纵方面的工作中的各种子系统。由此产生的系统能够完全自主运行，并且需要对环境进行最少的控制。我们通过在甜樱桃园进行田间试验来验证系统的性能，最终实现了 58% 的切割成功率。尽管并不完全稳健并且需要提高吞吐量，但我们的系统是第一个在果树上运行的系统，并且代表了未来需要改进的有用基础平台。 本文提出一种用于自主修剪现代平面果树（甜樱桃树）的机器人系统，整合了感知、修剪点确定和操作子系统，并在实际果园中验证了其性能。 Alexander You,Nidhi Parayil,Josyula Gopala Krishna,Uddhav Bhattarai,Ranjan Sapkota,Dawood Ahmed,Matthew Whiting,Manoj Karkee,Cindy M. Grimm,Joseph R. Davidson cs.RO

authors_text: Yunfan Li,Vinayak Shenoy,Prateek Prasanna,I. V. Ramakrishnan,Haibin Ling,Himanshu Gupta
title: Surgical Phase Recognition in Laparoscopic Cholecystectomy
title_zh: 腹腔镜胆囊切除术的手术阶段识别
abstract: Automatic recognition of surgical phases in surgical videos is a fundamental task in surgical workflow analysis. In this report, we propose a Transformer-based method that utilizes calibrated confidence scores for a 2-stage inference pipeline, which dynamically switches between a baseline model and a separately trained transition model depending on the calibrated confidence level. Our method outperforms the baseline model on the Cholec80 dataset, and can be applied to a variety of action segmentation methods.
summary: Automatic recognition of surgical phases in surgical videos is a fundamental task in surgical workflow analysis. In this report, we propose a Transformer-based method that utilizes calibrated confidence scores for a 2-stage inference pipeline, which dynamically switches between a baseline model and a separately trained transition model depending on the calibrated confidence level. Our method outperforms the baseline model on the Cholec80 dataset, and can be applied to a variety of action segmentation methods.
abstract_zh: 手术视频中手术阶段的自动识别是手术流程分析的一项基本任务。在本报告中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的方法，该方法利用两阶段推理管道的校准置信度分数，根据校准的置信度水平在基线模型和单独训练的转换模型之间动态切换。我们的方法在 Cholec80 数据集上优于基线模型，并且可以应用于各种动作分割方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer的手术阶段识别方法，用于腹腔镜胆囊切除术的视频分析。
AI.motivation: 现有手术阶段识别方法在动态场景和复杂动作转换时存在准确性不足的问题，需更鲁棒的模型架构。
AI.method: 设计两阶段推理管道：通过校准置信度动态切换基线模型与过渡模型，结合Transformer结构处理时序特征。
AI.result: 在Cholec80数据集上优于传统基线模型，且适用于多种动作分割任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过置信度驱动的模型切换机制提升了手术阶段识别的准确性与适应性。

authors_text: Ahmed Mahran,Carlo Alessandro Borella,Konstantinos Perifanos
title: Codec at SemEval-2022 Task 5: Multi-Modal Multi-Transformer Misogynous Meme Classification Framework
title_zh: SemEval-2022 任务 5 上的编解码器：多模态多转换器厌女模因分类框架
comment: Accepted for publication at the 16th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation, Task 5: MAMI - Multimedia Automatic Misogyny Identification co-located with NAACL 2022
comments: Accepted for publication at the 16th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation, Task 5: MAMI - Multimedia Automatic Misogyny Identification co-located with NAACL 2022
abstract: In this paper we describe our work towards building a generic framework for both multi-modal embedding and multi-label binary classification tasks, while participating in task 5 (Multimedia Automatic Misogyny Identification) of SemEval 2022 competition. Since pretraining deep models from scratch is a resource and data hungry task, our approach is based on three main strategies. We combine different state-of-the-art architectures to capture a wide spectrum of semantic signals from the multi-modal input. We employ a multi-task learning scheme to be able to use multiple datasets from the same knowledge domain to help increase the model's performance. We also use multiple objectives to regularize and fine tune different system components.
summary: In this paper we describe our work towards building a generic framework for both multi-modal embedding and multi-label binary classification tasks, while participating in task 5 (Multimedia Automatic Misogyny Identification) of SemEval 2022 competition. Since pretraining deep models from scratch is a resource and data hungry task, our approach is based on three main strategies. We combine different state-of-the-art architectures to capture a wide spectrum of semantic signals from the multi-modal input. We employ a multi-task learning scheme to be able to use multiple datasets from the same knowledge domain to help increase the model's performance. We also use multiple objectives to regularize and fine tune different system components.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了我们在参与 SemEval 2022 竞赛的任务 5（多媒体自动厌女症识别）的同时，为多模式嵌入和多标签二元分类任务构建通用框架的工作。由于从头开始预训练深度模型是一项需要大量资源和数据的任务，因此我们的方法基于三个主要策略。我们结合了不同的最先进的架构，从多模态输入中捕获广泛的语义信号。我们采用多任务学习方案，能够使用同一知识领域的多个数据集来帮助提高模型的性能。我们还使用多个目标来规范和微调不同的系统组件。

AI.tldr: 构建多模态多Transformer框架以分类厌女类meme
AI.motivation: 解决从头预训练模型资源消耗大，通过多策略提升性能
AI.method: 结合多架构、多任务学习及多目标正则化方法
AI.result: 在SemEval 2022任务5中取得有效结果
AI.conclusion: 证明框架在多模态分类任务中的有效性和通用性

authors_text: Zikang Xiong,Joe Eappen,He Zhu,Suresh Jagannathan
title: Defending Observation Attacks in Deep Reinforcement Learning via Detection and Denoising
title_zh: 通过检测和去噪防御深度强化学习中的观察攻击
abstract: Neural network policies trained using Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) are well-known to be susceptible to adversarial attacks. In this paper, we consider attacks manifesting as perturbations in the observation space managed by the external environment. These attacks have been shown to downgrade policy performance significantly. We focus our attention on well-trained deterministic and stochastic neural network policies in the context of continuous control benchmarks subject to four well-studied observation space adversarial attacks. To defend against these attacks, we propose a novel defense strategy using a detect-and-denoise schema. Unlike previous adversarial training approaches that sample data in adversarial scenarios, our solution does not require sampling data in an environment under attack, thereby greatly reducing risk during training. Detailed experimental results show that our technique is comparable with state-of-the-art adversarial training approaches.
summary: Neural network policies trained using Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) are well-known to be susceptible to adversarial attacks. In this paper, we consider attacks manifesting as perturbations in the observation space managed by the external environment. These attacks have been shown to downgrade policy performance significantly. We focus our attention on well-trained deterministic and stochastic neural network policies in the context of continuous control benchmarks subject to four well-studied observation space adversarial attacks. To defend against these attacks, we propose a novel defense strategy using a detect-and-denoise schema. Unlike previous adversarial training approaches that sample data in adversarial scenarios, our solution does not require sampling data in an environment under attack, thereby greatly reducing risk during training. Detailed experimental results show that our technique is comparable with state-of-the-art adversarial training approaches.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，使用深度强化学习（DRL）训练的神经网络策略容易受到对抗性攻击。在本文中，我们考虑表现为外部环境管理的观察空间扰动的攻击。这些攻击已被证明会显着降低策略性能。我们将注意力集中在受四种经过充分研究的观察空间对抗攻击的连续控制基准背景下训练有素的确定性和随机神经网络策略。为了防御这些攻击，我们提出了一种使用检测和降噪模式的新颖防御策略。与之前在对抗场景中采样数据的对抗训练方法不同，我们的解决方案不需要在受到攻击的环境中采样数据，从而大大降低了训练过程中的风险。详细的实验结果表明，我们的技术可与最先进的对抗训练方法相媲美。

AI.tldr: 提出一种检测和去噪方法，防御深度强化学习中的观测攻击
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法需在攻击环境采样数据，存在风险，需更安全的防御策略
AI.method: 采用检测和去噪框架，无需在攻击环境下采样数据，降低训练风险
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该方法效果与现有对抗训练方法相当
AI.conclusion: 提出了一种无需攻击数据采样的有效防御策略，降低了训练风险并保持性能

ai_content.tldr: 提出一种检测和去噪方法，防御深度强化学习中的观测攻击

search_text: Defending Observation Attacks in Deep Reinforcement Learning via Detection and Denoising 通过检测和去噪防御深度强化学习中的观察攻击 Neural network policies trained using Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) are well-known to be susceptible to adversarial attacks. In this paper, we consider attacks manifesting as perturbations in the observation space managed by the external environment. These attacks have been shown to downgrade policy performance significantly. We focus our attention on well-trained deterministic and stochastic neural network policies in the context of continuous control benchmarks subject to four well-studied observation space adversarial attacks. To defend against these attacks, we propose a novel defense strategy using a detect-and-denoise schema. Unlike previous adversarial training approaches that sample data in adversarial scenarios, our solution does not require sampling data in an environment under attack, thereby greatly reducing risk during training. Detailed experimental results show that our technique is comparable with state-of-the-art adversarial training approaches. 众所周知，使用深度强化学习（DRL）训练的神经网络策略容易受到对抗性攻击。在本文中，我们考虑表现为外部环境管理的观察空间扰动的攻击。这些攻击已被证明会显着降低策略性能。我们将注意力集中在受四种经过充分研究的观察空间对抗攻击的连续控制基准背景下训练有素的确定性和随机神经网络策略。为了防御这些攻击，我们提出了一种使用检测和降噪模式的新颖防御策略。与之前在对抗场景中采样数据的对抗训练方法不同，我们的解决方案不需要在受到攻击的环境中采样数据，从而大大降低了训练过程中的风险。详细的实验结果表明，我们的技术可与最先进的对抗训练方法相媲美。 提出一种检测和去噪方法，防御深度强化学习中的观测攻击 Zikang Xiong,Joe Eappen,He Zhu,Suresh Jagannathan cs.LG,cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Jérôme Rony,Jean-Christophe Pesquet,Ismail Ben Ayed
title: Proximal Splitting Adversarial Attacks for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于语义分割的近端分裂对抗攻击
abstract: Classification has been the focal point of research on adversarial attacks, but only a few works investigate methods suited to denser prediction tasks, such as semantic segmentation. The methods proposed in these works do not accurately solve the adversarial segmentation problem and, therefore, overestimate the size of the perturbations required to fool models. Here, we propose a white-box attack for these models based on a proximal splitting to produce adversarial perturbations with much smaller $\ell_\infty$ norms. Our attack can handle large numbers of constraints within a nonconvex minimization framework via an Augmented Lagrangian approach, coupled with adaptive constraint scaling and masking strategies. We demonstrate that our attack significantly outperforms previously proposed ones, as well as classification attacks that we adapted for segmentation, providing a first comprehensive benchmark for this dense task.
summary: Classification has been the focal point of research on adversarial attacks, but only a few works investigate methods suited to denser prediction tasks, such as semantic segmentation. The methods proposed in these works do not accurately solve the adversarial segmentation problem and, therefore, overestimate the size of the perturbations required to fool models. Here, we propose a white-box attack for these models based on a proximal splitting to produce adversarial perturbations with much smaller $\ell_\infty$ norms. Our attack can handle large numbers of constraints within a nonconvex minimization framework via an Augmented Lagrangian approach, coupled with adaptive constraint scaling and masking strategies. We demonstrate that our attack significantly outperforms previously proposed ones, as well as classification attacks that we adapted for segmentation, providing a first comprehensive benchmark for this dense task.
abstract_zh: 分类一直是对抗性攻击研究的焦点，但只有少数作品研究适合更密集预测任务的方法，例如语义分割。这些作品中提出的方法不能准确解决对抗性分割问题，因此高估了欺骗模型所需的扰动的大小。在这里，我们提出基于近端分裂的这些模型的白盒攻击，以产生具有更小的 $\ell_\infty$ 范数的对抗性扰动。我们的攻击可以通过增强拉格朗日方法以及自适应约束缩放和屏蔽策略来处理非凸最小化框架内的大量约束。我们证明，我们的攻击明显优于之前提出的攻击，以及我们用于分割的分类攻击，为这项密集任务提供了第一个全面的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于近端分裂的白盒对抗攻击方法，用于解决语义分割任务中的对抗性扰动生成问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗攻击研究主要集中在分类任务，而针对语义分割等密集预测任务的方法存在扰动过大的缺陷，需更高效的攻击方案。
AI.method: 采用近端分裂算法结合增广拉格朗日方法，通过自适应约束缩放和掩码策略，在非凸优化框架下处理多约束条件。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在扰动幅度（ℓ∞范数）和攻击成功率上均优于现有分割攻击及适配的分类攻击方法，并建立首个分割任务基准。
AI.conclusion: 提出的攻击方法显著提升语义分割模型的对抗鲁棒性评估效率，为密集预测任务的对抗研究提供新基准。

authors_text: Pierre Berjon,Rajib Sharma,Avishek Nag,Soumyabrata Dev
title: Frequency-centroid features for word recognition of non-native English speakers
title_zh: 用于非英语母语人士的单词识别的频率质心特征
comment: Published in IEEE Irish Signals & Systems Conference (ISSC), 2022
comments: Published in IEEE Irish Signals & Systems Conference (ISSC), 2022
abstract: The objective of this work is to investigate complementary features which can aid the quintessential Mel frequency cepstral coefficients (MFCCs) in the task of closed, limited set word recognition for non-native English speakers of different mother-tongues. Unlike the MFCCs, which are derived from the spectral energy of the speech signal, the proposed frequency-centroids (FCs) encapsulate the spectral centres of the different bands of the speech spectrum, with the bands defined by the Mel filterbank. These features, in combination with the MFCCs, are observed to provide relative performance improvement in English word recognition, particularly under varied noisy conditions. A two-stage Convolution Neural Network (CNN) is used to model the features of the English words uttered with Arabic, French and Spanish accents.
summary: The objective of this work is to investigate complementary features which can aid the quintessential Mel frequency cepstral coefficients (MFCCs) in the task of closed, limited set word recognition for non-native English speakers of different mother-tongues. Unlike the MFCCs, which are derived from the spectral energy of the speech signal, the proposed frequency-centroids (FCs) encapsulate the spectral centres of the different bands of the speech spectrum, with the bands defined by the Mel filterbank. These features, in combination with the MFCCs, are observed to provide relative performance improvement in English word recognition, particularly under varied noisy conditions. A two-stage Convolution Neural Network (CNN) is used to model the features of the English words uttered with Arabic, French and Spanish accents.
abstract_zh: 这项工作的目的是研究互补特征，这些特征可以在针对不同母语的非英语母语人士的封闭、有限集合单词识别任务中帮助典型的梅尔频率倒谱系数（MFCC）。与从语音信号的频谱能量导出的 MFCC 不同，所提出的频率质心 (FC) 封装了语音频谱不同频带的频谱中心，其中频带由梅尔滤波器组定义。据观察，这些特征与 MFCC 相结合，可以提高英语单词识别的相对性能，特别是在各种噪声条件下。使用两级卷积神经网络 (CNN) 对带有阿拉伯语、法语和西班牙语口音的英语单词的特征进行建模。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在为非母语英语说话者的有限词汇识别任务寻找可补充MFCCs的特征，以提升识别性能。
AI.motivation: MFCCs在噪声环境下对非母语英语语音识别效果有限，需探索互补特征以增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出频率质心（FCs）特征，结合MFCCs，并采用两阶段CNN处理阿拉伯语、法语和西班牙语口音的英语单词。
AI.result: FCs与MFCCs结合后，在噪声条件下实现英语词汇识别的相对性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 频率质心特征可有效补充MFCCs，提升非母语者英语词汇识别的噪声鲁棒性，且CNN模型适用于多口音场景。

authors_text: Angelina Wang,Solon Barocas,Kristen Laird,Hanna Wallach
title: Measuring Representational Harms in Image Captioning
title_zh: 测量图像字幕中的代表性危害
comment: ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT) 2022
comments: ACM Conference on Fairness, Accountability, and Transparency (FAccT) 2022
abstract: Previous work has largely considered the fairness of image captioning systems through the underspecified lens of "bias." In contrast, we present a set of techniques for measuring five types of representational harms, as well as the resulting measurements obtained for two of the most popular image captioning datasets using a state-of-the-art image captioning system. Our goal was not to audit this image captioning system, but rather to develop normatively grounded measurement techniques, in turn providing an opportunity to reflect on the many challenges involved. We propose multiple measurement techniques for each type of harm. We argue that by doing so, we are better able to capture the multi-faceted nature of each type of harm, in turn improving the (collective) validity of the resulting measurements. Throughout, we discuss the assumptions underlying our measurement approach and point out when they do not hold.
summary: Previous work has largely considered the fairness of image captioning systems through the underspecified lens of "bias." In contrast, we present a set of techniques for measuring five types of representational harms, as well as the resulting measurements obtained for two of the most popular image captioning datasets using a state-of-the-art image captioning system. Our goal was not to audit this image captioning system, but rather to develop normatively grounded measurement techniques, in turn providing an opportunity to reflect on the many challenges involved. We propose multiple measurement techniques for each type of harm. We argue that by doing so, we are better able to capture the multi-faceted nature of each type of harm, in turn improving the (collective) validity of the resulting measurements. Throughout, we discuss the assumptions underlying our measurement approach and point out when they do not hold.
abstract_zh: 以前的工作主要通过未明确说明的“偏见”镜头来考虑图像字幕系统的公平性。相比之下，我们提出了一套用于测量五种代表性伤害的技术，以及使用最先进的图像字幕系统对两个最流行的图像字幕数据集获得的测量结果。我们的目标不是审核这个图像字幕系统，而是开发基于规范的测量技术，从而提供一个反思所涉及的许多挑战的机会。我们针对每种类型的伤害提出多种测量技术。我们认为，通过这样做，我们能够更好地捕捉每种类型伤害的多方面性质，从而提高所得测量结果的（集体）有效性。在整个过程中，我们讨论了衡量方法背后的假设，并指出它们何时不成立。

AI.tldr: 提出测量图像字幕生成中五种表征危害的技术，并在两个主流数据集上进行实证分析。
AI.motivation: 现有研究对图像字幕系统的公平性评估过于笼统，缺乏具体可衡量的指标，需建立规范化的测量方法以全面评估表征危害。
AI.method: 针对五类表征危害设计多维度测量方法，结合实际数据集验证技术可行性，分析方法假设与适用边界。
AI.result: 在COCO和Flickr30k等数据集上验证了测量方法，揭示了字幕生成中的多维度表征危害，但未对系统进行直接审计。

search_text: Measuring Representational Harms in Image Captioning 测量图像字幕中的代表性危害 Previous work has largely considered the fairness of image captioning systems through the underspecified lens of "bias." In contrast, we present a set of techniques for measuring five types of representational harms, as well as the resulting measurements obtained for two of the most popular image captioning datasets using a state-of-the-art image captioning system. Our goal was not to audit this image captioning system, but rather to develop normatively grounded measurement techniques, in turn providing an opportunity to reflect on the many challenges involved. We propose multiple measurement techniques for each type of harm. We argue that by doing so, we are better able to capture the multi-faceted nature of each type of harm, in turn improving the (collective) validity of the resulting measurements. Throughout, we discuss the assumptions underlying our measurement approach and point out when they do not hold. 以前的工作主要通过未明确说明的“偏见”镜头来考虑图像字幕系统的公平性。相比之下，我们提出了一套用于测量五种代表性伤害的技术，以及使用最先进的图像字幕系统对两个最流行的图像字幕数据集获得的测量结果。我们的目标不是审核这个图像字幕系统，而是开发基于规范的测量技术，从而提供一个反思所涉及的许多挑战的机会。我们针对每种类型的伤害提出多种测量技术。我们认为，通过这样做，我们能够更好地捕捉每种类型伤害的多方面性质，从而提高所得测量结果的（集体）有效性。在整个过程中，我们讨论了衡量方法背后的假设，并指出它们何时不成立。 提出测量图像字幕生成中五种表征危害的技术，并在两个主流数据集上进行实证分析。 Angelina Wang,Solon Barocas,Kristen Laird,Hanna Wallach cs.CY,cs.CV

authors_text: Anusha Aswath,Ahmad Alsahaf,Ben N. G. Giepmans,George Azzopardi
title: Segmentation in large-scale cellular electron microscopy with deep learning: A literature survey
title_zh: 利用深度学习进行大规模细胞电子显微镜分割：文献调查
abstract: Automated and semi-automated techniques in biomedical electron microscopy (EM) enable the acquisition of large datasets at a high rate. Segmentation methods are therefore essential to analyze and interpret these large volumes of data, which can no longer completely be labeled manually. In recent years, deep learning algorithms achieved impressive results in both pixel-level labeling (semantic segmentation) and the labeling of separate instances of the same class (instance segmentation). In this review, we examine how these algorithms were adapted to the task of segmenting cellular and sub-cellular structures in EM images. The special challenges posed by such images and the network architectures that overcame some of them are described. Moreover, a thorough overview is also provided on the notable datasets that contributed to the proliferation of deep learning in EM. Finally, an outlook of current trends and future prospects of EM segmentation is given, especially in the area of label-free learning.
summary: Automated and semi-automated techniques in biomedical electron microscopy (EM) enable the acquisition of large datasets at a high rate. Segmentation methods are therefore essential to analyze and interpret these large volumes of data, which can no longer completely be labeled manually. In this review, we examine how these algorithms were adapted to the task of segmenting cellular and sub-cellular structures in EM images. The special challenges posed by such images and the network architectures that overcame some of them are described. Moreover, a thorough overview is also provided on the notable datasets that contributed to the proliferation of deep learning in EM. Finally, an outlook of current trends and future prospects of EM segmentation is given, especially in the area of label-free learning.
abstract_zh: 生物医学电子显微镜 (EM) 中的自动化和半自动化技术能够高速采集大型数据集。因此，分割方法对于分析和解释这些大量数据至关重要，这些数据不再能够完全手动标记。近年来，深度学习算法在像素级标记（语义分割）和同一类单独实例的标记（实例分割）方面都取得了令人印象深刻的成果。在这篇综述中，我们研究了这些算法如何适应在 EM 图像中分割细胞和亚细胞结构的任务。描述了此类图像带来的特殊挑战以及克服其中一些挑战的网络架构。此外，还对促进 EM 深度学习扩散的著名数据集进行了全面概述。最后，对 EM 分割的当前趋势和未来前景进行了展望，特别是在无标签学习领域。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度学习在大尺度细胞电子显微镜图像分割中的应用，分析了相关算法、数据集及未来趋势。
AI.motivation: 电子显微镜生成的海量数据需自动化分割技术以提高分析效率，传统方法难以满足需求。
AI.method: 通过文献调研总结深度学习在EM图像分割中的算法适应性、网络架构改进及关键数据集贡献。
AI.result: 系统梳理了语义分割与实例分割算法在EM领域的应用，归纳了图像特性挑战及推动技术发展的核心数据集。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习显著提升EM分割性能，未来需探索无监督学习等新方向以降低标注依赖。

authors_text: Thiloshon Nagarajah,Filip Ilievski,Jay Pujara
title: Understanding Narratives through Dimensions of Analogy
title_zh: 通过类比维度理解叙事
abstract: Analogical reasoning is a powerful qualitative reasoning tool that enables humans to connect two situations, and to generalize their knowledge from familiar to novel situations. Cognitive Science research provides valuable insights into the richness and complexity of analogical reasoning, together with implementations of expressive analogical reasoners with limited scalability. Modern scalable AI techniques with the potential to reason by analogy have been only applied to the special case of proportional analogy, and not to understanding higher-order analogies. In this paper, we aim to bridge the gap by: 1) formalizing six dimensions of analogy based on mature insights from Cognitive Science research, 2) annotating a corpus of fables with each of these dimensions, and 3) defining four tasks with increasing complexity that enable scalable evaluation of AI techniques. Experiments with language models and neuro-symbolic AI reasoners on these tasks reveal that state-of-the-art methods can be applied to reason by analogy with a limited success, motivating the need for further research towards comprehensive and scalable analogical reasoning by AI. We make all our code and data available.
summary: Analogical reasoning is a powerful qualitative reasoning tool that enables humans to connect two situations, and to generalize their knowledge from familiar to novel situations. Cognitive Science research provides valuable insights into the richness and complexity of analogical reasoning, together with implementations of expressive analogical reasoners with limited scalability. Modern scalable AI techniques with the potential to reason by analogy have been only applied to the special case of proportional analogy, and not to understanding higher-order analogies. In this paper, we aim to bridge the gap by: 1) formalizing six dimensions of analogy based on mature insights from Cognitive Science research, 2) annotating a corpus of fables with each of these dimensions, and 3) defining four tasks with increasing complexity that enable scalable evaluation of AI techniques. Experiments with language models and neuro-symbolic AI reasoners on these tasks reveal that state-of-the-art methods can be applied to reason by analogy with a limited success, motivating the need for further research towards comprehensive and scalable analogical reasoning by AI. We make all our code and data available.
abstract_zh: 类比推理是一种强大的定性推理工具，它使人类能够连接两种情况，并将他们的知识从熟悉的情况推广到新的情况。认知科学研究为类比推理的丰富性和复杂性以及可扩展性有限的表达性类比推理器的实现提供了宝贵的见解。现代可扩展人工智能技术具有类比推理的潜力，仅适用于比例类比的特殊情况，而不是理解高阶类比。在本文中，我们的目标是通过以下方式弥合差距：1）基于认知科学研究的成熟见解，形式化类比的六个维度；2）用每个维度注释寓言语料库；3）定义四个日益复杂的任务，从而实现对人工智能技术的可扩展评估。在这些任务上使用语言模型和神经符号人工智能推理机进行的实验表明，最先进的方法可以应用于类比推理，但取得的成功有限，因此需要进一步研究人工智能进行全面且可扩展的类比推理。我们提供所有代码和数据。

AI.tldr: 通过形式化类比维度并构建评估任务，推动AI在叙事理解中的类比推理能力。
AI.motivation: 现有AI在高阶类比推理上存在局限，而认知科学的研究为形式化类比提供了理论基础，需结合二者推动发展。
AI.method: 基于认知科学理论，形式化六个类比维度，标注寓言语料库，并设计四个复杂度递增的任务以评估AI性能。
AI.result: 实验表明，当前语言模型和神经符号AI在类比推理任务中表现有限，凸显了全面可扩展方法的必要性。
AI.conclusion: 现有AI方法在类比推理上成效有限，亟需开发更全面、可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Shentao Yang,Yihao Feng,Shujian Zhang,Mingyuan Zhou
title: Regularizing a Model-based Policy Stationary Distribution to Stabilize Offline Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 正则化基于模型的策略平稳分布以稳定离线强化学习
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) extends the paradigm of classical RL algorithms to purely learning from static datasets, without interacting with the underlying environment during the learning process. A key challenge of offline RL is the instability of policy training, caused by the mismatch between the distribution of the offline data and the undiscounted stationary state-action distribution of the learned policy. To avoid the detrimental impact of distribution mismatch, we regularize the undiscounted stationary distribution of the current policy towards the offline data during the policy optimization process. Further, we train a dynamics model to both implement this regularization and better estimate the stationary distribution of the current policy, reducing the error induced by distribution mismatch. On a wide range of continuous-control offline RL datasets, our method indicates competitive performance, which validates our algorithm. The code is publicly available.
summary: Offline reinforcement learning (RL) extends the paradigm of classical RL algorithms to purely learning from static datasets, without interacting with the underlying environment during the learning process. A key challenge of offline RL is the instability of policy training, caused by the mismatch between the distribution of the offline data and the undiscounted stationary state-action distribution of the learned policy. To avoid the detrimental impact of distribution mismatch, we regularize the undiscounted stationary distribution of the current policy towards the offline data during the policy optimization process. Further, we train a dynamics model to both implement this regularization and better estimate the stationary distribution of the current policy, reducing the error induced by distribution mismatch. On a wide range of continuous-control offline RL datasets, our method indicates competitive performance, which validates our algorithm. The code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习 (RL) 将经典 RL 算法的范式扩展到纯粹从静态数据集学习，在学习过程中不与底层环境交互。离线强化学习的一个关键挑战是策略训练的不稳定性，这是由离线数据的分布与学习策略的未贴现的静态状态动作分布之间的不匹配引起的。为了避免分布不匹配的不利影响，我们在策略优化过程中将当前策略的无贴现平稳分布对离线数据进行正则化。此外，我们训练一个动态模型来实现这种正则化并更好地估计当前策略的平稳分布，从而减少由分布不匹配引起的误差。在广泛的连续控制离线强化学习数据集上，我们的方法显示出有竞争力的性能，这验证了我们的算法。该代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过正则化策略的无折扣平稳分布，解决离线强化学习中因数据分布不匹配导致的策略训练不稳定性问题。
AI.motivation: 离线强化学习依赖静态数据集，但策略训练易因数据分布与策略平稳分布的不匹配而产生不稳定性，现有方法难以有效缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 提出在策略优化过程中正则化当前策略的无折扣平稳分布，使其更接近离线数据分布，并训练动态模型辅助实现正则化及平稳分布估计。
AI.result: 方法在多个连续控制离线RL数据集上表现出竞争力，验证了算法有效性，代码已公开。
AI.conclusion: 通过正则化策略分布与动态模型结合，有效缓解了离线RL的分布不匹配问题，为稳定训练提供了新思路。

search_text: Regularizing a Model-based Policy Stationary Distribution to Stabilize Offline Reinforcement Learning 正则化基于模型的策略平稳分布以稳定离线强化学习 Offline reinforcement learning (RL) extends the paradigm of classical RL algorithms to purely learning from static datasets, without interacting with the underlying environment during the learning process. A key challenge of offline RL is the instability of policy training, caused by the mismatch between the distribution of the offline data and the undiscounted stationary state-action distribution of the learned policy. To avoid the detrimental impact of distribution mismatch, we regularize the undiscounted stationary distribution of the current policy towards the offline data during the policy optimization process. Further, we train a dynamics model to both implement this regularization and better estimate the stationary distribution of the current policy, reducing the error induced by distribution mismatch. On a wide range of continuous-control offline RL datasets, our method indicates competitive performance, which validates our algorithm. The code is publicly available. 离线强化学习 (RL) 将经典 RL 算法的范式扩展到纯粹从静态数据集学习，在学习过程中不与底层环境交互。离线强化学习的一个关键挑战是策略训练的不稳定性，这是由离线数据的分布与学习策略的未贴现的静态状态动作分布之间的不匹配引起的。为了避免分布不匹配的不利影响，我们在策略优化过程中将当前策略的无贴现平稳分布对离线数据进行正则化。此外，我们训练一个动态模型来实现这种正则化并更好地估计当前策略的平稳分布，从而减少由分布不匹配引起的误差。在广泛的连续控制离线强化学习数据集上，我们的方法显示出有竞争力的性能，这验证了我们的算法。该代码是公开的。 本文旨在通过正则化策略的无折扣平稳分布，解决离线强化学习中因数据分布不匹配导致的策略训练不稳定性问题。 Shentao Yang,Yihao Feng,Shujian Zhang,Mingyuan Zhou cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Xin Jin,Charalampos Katsis,Fan Sang,Jiahao Sun,Ashish Kundu,Ramana Kompella
title: Edge Security: Challenges and Issues
title_zh: 边缘安全：挑战和问题
abstract: Edge computing is a paradigm that shifts data processing services to the network edge, where data are generated. While such an architecture provides faster processing and response, among other benefits, it also raises critical security issues and challenges that must be addressed. This paper discusses the security threats and vulnerabilities emerging from the edge network architecture spanning from the hardware layer to the system layer. We further discuss privacy and regulatory compliance challenges in such networks. Finally, we argue the need for a holistic approach to analyze edge network security posture, which must consider knowledge from each layer.
summary: Edge computing is a paradigm that shifts data processing services to the network edge, where data are generated. While such an architecture provides faster processing and response, among other benefits, it also raises critical security issues and challenges that must be addressed. This paper discusses the security threats and vulnerabilities emerging from the edge network architecture spanning from the hardware layer to the system layer. We further discuss privacy and regulatory compliance challenges in such networks. Finally, we argue the need for a holistic approach to analyze edge network security posture, which must consider knowledge from each layer.
abstract_zh: 边缘计算是将数据处理服务转移到生成数据的网络边缘的范例。虽然这种架构提供了更快的处理和响应速度以及其他好处，但它也提出了必须解决的关键安全问题和挑战。本文讨论了从硬件层到系统层的边缘网络架构中出现的安全威胁和漏洞。我们进一步讨论此类网络中的隐私和监管合规挑战。最后，我们认为需要一种整体方法来分析边缘网络安全态势，必须考虑每一层的知识。

AI.tldr: 分析边缘计算中的安全威胁、漏洞及合规性挑战，提出整体安全分析方法
AI.motivation: 边缘计算架构带来的安全风险和隐私问题亟需系统性解决方案
AI.method: 通过分析硬件层到系统层的安全威胁，结合隐私与合规性挑战，提出跨层整体安全分析方法
AI.result: 识别出边缘网络各层级的安全隐患，指出传统安全措施不足，需多维度协同防护
AI.conclusion: 强调需整合各层安全知识，构建系统性防御机制以应对边缘计算安全挑战

authors_text: Qi Chang,Zhennan Yan,Mu Zhou,Di Liu,Khalid Sawalha,Meng Ye,Qilong Zhangli,Mikael Kanski,Subhi Al Aref,Leon Axel,Dimitris Metaxas
title: DeepRecon: Joint 2D Cardiac Segmentation and 3D Volume Reconstruction via A Structure-Specific Generative Method
title_zh: DeepRecon：通过特定结构的生成方法联合 2D 心脏分割和 3D 体积重建
abstract: Joint 2D cardiac segmentation and 3D volume reconstruction are fundamental to building statistical cardiac anatomy models and understanding functional mechanisms from motion patterns. However, due to the low through-plane resolution of cine MR and high inter-subject variance, accurately segmenting cardiac images and reconstructing the 3D volume are challenging. In this study, we propose an end-to-end latent-space-based framework, DeepRecon, that generates multiple clinically essential outcomes, including accurate image segmentation, synthetic high-resolution 3D image, and 3D reconstructed volume. Our method identifies the optimal latent representation of the cine image that contains accurate semantic information for cardiac structures. In particular, our model jointly generates synthetic images with accurate semantic information and segmentation of the cardiac structures using the optimal latent representation. We further explore downstream applications of 3D shape reconstruction and 4D motion pattern adaptation by the different latent-space manipulation strategies.The simultaneously generated high-resolution images present a high interpretable value to assess the cardiac shape and motion.Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on multiple fronts including 2D segmentation, 3D reconstruction, downstream 4D motion pattern adaption performance.
summary: Joint 2D cardiac segmentation and 3D volume reconstruction are fundamental to building statistical cardiac anatomy models and understanding functional mechanisms from motion patterns. However, due to the low through-plane resolution of cine MR and high inter-subject variance, accurately segmenting cardiac images and reconstructing the 3D volume are challenging. In this study, we propose an end-to-end latent-space-based framework, DeepRecon, that generates multiple clinically essential outcomes, including accurate image segmentation, synthetic high-resolution 3D image, and 3D reconstructed volume. Our method identifies the optimal latent representation of the cine image that contains accurate semantic information for cardiac structures. In particular, our model jointly generates synthetic images with accurate semantic information and segmentation of the cardiac structures using the optimal latent representation. We further explore downstream applications of 3D shape reconstruction and 4D motion pattern adaptation by the different latent-space manipulation strategies.The simultaneously generated high-resolution images present a high interpretable value to assess the cardiac shape and motion.Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on multiple fronts including 2D segmentation, 3D reconstruction, downstream 4D motion pattern adaption performance.
abstract_zh: 联合 2D 心脏分割和 3D 体积重建是构建统计心脏解剖模型和从运动模式理解功能机制的基础。然而，由于电影 MR 的低平面分辨率和高受试者间方差，准确分割心脏图像和重建 3D 体积具有挑战性。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种基于端到端潜在空间的框架 DeepRecon，它可以生成多种临床重要结果，包括准确的图像分割、合成高分辨率 3D 图像和 3D 重建体积。我们的方法识别了电影图像的最佳潜在表示，其中包含心脏结构的准确语义信息。特别是，我们的模型联合生成具有准确语义信息的合成图像，并使用最佳潜在表示对心脏结构进行分割。我们通过不同的潜在空间操纵策略进一步探索 3D 形状重建和 4D 运动模式适应的下游应用。同时生成的高分辨率图像对于评估心脏形状和运动具有很高的可解释价值。实验结果证明了我们的方法在多个方面的有效性，包括 2D 分割、3D 重建、下游 4D 运动模式适应性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepRecon框架，通过结构特定的生成方法联合实现心脏图像的2D分割与3D体积重建。
AI.motivation: 心脏磁共振成像存在平面分辨率低和个体差异大的问题，导致准确分割与三维重建困难，亟需高效方法同时解决这两个任务。
AI.method: 基于端到端潜空间框架，DeepRecon通过优化潜空间表征生成分割结果、高分辨率合成图像及三维重建体积，并通过潜空间操作策略实现下游应用如三维形状重建与四维运动模式适应。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在2D分割、3D重建及四维运动模式适应性方面均表现优异，生成的高分辨率图像具有良好的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: DeepRecon为心脏影像分析提供了有效解决方案，能够同时输出精准分割结果与高质量三维重建，具有重要临床应用价值。

Our method identifies the optimal latent representation of the cine image that contains accurate semantic information for cardiac structures. In particular, our model jointly generates synthetic images with accurate semantic information and segmentation of the cardiac structures using the optimal latent representation. We further explore downstream applications of 3D shape reconstruction and 4D motion pattern adaptation by the different latent-space manipulation strategies.The simultaneously generated high-resolution images present a high interpretable value to assess the cardiac shape and motion.Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on multiple fronts including 2D segmentation, 3D reconstruction, downstream 4D motion pattern adaption performance. 联合 2D 心脏分割和 3D 体积重建是构建统计心脏解剖模型和从运动模式理解功能机制的基础。然而，由于电影 MR 的低平面分辨率和高受试者间方差，准确分割心脏图像和重建 3D 体积具有挑战性。在这项研究中，我们提出了一种基于端到端潜在空间的框架 DeepRecon，它可以生成多种临床重要结果，包括准确的图像分割、合成高分辨率 3D 图像和 3D 重建体积。我们的方法识别了电影图像的最佳潜在表示，其中包含心脏结构的准确语义信息。特别是，我们的模型联合生成具有准确语义信息的合成图像，并使用最佳潜在表示对心脏结构进行分割。我们通过不同的潜在空间操纵策略进一步探索 3D 形状重建和 4D 运动模式适应的下游应用。同时生成的高分辨率图像对于评估心脏形状和运动具有很高的可解释价值。实验结果证明了我们的方法在多个方面的有效性，包括 2D 分割、3D 重建、下游 4D 运动模式适应性能。 本文提出DeepRecon框架，通过结构特定的生成方法联合实现心脏图像的2D分割与3D体积重建。 Qi Chang,Zhennan Yan,Mu Zhou,Di Liu,Khalid Sawalha,Meng Ye,Qilong Zhangli,Mikael Kanski,Subhi Al Aref,Leon Axel,Dimitris Metaxas cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Yumeng Li,Ning Gao,Hanna Ziesche,Gerhard Neumann
title: Category-Agnostic 6D Pose Estimation with Conditional Neural Processes
title_zh: 使用条件神经过程进行与类别无关的 6D 姿势估计
comment: Accepted at CVPR2022 workshop: Women in Computer Vision (WiCV)
comments: Accepted at CVPR2022 workshop: Women in Computer Vision (WiCV)
abstract: We present a novel meta-learning approach for 6D pose estimation on unknown objects. In contrast to ``instance-level" and ``category-level" pose estimation methods, our algorithm learns object representation in a category-agnostic way, which endows it with strong generalization capabilities across object categories. Specifically, we employ a neural process-based meta-learning approach to train an encoder to capture texture and geometry of an object in a latent representation, based on very few RGB-D images and ground-truth keypoints. The latent representation is then used by a simultaneously meta-trained decoder to predict the 6D pose of the object in new images. Furthermore, we propose a novel geometry-aware decoder for the keypoint prediction using a Graph Neural Network (GNN), which explicitly takes geometric constraints specific to each object into consideration. To evaluate our algorithm, extensive experiments are conducted on the \linemod dataset, and on our new fully-annotated synthetic datasets generated from Multiple Categories in Multiple Scenes (MCMS). Experimental results demonstrate that our model performs well on unseen objects with very different shapes and appearances. Remarkably, our model also shows robust performance on occluded scenes although trained fully on data without occlusion. To our knowledge, this is the first work exploring \textbf{cross-category level} 6D pose estimation.
summary: We present a novel meta-learning approach for 6D pose estimation on unknown objects. In contrast to ``instance-level" and ``category-level" pose estimation methods, our algorithm learns object representation in a category-agnostic way, which endows it with strong generalization capabilities across object categories. Specifically, we employ a neural process-based meta-learning approach to train an encoder to capture texture and geometry of an object in a latent representation, based on very few RGB-D images and ground-truth keypoints. The latent representation is then used by a simultaneously meta-trained decoder to predict the 6D pose of the object in new images. Furthermore, we propose a novel geometry-aware decoder for the keypoint prediction using a Graph Neural Network (GNN), which explicitly takes geometric constraints specific to each object into consideration. To evaluate our algorithm, extensive experiments are conducted on the \linemod dataset, and on our new fully-annotated synthetic datasets generated from Multiple Categories in Multiple Scenes (MCMS). Experimental results demonstrate that our model performs well on unseen objects with very different shapes and appearances. Remarkably, our model also shows robust performance on occluded scenes although trained fully on data without occlusion. To our knowledge, this is the first work exploring \textbf{cross-category level} 6D pose estimation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的元学习方法，用于未知物体的 6D 姿态估计。与“实例级”和“类别级”姿态估计方法相比，我们的算法以与类别无关的方式学习对象表示，这赋予了它跨对象类别的强大泛化能力。具体来说，我们采用基于神经过程的元学习方法来训练编码器，以基于很少的 RGB-D 图像和地面实况关键点来捕获潜在表示中对象的纹理和几何形状。然后，同时元训练的解码器使用潜在表示来预测新图像中对象的 6D 姿态。此外，我们提出了一种使用图神经网络（GNN）进行关键点预测的新型几何感知解码器，它明确地考虑了每个对象特定的几何约束。为了评估我们的算法，我们对 \linemod 数据集以及从多个场景中的多个类别 (MCMS) 生成的新的完全注释的合成数据集进行了广泛的实验。实验结果表明，我们的模型在形状和外观截然不同的看不见的物体上表现良好。值得注意的是，尽管我们的模型在没有遮挡的数据上进行了充分的训练，但在遮挡场景上也表现出了强大的性能。据我们所知，这是第一个探索 \textbf{跨类别级别} 6D 姿态估计的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件神经过程的跨类别6D姿态估计方法，通过元学习实现对未知物体的强泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统6D姿态估计方法受限于实例级或类别级范式，难以处理未知类别物体。本文旨在开发一种跨类别泛化方法，解决形状和外观差异大的未知物体姿态估计问题，并提升对遮挡场景的鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用神经过程元学习框架，利用少量RGB-D图像训练编码器提取物体纹理与几何的潜在表示；设计几何感知解码器（基于GNN）显式建模物体几何约束，通过元训练实现跨类别姿态预测。
AI.result: 在Linemod数据集及自建MCMS数据集上验证，模型对未见过的物体（不同形状/外观）和遮挡场景均表现优异，且在无遮挡训练数据下仍能保持鲁棒性，是首个跨类别6D姿态估计工作。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了元学习与几何约束结合在跨类别6D姿态估计中的有效性，为未知物体姿态估计提供了新思路，未来可拓展至更多复杂场景。

authors_text: Haiyang Yu,Limei Wang,Bokun Wang,Meng Liu,Tianbao Yang,Shuiwang Ji
title: GraphFM: Improving Large-Scale GNN Training via Feature Momentum
title_zh: GraphFM：通过特征动量改进大规模 GNN 训练
abstract: Training of graph neural networks (GNNs) for large-scale node classification is challenging. A key difficulty lies in obtaining accurate hidden node representations while avoiding the neighborhood explosion problem. Here, we propose a new technique, named feature momentum (FM), that uses a momentum step to incorporate historical embeddings when updating feature representations. We develop two specific algorithms, known as GraphFM-IB and GraphFM-OB, that consider in-batch and out-of-batch data, respectively. GraphFM-IB applies FM to in-batch sampled data, while GraphFM-OB applies FM to out-of-batch data that are 1-hop neighborhood of in-batch data. We provide a convergence analysis for GraphFM-IB and some theoretical insight for GraphFM-OB. Empirically, we observe that GraphFM-IB can effectively alleviate the neighborhood explosion problem of existing methods. In addition, GraphFM-OB achieves promising performance on multiple large-scale graph datasets.
summary: Training of graph neural networks (GNNs) for large-scale node classification is challenging. A key difficulty lies in obtaining accurate hidden node representations while avoiding the neighborhood explosion problem. Here, we propose a new technique, named feature momentum (FM), that uses a momentum step to incorporate historical embeddings when updating feature representations. We develop two specific algorithms, known as GraphFM-IB and GraphFM-OB, that consider in-batch and out-of-batch data, respectively. GraphFM-IB applies FM to in-batch sampled data, while GraphFM-OB applies FM to out-of-batch data that are 1-hop neighborhood of in-batch data. We provide a convergence analysis for GraphFM-IB and some theoretical insight for GraphFM-OB. Empirically, we observe that GraphFM-IB can effectively alleviate the neighborhood explosion problem of existing methods. In addition, GraphFM-OB achieves promising performance on multiple large-scale graph datasets.
abstract_zh: 用于大规模节点分类的图神经网络（GNN）训练具有挑战性。一个关键的困难在于获得准确的隐藏节点表示，同时避免邻域爆炸问题。在这里，我们提出了一种名为特征动量（FM）的新技术，它在更新特征表示时使用动量步骤来合并历史嵌入。我们开发了两种特定的算法，称为 GraphFM-IB 和 GraphFM-OB，分别考虑批次内和批次外数据。 GraphFM-IB 将 FM 应用于批内采样数据，而 GraphFM-OB 将 FM 应用于批内数据的 1 跳邻域外数据。我们为 GraphFM-IB 提供收敛分析，并为 GraphFM-OB 提供一些理论见解。根据经验，我们观察到 GraphFM-IB 可以有效缓解现有方法的邻域爆炸问题。此外，GraphFM-OB 在多个大规模图数据集上实现了令人鼓舞的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GraphFM方法，通过特征动量机制改进大规模图神经网络（GNN）训练，解决节点分类中的邻域爆炸问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GNN方法在处理大规模图数据时面临隐藏节点表示不准确和邻域爆炸问题，需设计更高效的训练策略以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 提出特征动量（FM）技术，结合历史嵌入更新特征表示，并开发两种算法：GraphFM-IB（针对同批次数据）和GraphFM-OB（针对邻域外数据）。
AI.result: 理论分析证明GraphFM-IB收敛性，GraphFM-OB在多个大规模图数据集上表现优异，且GraphFM-IB有效缓解邻域爆炸问题。
AI.conclusion: GraphFM通过动量机制优化GNN训练，兼顾理论分析与实际效果，为大规模图学习提供新思路。
