authors_text: Linjie Li,Zhe Gan,Kevin Lin,Chung-Ching Lin,Zicheng Liu,Ce Liu,Lijuan Wang
title: LAVENDER: Unifying Video-Language Understanding as Masked Language Modeling
title_zh: LAVENDER：将视频语言理解统一为掩码语言模型
abstract: Unified vision-language frameworks have greatly advanced in recent years, most of which adopt an encoder-decoder architecture to unify image-text tasks as sequence-to-sequence generation. However, existing video-language (VidL) models still require task-specific designs in model architecture and training objectives for each task. In this work, we explore a unified VidL framework LAVENDER, where Masked Language Modeling (MLM) is used as the common interface for all pre-training and downstream tasks. Such unification leads to a simplified model architecture, where only a lightweight MLM head, instead of a decoder with much more parameters, is needed on top of the multimodal encoder. Surprisingly, experimental results show that this unified framework achieves competitive performance on 14 VidL benchmarks, covering video question answering, text-to-video retrieval and video captioning. Extensive analyses further demonstrate the advantage of LAVENDER over existing VidL methods in: (i) supporting all downstream tasks with just a single set of parameter values when multi-task finetuned; (ii) few-shot generalization on various downstream tasks; and (iii) enabling zero-shot evaluation on video question answering tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/microsoft/LAVENDER.
summary: Unified vision-language frameworks have greatly advanced in recent years, most of which adopt an encoder-decoder architecture to unify image-text tasks as sequence-to-sequence generation. However, existing video-language (VidL) models still require task-specific designs in model architecture and training objectives for each task. In this work, we explore a unified VidL framework LAVENDER, where Masked Language Modeling (MLM) is used as the common interface for all pre-training and downstream tasks. Such unification leads to a simplified model architecture, where only a lightweight MLM head, instead of a decoder with much more parameters, is needed on top of the multimodal encoder. Surprisingly, experimental results show that this unified framework achieves competitive performance on 14 VidL benchmarks, covering video question answering, text-to-video retrieval and video captioning. Extensive analyses further demonstrate the advantage of LAVENDER over existing VidL methods in: (i) supporting all downstream tasks with just a single set of parameter values when multi-task finetuned; (ii) few-shot generalization on various downstream tasks; and (iii) enabling zero-shot evaluation on video question answering tasks. Code is available at https://github.com/microsoft/LAVENDER.
abstract_zh: 近年来，统一视觉语言框架取得了巨大进步，其中大多数采用编码器-解码器架构将图像-文本任务统一为序列到序列生成。然而，现有的视频语言（VidL）模型仍然需要在模型架构和每个任务的训练目标中进行特定于任务的设计。在这项工作中，我们探索了一个统一的 VidL 框架 LAVENDER，其中使用 Masked Language Modeling (MLM) 作为所有预训练和下游任务的通用接口。这种统一带来了简化的模型架构，在多模态编码器之上只需要一个轻量级的 MLM 头，而不是具有更多参数的解码器。令人惊讶的是，实验结果表明，这个统一框架在 14 个 VidL 基准测试中实现了具有竞争力的性能，涵盖视频问答、文本到视频检索和视频字幕。广泛的分析进一步证明了 LAVENDER 相对于现有 VidL 方法的优势在于：（i）在多任务微调时仅用一组参数值支持所有下游任务； (ii) 对各种下游任务的小样本泛化； (iii) 实现视频问答任务的零样本评估。代码可在 https://github.com/microsoft/LAVENDER 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LAVENDER框架，通过掩码语言建模（MLM）统一视频-语言理解任务，简化模型架构并提升跨任务性能。
AI.motivation: 现有视频-语言模型需针对不同任务设计特定架构和训练目标，导致复杂性和参数冗余，缺乏统一性。
AI.method: 以MLM为核心接口，仅在多模态编码器上添加轻量级MLM头替代传统解码器，实现视频-语言任务的统一预训练与下游任务适配。
AI.result: 在14个视频-语言基准测试中表现优异，支持多任务微调参数共享、少样本泛化及视频问答零样本评估。
AI.conclusion: LAVENDER通过简化架构和统一目标，为视频-语言理解提供了高效且通用的解决方案，优于现有方法。

However, existing video-language (VidL) models still require task-specific designs in model architecture and training objectives for each task. In this work, we explore a unified VidL framework LAVENDER, where Masked Language Modeling (MLM) is used as the common interface for all pre-training and downstream tasks. Such unification leads to a simplified model architecture, where only a lightweight MLM head, instead of a decoder with much more parameters, is needed on top of the multimodal encoder. Surprisingly, experimental results show that this unified framework achieves competitive performance on 14 VidL benchmarks, covering video question answering, text-to-video retrieval and video captioning. Extensive analyses further demonstrate the advantage of LAVENDER over existing VidL methods in: (i) supporting all downstream tasks with just a single set of parameter values when multi-task finetuned; (ii) few-shot generalization on various downstream tasks; and (iii) enabling zero-shot evaluation on video question answering tasks. authors_text: Xuanang Xu,Hannah H. Deng,Jaime Gateno,Pingkun Yan
title: Federated Multi-organ Segmentation with Inconsistent Labels
title_zh: 标签不一致的联合多器官分割
comment: v1: 10 pages, 5 figures; v2: 14 pages, 5 figures, accepted by IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (TMI), published version available at https://doi.org/10.1109/TMI.2023.3270140, source code available at https://github.com/DIAL-RPI/Fed-MENU
comments: v1: 10 pages, 5 figures; v2: 14 pages, 5 figures, accepted by IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging (TMI), published version available at https://doi.org/10.1109/TMI.2023.3270140, source code available at https://github.com/DIAL-RPI/Fed-MENU
abstract: Federated learning is an emerging paradigm allowing large-scale decentralized learning without sharing data across different data owners, which helps address the concern of data privacy in medical image analysis. However, the requirement for label consistency across clients by the existing methods largely narrows its application scope. In practice, each clinical site may only annotate certain organs of interest with partial or no overlap with other sites. Incorporating such partially labeled data into a unified federation is an unexplored problem with clinical significance and urgency. This work tackles the challenge by using a novel federated multi-encoding U-Net (Fed-MENU) method for multi-organ segmentation. In our method, a multi-encoding U-Net (MENU-Net) is proposed to extract organ-specific features through different encoding sub-networks. Each sub-network can be seen as an expert of a specific organ and trained for that client. Moreover, to encourage the organ-specific features extracted by different sub-networks to be informative and distinctive, we regularize the training of the MENU-Net by designing an auxiliary generic decoder (AGD). Extensive experiments on six public abdominal CT datasets show that our Fed-MENU method can effectively obtain a federated learning model using the partially labeled datasets with superior performance to other models trained by either localized or centralized learning methods. Source code is publicly available at https://github.com/DIAL-RPI/Fed-MENU.
summary: Federated learning is an emerging paradigm allowing large-scale decentralized learning without sharing data across different data owners, which helps address the concern of data privacy in medical image analysis. However, the requirement for label consistency across clients by the existing methods largely narrows its application scope. In practice, each clinical site may only annotate certain organs of interest with partial or no overlap with other sites. Incorporating such partially labeled data into a unified federation is an unexplored problem with clinical significance and urgency. This work tackles the challenge by using a novel federated multi-encoding U-Net (Fed-MENU) method for multi-organ segmentation. In our method, a multi-encoding U-Net (MENU-Net) is proposed to extract organ-specific features through different encoding sub-networks. Each sub-network can be seen as an expert of a specific organ and trained for that client. Moreover, to encourage the organ-specific features extracted by different sub-networks to be informative and distinctive, we regularize the training of the MENU-Net by designing an auxiliary generic decoder (AGD). Extensive experiments on six public abdominal CT datasets show that our Fed-MENU method can effectively obtain a federated learning model using the partially labeled datasets with superior performance to other models trained by either localized or centralized learning methods. Source code is publicly available at https://github.com/DIAL-RPI/Fed-MENU.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习是一种新兴的范式，允许大规模去中心化学习，而无需在不同数据所有者之间共享数据，这有助于解决医学图像分析中的数据隐私问题。然而，现有方法对跨客户端标签一致性的要求很大程度上缩小了其应用范围。在实践中，每个临床部位可能仅注释某些感兴趣的器官，与其他部位部分重叠或不重叠。将此类部分标记的数据纳入统一的联邦是一个具有临床意义和紧迫性的尚未探索的问题。这项工作通过使用一种新颖的联合多编码 U-Net (Fed-MENU) 方法进行多器官分割来应对这一挑战。在我们的方法中，提出了多编码 U-Net（MENU-Net），通过不同的编码子网络提取器官特定特征。每个子网络都可以被视为特定器官的专家并为该客户进行培训。此外，为了鼓励不同子网络提取的器官特定特征变得信息丰富且独特，我们通过设计辅助通用解码器（AGD）来规范 MENU-Net 的训练。对六个公共腹部 CT 数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的 Fed-MENU 方法可以使用部分标记的数据集有效地获得联邦学习模型，其性能优于通过本地或集中学习方法训练的其他模型。源代码可在 https://github.com/DIAL-RPI/Fed-MENU 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Fed-MENU的联邦多器官分割方法，用于处理不同临床站点标注不一致的医学图像数据。
AI.motivation: 现有的联邦学习方法要求标签一致性，这在实际医疗场景中难以满足，因为不同临床站点可能只标注部分器官，缺乏标签重叠。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种多编码U-Net（MENU-Net）结构，每个子网络专门负责一个器官的特征提取，并设计了辅助通用解码器（AGD）来增强器官特征的区分性。
AI.result: 在六个公共腹部CT数据集上的实验表明，Fed-MENU方法在使用部分标注数据进行联邦学习时，性能优于本地化或集中式学习方法。
AI.conclusion: Fed-MENU方法有效解决了联邦学习中部分标注数据的整合问题，具有重要的临床应用价值。

authors_text: Anil Palepu,Andrew L Beam
title: Self-Supervision on Images and Text Reduces Reliance on Visual Shortcut Features
title_zh: 对图像和文本的自我监督减少了对视觉快捷功能的依赖
comment: 4 pages, 2 figures, spotlight talk at SCIS workshop, ICML 2022
comments: 4 pages, 2 figures, spotlight talk at SCIS workshop, ICML 2022
abstract: Deep learning models trained in a fully supervised manner have been shown to rely on so-called "shortcut" features. Shortcut features are inputs that are associated with the outcome of interest in the training data, but are either no longer associated or not present in testing or deployment settings. Here we provide experiments that show recent self-supervised models trained on images and text provide more robust image representations and reduce the model's reliance on visual shortcut features on a realistic medical imaging example. Additionally, we find that these self-supervised models "forget" shortcut features more quickly than fully supervised ones when fine-tuned on labeled data. Though not a complete solution, our experiments provide compelling evidence that self-supervised models trained on images and text provide some resilience to visual shortcut features.
summary: Deep learning models trained in a fully supervised manner have been shown to rely on so-called "shortcut" features. Shortcut features are inputs that are associated with the outcome of interest in the training data, but are either no longer associated or not present in testing or deployment settings. Here we provide experiments that show recent self-supervised models trained on images and text provide more robust image representations and reduce the model's reliance on visual shortcut features on a realistic medical imaging example. Additionally, we find that these self-supervised models "forget" shortcut features more quickly than fully supervised ones when fine-tuned on labeled data. Though not a complete solution, our experiments provide compelling evidence that self-supervised models trained on images and text provide some resilience to visual shortcut features.
abstract_zh: 以完全监督的方式训练的深度学习模型已被证明依赖于所谓的“快捷方式”特征。快捷功能是与训练数据中感兴趣的结果相关联的输入，但不再关联或不存在于测试或部署设置中。在这里，我们提供的实验表明，最近在图像和文本上训练的自监督模型提供了更稳健的图像表示，并减少了模型对真实医学成像示例中的视觉快捷特征的依赖。此外，我们发现，在对标记数据进行微调时，这些自监督模型比完全监督模型更快地“忘记”快捷功能。虽然不是一个完整的解决方案，但我们的实验提供了令人信服的证据，表明在图像和文本上训练的自监督模型为视觉快捷方式功能提供了一定的弹性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在图像和文本上训练的自监督模型如何减少对视觉捷径特征的依赖，并通过医学影像实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 完全监督模型容易依赖训练数据中的捷径特征，导致在测试环境中性能下降，需探索更稳健的模型训练方法。
AI.method: 对比完全监督模型与自监督模型（结合图像和文本），通过医学影像任务评估模型对捷径特征的依赖程度及微调后的表现。
AI.result: 自监督模型在医学影像任务中表现出更稳健的图像表示，减少对捷径特征依赖，并在微调时更快遗忘捷径特征。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习在减少视觉捷径依赖方面具有潜力，但需进一步研究以完善其解决方案。

search_text: Self-Supervision on Images and Text Reduces Reliance on Visual Shortcut Features 对图像和文本的自我监督减少了对视觉快捷功能的依赖 Deep learning models trained in a fully supervised manner have been shown to rely on so-called "shortcut" features. Shortcut features are inputs that are associated with the outcome of interest in the training data, but are either no longer associated or not present in testing or deployment settings. Here we provide experiments that show recent self-supervised models trained on images and text provide more robust image representations and reduce the model's reliance on visual shortcut features on a realistic medical imaging example. Additionally, we find that these self-supervised models "forget" shortcut features more quickly than fully supervised ones when fine-tuned on labeled data. Though not a complete solution, our experiments provide compelling evidence that self-supervised models trained on images and text provide some resilience to visual shortcut features. 以完全监督的方式训练的深度学习模型已被证明依赖于所谓的“快捷方式”特征。快捷功能是与训练数据中感兴趣的结果相关联的输入，但不再关联或不存在于测试或部署设置中。在这里，我们提供的实验表明，最近在图像和文本上训练的自监督模型提供了更稳健的图像表示，并减少了模型对真实医学成像示例中的视觉快捷特征的依赖。此外，我们发现，在对标记数据进行微调时，这些自监督模型比完全监督模型更快地“忘记”快捷功能。虽然不是一个完整的解决方案，但我们的实验提供了令人信服的证据，表明在图像和文本上训练的自监督模型为视觉快捷方式功能提供了一定的弹性。 本文研究了在图像和文本上训练的自监督模型如何减少对视觉捷径特征的依赖，并通过医学影像实验验证其有效性。 Anil Palepu,Andrew L Beam cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Zirong Chen,Isaac Li,Haoxiang Zhang,Sarah Preum,John Stankovic,Meiyi Ma
title: An Intelligent Assistant for Converting City Requirements to Formal Specification
title_zh: 将城市需求转化为正式规范的智能助手
comment: This demo paper is accepted by SMARTCOMP 2022
comments: This demo paper is accepted by SMARTCOMP 2022
abstract: As more and more monitoring systems have been deployed to smart cities, there comes a higher demand for converting new human-specified requirements to machine-understandable formal specifications automatically. However, these human-specific requirements are often written in English and bring missing, inaccurate, or ambiguous information. In this paper, we present CitySpec, an intelligent assistant system for requirement specification in smart cities. CitySpec not only helps overcome the language differences brought by English requirements and formal specifications, but also offers solutions to those missing, inaccurate, or ambiguous information. The goal of this paper is to demonstrate how CitySpec works. Specifically, we present three demos: (1) interactive completion of requirements in CitySpec; (2) human-in-the-loop correction while CitySepc encounters exceptions; (3) online learning in CitySpec.
summary: As more and more monitoring systems have been deployed to smart cities, there comes a higher demand for converting new human-specified requirements to machine-understandable formal specifications automatically. However, these human-specific requirements are often written in English and bring missing, inaccurate, or ambiguous information. In this paper, we present CitySpec, an intelligent assistant system for requirement specification in smart cities. CitySpec not only helps overcome the language differences brought by English requirements and formal specifications, but also offers solutions to those missing, inaccurate, or ambiguous information. The goal of this paper is to demonstrate how CitySpec works. Specifically, we present three demos: (1) interactive completion of requirements in CitySpec; (2) human-in-the-loop correction while CitySepc encounters exceptions; (3) online learning in CitySpec.
abstract_zh: 随着越来越多的监控系统被部署到智慧城市，对自动将人类指定的新要求转换为机器可理解的正式规范提出了更高的要求。然而，这些针对人类的要求通常是用英语编写的，并且会带来缺失、不准确或模糊的信息。在本文中，我们提出了 CitySpec，这是一种用于智能城市需求规范的智能辅助系统。 CitySpec不仅有助于克服英语要求和正式规范带来的语言差异，而且还为那些缺失、不准确或模糊的信息提供解决方案。本文的目的是展示 CitySpec 的工作原理。具体来说，我们展示了三个演示：（1）CitySpec 中交互式完成需求； （2）CitySepc遇到异常时进行人在环修正； (3)CitySpec在线学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CitySpec智能系统，用于解决智慧城市中将人类需求自动转换为形式化规范时的语言差异及信息缺失问题。
AI.motivation: 智慧城市监控系统需求激增，但人工需求存在语言障碍及信息模糊问题，亟需自动化转换工具。
AI.method: 开发CitySpec系统，包含交互式需求补全、异常时人工校正、在线学习三个核心功能模块。
AI.result: 通过三个演示验证系统有效性：需求交互补全、异常处理机制、持续学习能力。
AI.conclusion: CitySpec成功解决语言转换与信息缺失难题，为智慧城市需求规范化提供可行方案。

authors_text: Didac Suris,Carl Vondrick,Bryan Russell,Justin Salamon
title: It's Time for Artistic Correspondence in Music and Video
title_zh: 是时候在音乐和视频中进行艺术对应了
abstract: We present an approach for recommending a music track for a given video, and vice versa, based on both their temporal alignment and their correspondence at an artistic level. We propose a self-supervised approach that learns this correspondence directly from data, without any need of human annotations. In order to capture the high-level concepts that are required to solve the task, we propose modeling the long-term temporal context of both the video and the music signals, using Transformer networks for each modality. Experiments show that this approach strongly outperforms alternatives that do not exploit the temporal context. The combination of our contributions improve retrieval accuracy up to 10x over prior state of the art. This strong improvement allows us to introduce a wide range of analyses and applications. For instance, we can condition music retrieval based on visually defined attributes.
summary: We present an approach for recommending a music track for a given video, and vice versa, based on both their temporal alignment and their correspondence at an artistic level. We propose a self-supervised approach that learns this correspondence directly from data, without any need of human annotations. In order to capture the high-level concepts that are required to solve the task, we propose modeling the long-term temporal context of both the video and the music signals, using Transformer networks for each modality. Experiments show that this approach strongly outperforms alternatives that do not exploit the temporal context. The combination of our contributions improve retrieval accuracy up to 10x over prior state of the art. This strong improvement allows us to introduce a wide range of analyses and applications. For instance, we can condition music retrieval based on visually defined attributes.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种根据时间对齐和艺术层面的对应关系为给定视频推荐音乐曲目的方法，反之亦然。我们提出了一种自我监督的方法，可以直接从数据中学习这种对应关系，而不需要任何人工注释。为了捕获解决任务所需的高级概念，我们建议使用每种模态的 Transformer 网络对视频和音乐信号的长期时间上下文进行建模。实验表明，这种方法的性能远远优于不利用时间上下文的替代方法。我们的贡献相结合，将检索准确率提高至现有技术水平的 10 倍。这一强大的改进使我们能够引入广泛的分析和应用。例如，我们可以根据视觉定义的属性来调节音乐检索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视频和音乐时间对齐及艺术层面对应关系的跨模态推荐方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效捕捉视频与音乐的长期时间上下文，且依赖人工标注数据限制了应用范围。
AI.method: 采用自监督学习框架，利用Transformer网络分别建模视频和音乐的长期时间上下文，无需人工标注。
AI.result: 在检索准确率上较先前方法提升达10倍，支持基于视觉属性的音乐检索等新应用场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过建模跨模态长期依赖关系，显著提升了艺术化对应推荐性能，为多模态分析开辟新方向。

authors_text: Andres Faiña
title: Learning Hands-On Electronics from Home: A Simulator for Fritzing
title_zh: 在家学习动手实践电子产品：Fritzing 模拟器
comment: 12 pages, 4 figures, to be published in 25th International Conference Series on Climbing and Walking Robots (CLAWAR 2022)
comments: 12 pages, 4 figures, to be published in 25th International Conference Series on Climbing and Walking Robots (CLAWAR 2022)
abstract: The recent pandemic has forced us to teach online, which is especially difficult for hand-on courses in robotics, like basic electronics. In this paper, I present a simulator which tries to replicate the same experience students will encounter during the exercises in the laboratory. The simulator has been developed in Fritzing, uses realistic multimeters for measuring and checks for common mistakes. Results show not only that the simulator was extremely useful during the pandemic, but also that it can supplement laboratory exercises when teaching in-classroom.
summary: The recent pandemic has forced us to teach online, which is especially difficult for hand-on courses in robotics, like basic electronics. In this paper, I present a simulator which tries to replicate the same experience students will encounter during the exercises in the laboratory. The simulator has been developed in Fritzing, uses realistic multimeters for measuring and checks for common mistakes. Results show not only that the simulator was extremely useful during the pandemic, but also that it can supplement laboratory exercises when teaching in-classroom.
abstract_zh: 最近的大流行迫使我们在线教学，这对于基础电子学等机器人技术的实践课程来说尤其困难。在本文中，我提出了一个模拟器，它试图复制学生在实验室练习中遇到的相同体验。该模拟器是在 Fritzing 中开发的，使用真实的万用表进行测量并检查常见错误。结果表明，该模拟器不仅在疫情期间非常有用，而且还可以在课堂教学时补充实验室练习。

AI.motivation: 疫情期间在线教学面临缺乏实践操作工具的挑战，尤其针对需要动手操作的电子课程
AI.method: 基于Fritzing平台构建模拟器，集成真实万用表测量功能与常见错误检测机制
AI.result: 模拟器在疫情期间有效支持了在线教学，并作为课堂实验的有效补充
AI.conclusion: 该模拟器成功解决了远程电子教学的实践需求，同时可增强传统实验教学效果

authors_text: Hanming Wang,Haozheng Luo,Yue Wang
title: MBGDT:Robust Mini-Batch Gradient Descent
title_zh: MBGDT：鲁棒小批量梯度下降
abstract: In high dimensions, most machine learning method perform fragile even there are a little outliers. To address this, we hope to introduce a new method with the base learner, such as Bayesian regression or stochastic gradient descent to solve the problem of the vulnerability in the model. Because the mini-batch gradient descent allows for a more robust convergence than the batch gradient descent, we work a method with the mini-batch gradient descent, called Mini-Batch Gradient Descent with Trimming (MBGDT). Our method show state-of-art performance and have greater robustness than several baselines when we apply our method in designed dataset.
summary: In high dimensions, most machine learning method perform fragile even there are a little outliers. To address this, we hope to introduce a new method with the base learner, such as Bayesian regression or stochastic gradient descent to solve the problem of the vulnerability in the model. Because the mini-batch gradient descent allows for a more robust convergence than the batch gradient descent, we work a method with the mini-batch gradient descent, called Mini-Batch Gradient Descent with Trimming (MBGDT). Our method show state-of-art performance and have greater robustness than several baselines when we apply our method in designed dataset.
abstract_zh: 在高维情况下，大多数机器学习方法即使存在一些异常值，其性能也很脆弱。为了解决这个问题，我们希望引入一种新的基学习器方法，例如贝叶斯回归或随机梯度下降来解决模型中的脆弱性问题。由于小批量梯度下降比批量梯度下降具有更稳健的收敛性，因此我们采用了一种小批量梯度下降方法，称为带修剪的小批量梯度下降（MBGDT）。当我们在设计的数据集中应用我们的方法时，我们的方法显示出最先进的性能，并且比几个基线具有更高的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MBGDT的鲁棒小批量梯度下降方法，旨在解决高维数据中异常值导致的模型脆弱性问题。
AI.motivation: 高维数据中大多数机器学习方法对异常值敏感，现有模型存在脆弱性，需引入更鲁棒的优化算法以提高稳定性。
AI.method: 基于小批量梯度下降（MBGD）框架，结合裁剪机制（Trimming）设计MBGDT算法，通过剔除异常梯度更新方向提升收敛鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在设计数据集上验证了MBGDT的优越性，其性能优于多个基线方法，且表现出更显著的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: MBGDT有效增强了模型对高维数据中异常值的鲁棒性，为优化算法设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sören Mindermann,Jan Brauner,Muhammed Razzak,Mrinank Sharma,Andreas Kirsch,Winnie Xu,Benedikt Höltgen,Aidan N. Gomez,Adrien Morisot,Sebastian Farquhar,Yarin Gal
title: Prioritized Training on Points that are Learnable, Worth Learning, and Not Yet Learnt
title_zh: 优先培训可学、值得学、未学的点
abstract: Training on web-scale data can take months. But most computation and time is wasted on redundant and noisy points that are already learnt or not learnable. To accelerate training, we introduce Reducible Holdout Loss Selection (RHO-LOSS), a simple but principled technique which selects approximately those points for training that most reduce the model's generalization loss. As a result, RHO-LOSS mitigates the weaknesses of existing data selection methods: techniques from the optimization literature typically select 'hard' (e.g. high loss) points, but such points are often noisy (not learnable) or less task-relevant. Conversely, curriculum learning prioritizes 'easy' points, but such points need not be trained on once learned. In contrast, RHO-LOSS selects points that are learnable, worth learning, and not yet learnt. RHO-LOSS trains in far fewer steps than prior art, improves accuracy, and speeds up training on a wide range of datasets, hyperparameters, and architectures (MLPs, CNNs, and BERT). On the large web-scraped image dataset Clothing-1M, RHO-LOSS trains in 18x fewer steps and reaches 2% higher final accuracy than uniform data shuffling.
summary: Training on web-scale data can take months. But most computation and time is wasted on redundant and noisy points that are already learnt or not learnable. To accelerate training, we introduce Reducible Holdout Loss Selection (RHO-LOSS), a simple but principled technique which selects approximately those points for training that most reduce the model's generalization loss. As a result, RHO-LOSS mitigates the weaknesses of existing data selection methods: techniques from the optimization literature typically select 'hard' (e.g. high loss) points, but such points are often noisy (not learnable) or less task-relevant. Conversely, curriculum learning prioritizes 'easy' points, but such points need not be trained on once learned. In contrast, RHO-LOSS selects points that are learnable, worth learning, and not yet learnt. RHO-LOSS trains in far fewer steps than prior art, improves accuracy, and speeds up training on a wide range of datasets, hyperparameters, and architectures (MLPs, CNNs, and BERT). On the large web-scraped image dataset Clothing-1M, RHO-LOSS trains in 18x fewer steps and reaches 2% higher final accuracy than uniform data shuffling.
abstract_zh: 对网络规模数据的培训可能需要数月时间。但大多数计算和时间都浪费在已经学习或不可学习的冗余和噪声点上。为了加速训练，我们引入了可减少的保留损失选择（RHO-LOSS），这是一种简单但有原则的技术，它大约选择那些最能减少模型泛化损失的训练点。因此，RHO-LOSS 缓解了现有数据选择方法的弱点：优化文献中的技术通常选择“硬”（例如高损失）点，但这些点通常有噪声（不可学习）或与任务相关性较低。相反，课程学习优先考虑“简单”的要点，但这些要点一旦学会就不需要训练。相比之下，RHO-LOSS 选择可学习、值得学习和尚未学习的点。 RHO-LOSS 的训练步骤比现有技术少得多，提高了准确性，并加快了对各种数据集、超参数和架构（MLP、CNN 和 BERT）的训练速度。在大型网络抓取图像数据集 Clothing-1M 上，RHO-LOSS 的训练步骤减少了 18 倍，最终精度比统一数据洗牌高 2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RHO-LOSS的数据选择方法，通过优先训练可学习、值得学习且尚未学习的数据点，以加速模型训练并提高准确率。
AI.motivation: 传统训练方法在处理大规模数据时效率低下，因大量计算资源浪费在冗余噪声数据或已掌握的样本上，现有数据选择方法存在选择噪声样本或重复训练易样本的缺陷。
AI.method: RHO-LOSS通过近似选择最能降低模型泛化损失的数据点，综合考虑样本的可学习性、任务相关性和未学习状态，避免单纯选择高损失（噪声）或低损失（已掌握）样本。
AI.result: 在Clothing-1M等多数据集上，RHO-LOSS减少18倍训练步骤并提升2%准确率，适用于MLP、CNN、BERT等多种模型架构和超参数设置。
AI.conclusion: RHO-LOSS通过智能数据选择显著加速训练过程并提升模型性能，为大规模数据训练提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为RHO-LOSS的数据选择方法，通过优先训练可学习、值得学习且尚未学习的数据点，以加速模型训练并提高准确率。

authors_text: Zhiqi Bu,Yu-Xiang Wang,Sheng Zha,George Karypis
title: Automatic Clipping: Differentially Private Deep Learning Made Easier and Stronger
title_zh: 自动裁剪：差分隐私深度学习变得更容易、更强
abstract: Per-example gradient clipping is a key algorithmic step that enables practical differential private (DP) training for deep learning models. The choice of clipping threshold R, however, is vital for achieving high accuracy under DP. We propose an easy-to-use replacement, called automatic clipping, that eliminates the need to tune R for any DP optimizers, including DP-SGD, DP-Adam, DP-LAMB and many others. The automatic variants are as private and computationally efficient as existing DP optimizers, but require no DP-specific hyperparameters and thus make DP training as amenable as the standard non-private training. We give a rigorous convergence analysis of automatic DP-SGD in the non-convex setting, showing that it can enjoy an asymptotic convergence rate that matches the standard SGD, under a symmetric gradient noise assumption of the per-sample gradients (commonly used in the non-DP literature). We demonstrate on various language and vision tasks that automatic clipping outperforms or matches the state-of-the-art, and can be easily employed with minimal changes to existing codebases.
summary: Per-example gradient clipping is a key algorithmic step that enables practical differential private (DP) training for deep learning models. The choice of clipping threshold R, however, is vital for achieving high accuracy under DP. We propose an easy-to-use replacement, called automatic clipping, that eliminates the need to tune R for any DP optimizers, including DP-SGD, DP-Adam, DP-LAMB and many others. The automatic variants are as private and computationally efficient as existing DP optimizers, but require no DP-specific hyperparameters and thus make DP training as amenable as the standard non-private training. We give a rigorous convergence analysis of automatic DP-SGD in the non-convex setting, showing that it can enjoy an asymptotic convergence rate that matches the standard SGD, under a symmetric gradient noise assumption of the per-sample gradients (commonly used in the non-DP literature). We demonstrate on various language and vision tasks that automatic clipping outperforms or matches the state-of-the-art, and can be easily employed with minimal changes to existing codebases.
abstract_zh: 每个示例的梯度裁剪是一个关键的算法步骤，它可以为深度学习模型提供实用的差分私有（DP）训练。然而，限幅阈值 R 的选择对于在 DP 下实现高精度至关重要。我们提出了一种易于使用的替代方案，称为自动裁剪，无需为任何 DP 优化器（包括 DP-SGD、DP-Adam、DP-LAMB 等）调整 R。自动变体与现有 DP 优化器一样具有私密性和计算效率，但不需要特定于 DP 的超参数，从而使 DP 训练与标准非私密训练一样易于接受。我们对非凸设置下的自动 DP-SGD 进行了严格的收敛分析，表明在每样本梯度的对称梯度噪声假设下（非 DP 文献中常用），它可以享受与标准 SGD 相匹配的渐近收敛速度。我们在各种语言和视觉任务中演示了自动裁剪优于或匹配最先进的技术，并且可以轻松使用，只需对现有代码库进行最小的更改。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动梯度裁剪方法，简化差分隐私深度学习训练过程，无需手动调整裁剪阈值。
AI.motivation: 差分隐私训练中梯度裁剪阈值R的选择对模型精度至关重要，但传统方法需要人工调参，增加了复杂性和专业门槛。
AI.method: 设计自动裁剪算法动态适配梯度阈值，兼容DP-SGD等主流优化器，无需DP专用超参数，并提供非凸场景下的收敛性证明。
AI.result: 在语言和视觉任务中，自动裁剪方法性能优于或匹配现有最优方案，且对现有代码库改动极小。
AI.conclusion: 自动裁剪使差分隐私训练与普通训练同样便捷，兼顾隐私性与实用性，推动DP技术更广泛落地。

search_text: Automatic Clipping: Differentially Private Deep Learning Made Easier and Stronger 自动裁剪：差分隐私深度学习变得更容易、更强 Per-example gradient clipping is a key algorithmic step that enables practical differential private (DP) training for deep learning models. The choice of clipping threshold R, however, is vital for achieving high accuracy under DP. We propose an easy-to-use replacement, called automatic clipping, that eliminates the need to tune R for any DP optimizers, including DP-SGD, DP-Adam, DP-LAMB and many others. The automatic variants are as private and computationally efficient as existing DP optimizers, but require no DP-specific hyperparameters and thus make DP training as amenable as the standard non-private training. We give a rigorous convergence analysis of automatic DP-SGD in the non-convex setting, showing that it can enjoy an asymptotic convergence rate that matches the standard SGD, under a symmetric gradient noise assumption of the per-sample gradients (commonly used in the non-DP literature). We demonstrate on various language and vision tasks that automatic clipping outperforms or matches the state-of-the-art, and can be easily employed with minimal changes to existing codebases. 每个示例的梯度裁剪是一个关键的算法步骤，它可以为深度学习模型提供实用的差分私有（DP）训练。然而，限幅阈值 R 的选择对于在 DP 下实现高精度至关重要。我们提出了一种易于使用的替代方案，称为自动裁剪，无需为任何 DP 优化器（包括 DP-SGD、DP-Adam、DP-LAMB 等）调整 R。自动变体与现有 DP 优化器一样具有私密性和计算效率，但不需要特定于 DP 的超参数，从而使 DP 训练与标准非私密训练一样易于接受。我们对非凸设置下的自动 DP-SGD 进行了严格的收敛分析，表明在每样本梯度的对称梯度噪声假设下（非 DP 文献中常用），它可以享受与标准 SGD 相匹配的渐近收敛速度。我们在各种语言和视觉任务中演示了自动裁剪优于或匹配最先进的技术，并且可以轻松使用，只需对现有代码库进行最小的更改。 本文提出了一种自动梯度裁剪方法，简化差分隐私深度学习训练过程，无需手动调整裁剪阈值。 Zhiqi Bu,Yu-Xiang Wang,Sheng Zha,George Karypis cs.LG,cs.CL,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Pol del Aguila Pla,Sebastian Neumayer,Michael Unser
title: Stability of Image-Reconstruction Algorithms
title_zh: 图像重建算法的稳定性
abstract: Robustness and stability of image-reconstruction algorithms have recently come under scrutiny. Their importance to medical imaging cannot be overstated. We review the known results for the topical variational regularization strategies ($\ell_2$ and $\ell_1$ regularization) and present novel stability results for $\ell_p$-regularized linear inverse problems for $p\in(1,\infty)$. Our results guarantee Lipschitz continuity for small $p$ and Hölder continuity for larger $p$. They generalize well to the $L_p(Ω)$ function spaces.
summary: Robustness and stability of image-reconstruction algorithms have recently come under scrutiny. Their importance to medical imaging cannot be overstated. We review the known results for the topical variational regularization strategies ($\ell_2$ and $\ell_1$ regularization) and present novel stability results for $\ell_p$-regularized linear inverse problems for $p\in(1,\infty)$. Our results guarantee Lipschitz continuity for small $p$ and Hölder continuity for larger $p$. They generalize well to the $L_p(Ω)$ function spaces.
abstract_zh: 图像重建算法的鲁棒性和稳定性最近受到密切关注。它们对医学成像的重要性怎么强调都不为过。我们回顾了主题变分正则化策略（$\ell_2$ 和 $\ell_1$ 正则化）的已知结果，并针对 $p\in(1,\infty)$ 的 $\ell_p$ 正则化线性逆问题提出了新颖的稳定性结果。我们的结果保证了小$p$ 的Lipschitz 连续性和较大$p$ 的Hölder 连续性。它们很好地推广到 $L_p(Ω)$ 函数空间。

AI.tldr: 本文研究图像重建算法的稳定性，特别是ℓp正则化方法在不同p值下的稳定性分析。
AI.motivation: 图像重建算法的稳定性对医学影像至关重要，现有研究主要集中在ℓ2和ℓ1正则化，需扩展到更一般的ℓp正则化以提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 回顾变分正则化方法的现有结果，分析ℓp正则化线性反问题的稳定性，并推广至L_p(Ω)函数空间。
AI.result: 证明了当p较小时ℓp正则化的Lipschitz连续性，以及p较大时的Hölder连续性，结果适用于更广泛的函数空间。
AI.conclusion: 本文的稳定性结果为医学影像处理提供了理论保障，并为未来研究更复杂的正则化方法奠定了基础。

authors_text: Arash Asadian,Evan Weidner,Lei Jiang
title: Self-Supervised Pretraining for Differentially Private Learning
title_zh: 差异化私人学习的自我监督预训练
abstract: We demonstrate self-supervised pretraining (SSP) is a scalable solution to deep learning with differential privacy (DP) regardless of the size of available public datasets in image classification. When facing the lack of public datasets, we show the features generated by SSP on only one single image enable a private classifier to obtain much better utility than the non-learned handcrafted features under the same privacy budget. When a moderate or large size public dataset is available, the features produced by SSP greatly outperform the features trained with labels on various complex private datasets under the same private budget. We also compared multiple DP-enabled training frameworks to train a private classifier on the features generated by SSP. Finally, we report a non-trivial utility 25.3\% of a private ImageNet-1K dataset when $ε=3$. Our source code can be found at \url{https://github.com/UnchartedRLab/SSP}.
summary: We demonstrate self-supervised pretraining (SSP) is a scalable solution to deep learning with differential privacy (DP) regardless of the size of available public datasets in image classification. When facing the lack of public datasets, we show the features generated by SSP on only one single image enable a private classifier to obtain much better utility than the non-learned handcrafted features under the same privacy budget. When a moderate or large size public dataset is available, the features produced by SSP greatly outperform the features trained with labels on various complex private datasets under the same private budget. We also compared multiple DP-enabled training frameworks to train a private classifier on the features generated by SSP. Finally, we report a non-trivial utility 25.3\% of a private ImageNet-1K dataset when $ε=3$. Our source code can be found at \url{https://github.com/UnchartedRLab/SSP}.
abstract_zh: 我们证明，自监督预训练（SSP）是一种可扩展的深度学习解决方案，具有差分隐私（DP），无论图像分类中可用公共数据集的大小如何。当面临公共数据集的缺乏时，我们展示了 SSP 仅在一张图像上生成的特征，使得私有分类器在相同的隐私预算下比非学习的手工特征获得更好的效用。当中等或大型公共数据集可用时，SSP 生成的特征大大优于在相同私人预算下在各种复杂私人数据集上使用标签训练的特征。我们还比较了多个支持 DP 的训练框架，以根据 SSP 生成的特征训练私有分类器。最后，当 $ε=3$ 时，我们报告了私有 ImageNet-1K 数据集的非平凡效用 25.3%。我们的源代码可以在 \url{https://github.com/UnchartedRLab/SSP} 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出自监督预训练（SSP）作为差分隐私学习的可扩展解决方案，适用于不同规模的公共数据集的图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 差分隐私（DP）下的深度学习面临隐私预算限制与模型效用之间的矛盾，尤其在缺乏公共数据集时难以有效训练私有分类器。
AI.method: 通过自监督预训练生成特征，结合多种DP训练框架，在仅有单张图像或中等规模公共数据集的情况下训练私有分类器，并对比不同方法的性能。
AI.result: 在隐私预算ε=3时，私有ImageNet-1K数据集的效用达到非私有模型的25.3%；SSP生成的特征在相同隐私预算下显著优于传统手工特征和有标签特征。
AI.conclusion: 自监督预训练能有效提升差分隐私学习的模型效用，无论公共数据集规模大小，为隐私保护下的深度学习提供实用方案。

When a moderate or large size public dataset is available, the features produced by SSP greatly outperform the features trained with labels on various complex private datasets under the same private budget. We also compared multiple DP-enabled training frameworks to train a private classifier on the features generated by SSP. Finally, we report a non-trivial utility 25.3\% of a private ImageNet-1K dataset when $ε=3$. Our source code can be found at \url{https://github.com/UnchartedRLab/SSP}. 我们证明，自监督预训练（SSP）是一种可扩展的深度学习解决方案，具有差分隐私（DP），无论图像分类中可用公共数据集的大小如何。当面临公共数据集的缺乏时，我们展示了 SSP 仅在一张图像上生成的特征，使得私有分类器在相同的隐私预算下比非学习的手工特征获得更好的效用。当中等或大型公共数据集可用时，SSP 生成的特征大大优于在相同私人预算下在各种复杂私人数据集上使用标签训练的特征。我们还比较了多个支持 DP 的训练框架，以根据 SSP 生成的特征训练私有分类器。最后，当 $ε=3$ 时，我们报告了私有 ImageNet-1K 数据集的非平凡效用 25.3%。我们的源代码可以在 \url{https://github.com/UnchartedRLab/SSP} 找到。 本文提出自监督预训练（SSP）作为差分隐私学习的可扩展解决方案，适用于不同规模的公共数据集的图像分类任务。 Arash Asadian,Evan Weidner,Lei Jiang cs.CV,cs.CR

authors_text: Brian Lucena
title: Loss Functions for Classification using Structured Entropy
title_zh: 使用结构化熵进行分类的损失函数
abstract: Cross-entropy loss is the standard metric used to train classification models in deep learning and gradient boosting. It is well-known that this loss function fails to account for similarities between the different values of the target. We propose a generalization of entropy called {\em structured entropy} which uses a random partition to incorporate the structure of the target variable in a manner which retains many theoretical properties of standard entropy. We show that a structured cross-entropy loss yields better results on several classification problems where the target variable has an a priori known structure. The approach is simple, flexible, easily computable, and does not rely on a hierarchically defined notion of structure.
summary: Cross-entropy loss is the standard metric used to train classification models in deep learning and gradient boosting. It is well-known that this loss function fails to account for similarities between the different values of the target. We propose a generalization of entropy called {\em structured entropy} which uses a random partition to incorporate the structure of the target variable in a manner which retains many theoretical properties of standard entropy. We show that a structured cross-entropy loss yields better results on several classification problems where the target variable has an a priori known structure. The approach is simple, flexible, easily computable, and does not rely on a hierarchically defined notion of structure.
abstract_zh: 交叉熵损失是用于训练深度学习和梯度提升中的分类模型的标准度量。众所周知，该损失函数无法考虑目标不同值之间的相似性。我们提出了一种称为“结构化熵”的熵的推广，它使用随机分区以保留标准熵的许多理论属性的方式合并目标变量的结构。我们表明，结构化交叉熵损失在目标变量具有先验已知结构的几个分类问题上产生更好的结果。该方法简单、灵活、易于计算，并且不依赖于分层定义的结构概念。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于结构熵的分类损失函数，用于处理具有先验结构的目标变量分类问题。
AI.motivation: 传统交叉熵损失函数无法捕捉目标变量之间的相似性结构，导致在存在潜在结构信息时分类效果受限。
AI.method: 通过引入随机分区机制构建结构熵，将目标变量的先验结构信息嵌入损失函数计算过程。
AI.result: 在多个具有结构化目标的分类任务中，结构交叉熵损失较传统方法取得更优性能，且计算复杂度可控。
AI.conclusion: 结构熵损失函数在保持理论完备性的同时，有效利用了目标变量的结构特征，为分类任务提供了更灵活的优化方向。

authors_text: Mohammad Rezaei,Razieh Rastgoo,Vassilis Athitsos
title: TriHorn-Net: A Model for Accurate Depth-Based 3D Hand Pose Estimation
title_zh: TriHorn-Net：基于深度的准确 3D 手势估计模型
abstract: 3D hand pose estimation methods have made significant progress recently. However, the estimation accuracy is often far from sufficient for specific real-world applications, and thus there is significant room for improvement. This paper proposes TriHorn-Net, a novel model that uses specific innovations to improve hand pose estimation accuracy on depth images. The first innovation is the decomposition of the 3D hand pose estimation into the estimation of 2D joint locations in the depth image space (UV), and the estimation of their corresponding depths aided by two complementary attention maps. This decomposition prevents depth estimation, which is a more difficult task, from interfering with the UV estimations at both the prediction and feature levels. The second innovation is PixDropout, which is, to the best of our knowledge, the first appearance-based data augmentation method for hand depth images. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on three public benchmark datasets. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/mrezaei92/TriHorn-Net.
summary: 3D hand pose estimation methods have made significant progress recently. However, the estimation accuracy is often far from sufficient for specific real-world applications, and thus there is significant room for improvement. This paper proposes TriHorn-Net, a novel model that uses specific innovations to improve hand pose estimation accuracy on depth images. The first innovation is the decomposition of the 3D hand pose estimation into the estimation of 2D joint locations in the depth image space (UV), and the estimation of their corresponding depths aided by two complementary attention maps. This decomposition prevents depth estimation, which is a more difficult task, from interfering with the UV estimations at both the prediction and feature levels. The second innovation is PixDropout, which is, to the best of our knowledge, the first appearance-based data augmentation method for hand depth images. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed model outperforms the state-of-the-art methods on three public benchmark datasets. Our implementation is available at https://github.com/mrezaei92/TriHorn-Net.
abstract_zh: 3D 手部姿势估计方法最近取得了重大进展。然而，估计精度通常远远不足以满足特定的实际应用，因此还有很大的改进空间。本文提出了 TriHorn-Net，这是一种新颖的模型，它使用特定的创新来提高深度图像的手部姿势估计准确性。第一个创新是将 3D 手部姿势估计分解为深度图像空间 (UV) 中 2D 关节位置的估计，并在两个互补的注意力图的帮助下估计其相应的深度。这种分解可以防止深度估计（这是一项更困难的任务）干扰预测和特征级别的 UV 估计。第二个创新是 PixDropout，据我们所知，这是第一个基于外观的手部深度图像数据增强方法。实验结果表明，所提出的模型在三个公共基准数据集上优于最先进的方法。我们的实现可在 https://github.com/mrezaei92/TriHorn-Net 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TriHorn-Net模型，通过深度图像实现更精确的3D手部姿态估计。
AI.motivation: 现有3D手部姿态估计方法在实际应用中精度不足，需改进以满足现实需求。
AI.method: 提出两种创新：1) 将3D姿态分解为深度图像中的2D关节定位（UV）与深度估计，利用互补注意力图减少干扰；2) 设计PixDropout数据增强方法。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上优于现有最佳方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: TriHorn-Net通过分解任务与新型数据增强显著提升精度，适用于实际场景。

authors_text: Fariba Karimi,Marcos Oliveira,Markus Strohmaier
title: Minorities in networks and algorithms
title_zh: 网络和算法中的少数派
abstract: In this chapter, we provide an overview of recent advances in data-driven and theory-informed complex models of social networks and their potential in understanding societal inequalities and marginalization. We focus on inequalities arising from networks and network-based algorithms and how they affect minorities. In particular, we examine how homophily and mixing biases shape large and small social networks, influence perception of minorities, and affect collaboration patterns. We also discuss dynamical processes on and of networks and the formation of norms and health inequalities. Additionally, we argue that network modeling is paramount for unveiling the effect of ranking and social recommendation algorithms on the visibility of minorities. Finally, we highlight the key challenges and future opportunities in this emerging research topic.
summary: In this chapter, we provide an overview of recent advances in data-driven and theory-informed complex models of social networks and their potential in understanding societal inequalities and marginalization. We focus on inequalities arising from networks and network-based algorithms and how they affect minorities. In particular, we examine how homophily and mixing biases shape large and small social networks, influence perception of minorities, and affect collaboration patterns. We also discuss dynamical processes on and of networks and the formation of norms and health inequalities. Additionally, we argue that network modeling is paramount for unveiling the effect of ranking and social recommendation algorithms on the visibility of minorities. Finally, we highlight the key challenges and future opportunities in this emerging research topic.
abstract_zh: 在本章中，我们概述了数据驱动和理论指导的复杂社交网络模型的最新进展及其在理解社会不平等和边缘化方面的潜力。我们关注网络和基于网络的算法引起的不平等以及它们如何影响少数群体。特别是，我们研究了同质性和混合偏见如何塑造大大小小的社交网络、影响少数群体的看法以及影响协作模式。我们还讨论网络上的动态过程以及规范和健康不平等的形成。此外，我们认为网络建模对于揭示排名和社交推荐算法对少数群体可见性的影响至关重要。最后，我们强调了这个新兴研究主题的主要挑战和未来机遇。

AI.tldr: 综述社会网络和算法如何影响少数群体的不平等，并探讨相关机制与挑战。
AI.motivation: 揭示网络结构与算法在加剧社会不平等中的作用，尤其是对少数群体的影响，以促进更公平的网络设计。
AI.method: 结合数据驱动模型与理论分析，研究网络结构、算法机制及动态过程对少数群体的影响。
AI.result: 发现网络同质性和算法偏差加剧了少数群体的边缘化，动态过程影响规范与健康不平等。
AI.conclusion: 强调网络建模对揭示算法偏见的关键作用，呼吁跨学科研究以解决少数群体在数字社会中的不平等问题。

Finally, we highlight the key challenges and future opportunities in this emerging research topic. 在本章中，我们概述了数据驱动和理论指导的复杂社交网络模型的最新进展及其在理解社会不平等和边缘化方面的潜力。我们关注网络和基于网络的算法引起的不平等以及它们如何影响少数群体。特别是，我们研究了同质性和混合偏见如何塑造大大小小的社交网络、影响少数群体的看法以及影响协作模式。我们还讨论网络上的动态过程以及规范和健康不平等的形成。此外，我们认为网络建模对于揭示排名和社交推荐算法对少数群体可见性的影响至关重要。最后，我们强调了这个新兴研究主题的主要挑战和未来机遇。 综述社会网络和算法如何影响少数群体的不平等，并探讨相关机制与挑战。 Fariba Karimi,Marcos Oliveira,Markus Strohmaier physics.soc-ph,cs.AI,cs.CY,cs.SI,nlin.AO

authors_text: Fatih Erdem Kizilkaya,David Kempe
title: Plurality Veto: A Simple Voting Rule Achieving Optimal Metric Distortion
title_zh: 多数否决：实现最佳度量扭曲的简单投票规则
abstract: The metric distortion framework posits that n voters and m candidates are jointly embedded in a metric space such that voters rank candidates that are closer to them higher. A voting rule's purpose is to pick a candidate with minimum total distance to the voters, given only the rankings, but not the actual distances. As a result, in the worst case, each deterministic rule picks a candidate whose total distance is at least three times larger than that of an optimal one, i.e., has distortion at least 3. A recent breakthrough result showed that achieving this bound of 3 is possible; however, the proof is non-constructive, and the voting rule itself is a complicated exhaustive search. Our main result is an extremely simple voting rule, called Plurality Veto, which achieves the same optimal distortion of 3. Each candidate starts with a score equal to his number of first-place votes. These scores are then gradually decreased via an n-round veto process in which a candidate drops out when his score reaches zero. One after the other, voters decrement the score of their bottom choice among the standing candidates, and the last standing candidate wins. We give a one-paragraph proof that this voting rule achieves distortion 3. This rule is also immensely practical, and it only makes two queries to each voter, so it has low communication overhead. We also generalize Plurality Veto into a class of randomized voting rules in the following way: Plurality veto is run only for k < n rounds; then, a candidate is chosen with probability proportional to his residual score. This general rule interpolates between Random Dictatorship (for k=0) and Plurality Veto (for k=n-1), and k controls the variance of the output. We show that for all k, this rule has distortion at most 3.
summary: The metric distortion framework posits that n voters and m candidates are jointly embedded in a metric space such that voters rank candidates that are closer to them higher. A voting rule's purpose is to pick a candidate with minimum total distance to the voters, given only the rankings, but not the actual distances. As a result, in the worst case, each deterministic rule picks a candidate whose total distance is at least three times larger than that of an optimal one, i.e., has distortion at least 3. A recent breakthrough result showed that achieving this bound of 3 is possible; however, the proof is non-constructive, and the voting rule itself is a complicated exhaustive search. Our main result is an extremely simple voting rule, called Plurality Veto, which achieves the same optimal distortion of 3. Each candidate starts with a score equal to his number of first-place votes. These scores are then gradually decreased via an n-round veto process in which a candidate drops out when his score reaches zero. One after the other, voters decrement the score of their bottom choice among the standing candidates, and the last standing candidate wins. We give a one-paragraph proof that this voting rule achieves distortion 3. This rule is also immensely practical, and it only makes two queries to each voter, so it has low communication overhead. We also generalize Plurality Veto into a class of randomized voting rules in the following way: Plurality veto is run only for k < n rounds; then, a candidate is chosen with probability proportional to his residual score. This general rule interpolates between Random Dictatorship (for k=0) and Plurality Veto (for k=n-1), and k controls the variance of the output. We show that for all k, this rule has distortion at most 3.
abstract_zh: 度量扭曲框架假设 n 个选民和 m 个候选人共同嵌入到一个度量空间中，以便选民将与他们更接近的候选人排名更高。投票规则的目的是选择与选民总距离最小的候选人，仅给出排名，而不给出实际距离。结果，在最坏的情况下，每个确定性规则都会选择一个总距离至少比最优规则大三倍的候选者，即失真度至少为 3。最近的一项突破性结果表明，达到 3 的界限是可能的；然而，证明是非建设性的，投票规则本身就是一个复杂的穷举搜索。我们的主要结果是一个极其简单的投票规则，称为“复数否决”，它实现了同样的最佳失真度 3。每个候选人一开始的得分等于他的第一名选票数。然后，这些分数通过 n 轮否决过程逐渐降低，当候选人的分数达到零时，他将退出。选民们依次递减他们在常任候选人中排名垫底的选择的分数，最后一位常任候选人获胜。我们给出了一段证明，证明这个投票规则实现了扭曲3。这个规则也非常实用，它只对每个投票者进行两次查询，因此它的通信开销很低。我们还通过以下方式将复数否决推广为一类随机投票规则：复数否决仅在 k < n 轮中运行；然后，以与其剩余分数成比例的概率选择候选人。此一般规则在随机独裁（对于 k=0）和复数否决（对于 k=n-1）之间进行插值，并且 k 控制输出的方差。我们证明，对于所有 k，该规则的失真度最多为 3。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Plurality Veto的简单投票规则，能够在不依赖实际距离信息的情况下，通过排名实现最优的度量失真（distortion）控制。
AI.motivation: 传统确定性投票规则在最坏情况下会导致总距离是最佳候选人的三倍，尽管已有理论证明可达到3的失真界，但此前方法复杂且非构造性，缺乏实用性。
AI.method: Plurality Veto规则初始根据第一选票分配分数，通过n轮逐步淘汰机制降低分数，最终剩余候选人获胜；并推广为随机化规则以平衡输出方差。
AI.result: 该规则在保证通信开销极低（仅需每名选民两次查询）的同时，严格证明其失真界为3，且随机化扩展版本对所有k值均保持失真不超过3。
AI.conclusion: Plurality Veto兼具理论最优性与工程实用性，为度量失真框架下的群体决策提供了简洁高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Kaifeng Lyu,Zhiyuan Li,Sanjeev Arora
title: Understanding the Generalization Benefit of Normalization Layers: Sharpness Reduction
title_zh: 了解归一化层的泛化优势：锐度降低
comment: 76 pages, many figures; NeurIPS 2022 camera-ready version; fixes minor typos
comments: 76 pages, many figures; NeurIPS 2022 camera-ready version; fixes minor typos
abstract: Normalization layers (e.g., Batch Normalization, Layer Normalization) were introduced to help with optimization difficulties in very deep nets, but they clearly also help generalization, even in not-so-deep nets. Motivated by the long-held belief that flatter minima lead to better generalization, this paper gives mathematical analysis and supporting experiments suggesting that normalization (together with accompanying weight-decay) encourages GD to reduce the sharpness of loss surface. Here "sharpness" is carefully defined given that the loss is scale-invariant, a known consequence of normalization. Specifically, for a fairly broad class of neural nets with normalization, our theory explains how GD with a finite learning rate enters the so-called Edge of Stability (EoS) regime, and characterizes the trajectory of GD in this regime via a continuous sharpness-reduction flow.
summary: Normalization layers (e.g., Batch Normalization, Layer Normalization) were introduced to help with optimization difficulties in very deep nets, but they clearly also help generalization, even in not-so-deep nets. Motivated by the long-held belief that flatter minima lead to better generalization, this paper gives mathematical analysis and supporting experiments suggesting that normalization (together with accompanying weight-decay) encourages GD to reduce the sharpness of loss surface. Here "sharpness" is carefully defined given that the loss is scale-invariant, a known consequence of normalization. Specifically, for a fairly broad class of neural nets with normalization, our theory explains how GD with a finite learning rate enters the so-called Edge of Stability (EoS) regime, and characterizes the trajectory of GD in this regime via a continuous sharpness-reduction flow.
abstract_zh: 引入归一化层（例如批量归一化、层归一化）是为了帮助解决非常深的网络中的优化困难，但它们显然也有助于泛化，即使在不太深的网络中也是如此。受长期持有的信念的启发，即更平坦的最小值会带来更好的泛化能力，本文给出了数学分析和支持实验，表明归一化（连同伴随的权重衰减）鼓励 GD 降低损失表面的锐度。这里“清晰度”被仔细定义，因为损失是尺度不变的，这是归一化的已知结果。具体来说，对于相当广泛的归一化神经网络，我们的理论解释了具有有限学习率的 GD 如何进入所谓的稳定边缘（EoS）状态，并通过连续的锐度降低流来表征该状态下 GD 的轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文分析归一化层（如批量归一化）如何通过降低损失函数曲面的sharpness（锐度）来提升神经网络的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 基于传统观点认为平坦的损失函数极小值更利于泛化，本文旨在解释归一化层为何能提升模型泛化性能。
AI.method: 结合数学分析与实验，定义scale-invariant条件下的sharpness，研究梯度下降在归一化网络中的动态行为，并分析其进入Edge of Stability（EoS）区域的轨迹。
AI.result: 理论证明归一化层与权重衰减联合使用时，梯度下降会降低损失曲面sharpness，并通过连续锐度减少流刻画其EoS区域的优化轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 归一化层通过降低sharpness促进泛化，该机制为理解其优化与泛化优势提供了理论依据。

authors_text: N. Cavrel,D. Pellier,H. Fiorino
title: An Efficient HTN to STRIPS Encoding for Concurrent Plans
title_zh: 并发计划的高效 HTN 到 STRIPS 编码
comment: ef:Proceedings of the International Workshop of Hierarchical Planning (ICAPS), 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the International Workshop of Hierarchical Planning (ICAPS), 2022
abstract: The Hierarchical Task Network (HTN) formalism is used to express a wide variety of planning problems in terms of decompositions of tasks into subtaks. Many techniques have been proposed to solve such hierarchical planning problems. A particular technique is to encode hierarchical planning problems as classical STRIPS planning problems. One advantage of this technique is to benefit directly from the constant improvements made by STRIPS planners. However, there are still few effective and expressive encodings. In this paper, we present a new HTN to STRIPS encoding allowing to generate concurrent plans. We show experimentally that this encoding outperforms previous approaches on hierarchical IPC benchmarks.
summary: The Hierarchical Task Network (HTN) formalism is used to express a wide variety of planning problems in terms of decompositions of tasks into subtaks. Many techniques have been proposed to solve such hierarchical planning problems. A particular technique is to encode hierarchical planning problems as classical STRIPS planning problems. One advantage of this technique is to benefit directly from the constant improvements made by STRIPS planners. However, there are still few effective and expressive encodings. In this paper, we present a new HTN to STRIPS encoding allowing to generate concurrent plans. We show experimentally that this encoding outperforms previous approaches on hierarchical IPC benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 分层任务网络 (HTN) 形式用于将任务分解为子任务来表达各种规划问题。已经提出了许多技术来解决此类分层规划问题。一种特殊的技术是将分层规划问题编码为经典的 STRIPS 规划问题。该技术的优点之一是直接受益于 STRIPS 规划者的不断改进。然而，有效且富有表现力的编码仍然很少。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的 HTN 到 STRIPS 编码，允许生成并发计划。我们通过实验证明，这种编码在分层 IPC 基准测试中优于以前的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的HTN到STRIPS编码方法，用于生成并发计划。
AI.motivation: 现有HTN到STRIPS的编码方法在表达能力和效率上存在不足，而STRIPS规划器的持续改进值得利用。
AI.method: 设计新的HTN到STRIPS编码方案，支持并发计划生成并保留任务分解特性。
AI.result: 实验表明该编码方法在分层IPC基准测试中优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 新编码方法有效提升了分层规划问题的求解效率和表达能力。

authors_text: Yunwen Lei
title: Stability and Generalization of Stochastic Optimization with Nonconvex and Nonsmooth Problems
title_zh: 非凸非光滑问题随机优化的稳定性和泛化
abstract: Stochastic optimization has found wide applications in minimizing objective functions in machine learning, which motivates a lot of theoretical studies to understand its practical success. Most of existing studies focus on the convergence of optimization errors, while the generalization analysis of stochastic optimization is much lagging behind. This is especially the case for nonconvex and nonsmooth problems often encountered in practice. In this paper, we initialize a systematic stability and generalization analysis of stochastic optimization on nonconvex and nonsmooth problems. We introduce novel algorithmic stability measures and establish their quantitative connection on the gap between population gradients and empirical gradients, which is then further extended to study the gap between the Moreau envelope of the empirical risk and that of the population risk. To our knowledge, these quantitative connection between stability and generalization in terms of either gradients or Moreau envelopes have not been studied in the literature. We introduce a class of sampling-determined algorithms, for which we develop bounds for three stability measures. Finally, we apply these discussions to derive error bounds for stochastic gradient descent and its adaptive variant, where we show how to achieve an implicit regularization by tuning the step sizes and the number of iterations.
summary: Stochastic optimization has found wide applications in minimizing objective functions in machine learning, which motivates a lot of theoretical studies to understand its practical success. Most of existing studies focus on the convergence of optimization errors, while the generalization analysis of stochastic optimization is much lagging behind. This is especially the case for nonconvex and nonsmooth problems often encountered in practice. In this paper, we initialize a systematic stability and generalization analysis of stochastic optimization on nonconvex and nonsmooth problems. We introduce novel algorithmic stability measures and establish their quantitative connection on the gap between population gradients and empirical gradients, which is then further extended to study the gap between the Moreau envelope of the empirical risk and that of the population risk. To our knowledge, these quantitative connection between stability and generalization in terms of either gradients or Moreau envelopes have not been studied in the literature. We introduce a class of sampling-determined algorithms, for which we develop bounds for three stability measures. Finally, we apply these discussions to derive error bounds for stochastic gradient descent and its adaptive variant, where we show how to achieve an implicit regularization by tuning the step sizes and the number of iterations.
abstract_zh: 随机优化在机器学习中最小化目标函数方面有着广泛的应用，这激发了许多理论研究来理解其实际成功。现有的研究大多集中在优化误差的收敛性上，而对随机优化的泛化分析则严重滞后。对于实践中经常遇到的非凸和非光滑问题尤其如此。在本文中，我们初始化了非凸和非光滑问题的随机优化的系统稳定性和泛化分析。我们引入了新颖的算法稳定性度量，并在总体梯度和经验梯度之间的差距上建立了定量联系，然后进一步扩展到研究经验风险的莫罗包络线和总体风险的莫罗包络线之间的差距。据我们所知，文献中尚未研究过梯度或莫罗包络方面的稳定性和泛化之间的定量联系。我们引入了一类采样确定的算法，为此我们开发了三个稳定性度量的界限。最后，我们应用这些讨论来推导随机梯度下降及其自适应变体的误差界限，其中我们展示了如何通过调整步长和迭代次数来实现隐式正则化。

AI.tldr: 本文系统分析了随机优化在非凸和非光滑问题中的稳定性与泛化能力，填补了现有研究在泛化分析方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注随机优化的收敛性，而对非凸和非光滑问题的泛化分析不足，亟需建立稳定性与泛化的定量联系。
AI.method: 引入新型算法稳定性度量，建立其与梯度差距及Moreau包络差距的定量关系，并提出采样确定算法类以分析稳定性界限。
AI.result: 推导了随机梯度下降及其自适应变体的误差界，证明通过调整步长和迭代次数可实现隐式正则化。
AI.conclusion: 首次建立了非凸非光滑问题中稳定性与泛化的定量联系，为算法设计提供了理论依据并展示了隐式正则化潜力。

Most of existing studies focus on the convergence of optimization errors, while the generalization analysis of stochastic optimization is much lagging behind. This is especially the case for nonconvex and nonsmooth problems often encountered in practice. In this paper, we initialize a systematic stability and generalization analysis of stochastic optimization on nonconvex and nonsmooth problems. We introduce novel algorithmic stability measures and establish their quantitative connection on the gap between population gradients and empirical gradients, which is then further extended to study the gap between the Moreau envelope of the empirical risk and that of the population risk. To our knowledge, these quantitative connection between stability and generalization in terms of either gradients or Moreau envelopes have not been studied in the literature. We introduce a class of sampling-determined algorithms, for which we develop bounds for three stability measures. authors_text: Rongguang Wang,Vishnu Bashyam,Zhijian Yang,Fanyang Yu,Vasiliki Tassopoulou,Sai Spandana Chintapalli,Ioanna Skampardoni,Lasya P. Sreepada,Dushyant Sahoo,Konstantina Nikita,Ahmed Abdulkadir,Junhao Wen,Christos Davatzikos
title: Applications of Generative Adversarial Networks in Neuroimaging and Clinical Neuroscience
title_zh: 生成对抗网络在神经影像和临床神经科学中的应用
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) are one powerful type of deep learning models that have been successfully utilized in numerous fields. They belong to a broader family called generative methods, which generate new data with a probabilistic model by learning sample distribution from real examples. In the clinical context, GANs have shown enhanced capabilities in capturing spatially complex, nonlinear, and potentially subtle disease effects compared to traditional generative methods. This review appraises the existing literature on the applications of GANs in imaging studies of various neurological conditions, including Alzheimer's disease, brain tumors, brain aging, and multiple sclerosis. We provide an intuitive explanation of various GAN methods for each application and further discuss the main challenges, open questions, and promising future directions of leveraging GANs in neuroimaging. We aim to bridge the gap between advanced deep learning methods and neurology research by highlighting how GANs can be leveraged to support clinical decision making and contribute to a better understanding of the structural and functional patterns of brain diseases.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) are one powerful type of deep learning models that have been successfully utilized in numerous fields. They belong to a broader family called generative methods, which generate new data with a probabilistic model by learning sample distribution from real examples. In the clinical context, GANs have shown enhanced capabilities in capturing spatially complex, nonlinear, and potentially subtle disease effects compared to traditional generative methods. This review appraises the existing literature on the applications of GANs in imaging studies of various neurological conditions, including Alzheimer's disease, brain tumors, brain aging, and multiple sclerosis. We provide an intuitive explanation of various GAN methods for each application and further discuss the main challenges, open questions, and promising future directions of leveraging GANs in neuroimaging. We aim to bridge the gap between advanced deep learning methods and neurology research by highlighting how GANs can be leveraged to support clinical decision making and contribute to a better understanding of the structural and functional patterns of brain diseases.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）是一种强大的深度学习模型，已成功应用于许多领域。它们属于一个更广泛的家族，称为生成方法，通过从真实例子中学习样本分布，使用概率模型生成新数据。在临床环境中，与传统的生成方法相比，GAN 在捕获空间复杂、非线性和潜在微妙的疾病影响方面表现出了增强的能力。本综述评估了有关 GAN 在各种神经系统疾病成像研究中应用的现有文献，包括阿尔茨海默病、脑肿瘤、脑衰老和多发性硬化症。我们为每个应用提供了各种 GAN 方法的直观解释，并进一步讨论了在神经影像中利用 GAN 的主要挑战、悬而未决的问题和有希望的未来方向。我们的目标是通过强调如何利用 GAN 来支持临床决策并有助于更好地理解脑部疾病的结构和功能模式，从而弥合先进深度学习方法和神经学研究之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了生成对抗网络（GANs）在神经影像学和临床神经科学中的应用，重点探讨其在阿尔茨海默病、脑肿瘤等神经系统疾病研究中的潜力。
AI.motivation: 传统生成方法难以捕捉复杂脑疾病的空间非线性特征，而GANs在数据生成和疾病模式建模方面表现出优势，需系统梳理其在神经影像领域的应用现状与挑战。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析GANs在不同神经疾病中的具体应用案例，解释各类GAN方法的原理，并讨论技术难点与未来研究方向。
AI.result: 总结了GANs在脑疾病影像生成、病理特征提取及临床决策支持中的应用进展，明确了数据质量、模型可解释性等关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: GANs为神经影像研究提供了新工具，但需进一步优化算法鲁棒性与临床验证流程以推动实际应用。

search_text: Applications of Generative Adversarial Networks in Neuroimaging and Clinical Neuroscience 生成对抗网络在神经影像和临床神经科学中的应用 Generative adversarial networks (GANs) are one powerful type of deep learning models that have been successfully utilized in numerous fields. They belong to a broader family called generative methods, which generate new data with a probabilistic model by learning sample distribution from real examples. In the clinical context, GANs have shown enhanced capabilities in capturing spatially complex, nonlinear, and potentially subtle disease effects compared to traditional generative methods. This review appraises the existing literature on the applications of GANs in imaging studies of various neurological conditions, including Alzheimer's disease, brain tumors, brain aging, and multiple sclerosis. We provide an intuitive explanation of various GAN methods for each application and further discuss the main challenges, open questions, and promising future directions of leveraging GANs in neuroimaging. We aim to bridge the gap between advanced deep learning methods and neurology research by highlighting how GANs can be leveraged to support clinical decision making and contribute to a better understanding of the structural and functional patterns of brain diseases. 生成对抗网络（GAN）是一种强大的深度学习模型，已成功应用于许多领域。它们属于一个更广泛的家族，称为生成方法，通过从真实例子中学习样本分布，使用概率模型生成新数据。在临床环境中，与传统的生成方法相比，GAN 在捕获空间复杂、非线性和潜在微妙的疾病影响方面表现出了增强的能力。本综述评估了有关 GAN 在各种神经系统疾病成像研究中应用的现有文献，包括阿尔茨海默病、脑肿瘤、脑衰老和多发性硬化症。我们为每个应用提供了各种 GAN 方法的直观解释，并进一步讨论了在神经影像中利用 GAN 的主要挑战、悬而未决的问题和有希望的未来方向。我们的目标是通过强调如何利用 GAN 来支持临床决策并有助于更好地理解脑部疾病的结构和功能模式，从而弥合先进深度学习方法和神经学研究之间的差距。 本文综述了生成对抗网络（GANs）在神经影像学和临床神经科学中的应用，重点探讨其在阿尔茨海默病、脑肿瘤等神经系统疾病研究中的潜力。 Rongguang Wang,Vishnu Bashyam,Zhijian Yang,Fanyang Yu,Vasiliki Tassopoulou,Sai Spandana Chintapalli,Ioanna Skampardoni,Lasya P. Sreepada,Dushyant Sahoo,Konstantina Nikita,Ahmed Abdulkadir,Junhao Wen,Christos Davatzikos cs.LG,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Carl Corea,John Grant,Matthias Thimm
title: Measuring Inconsistency in Declarative Process Specifications
title_zh: 测量声明性流程规范中的不一致
abstract: We address the problem of measuring inconsistency in declarative process specifications, with an emphasis on linear temporal logic on fixed traces (LTLff). As we will show, existing inconsistency measures for classical logic cannot provide a meaningful assessment of inconsistency in LTL in general, as they cannot adequately handle the temporal operators. We therefore propose a novel paraconsistent semantics as a framework for inconsistency measurement. We then present two new inconsistency measures based on these semantics and show that they satisfy important desirable properties. We show how these measures can be applied to declarative process models and investigate the computational complexity of the introduced approach.
summary: We address the problem of measuring inconsistency in declarative process specifications, with an emphasis on linear temporal logic on fixed traces (LTLff). As we will show, existing inconsistency measures for classical logic cannot provide a meaningful assessment of inconsistency in LTL in general, as they cannot adequately handle the temporal operators. We therefore propose a novel paraconsistent semantics as a framework for inconsistency measurement. We then present two new inconsistency measures based on these semantics and show that they satisfy important desirable properties. We show how these measures can be applied to declarative process models and investigate the computational complexity of the introduced approach.
abstract_zh: 我们解决了测量声明性流程规范中的不一致问题，重点是固定轨迹上的线性时序逻辑（LTLff）。正如我们将要展示的，现有的经典逻辑不一致度量通常无法对 LTL 中的不一致提供有意义的评估，因为它们无法充分处理时间运算符。因此，我们提出了一种新颖的副一致语义作为不一致性测量的框架。然后，我们基于这些语义提出两种新的不一致度量，并表明它们满足重要的期望属性。我们展示了如何将这些措施应用于声明性过程模型，并研究所引入方法的计算复杂性。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何度量声明性流程规范中的不一致性，特别是在线性时态逻辑（LTLff）框架下提出新的度量方法。
AI.motivation: 现有经典逻辑的不一致度量方法无法有效处理时态算子，难以准确评估LTL中的不一致性，需提出新框架和度量标准。
AI.method: 提出基于副协调语义的新框架，设计两种满足关键性质的不一致度量方法，并分析其在声明性流程模型中的应用及计算复杂度。
AI.result: 两种新度量方法成功应用于声明性流程模型，验证了其有效性，并明确了该方法的计算复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 新框架和度量方法有效解决了LTLff中不一致性评估的不足，为声明性流程规范的分析提供了理论支持和计算工具。

authors_text: Zile Hui
title: Sequential Optimization Numbers and Conjecture about Edge-Symmetry and Weight-Symmetry Shortest Weight-Constrained Path
title_zh: 关于边对称和权对称最短权约束路径的序贯优化数和猜想
abstract: This paper defines multidimensional sequential optimization numbers and prove that the unsigned Stirling numbers of first kind are 1-dimensional sequential optimization numbers. This paper gives a recurrence formula and an upper bound of multidimensional sequential optimization numbers. We proof that the k-dimensional sequential optimization numbers, denoted by O_k (n,m), are almost in {O_k (n,a)}, where a belong to[1,eklog(n-1)+(epi)^2/6(2^k-1)+M_1], n is the size of k-dimensional sequential optimization numbers and M_1 is large positive integer. Many achievements of the Stirling numbers of first kind can be transformed into the properties of k-dimensional sequential optimization numbers by k-dimensional extension and we give some examples. Shortest weight-constrained path is NP-complete problem [1]. In the case of edge symmetry and weight symmetry, we use the definition of the optimization set to design 2-dimensional Bellman-Ford algorithm to solve it. According to the fact that P_1 (n,m>M) less than or equal to e^(-M_1 ), where M=elog(n-1)+e+M_1, M_1 is a positive integer and P_1 (n,m) is the probability of 1-dimensional sequential optimization numbers, this paper conjecture that the probability of solving edge-symmetry and weight-symmetry shortest weight-constrained path problem in polynomial time approaches 1 exponentially with the increase of constant term in algorithm complexity. The results of a large number of simulation experiments agree with this conjecture.
summary: This paper defines multidimensional sequential optimization numbers and prove that the unsigned Stirling numbers of first kind are 1-dimensional sequential optimization numbers. This paper gives a recurrence formula and an upper bound of multidimensional sequential optimization numbers. We proof that the k-dimensional sequential optimization numbers, denoted by O_k (n,m), are almost in {O_k (n,a)}, where a belong to[1,eklog(n-1)+(epi)^2/6(2^k-1)+M_1], n is the size of k-dimensional sequential optimization numbers and M_1 is large positive integer. Many achievements of the Stirling numbers of first kind can be transformed into the properties of k-dimensional sequential optimization numbers by k-dimensional extension and we give some examples. Shortest weight-constrained path is NP-complete problem [1]. In the case of edge symmetry and weight symmetry, we use the definition of the optimization set to design 2-dimensional Bellman-Ford algorithm to solve it. According to the fact that P_1 (n,m>M) less than or equal to e^(-M_1 ), where M=elog(n-1)+e+M_1, M_1 is a positive integer and P_1 (n,m) is the probability of 1-dimensional sequential optimization numbers, this paper conjecture that the probability of solving edge-symmetry and weight-symmetry shortest weight-constrained path problem in polynomial time approaches 1 exponentially with the increase of constant term in algorithm complexity. The results of a large number of simulation experiments agree with this conjecture.
abstract_zh: 本文定义了多维序贯优化数，并证明第一类无符号斯特林数是一维序贯优化数。本文给出了递推公式和多维序贯优化数的上限。我们证明k维顺序优化数，用O_k(n,m)表示，几乎在{O_k(n,a)}中，其中a属于[1,eklog(n-1)+(epi)^2/6(2^k-1)+M_1]，n是k维顺序优化数的大小，M_1是大正整数。第一类斯特林数的许多成果可以通过k维推广转化为k维序贯优化数的性质，并给出了一些例子。最短权重约束路径是 NP 完全问题[1]。在边对称和权重对称的情况下，我们利用优化集的定义设计二维Bellman-Ford算法来求解。根据P_1(n,m>M)小于等于e^(-M_1)，其中M=elog(n-1)+e+M_1，M_1为正整数，P_1(n,m)为一维序贯优化数的概率，本文推测，在多项式时间内求解边对称和权对称最短权约束路径问题的概率随着算法复杂度中的常数项。大量模拟实验的结果与这一猜想相一致。

AI.tldr: 本文定义了多维序列优化数并研究其性质，同时针对边对称和权重对称的最短权重约束路径问题提出猜想。
AI.motivation: 扩展斯特林数的理论框架，解决NP完全问题在特定对称条件下的多项式时间求解可能性。
AI.method: 通过递推公式和上界分析多维序列优化数，设计二维Bellman-Ford算法，并结合概率分析与仿真验证猜想。
AI.result: 证明k维序列优化数的分布特性，提出对称条件下路径问题多项式时间求解概率指数级趋近于1的猜想，仿真结果支持该结论。
AI.conclusion: 多维序列优化数理论为组合优化提供新工具，对称性假设下复杂问题的高效求解可能性得到理论与实验双重验证。

authors_text: Martin Genzel,Ingo Gühring,Jan Macdonald,Maximilian März
title: Near-Exact Recovery for Tomographic Inverse Problems via Deep Learning
title_zh: 通过深度学习近乎精确地恢复层析反问题
comment: ICML 2022 (long talk). Code available at https://github.com/jmaces/aapm-ct-challenge. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.00280
comments: ICML 2022 (long talk). Code available at https://github.com/jmaces/aapm-ct-challenge. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2106.00280
abstract: This work is concerned with the following fundamental question in scientific machine learning: Can deep-learning-based methods solve noise-free inverse problems to near-perfect accuracy? Positive evidence is provided for the first time, focusing on a prototypical computed tomography (CT) setup. We demonstrate that an iterative end-to-end network scheme enables reconstructions close to numerical precision, comparable to classical compressed sensing strategies. Our results build on our winning submission to the recent AAPM DL-Sparse-View CT Challenge. Its goal was to identify the state-of-the-art in solving the sparse-view CT inverse problem with data-driven techniques. A specific difficulty of the challenge setup was that the precise forward model remained unknown to the participants. Therefore, a key feature of our approach was to initially estimate the unknown fanbeam geometry in a data-driven calibration step. Apart from an in-depth analysis of our methodology, we also demonstrate its state-of-the-art performance on the open-access real-world dataset LoDoPaB CT.
summary: This work is concerned with the following fundamental question in scientific machine learning: Can deep-learning-based methods solve noise-free inverse problems to near-perfect accuracy? Positive evidence is provided for the first time, focusing on a prototypical computed tomography (CT) setup. We demonstrate that an iterative end-to-end network scheme enables reconstructions close to numerical precision, comparable to classical compressed sensing strategies. Our results build on our winning submission to the recent AAPM DL-Sparse-View CT Challenge. Its goal was to identify the state-of-the-art in solving the sparse-view CT inverse problem with data-driven techniques. A specific difficulty of the challenge setup was that the precise forward model remained unknown to the participants. Therefore, a key feature of our approach was to initially estimate the unknown fanbeam geometry in a data-driven calibration step. Apart from an in-depth analysis of our methodology, we also demonstrate its state-of-the-art performance on the open-access real-world dataset LoDoPaB CT.
abstract_zh: 这项工作涉及科学机器学习中的以下基本问题：基于深度学习的方法能否以近乎完美的精度解决无噪声逆问题？首次提供了积极的证据，重点关注原型计算机断层扫描 (CT) 设置。我们证明，迭代端到端网络方案能够实现接近数值精度的重建，与经典的压缩感知策略相当。我们的结果建立在我们最近 AAPM DL-Sparse-View CT 挑战赛获奖作品的基础上。其目标是确定利用数据驱动技术解决稀疏视图 CT 反问题的最新技术。挑战设置的一个具体困难是参与者仍然不知道精确的前向模型。因此，我们方法的一个关键特征是在数据驱动的校准步骤中初步估计未知的扇形束几何形状。除了对我们的方法进行深入分析之外，我们还在开放访问的真实世界数据集 LoDoPaB CT 上展示了其最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨通过深度学习方法实现断层扫描逆问题的近精确恢复，重点针对无噪声条件下的CT重建。
AI.motivation: 科学机器学习领域亟需验证深度学习能否在无噪声条件下以接近完美精度解决逆问题，尤其在未知正向模型的挑战性场景中。
AI.method: 提出迭代端到端网络架构，结合数据驱动的校准步骤估计未知的扇形束几何参数，并基于此进行图像重建。
AI.result: 方法在无噪声CT逆问题中实现接近数值精度的重建效果，性能优于传统压缩感知策略，并在AAPM挑战赛和LoDoPaB数据集上达到最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习可有效解决未知正向模型的断层扫描逆问题，实现近精确恢复，为科学机器学习提供新范式。

search_text: Near-Exact Recovery for Tomographic Inverse Problems via Deep Learning 通过深度学习近乎精确地恢复层析反问题 This work is concerned with the following fundamental question in scientific machine learning: Can deep-learning-based methods solve noise-free inverse problems to near-perfect accuracy? Positive evidence is provided for the first time, focusing on a prototypical computed tomography (CT) setup. We demonstrate that an iterative end-to-end network scheme enables reconstructions close to numerical precision, comparable to classical compressed sensing strategies. Our results build on our winning submission to the recent AAPM DL-Sparse-View CT Challenge. Its goal was to identify the state-of-the-art in solving the sparse-view CT inverse problem with data-driven techniques. A specific difficulty of the challenge setup was that the precise forward model remained unknown to the participants. Therefore, a key feature of our approach was to initially estimate the unknown fanbeam geometry in a data-driven calibration step. Apart from an in-depth analysis of our methodology, we also demonstrate its state-of-the-art performance on the open-access real-world dataset LoDoPaB CT. 这项工作涉及科学机器学习中的以下基本问题：基于深度学习的方法能否以近乎完美的精度解决无噪声逆问题？首次提供了积极的证据，重点关注原型计算机断层扫描 (CT) 设置。我们证明，迭代端到端网络方案能够实现接近数值精度的重建，与经典的压缩感知策略相当。我们的结果建立在我们最近 AAPM DL-Sparse-View CT 挑战赛获奖作品的基础上。其目标是确定利用数据驱动技术解决稀疏视图 CT 反问题的最新技术。挑战设置的一个具体困难是参与者仍然不知道精确的前向模型。因此，我们方法的一个关键特征是在数据驱动的校准步骤中初步估计未知的扇形束几何形状。除了对我们的方法进行深入分析之外，我们还在开放访问的真实世界数据集 LoDoPaB CT 上展示了其最先进的性能。 本文探讨通过深度学习方法实现断层扫描逆问题的近精确恢复，重点针对无噪声条件下的CT重建。 Martin Genzel,Ingo Gühring,Jan Macdonald,Maximilian März eess.IV,cs.LG

authors_text: Fabio Tosi,Pierluigi Zama Ramirez,Matteo Poggi,Samuele Salti,Stefano Mattoccia,Luigi Di Stefano
title: RGB-Multispectral Matching: Dataset, Learning Methodology, Evaluation
title_zh: RGB-多光谱匹配：数据集、学习方法、评估
comment: CVPR 2022, New Orleans. Project page: https://cvlab-unibo.github.io/rgb-ms-web/
comments: CVPR 2022, New Orleans. Project page: https://cvlab-unibo.github.io/rgb-ms-web/
abstract: We address the problem of registering synchronized color (RGB) and multi-spectral (MS) images featuring very different resolution by solving stereo matching correspondences. Purposely, we introduce a novel RGB-MS dataset framing 13 different scenes in indoor environments and providing a total of 34 image pairs annotated with semi-dense, high-resolution ground-truth labels in the form of disparity maps. To tackle the task, we propose a deep learning architecture trained in a self-supervised manner by exploiting a further RGB camera, required only during training data acquisition. In this setup, we can conveniently learn cross-modal matching in the absence of ground-truth labels by distilling knowledge from an easier RGB-RGB matching task based on a collection of about 11K unlabeled image triplets. Experiments show that the proposed pipeline sets a good performance bar (1.16 pixels average registration error) for future research on this novel, challenging task.
summary: We address the problem of registering synchronized color (RGB) and multi-spectral (MS) images featuring very different resolution by solving stereo matching correspondences. Purposely, we introduce a novel RGB-MS dataset framing 13 different scenes in indoor environments and providing a total of 34 image pairs annotated with semi-dense, high-resolution ground-truth labels in the form of disparity maps. To tackle the task, we propose a deep learning architecture trained in a self-supervised manner by exploiting a further RGB camera, required only during training data acquisition. In this setup, we can conveniently learn cross-modal matching in the absence of ground-truth labels by distilling knowledge from an easier RGB-RGB matching task based on a collection of about 11K unlabeled image triplets. Experiments show that the proposed pipeline sets a good performance bar (1.16 pixels average registration error) for future research on this novel, challenging task.
abstract_zh: 我们通过解决立体匹配对应关系来解决具有不同分辨率的同步彩色 (RGB) 和多光谱 (MS) 图像的配准问题。我们特意引入了一种新颖的 RGB-MS 数据集，该数据集在室内环境中构建了 13 个不同的场景，并提供了总共 34 个图像对，并以视差图的形式用半密集、高分辨率的地面实况标签进行了注释。为了解决这个任务，我们提出了一种深度学习架构，通过利用仅在训练数据采集期间需要的另一个 RGB 相机，以自我监督的方式进行训练。在此设置中，我们可以通过从基于约 11K 未标记图像三元组的集合的更简单的 RGB-RGB 匹配任务中提取知识，在没有真实标签的情况下方便地学习跨模态匹配。实验表明，所提出的流程为这项新颖且具有挑战性的任务的未来研究设定了良好的性能标准（平均配准误差为 1.16 像素）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于同步彩色（RGB）和多光谱（MS）图像配准的新方法，通过解决立体匹配对应关系来处理分辨率差异极大的图像。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理RGB与多光谱图像间显著的分辨率差异及缺乏标注数据的问题，亟需一种有效的自监督学习框架。
AI.method: 设计了一个自监督深度学习架构，利用额外的RGB相机在训练阶段获取数据，通过约11K未标注的三元组从RGB-RGB匹配任务中蒸馏知识，实现跨模态匹配。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在新构建的包含13个室内场景的RGB-MS数据集上达到1.16像素的平均配准误差，为该任务设立了性能基准。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的自监督学习方法有效解决了跨模态图像配准难题，为未来研究提供了高质量数据集和性能基准。
