authors_text: Ziheng Zhao,Tianjiao Zhang,Weidi Xie,Yanfeng Wang,Ya Zhang
title: K-Space Transformer for Undersampled MRI Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于欠采样 MRI 重建的 K 空间变压器
abstract: This paper considers the problem of undersampled MRI reconstruction. We propose a novel Transformer-based framework for directly processing signal in k-space, going beyond the limitation of regular grids as ConvNets do. We adopt an implicit representation of k-space spectrogram, treating spatial coordinates as inputs, and dynamically query the sparsely sampled points to reconstruct the spectrogram, i.e. learning the inductive bias in k-space. To strike a balance between computational cost and reconstruction quality, we build the decoder with hierarchical structure to generate low-resolution and high-resolution outputs respectively. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed method, we have conducted extensive experiments on two public datasets, and demonstrate superior or comparable performance to state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: This paper considers the problem of undersampled MRI reconstruction. We propose a novel Transformer-based framework for directly processing signal in k-space, going beyond the limitation of regular grids as ConvNets do. We adopt an implicit representation of k-space spectrogram, treating spatial coordinates as inputs, and dynamically query the sparsely sampled points to reconstruct the spectrogram, i.e. learning the inductive bias in k-space. To strike a balance between computational cost and reconstruction quality, we build the decoder with hierarchical structure to generate low-resolution and high-resolution outputs respectively. To validate the effectiveness of our proposed method, we have conducted extensive experiments on two public datasets, and demonstrate superior or comparable performance to state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 本文考虑欠采样 MRI 重建问题。我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的新颖框架，用于直接处理 k 空间中的信号，超越了 ConvNet 等常规网格的限制。我们采用k空间声谱图的隐式表示，将空间坐标作为输入，动态查询稀疏采样点来重建声谱图，即学习k空间中的归纳偏差。为了在计算成本和重建质量之间取得平衡，我们构建了具有分层结构的解码器来分别生成低分辨率和高分辨率输出。为了验证我们提出的方法的有效性，我们在两个公共数据集上进行了广泛的实验，并证明了与最先进的方法相比具有优越或可比的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的框架，直接在k空间处理信号以解决欠采样MRI重建问题。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积网络受限于规则网格结构，难以有效处理k空间的稀疏采样特性，需探索更灵活的建模方式。
AI.method: 采用k空间谱图的隐式表示，以空间坐标为输入动态查询稀疏采样点，并通过分层解码器生成多分辨率重建结果。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上实验表明，该方法在重建质量上优于或接近当前最先进的技术。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过学习k空间归纳偏置，在计算成本与重建质量间取得平衡，为MRI重建提供新思路。

authors_text: Stephen J. Walsh,John J. Borkowski
title: Generating Exact Optimal Designs via Particle Swarm Optimization: Assessing Efficacy and Efficiency via Case Study
title_zh: 通过粒子群优化生成精确的最优设计：通过案例研究评估功效和效率
abstract: In this study we address existing deficiencies in the literature on applications of Particle Swarm Optimization to generate optimal designs. We present the results of a large computer study in which we bench-mark both efficiency and efficacy of PSO to generate high quality candidate designs for small-exact response surface scenarios commonly encountered by industrial practitioners. A preferred version of PSO is demonstrated and recommended. Further, in contrast to popular local optimizers such as the coordinate exchange, PSO is demonstrated to, even in a single run, generate highly efficient designs with large probability at small computing cost. Therefore, it appears beneficial for more practitioners to adopt and use PSO as tool for generating candidate experimental designs.
summary: In this study we address existing deficiencies in the literature on applications of Particle Swarm Optimization to generate optimal designs. We present the results of a large computer study in which we bench-mark both efficiency and efficacy of PSO to generate high quality candidate designs for small-exact response surface scenarios commonly encountered by industrial practitioners. A preferred version of PSO is demonstrated and recommended. Further, in contrast to popular local optimizers such as the coordinate exchange, PSO is demonstrated to, even in a single run, generate highly efficient designs with large probability at small computing cost. Therefore, it appears beneficial for more practitioners to adopt and use PSO as tool for generating candidate experimental designs.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们解决了应用粒子群优化生成最佳设计的文献中现有的缺陷。我们展示了一项大型计算机研究的结果，其中我们对 PSO 的效率和功效进行了基准测试，以便为工业从业者经常遇到的小精确响应面场景生成高质量的候选设计。演示并推荐了 PSO 的首选版本。此外，与坐标交换等流行的局部优化器相比，PSO 被证明即使在单次运行中也能以较小的计算成本以较大的概率生成高效的设计。因此，对于更多的从业者来说，采用 PSO 作为生成候选实验设计的工具似乎是有益的。

AI.tldr: 本文通过案例研究评估粒子群优化算法（PSO）在生成小规模精确响应面实验设计中的效能与效率，对比传统局部优化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有文献中PSO在生成最优设计的应用存在不足，需验证其在工业实践中生成高质量设计的可行性及优势。
AI.method: 通过大规模计算机实验，对比PSO与坐标交换等局部优化算法的效率和效能，验证PSO单次运行生成高效设计的概率。
AI.result: PSO在单次运行中以较低计算成本生成高效设计的概率显著高于传统方法，且能稳定产出高质量候选设计。
AI.conclusion: PSO作为生成实验设计的工具，因其高效性与低计算成本，值得工业界更多采用。

authors_text: Fuchen Long,Zhaofan Qiu,Yingwei Pan,Ting Yao,Jiebo Luo,Tao Mei
title: Stand-Alone Inter-Frame Attention in Video Models
title_zh: 视频模型中的独立帧间注意力
comment: CVPR 2022; Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/FuchenUSTC/SIFA
comments: CVPR 2022; Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/FuchenUSTC/SIFA
abstract: Motion, as the uniqueness of a video, has been critical to the development of video understanding models. Modern deep learning models leverage motion by either executing spatio-temporal 3D convolutions, factorizing 3D convolutions into spatial and temporal convolutions separately, or computing self-attention along temporal dimension. The implicit assumption behind such successes is that the feature maps across consecutive frames can be nicely aggregated. Nevertheless, the assumption may not always hold especially for the regions with large deformation. In this paper, we present a new recipe of inter-frame attention block, namely Stand-alone Inter-Frame Attention (SIFA), that novelly delves into the deformation across frames to estimate local self-attention on each spatial location. Technically, SIFA remoulds the deformable design via re-scaling the offset predictions by the difference between two frames. Taking each spatial location in the current frame as the query, the locally deformable neighbors in the next frame are regarded as the keys/values. Then, SIFA measures the similarity between query and keys as stand-alone attention to weighted average the values for temporal aggregation. We further plug SIFA block into ConvNets and Vision Transformer, respectively, to devise SIFA-Net and SIFA-Transformer. Extensive experiments conducted on four video datasets demonstrate the superiority of SIFA-Net and SIFA-Transformer as stronger backbones. More remarkably, SIFA-Transformer achieves an accuracy of 83.1% on Kinetics-400 dataset. Source code is available at \url{https://github.com/FuchenUSTC/SIFA}.
summary: Motion, as the uniqueness of a video, has been critical to the development of video understanding models. Modern deep learning models leverage motion by either executing spatio-temporal 3D convolutions, factorizing 3D convolutions into spatial and temporal convolutions separately, or computing self-attention along temporal dimension. The implicit assumption behind such successes is that the feature maps across consecutive frames can be nicely aggregated. Nevertheless, the assumption may not always hold especially for the regions with large deformation. In this paper, we present a new recipe of inter-frame attention block, namely Stand-alone Inter-Frame Attention (SIFA), that novelly delves into the deformation across frames to estimate local self-attention on each spatial location. Technically, SIFA remoulds the deformable design via re-scaling the offset predictions by the difference between two frames. Taking each spatial location in the current frame as the query, the locally deformable neighbors in the next frame are regarded as the keys/values. Then, SIFA measures the similarity between query and keys as stand-alone attention to weighted average the values for temporal aggregation. We further plug SIFA block into ConvNets and Vision Transformer, respectively, to devise SIFA-Net and SIFA-Transformer. Extensive experiments conducted on four video datasets demonstrate the superiority of SIFA-Net and SIFA-Transformer as stronger backbones. More remarkably, SIFA-Transformer achieves an accuracy of 83.1% on Kinetics-400 dataset. Source code is available at \url{https://github.com/FuchenUSTC/SIFA}.
abstract_zh: 运动作为视频的独特性，对于视频理解模型的发展至关重要。现代深度学习模型通过执行时空 3D 卷积、将 3D 卷积分别分解为空间和时间卷积或沿时间维度计算自注意力来利用运动。这种成功背后的隐含假设是连续帧的特征图可以很好地聚合。然而，该假设可能并不总是成立，特别是对于变形较大的区域。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的帧间注意块配方，即独立帧间注意（SIFA），它新颖地深入研究跨帧的变形以估计每个空间位置上的局部自注意力。从技术上讲，SIFA 通过根据两帧之间的差异重新缩放偏移预测来重塑可变形设计。以当前帧中的每个空间位置作为查询，下一帧中的局部可变形邻居被视为键/值。然后，SIFA 测量查询和键之间的相似性，作为对时间聚合值的加权平均的独立关注。我们进一步将 SIFA 模块分别插入 ConvNets 和 Vision Transformer 中，以设计 SIFA-Net 和 SIFA-Transformer。对四个视频数据集进行的大量实验证明了 SIFA-Net 和 SIFA-Transformer 作为更强大的骨干网络的优越性。更值得注意的是，SIFA-Transformer 在 Kinetics-400 数据集上的准确率达到 83.1%。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/FuchenUSTC/SIFA} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种独立的帧间注意力机制（SIFA），用于改进视频模型中的运动建模，以解决传统方法在大形变区域的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有视频模型通过3D卷积或时间自注意力聚合连续帧特征，但假设可能不成立，尤其在大形变区域。因此需要更精确的帧间注意力机制。
AI.method: SIFA通过重新缩放帧间偏移预测，以当前帧每个空间位置为查询，下一帧的局部形变邻域为键/值，计算独立注意力进行时序聚合。
AI.result: SIFA-Net和SIFA-Transformer在四个视频数据集上表现优异，尤其在Kinetics-400上达到83.1%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: SIFA通过建模帧间形变提升了视频模型性能，为视频理解提供了更强大的主干网络。

authors_text: Yehao Li,Yingwei Pan,Ting Yao,Tao Mei
title: Comprehending and Ordering Semantics for Image Captioning
title_zh: 图像说明语义的理解和排序
comment: CVPR 2022; Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/YehLi/xmodaler/tree/master/configs/image_caption/cosnet
comments: CVPR 2022; Code is publicly available at: https://github.com/YehLi/xmodaler/tree/master/configs/image_caption/cosnet
abstract: Comprehending the rich semantics in an image and ordering them in linguistic order are essential to compose a visually-grounded and linguistically coherent description for image captioning. Modern techniques commonly capitalize on a pre-trained object detector/classifier to mine the semantics in an image, while leaving the inherent linguistic ordering of semantics under-exploited. In this paper, we propose a new recipe of Transformer-style structure, namely Comprehending and Ordering Semantics Networks (COS-Net), that novelly unifies an enriched semantic comprehending and a learnable semantic ordering processes into a single architecture. Technically, we initially utilize a cross-modal retrieval model to search the relevant sentences of each image, and all words in the searched sentences are taken as primary semantic cues. Next, a novel semantic comprehender is devised to filter out the irrelevant semantic words in primary semantic cues, and meanwhile infer the missing relevant semantic words visually grounded in the image. After that, we feed all the screened and enriched semantic words into a semantic ranker, which learns to allocate all semantic words in linguistic order as humans. Such sequence of ordered semantic words are further integrated with visual tokens of images to trigger sentence generation. Empirical evidences show that COS-Net clearly surpasses the state-of-the-art approaches on COCO and achieves to-date the best CIDEr score of 141.1% on Karpathy test split. Source code is available at \url{https://github.com/YehLi/xmodaler/tree/master/configs/image_caption/cosnet}.
summary: Comprehending the rich semantics in an image and ordering them in linguistic order are essential to compose a visually-grounded and linguistically coherent description for image captioning. Modern techniques commonly capitalize on a pre-trained object detector/classifier to mine the semantics in an image, while leaving the inherent linguistic ordering of semantics under-exploited. In this paper, we propose a new recipe of Transformer-style structure, namely Comprehending and Ordering Semantics Networks (COS-Net), that novelly unifies an enriched semantic comprehending and a learnable semantic ordering processes into a single architecture. Technically, we initially utilize a cross-modal retrieval model to search the relevant sentences of each image, and all words in the searched sentences are taken as primary semantic cues. Next, a novel semantic comprehender is devised to filter out the irrelevant semantic words in primary semantic cues, and meanwhile infer the missing relevant semantic words visually grounded in the image. After that, we feed all the screened and enriched semantic words into a semantic ranker, which learns to allocate all semantic words in linguistic order as humans. Such sequence of ordered semantic words are further integrated with visual tokens of images to trigger sentence generation. Empirical evidences show that COS-Net clearly surpasses the state-of-the-art approaches on COCO and achieves to-date the best CIDEr score of 141.1% on Karpathy test split. Source code is available at \url{https://github.com/YehLi/xmodaler/tree/master/configs/image_caption/cosnet}.
abstract_zh: 理解图像中丰富的语义并按语言顺序对它们进行排序对于为图像字幕编写基于视觉的、语言上连贯的描述至关重要。现代技术通常利用预先训练的对象检测器/分类器来挖掘图像中的语义，同时使语义的固有语言顺序未被充分利用。在本文中，我们提出了一种 Transformer 式结构的新方案，即理解和排序语义网络（COS-Net），它将丰富的语义理解和可学习的语义排序过程新颖地统一到单个架构中。从技术上讲，我们最初利用跨模态检索模型来搜索每个图像的相关句子，并将搜索到的句子中的所有单词作为主要语义线索。接下来，设计了一种新颖的语义理解器来过滤掉主要语义线索中不相关的语义词，同时推断图像中视觉上缺失的相关语义词。之后，我们将所有筛选和丰富的语义单词输入语义排序器，该排序器学习像人类一样按照语言顺序分配所有语义单词。这种有序语义词序列进一步与图像的视觉标记相结合以触发句子生成。经验证据表明，COS-Net 明显超越了 COCO 上最先进的方法，并在 Karpathy 测试分割上取得了迄今为止最好的 CIDEr 分数 141.1%。源代码可在 \url{https://github.com/YehLi/xmodaler/tree/master/configs/image_caption/cosnet} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出COS-Net架构，通过统一语义理解和排序过程提升图像字幕生成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度依赖预训练模型提取语义，忽视了语义的自然语言顺序对生成连贯字幕的重要性。
AI.method: 采用跨模态检索获取候选语义词，通过语义理解模块过滤无关词并补充缺失语义，最后利用排序器学习人类语言顺序生成有序语义序列。
AI.result: 在COCO数据集上达到141.1%的CIDEr分数，刷新Karpathy测试集最优性能。
AI.conclusion: COS-Net通过显式建模语义顺序机制，有效提升了图像字幕的语义准确性和语言连贯性。

authors_text: Lluís Alemany-Puig,Juan Luis Esteban,Ramon Ferrer-i-Cancho
title: The Maximum Linear Arrangement Problem for trees under projectivity and planarity
title_zh: 投影性和平面性下树的最大线性排列问题
comment: The fourth version is incorrect. We are sure the right files were uploaded but for whatever reason, it looks like we uploaded the wrong files. The abstract in the fourth version is correct though
comments: The fourth version is incorrect. We are sure the right files were uploaded but for whatever reason, it looks like we uploaded the wrong files. The abstract in the fourth version is correct though
abstract: A linear arrangement is a mapping $π$ from the $n$ vertices of a graph $G$ to $n$ distinct consecutive integers. Linear arrangements can be represented by drawing the vertices along a horizontal line and drawing the edges as semicircles above said line. In this setting, the length of an edge is defined as the absolute value of the difference between the positions of its two vertices in the arrangement, and the cost of an arrangement as the sum of all edge lengths. Here we study two variants of the Maximum Linear Arrangement problem (MaxLA), which consists of finding an arrangement that maximizes the cost. In the planar variant for free trees, vertices have to be arranged in such a way that there are no edge crossings. In the projective variant for rooted trees, arrangements have to be planar and the root of the tree cannot be covered by any edge. In this paper we present algorithms that are linear in time and space to solve planar and projective MaxLA for trees. We also prove several properties of maximum projective and planar arrangements, and show that caterpillar trees maximize planar MaxLA over all trees of a fixed size thereby generalizing a previous extremal result on trees.
summary: A linear arrangement is a mapping $π$ from the $n$ vertices of a graph $G$ to $n$ distinct consecutive integers. Linear arrangements can be represented by drawing the vertices along a horizontal line and drawing the edges as semicircles above said line. In this setting, the length of an edge is defined as the absolute value of the difference between the positions of its two vertices in the arrangement, and the cost of an arrangement as the sum of all edge lengths. Here we study two variants of the Maximum Linear Arrangement problem (MaxLA), which consists of finding an arrangement that maximizes the cost. In the planar variant for free trees, vertices have to be arranged in such a way that there are no edge crossings. In the projective variant for rooted trees, arrangements have to be planar and the root of the tree cannot be covered by any edge. In this paper we present algorithms that are linear in time and space to solve planar and projective MaxLA for trees. We also prove several properties of maximum projective and planar arrangements, and show that caterpillar trees maximize planar MaxLA over all trees of a fixed size thereby generalizing a previous extremal result on trees.
abstract_zh: 线性排列是从图 $G$ 的 $n$ 个顶点到 $n$ 个不同的连续整数的映射 $π$。线性排列可以通过沿水平线绘制顶点并将边缘绘制为该线上方的半圆来表示。在此设置中，边的长度定义为其排列中两个顶点的位置差的绝对值，排列的成本定义为所有边长度的总和。在这里，我们研究最大线性排列问题 (MaxLA) 的两个变体，其中包括找到最大化成本的排列。在自由树的平面变体中，顶点的排列方式必须不存在边交叉。在有根树的投影变体中，排列必须是平面的，并且树的根不能被任何边缘覆盖。在本文中，我们提出了时间和空间线性的算法来求解树的平面和射影 MaxLA。我们还证明了最大射影和平面排列的几个属性，并表明毛毛虫树在所有固定大小的树上最大化平面 MaxLA，从而概括了先前在树上的极值结果。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在平面性和投影性约束下，针对树结构的最大线性排列问题（MaxLA），提出了解决方案并分析了相关性质。
AI.motivation: 线性排列在图论和计算机科学中具有重要应用，而平面性和投影性约束能有效避免边交叉或覆盖根节点，提升布局的实用性与美观性。
AI.method: 设计了线性时间复杂度的算法，分别解决平面和投影约束下的MaxLA问题，并通过数学证明分析了最大排列的性质。
AI.result: 提出了针对平面和投影MaxLA的线性算法，证明了毛毛虫树在固定规模下可最大化平面MaxLA，推广了树结构的极值结果。
AI.conclusion: 本文的算法高效解决了两类约束下的MaxLA问题，揭示了树结构在排列优化中的特性，为相关领域提供了理论支持与实用工具。

search_text: The Maximum Linear Arrangement Problem for trees under projectivity and planarity 投影性和平面性下树的最大线性排列问题 A linear arrangement is a mapping $π$ from the $n$ vertices of a graph $G$ to $n$ distinct consecutive integers. Linear arrangements can be represented by drawing the vertices along a horizontal line and drawing the edges as semicircles above said line. In this setting, the length of an edge is defined as the absolute value of the difference between the positions of its two vertices in the arrangement, and the cost of an arrangement as the sum of all edge lengths. Here we study two variants of the Maximum Linear Arrangement problem (MaxLA), which consists of finding an arrangement that maximizes the cost. In the planar variant for free trees, vertices have to be arranged in such a way that there are no edge crossings. In the projective variant for rooted trees, arrangements have to be planar and the root of the tree cannot be covered by any edge. In this paper we present algorithms that are linear in time and space to solve planar and projective MaxLA for trees. We also prove several properties of maximum projective and planar arrangements, and show that caterpillar trees maximize planar MaxLA over all trees of a fixed size thereby generalizing a previous extremal result on trees. 线性排列是从图 $G$ 的 $n$ 个顶点到 $n$ 个不同的连续整数的映射 $π$。线性排列可以通过沿水平线绘制顶点并将边缘绘制为该线上方的半圆来表示。在此设置中，边的长度定义为其排列中两个顶点的位置差的绝对值，排列的成本定义为所有边长度的总和。在这里，我们研究最大线性排列问题 (MaxLA) 的两个变体，其中包括找到最大化成本的排列。在自由树的平面变体中，顶点的排列方式必须不存在边交叉。在有根树的投影变体中，排列必须是平面的，并且树的根不能被任何边缘覆盖。在本文中，我们提出了时间和空间线性的算法来求解树的平面和射影 MaxLA。我们还证明了最大射影和平面排列的几个属性，并表明毛毛虫树在所有固定大小的树上最大化平面 MaxLA，从而概括了先前在树上的极值结果。 本文研究了在平面性和投影性约束下，针对树结构的最大线性排列问题（MaxLA），提出了解决方案并分析了相关性质。 Lluís Alemany-Puig,Juan Luis Esteban,Ramon Ferrer-i-Cancho cs.DS,cs.CL,cs.DM

authors_text: Yuhang Chen,Liyuan Li,Xin Liu,Xiaofeng Su,Fansheng Chen
title: A Multi-task Framework for Infrared Small Target Detection and Segmentation
title_zh: 红外小目标检测和分割的多任务框架
abstract: Due to the complicated background and noise of infrared images, infrared small target detection is one of the most difficult problems in the field of computer vision. In most existing studies, semantic segmentation methods are typically used to achieve better results. The centroid of each target is calculated from the segmentation map as the detection result. In contrast, we propose a novel end-to-end framework for infrared small target detection and segmentation in this paper. First, with the use of UNet as the backbone to maintain resolution and semantic information, our model can achieve a higher detection accuracy than other state-of-the-art methods by attaching a simple anchor-free head. Then, a pyramid pool module is used to further extract features and improve the precision of target segmentation. Next, we use semantic segmentation tasks that pay more attention to pixel-level features to assist in the training process of object detection, which increases the average precision and allows the model to detect some targets that were previously not detectable. Furthermore, we develop a multi-task framework for infrared small target detection and segmentation. Our multi-task learning model reduces complexity by nearly half and speeds up inference by nearly twice compared to the composite single-task model, while maintaining accuracy. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/Chenastron/MTUNet.
summary: Due to the complicated background and noise of infrared images, infrared small target detection is one of the most difficult problems in the field of computer vision. In most existing studies, semantic segmentation methods are typically used to achieve better results. The centroid of each target is calculated from the segmentation map as the detection result. In contrast, we propose a novel end-to-end framework for infrared small target detection and segmentation in this paper. First, with the use of UNet as the backbone to maintain resolution and semantic information, our model can achieve a higher detection accuracy than other state-of-the-art methods by attaching a simple anchor-free head. Then, a pyramid pool module is used to further extract features and improve the precision of target segmentation. Next, we use semantic segmentation tasks that pay more attention to pixel-level features to assist in the training process of object detection, which increases the average precision and allows the model to detect some targets that were previously not detectable. Furthermore, we develop a multi-task framework for infrared small target detection and segmentation. Our multi-task learning model reduces complexity by nearly half and speeds up inference by nearly twice compared to the composite single-task model, while maintaining accuracy. The code and models are publicly available at https://github.com/Chenastron/MTUNet.
abstract_zh: 由于红外图像复杂的背景和噪声，红外小目标检测是计算机视觉领域最困难的问题之一。在大多数现有研究中，通常使用语义分割方法来获得更好的结果。根据分割图计算每个目标的质心作为检测结果。相比之下，我们在本文中提出了一种用于红外小目标检测和分割的新颖的端到端框架。首先，通过使用 UNet 作为维持分辨率和语义信息的主干，我们的模型可以通过附加简单的无锚头来实现比其他最先进的方法更高的检测精度。然后，使用金字塔池模块进一步提取特征，提高目标分割的精度。接下来，我们使用更关注像素级特征的语义分割任务来辅助对象检测的训练过程，这提高了平均精度并允许模型检测到一些以前无法检测到的目标。此外，我们开发了一个用于红外小目标检测和分割的多任务框架。与复合单任务模型相比，我们的多任务学习模型将复杂性降低了近一半，推理速度提高了近两倍，同时保持了准确性。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/Chenastron/MTUNet 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于红外小目标检测与分割的多任务框架。
AI.motivation: 由于红外图像背景复杂且噪声多，红外小目标检测是计算机视觉领域的一个难题。现有研究通常使用语义分割方法，但检测精度有限。
AI.method: 本文采用UNet作为主干网络，附加一个简单的无锚头以提高检测精度，并使用金字塔池模块进一步提取特征以提升分割精度。同时，利用语义分割任务辅助目标检测任务的训练过程，构建了一个多任务学习框架。
AI.result: 该多任务框架相比单任务模型，复杂度降低近一半，推理速度提高近两倍，同时保持了较高的检测精度。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的多任务框架在红外小目标检测与分割任务中取得了显著的性能提升，具有较高的实用价值。

authors_text: Mehdi S. M. Sajjadi,Daniel Duckworth,Aravindh Mahendran,Sjoerd van Steenkiste,Filip Pavetić,Mario Lučić,Leonidas J. Guibas,Klaus Greff,Thomas Kipf
title: Object Scene Representation Transformer
title_zh: 对象场景表示转换器
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS '22. Project page: https://osrt-paper.github.io/
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS '22. Project page: https://osrt-paper.github.io/
abstract: A compositional understanding of the world in terms of objects and their geometry in 3D space is considered a cornerstone of human cognition. Facilitating the learning of such a representation in neural networks holds promise for substantially improving labeled data efficiency. As a key step in this direction, we make progress on the problem of learning 3D-consistent decompositions of complex scenes into individual objects in an unsupervised fashion. We introduce Object Scene Representation Transformer (OSRT), a 3D-centric model in which individual object representations naturally emerge through novel view synthesis. OSRT scales to significantly more complex scenes with larger diversity of objects and backgrounds than existing methods. At the same time, it is multiple orders of magnitude faster at compositional rendering thanks to its light field parametrization and the novel Slot Mixer decoder. We believe this work will not only accelerate future architecture exploration and scaling efforts, but it will also serve as a useful tool for both object-centric as well as neural scene representation learning communities.
summary: A compositional understanding of the world in terms of objects and their geometry in 3D space is considered a cornerstone of human cognition. Facilitating the learning of such a representation in neural networks holds promise for substantially improving labeled data efficiency. As a key step in this direction, we make progress on the problem of learning 3D-consistent decompositions of complex scenes into individual objects in an unsupervised fashion. We introduce Object Scene Representation Transformer (OSRT), a 3D-centric model in which individual object representations naturally emerge through novel view synthesis. OSRT scales to significantly more complex scenes with larger diversity of objects and backgrounds than existing methods. At the same time, it is multiple orders of magnitude faster at compositional rendering thanks to its light field parametrization and the novel Slot Mixer decoder. We believe this work will not only accelerate future architecture exploration and scaling efforts, but it will also serve as a useful tool for both object-centric as well as neural scene representation learning communities.
abstract_zh: 根据 3D 空间中的物体及其几何形状对世界的组合理解被认为是人类认知的基石。促进神经网络中这种表示的学习有望大幅提高标记数据的效率。作为这个方向的关键一步，我们在以无监督方式学习复杂场景到单个对象的 3D 一致分解问题上取得了进展。我们引入了对象场景表示变换器 (OSRT)，这是一种以 3D 为中心的模型，其中各个对象表示通过新颖的视图合成自然出现。与现有方法相比，OSRT 可扩展到更复杂的场景，其中对象和背景的多样性更大。同时，由于其光场参数化和新颖的插槽混合器解码器，它的合成渲染速度提高了多个数量级。我们相信这项工作不仅会加速未来的架构探索和扩展工作，而且还将成为以对象为中心和神经场景表示学习社区的有用工具。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无监督学习方法，将复杂场景分解为3D一致的物体表示。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理复杂场景时效率低，需要更高效的数据利用方法。
AI.method: 引入OSRT模型，结合新颖视角合成、轻场参数化及Slot Mixer解码器，实现无监督分解。
AI.result: 处理更复杂多样的场景，渲染速度比现有方法快多个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 为未来架构探索和物体中心及神经场景表示学习提供有效工具。

search_text: Object Scene Representation Transformer 对象场景表示转换器 A compositional understanding of the world in terms of objects and their geometry in 3D space is considered a cornerstone of human cognition. Facilitating the learning of such a representation in neural networks holds promise for substantially improving labeled data efficiency. As a key step in this direction, we make progress on the problem of learning 3D-consistent decompositions of complex scenes into individual objects in an unsupervised fashion. We introduce Object Scene Representation Transformer (OSRT), a 3D-centric model in which individual object representations naturally emerge through novel view synthesis. OSRT scales to significantly more complex scenes with larger diversity of objects and backgrounds than existing methods. At the same time, it is multiple orders of magnitude faster at compositional rendering thanks to its light field parametrization and the novel Slot Mixer decoder. We believe this work will not only accelerate future architecture exploration and scaling efforts, but it will also serve as a useful tool for both object-centric as well as neural scene representation learning communities. 根据 3D 空间中的物体及其几何形状对世界的组合理解被认为是人类认知的基石。促进神经网络中这种表示的学习有望大幅提高标记数据的效率。作为这个方向的关键一步，我们在以无监督方式学习复杂场景到单个对象的 3D 一致分解问题上取得了进展。我们引入了对象场景表示变换器 (OSRT)，这是一种以 3D 为中心的模型，其中各个对象表示通过新颖的视图合成自然出现。与现有方法相比，OSRT 可扩展到更复杂的场景，其中对象和背景的多样性更大。同时，由于其光场参数化和新颖的插槽混合器解码器，它的合成渲染速度提高了多个数量级。我们相信这项工作不仅会加速未来的架构探索和扩展工作，而且还将成为以对象为中心和神经场景表示学习社区的有用工具。 提出一种无监督学习方法，将复杂场景分解为3D一致的物体表示。 Mehdi S. M. Sajjadi,Daniel Duckworth,Aravindh Mahendran,Sjoerd van Steenkiste,Filip Pavetić,Mario Lučić,Leonidas J. Guibas,Klaus Greff,Thomas Kipf cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yang Liu,Na Tang,Xiaoli Chu,Yang Yang,Jun Wang
title: LPCSE: Neural Speech Enhancement through Linear Predictive Coding
title_zh: LPCSE：通过线性预测编码增强神经语音
abstract: The increasingly stringent requirement on quality-of-experience in 5G/B5G communication systems has led to the emerging neural speech enhancement techniques, which however have been developed in isolation from the existing expert-rule based models of speech pronunciation and distortion, such as the classic Linear Predictive Coding (LPC) speech model because it is difficult to integrate the models with auto-differentiable machine learning frameworks. In this paper, to improve the efficiency of neural speech enhancement, we introduce an LPC-based speech enhancement (LPCSE) architecture, which leverages the strong inductive biases in the LPC speech model in conjunction with the expressive power of neural networks. Differentiable end-to-end learning is achieved in LPCSE via two novel blocks: a block that utilizes the expert rules to reduce the computational overhead when integrating the LPC speech model into neural networks, and a block that ensures the stability of the model and avoids exploding gradients in end-to-end training by mapping the Linear prediction coefficients to the filter poles. The experimental results show that LPCSE successfully restores the formants of the speeches distorted by transmission loss, and outperforms two existing neural speech enhancement methods of comparable neural network sizes in terms of the Perceptual evaluation of speech quality (PESQ) and Short-Time Objective Intelligibility (STOI) on the LJ Speech corpus.
summary: The increasingly stringent requirement on quality-of-experience in 5G/B5G communication systems has led to the emerging neural speech enhancement techniques, which however have been developed in isolation from the existing expert-rule based models of speech pronunciation and distortion, such as the classic Linear Predictive Coding (LPC) speech model because it is difficult to integrate the models with auto-differentiable machine learning frameworks. In this paper, to improve the efficiency of neural speech enhancement, we introduce an LPC-based speech enhancement (LPCSE) architecture, which leverages the strong inductive biases in the LPC speech model in conjunction with the expressive power of neural networks. Differentiable end-to-end learning is achieved in LPCSE via two novel blocks: a block that utilizes the expert rules to reduce the computational overhead when integrating the LPC speech model into neural networks, and a block that ensures the stability of the model and avoids exploding gradients in end-to-end training by mapping the Linear prediction coefficients to the filter poles. The experimental results show that LPCSE successfully restores the formants of the speeches distorted by transmission loss, and outperforms two existing neural speech enhancement methods of comparable neural network sizes in terms of the Perceptual evaluation of speech quality (PESQ) and Short-Time Objective Intelligibility (STOI) on the LJ Speech corpus.
abstract_zh: 5G/B5G通信系统对体验质量日益严格的要求催生了新兴的神经语音增强技术，但这些技术的开发是独立于现有的基于专家规则的语音发音和失真模型，例如经典的线性预测编码（LPC）语音模型，因为很难将模型与自动微分机器学习框架集成。在本文中，为了提高神经语音增强的效率，我们引入了一种基于 LPC 的语音增强（LPCSE）架构，该架构利用了 LPC 语音模型中的强归纳偏差以及神经网络的表达能力。 LPCSE 中可微分的端到端学习是通过两个新颖的块实现的：一个块在将 LPC 语音模型集成到神经网络时利用专家规则来减少计算开销，另一个块通过将线性预测系数映射到滤波器极点来确保模型的稳定性并避免端到端训练中的梯度爆炸。实验结果表明，LPCSE成功地恢复了因传输损耗而失真的语音共振峰，并且在LJ语音语料库上的语音质量感知评估（PESQ）和短时客观清晰度（STOI）方面优于现有的两种同等神经网络规模的神经语音增强方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于线性预测编码（LPC）的神经语音增强架构LPCSE，通过结合LPC模型的归纳偏置与神经网络的表达能力，提升语音增强效率。
AI.motivation: 5G/B5G通信系统对语音质量要求日益严格，但现有神经语音增强方法与传统LPC等专家规则模型难以融合，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 设计LPCSE架构，包含两个创新模块：1）利用专家规则降低LPC模型集成计算开销；2）通过线性预测系数到滤波器极点的映射确保训练稳定性并避免梯度爆炸。
AI.result: 实验表明，LPCSE在LJ Speech语料库上优于同类神经网络模型，在PESQ和STOI指标上表现更优，有效恢复了传输损耗导致的语音共振峰。
AI.conclusion: 通过将LPC模型与神经网络结合，LPCSE验证了传统语音模型与深度学习融合的潜力，为高效语音增强提供了新方向。

authors_text: Isak Potgieter,Christopher W. Cleghorn,Anna S. Bosman
title: A Local Optima Network Analysis of the Feedforward Neural Architecture Space
title_zh: 前馈神经结构空间的局部最优网络分析
comment: A version of this paper has been accepted for publication at IJCNN'22
comments: A version of this paper has been accepted for publication at IJCNN'22
abstract: This study investigates the use of local optima network (LON) analysis, a derivative of the fitness landscape of candidate solutions, to characterise and visualise the neural architecture space. The search space of feedforward neural network architectures with up to three layers, each with up to 10 neurons, is fully enumerated by evaluating trained model performance on a selection of data sets. Extracted LONs, while heterogeneous across data sets, all exhibit simple global structures, with single global funnels in all cases but one. These results yield early indication that LONs may provide a viable paradigm by which to analyse and optimise neural architectures.
summary: This study investigates the use of local optima network (LON) analysis, a derivative of the fitness landscape of candidate solutions, to characterise and visualise the neural architecture space. The search space of feedforward neural network architectures with up to three layers, each with up to 10 neurons, is fully enumerated by evaluating trained model performance on a selection of data sets. Extracted LONs, while heterogeneous across data sets, all exhibit simple global structures, with single global funnels in all cases but one. These results yield early indication that LONs may provide a viable paradigm by which to analyse and optimise neural architectures.
abstract_zh: 本研究研究了使用局部最优网络（LON）分析（候选解决方案的适应度景观的衍生物）来表征和可视化神经架构空间。通过在选定的数据集上评估经过训练的模型性能，可以完全枚举最多三层的前馈神经网络架构的搜索空间，每层最多有 10 个神经元。提取的 LON 虽然跨数据集是异构的，但都表现出简单的全局结构，除了一种情况外，在所有情况下都具有单一的全局漏斗。这些结果初步表明 LON 可能提供一种可行的范例来分析和优化神经架构。

AI.tldr: 利用局部最优网络（LON）分析表征和可视化前馈神经网络架构空间
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络架构搜索方法存在效率问题，需探索新方法分析架构空间
AI.method: 枚举三层以内、每层最多10个神经元的前馈网络架构，评估其在多个数据集上的性能，并提取局部最优网络进行分析
AI.result: 不同数据集的LONs呈现异质性，但多数具有单一全局漏斗结构，仅一例例外
AI.conclusion: LON分析为神经架构分析和优化提供了可行的新范式

authors_text: Fengbin Zhu,Chao Wang,Wenqiang Lei,Ziyang Liu,Tat Seng Chua
title: RDU: A Region-based Approach to Form-style Document Understanding
title_zh: RDU：基于区域的表单式文档理解方法
abstract: Key Information Extraction (KIE) is aimed at extracting structured information (e.g. key-value pairs) from form-style documents (e.g. invoices), which makes an important step towards intelligent document understanding. Previous approaches generally tackle KIE by sequence tagging, which faces difficulty to process non-flatten sequences, especially for table-text mixed documents. These approaches also suffer from the trouble of pre-defining a fixed set of labels for each type of documents, as well as the label imbalance issue. In this work, we assume Optical Character Recognition (OCR) has been applied to input documents, and reformulate the KIE task as a region prediction problem in the two-dimensional (2D) space given a target field. Following this new setup, we develop a new KIE model named Region-based Document Understanding (RDU) that takes as input the text content and corresponding coordinates of a document, and tries to predict the result by localizing a bounding-box-like region. Our RDU first applies a layout-aware BERT equipped with a soft layout attention masking and bias mechanism to incorporate layout information into the representations. Then, a list of candidate regions is generated from the representations via a Region Proposal Module inspired by computer vision models widely applied for object detection. Finally, a Region Categorization Module and a Region Selection Module are adopted to judge whether a proposed region is valid and select the one with the largest probability from all proposed regions respectively. Experiments on four types of form-style documents show that our proposed method can achieve impressive results. In addition, our RDU model can be trained with different document types seamlessly, which is especially helpful over low-resource documents.
summary: Key Information Extraction (KIE) is aimed at extracting structured information (e.g. key-value pairs) from form-style documents (e.g. invoices), which makes an important step towards intelligent document understanding. Previous approaches generally tackle KIE by sequence tagging, which faces difficulty to process non-flatten sequences, especially for table-text mixed documents. These approaches also suffer from the trouble of pre-defining a fixed set of labels for each type of documents, as well as the label imbalance issue. In this work, we assume Optical Character Recognition (OCR) has been applied to input documents, and reformulate the KIE task as a region prediction problem in the two-dimensional (2D) space given a target field. Following this new setup, we develop a new KIE model named Region-based Document Understanding (RDU) that takes as input the text content and corresponding coordinates of a document, and tries to predict the result by localizing a bounding-box-like region. Our RDU first applies a layout-aware BERT equipped with a soft layout attention masking and bias mechanism to incorporate layout information into the representations. Then, a list of candidate regions is generated from the representations via a Region Proposal Module inspired by computer vision models widely applied for object detection. Finally, a Region Categorization Module and a Region Selection Module are adopted to judge whether a proposed region is valid and select the one with the largest probability from all proposed regions respectively. Experiments on four types of form-style documents show that our proposed method can achieve impressive results. In addition, our RDU model can be trained with different document types seamlessly, which is especially helpful over low-resource documents.
abstract_zh: 关键信息提取（KIE）旨在从表单式文档（例如发票）中提取结构化信息（例如键值对），这为智能文档理解迈出了重要一步。以前的方法通常通过序列标记来处理 KIE，这面临着处理非扁平序列的困难，特别是对于表文本混合文档。这些方法还存在为每种类型的文档预先定义一组固定标签的麻烦以及标签不平衡问题。在这项工作中，我们假设光学字符识别 (OCR) 已应用于输入文档，并将 KIE 任务重新表述为给定目标字段的二维 (2D) 空间中的区域预测问题。在这个新设置之后，我们开发了一个名为基于区域的文档理解（RDU）的新 KIE 模型，该模型将文本内容和文档的相应坐标作为输入，并尝试通过定位类似边界框的区域来预测结果。我们的 RDU 首先应用布局感知 BERT，配备软布局注意掩蔽和偏差机制，将布局信息合并到表示中。然后，通过区域提议模块从表示中生成候选区域列表，该模块受到广泛应用于对象检测的计算机视觉模型的启发。最后，采用区域分类模块和区域选择模块来判断提议区域是否有效，并分别从所有提议区域中选择概率最大的区域。对四种表单样式文档的实验表明，我们提出的方法可以取得令人印象深刻的结果。此外，我们的 RDU 模型可以使用不同的文档类型进行无缝训练，这对于低资源文档尤其有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于区域的表单风格文档理解方法RDU，通过区域预测解决传统序列标注方法在复杂布局文档中的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统序列标注方法难以处理表格与文本混合的非扁平序列，且需预定义固定标签集，导致标签不平衡问题，限制了模型的灵活性和性能。
AI.method: 将KIE任务重构为二维空间区域预测问题，采用布局感知BERT结合软布局注意力机制，通过区域提议模块生成候选区域，并利用区域分类与选择模块确定有效区域。
AI.result: 在四种表单文档上的实验表明，RDU方法取得显著效果，且能无缝适应不同文档类型，尤其适用于低资源场景。
AI.conclusion: RDU通过区域化建模有效解决了布局复杂性和标签预定义问题，为表单文档理解提供了更灵活高效的解决方案。

search_text: RDU: A Region-based Approach to Form-style Document Understanding RDU：基于区域的表单式文档理解方法 Key Information Extraction (KIE) is aimed at extracting structured information (e.g. key-value pairs) from form-style documents (e.g. invoices), which makes an important step towards intelligent document understanding. Previous approaches generally tackle KIE by sequence tagging, which faces difficulty to process non-flatten sequences, especially for table-text mixed documents. These approaches also suffer from the trouble of pre-defining a fixed set of labels for each type of documents, as well as the label imbalance issue. In this work, we assume Optical Character Recognition (OCR) has been applied to input documents, and reformulate the KIE task as a region prediction problem in the two-dimensional (2D) space given a target field. Following this new setup, we develop a new KIE model named Region-based Document Understanding (RDU) that takes as input the text content and corresponding coordinates of a document, and tries to predict the result by localizing a bounding-box-like region. Our RDU first applies a layout-aware BERT equipped with a soft layout attention masking and bias mechanism to incorporate layout information into the representations. Then, a list of candidate regions is generated from the representations via a Region Proposal Module inspired by computer vision models widely applied for object detection. Finally, a Region Categorization Module and a Region Selection Module are adopted to judge whether a proposed region is valid and select the one with the largest probability from all proposed regions respectively. Experiments on four types of form-style documents show that our proposed method can achieve impressive results. In addition, our RDU model can be trained with different document types seamlessly, which is especially helpful over low-resource documents. 关键信息提取（KIE）旨在从表单式文档（例如发票）中提取结构化信息（例如键值对），这为智能文档理解迈出了重要一步。以前的方法通常通过序列标记来处理 KIE，这面临着处理非扁平序列的困难，特别是对于表文本混合文档。这些方法还存在为每种类型的文档预先定义一组固定标签的麻烦以及标签不平衡问题。在这项工作中，我们假设光学字符识别 (OCR) 已应用于输入文档，并将 KIE 任务重新表述为给定目标字段的二维 (2D) 空间中的区域预测问题。在这个新设置之后，我们开发了一个名为基于区域的文档理解（RDU）的新 KIE 模型，该模型将文本内容和文档的相应坐标作为输入，并尝试通过定位类似边界框的区域来预测结果。我们的 RDU 首先应用布局感知 BERT，配备软布局注意掩蔽和偏差机制，将布局信息合并到表示中。然后，通过区域提议模块从表示中生成候选区域列表，该模块受到广泛应用于对象检测的计算机视觉模型的启发。最后，采用区域分类模块和区域选择模块来判断提议区域是否有效，并分别从所有提议区域中选择概率最大的区域。对四种表单样式文档的实验表明，我们提出的方法可以取得令人印象深刻的结果。此外，我们的 RDU 模型可以使用不同的文档类型进行无缝训练，这对于低资源文档尤其有用。 本文提出一种基于区域的表单风格文档理解方法RDU，通过区域预测解决传统序列标注方法在复杂布局文档中的局限性。 Fengbin Zhu,Chao Wang,Wenqiang Lei,Ziyang Liu,Tat Seng Chua cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: M. Grand,H. Fiorino,D. Pellier
title: An Accurate HDDL Domain Learning Algorithm from Partial and Noisy Observations
title_zh: 基于部分和噪声观测的准确 HDDL 域学习算法
comment: ef:Proceedings of the International Workshop of Knowledge Engineering (ICAPS), 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the International Workshop of Knowledge Engineering (ICAPS), 2022
abstract: The Hierarchical Task Network ({\sf HTN}) formalism is very expressive and used to express a wide variety of planning problems. In contrast to the classical {\sf STRIPS} formalism in which only the action model needs to be specified, the {\sf HTN} formalism requires to specify, in addition, the tasks of the problem and their decomposition into subtasks, called {\sf HTN} methods. For this reason, hand-encoding {\sf HTN} problems is considered more difficult and more error-prone by experts than classical planning problem. To tackle this problem, we propose a new approach (HierAMLSI) based on grammar induction to acquire {\sf HTN} planning domain knowledge, by learning action models and {\sf HTN} methods with their preconditions. Unlike other approaches, HierAMLSI is able to learn both actions and methods with noisy and partial inputs observation with a high level or accuracy.
summary: The Hierarchical Task Network ({\sf HTN}) formalism is very expressive and used to express a wide variety of planning problems. In contrast to the classical {\sf STRIPS} formalism in which only the action model needs to be specified, the {\sf HTN} formalism requires to specify, in addition, the tasks of the problem and their decomposition into subtasks, called {\sf HTN} methods. For this reason, hand-encoding {\sf HTN} problems is considered more difficult and more error-prone by experts than classical planning problem. To tackle this problem, we propose a new approach (HierAMLSI) based on grammar induction to acquire {\sf HTN} planning domain knowledge, by learning action models and {\sf HTN} methods with their preconditions. Unlike other approaches, HierAMLSI is able to learn both actions and methods with noisy and partial inputs observation with a high level or accuracy.
abstract_zh: 分层任务网络（{\sf HTN}）形式主义非常具有表现力，可用于表达各种规划问题。与仅需要指定动作模型的经典 {\sf STRIPS} 形式相比，{\sf HTN} 形式还需要指定问题的任务及其分解为子任务，称为 {\sf HTN} 方法。因此，专家认为手工编码 {\sf HTN} 问题比经典规划问题更困难且更容易出错。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于语法归纳的新方法（HierAMLSI），通过学习动作模型和方法及其前提条件来获取规划领域知识。与其他方法不同，HierAMLSI 能够通过高水平或准确度的噪声和部分输入观察来学习动作和方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于语法归纳的新方法HierAMLSI，用于从部分和嘈杂的观察中学习HTN规划领域的知识。
AI.motivation: HTN形式在表达规划问题时非常强大，但手动编码HTN问题比经典规划问题更困难且容易出错。因此，需要一种能够自动学习HTN领域知识的方法。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于语法归纳的方法HierAMLSI，用于从部分和嘈杂的观察中学习HTN规划领域的动作模型和HTN方法及其前提条件。
AI.result: HierAMLSI能够在嘈杂和部分输入观察中准确学习动作和方法，具有较高的准确性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法能够在嘈杂和部分输入观察中有效学习HTN规划领域的知识，解决了手动编码HTN问题的困难。

authors_text: Zhongxiang Dai,Yizhou Chen,Haibin Yu,Bryan Kian Hsiang Low,Patrick Jaillet
title: On Provably Robust Meta-Bayesian Optimization
title_zh: 可证明稳健的元贝叶斯优化
comment: Accepted to 38th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI 2022), Extended version with proofs and additional experimental details and results, 31 pages
comments: Accepted to 38th Conference on Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence (UAI 2022), Extended version with proofs and additional experimental details and results, 31 pages
abstract: Bayesian optimization (BO) has become popular for sequential optimization of black-box functions. When BO is used to optimize a target function, we often have access to previous evaluations of potentially related functions. This begs the question as to whether we can leverage these previous experiences to accelerate the current BO task through meta-learning (meta-BO), while ensuring robustness against potentially harmful dissimilar tasks that could sabotage the convergence of BO. This paper introduces two scalable and provably robust meta-BO algorithms: robust meta-Gaussian process-upper confidence bound (RM-GP-UCB) and RM-GP-Thompson sampling (RM-GP-TS). We prove that both algorithms are asymptotically no-regret even when some or all previous tasks are dissimilar to the current task, and show that RM-GP-UCB enjoys a better theoretical robustness than RM-GP-TS. We also exploit the theoretical guarantees to optimize the weights assigned to individual previous tasks through regret minimization via online learning, which diminishes the impact of dissimilar tasks and hence further enhances the robustness. Empirical evaluations show that (a) RM-GP-UCB performs effectively and consistently across various applications, and (b) RM-GP-TS, despite being less robust than RM-GP-UCB both in theory and in practice, performs competitively in some scenarios with less dissimilar tasks and is more computationally efficient.
summary: Bayesian optimization (BO) has become popular for sequential optimization of black-box functions. When BO is used to optimize a target function, we often have access to previous evaluations of potentially related functions. This begs the question as to whether we can leverage these previous experiences to accelerate the current BO task through meta-learning (meta-BO), while ensuring robustness against potentially harmful dissimilar tasks that could sabotage the convergence of BO. This paper introduces two scalable and provably robust meta-BO algorithms: robust meta-Gaussian process-upper confidence bound (RM-GP-UCB) and RM-GP-Thompson sampling (RM-GP-TS). We prove that both algorithms are asymptotically no-regret even when some or all previous tasks are dissimilar to the current task, and show that RM-GP-UCB enjoys a better theoretical robustness than RM-GP-TS. We also exploit the theoretical guarantees to optimize the weights assigned to individual previous tasks through regret minimization via online learning, which diminishes the impact of dissimilar tasks and hence further enhances the robustness. Empirical evaluations show that (a) RM-GP-UCB performs effectively and consistently across various applications, and (b) RM-GP-TS, despite being less robust than RM-GP-UCB both in theory and in practice, performs competitively in some scenarios with less dissimilar tasks and is more computationally efficient.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯优化 (BO) 已在黑盒函数的顺序优化中变得流行。当使用 BO 来优化目标函数时，我们通常可以访问之前对潜在相关函数的评估。这就引出了一个问题：我们是否可以利用这些先前的经验，通过元学习（meta-BO）来加速当前的 BO 任务，同时确保针对可能破坏 BO 收敛的潜在有害的不同任务的鲁棒性。本文介绍了两种可扩展且可证明稳健的元 BO 算法：稳健的元高斯过程置信上限 (RM-GP-UCB) 和 RM-GP-Thompson 采样 (RM-GP-TS)。我们证明，即使先前的某些或所有任务与当前任务不同，这两种算法也是渐近无悔的，并表明 RM-GP-UCB 比 RM-GP-TS 具有更好的理论鲁棒性。我们还利用理论保证，通过在线学习的遗憾最小化来优化分配给各个先前任务的权重，这减少了不同任务的影响，从而进一步增强了鲁棒性。实证评估表明，（a）RM-GP-UCB 在各种应用程序中都能有效且一致地执行，（b）RM-GP-TS 尽管在理论上和实践中不如 RM-GP-UCB 稳健，但在某些任务相似度较低的场景中表现出竞争力，并且计算效率更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种可证明鲁棒的元贝叶斯优化算法RM-GP-UCB和RM-GP-TS，通过利用历史任务信息加速当前优化任务，同时保证对不相关任务的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 贝叶斯优化在处理黑箱函数时需利用历史任务数据加速收敛，但存在历史任务与当前任务差异过大导致优化失效的风险，需在元学习框架下实现鲁棒性保障。
AI.method: 设计具有理论保证的元学习算法，通过在线学习动态调整历史任务权重，降低不相关任务影响，并证明两种算法在存在差异任务时仍具渐进无悔特性。
AI.result: 实验表明RM-GP-UCB在多场景下表现稳定且理论鲁棒性更强，RM-GP-TS在任务相似度较高时效率更优，两种算法均有效提升元优化性能。

search_text: On Provably Robust Meta-Bayesian Optimization 可证明稳健的元贝叶斯优化 Bayesian optimization (BO) has become popular for sequential optimization of black-box functions. When BO is used to optimize a target function, we often have access to previous evaluations of potentially related functions. This begs the question as to whether we can leverage these previous experiences to accelerate the current BO task through meta-learning (meta-BO), while ensuring robustness against potentially harmful dissimilar tasks that could sabotage the convergence of BO. This paper introduces two scalable and provably robust meta-BO algorithms: robust meta-Gaussian process-upper confidence bound (RM-GP-UCB) and RM-GP-Thompson sampling (RM-GP-TS). We prove that both algorithms are asymptotically no-regret even when some or all previous tasks are dissimilar to the current task, and show that RM-GP-UCB enjoys a better theoretical robustness than RM-GP-TS. We also exploit the theoretical guarantees to optimize the weights assigned to individual previous tasks through regret minimization via online learning, which diminishes the impact of dissimilar tasks and hence further enhances the robustness. Empirical evaluations show that (a) RM-GP-UCB performs effectively and consistently across various applications, and (b) RM-GP-TS, despite being less robust than RM-GP-UCB both in theory and in practice, performs competitively in some scenarios with less dissimilar tasks and is more computationally efficient. 贝叶斯优化 (BO) 已在黑盒函数的顺序优化中变得流行。当使用 BO 来优化目标函数时，我们通常可以访问之前对潜在相关函数的评估。这就引出了一个问题：我们是否可以利用这些先前的经验，通过元学习（meta-BO）来加速当前的 BO 任务，同时确保针对可能破坏 BO 收敛的潜在有害的不同任务的鲁棒性。本文介绍了两种可扩展且可证明稳健的元 BO 算法：稳健的元高斯过程置信上限 (RM-GP-UCB) 和 RM-GP-Thompson 采样 (RM-GP-TS)。我们证明，即使先前的某些或所有任务与当前任务不同，这两种算法也是渐近无悔的，并表明 RM-GP-UCB 比 RM-GP-TS 具有更好的理论鲁棒性。我们还利用理论保证，通过在线学习的遗憾最小化来优化分配给各个先前任务的权重，这减少了不同任务的影响，从而进一步增强了鲁棒性。实证评估表明，（a）RM-GP-UCB 在各种应用程序中都能有效且一致地执行，（b）RM-GP-TS 尽管在理论上和实践中不如 RM-GP-UCB 稳健，但在某些任务相似度较低的场景中表现出竞争力，并且计算效率更高。 本文提出两种可证明鲁棒的元贝叶斯优化算法RM-GP-UCB和RM-GP-TS，通过利用历史任务信息加速当前优化任务，同时保证对不相关任务的鲁棒性。 Zhongxiang Dai,Yizhou Chen,Haibin Yu,Bryan Kian Hsiang Low,Patrick Jaillet cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Siyu Huo,Kushal Mukherjee,Jayachandu Bandlamudi,Vatche Isahagian,Vinod Muthusamy,Yara Rizk
title: Natural Language Sentence Generation from API Specifications
title_zh: 根据 API 规范生成自然语言句子
abstract: APIs are everywhere; they provide access to automation solutions that could help businesses automate some of their tasks. Unfortunately, they may not be accessible to the business users who need them but are not equipped with the necessary technical skills to leverage them. Wrapping these APIs with chatbot capabilities is one solution to make these automation solutions interactive. In this work, we propose a system to generate sentences to train intent recognition models, a crucial component within chatbots to understand natural language utterances from users. Evaluation of our approach based on deep learning models showed promising and inspiring results, and the human-in-the-loop interaction will provide further improvement on the system.
summary: APIs are everywhere; they provide access to automation solutions that could help businesses automate some of their tasks. Unfortunately, they may not be accessible to the business users who need them but are not equipped with the necessary technical skills to leverage them. Wrapping these APIs with chatbot capabilities is one solution to make these automation solutions interactive. In this work, we propose a system to generate sentences to train intent recognition models, a crucial component within chatbots to understand natural language utterances from users. Evaluation of our approach based on deep learning models showed promising and inspiring results, and the human-in-the-loop interaction will provide further improvement on the system.
abstract_zh: API 无处不在；他们提供自动化解决方案，可以帮助企业自动执行一些任务。不幸的是，需要它们但不具备利用它们的必要技术技能的业务用户可能无法访问它们。用聊天机器人功能包装这些 API 是使这些自动化解决方案具有交互性的一种解决方案。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个生成句子来训练意图识别模型的系统，这是聊天机器人中理解用户自然语言话语的关键组件。对我们基于深度学习模型的方法的评估显示出有希望和鼓舞人心的结果，人机交互将进一步改进系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从API规范生成自然语言句子的系统，用于训练聊天机器人中的意图识别模型。
AI.motivation: 业务用户缺乏技术能力难以直接使用API，需通过聊天机器人实现交互式自动化，但意图识别模型训练数据不足。
AI.method: 基于深度学习模型生成训练数据，并引入人类反馈进行迭代优化。
AI.result: 实验表明深度学习方法效果显著，结合人工干预可进一步提升系统性能。
AI.conclusion: 生成的自然语言句子能有效训练意图识别模型，未来可通过增强人机协作持续优化系统。

authors_text: Jakub R. Kaczmarzyk,Tahsin M. Kurc,Shahira Abousamra,Rajarsi Gupta,Joel H. Saltz,Peter K. Koo
title: Evaluating histopathology transfer learning with ChampKit
title_zh: 使用 ChampKit 评估组织病理学迁移学习
comment: Submitted to NeurIPS 2022 Track on Datasets and Benchmarks. Source code available at https://github.com/kaczmarj/champkit
comments: Submitted to NeurIPS 2022 Track on Datasets and Benchmarks. Source code available at https://github.com/kaczmarj/champkit
abstract: Histopathology remains the gold standard for diagnosis of various cancers. Recent advances in computer vision, specifically deep learning, have facilitated the analysis of histopathology images for various tasks, including immune cell detection and microsatellite instability classification. The state-of-the-art for each task often employs base architectures that have been pretrained for image classification on ImageNet. The standard approach to develop classifiers in histopathology tends to focus narrowly on optimizing models for a single task, not considering the aspects of modeling innovations that improve generalization across tasks. Here we present ChampKit (Comprehensive Histopathology Assessment of Model Predictions toolKit): an extensible, fully reproducible benchmarking toolkit that consists of a broad collection of patch-level image classification tasks across different cancers. ChampKit enables a way to systematically document the performance impact of proposed improvements in models and methodology. ChampKit source code and data are freely accessible at https://github.com/kaczmarj/champkit .
summary: Histopathology remains the gold standard for diagnosis of various cancers. Recent advances in computer vision, specifically deep learning, have facilitated the analysis of histopathology images for various tasks, including immune cell detection and microsatellite instability classification. The state-of-the-art for each task often employs base architectures that have been pretrained for image classification on ImageNet. The standard approach to develop classifiers in histopathology tends to focus narrowly on optimizing models for a single task, not considering the aspects of modeling innovations that improve generalization across tasks. Here we present ChampKit (Comprehensive Histopathology Assessment of Model Predictions toolKit): an extensible, fully reproducible benchmarking toolkit that consists of a broad collection of patch-level image classification tasks across different cancers. ChampKit enables a way to systematically document the performance impact of proposed improvements in models and methodology. ChampKit source code and data are freely accessible at https://github.com/kaczmarj/champkit .
abstract_zh: 组织病理学仍然是诊断各种癌症的金标准。计算机视觉（特别是深度学习）的最新进展促进了对各种任务的组织病理学图像的分析，包括免疫细胞检测和微卫星不稳定性分类。每个任务的最新技术通常采用已针对 ImageNet 上的图像分类进行预训练的基础架构。开发组织病理学分类器的标准方法往往狭隘地关注优化单个任务的模型，而不考虑改善跨任务泛化的建模创新方面。在这里，我们介绍 ChampKit（模型预测综合组织病理学评估工具包）：一个可扩展、完全可重复的基准测试工具包，由跨不同癌症的大量补丁级图像分类任务组成。 ChampKit 提供了一种方法来系统地记录模型和方法中提出的改进对性能的影响。 ChampKit 源代码和数据可在 https://github.com/kaczmarj/champkit 上免费访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ChampKit工具包，用于系统评估病理学图像的迁移学习效果，包含多种癌症的补丁级分类任务。
AI.motivation: 现有病理学图像分类方法多针对单一任务优化，缺乏跨任务泛化能力的评估，需建立统一基准以比较模型改进效果。
AI.method: 开发ChampKit工具包，整合多癌症类型的补丁级分类任务，提供可扩展的模型性能评估框架并开源代码与数据。
AI.result: ChampKit实现了对模型改进的系统性性能评估，支持跨任务泛化分析，资源可通过GitHub获取。
AI.conclusion: ChampKit为病理学迁移学习研究提供了标准化基准，有助于推动模型泛化能力的优化与创新方法的验证。

Kaczmarzyk,Tahsin M. Kurc,Shahira Abousamra,Rajarsi Gupta,Joel H. Saltz,Peter K. Koo q-bio.QM,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Mathieu Serrurier,Franck Mamalet,Thomas Fel,Louis Béthune,Thibaut Boissin
title: On the explainable properties of 1-Lipschitz Neural Networks: An Optimal Transport Perspective
title_zh: 论 1-Lipschitz 神经网络的可解释属性：最优传输视角
comment: ef:Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), Neural Information Processing Systems Foundation, Dec 2023, New Orleans (Louisiana), United States
comments: ef:Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS), Neural Information Processing Systems Foundation, Dec 2023, New Orleans (Louisiana), United States
abstract: Input gradients have a pivotal role in a variety of applications, including adversarial attack algorithms for evaluating model robustness, explainable AI techniques for generating Saliency Maps, and counterfactual explanations.However, Saliency Maps generated by traditional neural networks are often noisy and provide limited insights. In this paper, we demonstrate that, on the contrary, the Saliency Maps of 1-Lipschitz neural networks, learned with the dual loss of an optimal transportation problem, exhibit desirable XAI properties:They are highly concentrated on the essential parts of the image with low noise, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art explanation approaches across various models and metrics. We also prove that these maps align unprecedentedly well with human explanations on ImageNet.To explain the particularly beneficial properties of the Saliency Map for such models, we prove this gradient encodes both the direction of the transportation plan and the direction towards the nearest adversarial attack. Following the gradient down to the decision boundary is no longer considered an adversarial attack, but rather a counterfactual explanation that explicitly transports the input from one class to another. Thus, Learning with such a loss jointly optimizes the classification objective and the alignment of the gradient, i.e. the Saliency Map, to the transportation plan direction.These networks were previously known to be certifiably robust by design, and we demonstrate that they scale well for large problems and models, and are tailored for explainability using a fast and straightforward method.

We also prove that these maps align unprecedentedly well with human explanations on ImageNet.To explain the particularly beneficial properties of the Saliency Map for such models, we prove this gradient encodes both the direction of the transportation plan and the direction towards the nearest adversarial attack. Following the gradient down to the decision boundary is no longer considered an adversarial attack, but rather a counterfactual explanation that explicitly transports the input from one class to another. Thus, Learning with such a loss jointly optimizes the classification objective and the alignment of the gradient, i.e. the Saliency Map, to the transportation plan direction.These networks were previously known to be certifiably robust by design, and we demonstrate that they scale well for large problems and models, and are tailored for explainability using a fast and straightforward method.
abstract_zh: 输入梯度在各种应用中都发挥着关键作用，包括用于评估模型鲁棒性的对抗性攻击算法、用于生成显着性图的可解释的人工智能技术以及反事实解释。然而，传统神经网络生成的显着性图通常充满噪音，并且提供的见解有限。在本文中，我们证明，相反，通过最优运输问题的双重损失学习的 1-Lipschitz 神经网络的显着性图表现出理想的 XAI 属性：它们高度集中在低噪声图像的基本部分，在各种模型和指标上显着优于最先进的解释方法。我们还证明这些地图与 ImageNet 上的人类解释史无前例地吻合。为了解释显着图对于此类模型的特别有益的属性，我们证明该梯度编码了运输计划的方向和最近的对抗性攻击的方向。沿着梯度下降到决策边界不再被认为是对抗性攻击，而是一种反事实解释，明确地将输入从一个类传输到另一个类。因此，具有这种损失的学习联合优化了分类目标和梯度（即显着图）与交通计划方向的对齐。这些网络之前被认为在设计上具有可证明的鲁棒性，我们证明它们对于大型问题和模型具有良好的扩展性，并且使用快速而简单的方法进行了可解释性的定制。

AI.tldr: 本文从最优运输视角研究1-Lipschitz神经网络的可解释性特性，提出通过双损失函数优化生成更高质量的显著性图。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络生成的显著性图存在噪声大、解释性差的问题，而1-Lipschitz网络具有认证鲁棒性但其可解释性潜力尚未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 设计结合最优运输问题双损失函数的训练方法，证明梯度同时编码运输计划方向和对抗攻击方向，实现分类目标与显著性图方向的联合优化。
AI.result: 在ImageNet等数据集上显著性图噪声降低，解释效果优于现有SOTA方法，且与人类解释高度一致，同时保持模型鲁棒性和可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 1-Lipschitz网络通过最优运输视角的梯度优化，实现了鲁棒性与可解释性的统一，为可信AI提供了新的理论框架和实践方法。

authors_text: Janek Groß,Rasmus Adler,Michael Kläs,Jan Reich,Lisa Jöckel,Roman Gansch
title: Architectural patterns for handling runtime uncertainty of data-driven models in safety-critical perception
title_zh: 用于处理安全关键感知中数据驱动模型的运行时不确定性的架构模式
abstract: Data-driven models (DDM) based on machine learning and other AI techniques play an important role in the perception of increasingly autonomous systems. Due to the merely implicit definition of their behavior mainly based on the data used for training, DDM outputs are subject to uncertainty. This poses a challenge with respect to the realization of safety-critical perception tasks by means of DDMs. A promising approach to tackling this challenge is to estimate the uncertainty in the current situation during operation and adapt the system behavior accordingly. In previous work, we focused on runtime estimation of uncertainty and discussed approaches for handling uncertainty estimations. In this paper, we present additional architectural patterns for handling uncertainty. Furthermore, we evaluate the four patterns qualitatively and quantitatively with respect to safety and performance gains. For the quantitative evaluation, we consider a distance controller for vehicle platooning where performance gains are measured by considering how much the distance can be reduced in different operational situations. We conclude that the consideration of context information of the driving situation makes it possible to accept more or less uncertainty depending on the inherent risk of the situation, which results in performance gains.
summary: Data-driven models (DDM) based on machine learning and other AI techniques play an important role in the perception of increasingly autonomous systems. Due to the merely implicit definition of their behavior mainly based on the data used for training, DDM outputs are subject to uncertainty. This poses a challenge with respect to the realization of safety-critical perception tasks by means of DDMs. A promising approach to tackling this challenge is to estimate the uncertainty in the current situation during operation and adapt the system behavior accordingly. In previous work, we focused on runtime estimation of uncertainty and discussed approaches for handling uncertainty estimations. In this paper, we present additional architectural patterns for handling uncertainty. Furthermore, we evaluate the four patterns qualitatively and quantitatively with respect to safety and performance gains. For the quantitative evaluation, we consider a distance controller for vehicle platooning where performance gains are measured by considering how much the distance can be reduced in different operational situations. We conclude that the consideration of context information of the driving situation makes it possible to accept more or less uncertainty depending on the inherent risk of the situation, which results in performance gains.
abstract_zh: 基于机器学习和其他人工智能技术的数据驱动模型（DDM）在感知日益自治的系统中发挥着重要作用。由于其行为的隐式定义主要基于用于训练的数据，因此 DDM 输出存在不确定性。这对通过 DDM 实现安全关键感知任务提出了挑战。应对这一挑战的一个有前途的方法是估计运行过程中当前情况的不确定性并相应地调整系统行为。在之前的工作中，我们重点关注不确定性的运行时估计，并讨论了处理不确定性估计的方法。在本文中，我们提出了用于处理不确定性的附加架构模式。此外，我们还定性和定量地评估了这四种模式的安全性和性能收益。对于定量评估，我们考虑用于车辆队列的距离控制器，其中通过考虑在不同操作情况下可以减少多少距离来衡量性能增益。我们的结论是，考虑驾驶情况的上下文信息可以根据情况的固有风险接受或多或少的不确定性，从而提高性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并评估了处理数据驱动模型在安全关键感知任务中运行时不确定性的架构模式。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动模型在自主系统感知中起重要作用，但由于其行为主要依赖于训练数据，输出存在不确定性，这对安全关键任务提出了挑战。
AI.method: 本文提出了额外的架构模式来处理不确定性，并通过定性和定量方法进行评估，特别是在车辆编队的距离控制器中进行定量评估。
AI.result: 评估结果显示，考虑驾驶情境的上下文信息可以接受不同程度的不确定性，从而实现性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 根据情境信息调整对不确定性的接受程度，可以在保证安全的前提下提升系统性能。

authors_text: Peixian Chen,Mengdan Zhang,Yunhang Shen,Kekai Sheng,Yuting Gao,Xing Sun,Ke Li,Chunhua Shen
title: Efficient Decoder-free Object Detection with Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Transformer 进行高效的无解码器目标检测
abstract: Vision transformers (ViTs) are changing the landscape of object detection approaches. A natural usage of ViTs in detection is to replace the CNN-based backbone with a transformer-based backbone, which is straightforward and effective, with the price of bringing considerable computation burden for inference. More subtle usage is the DETR family, which eliminates the need for many hand-designed components in object detection but introduces a decoder demanding an extra-long time to converge. As a result, transformer-based object detection can not prevail in large-scale applications. To overcome these issues, we propose a novel decoder-free fully transformer-based (DFFT) object detector, achieving high efficiency in both training and inference stages, for the first time. We simplify objection detection into an encoder-only single-level anchor-based dense prediction problem by centering around two entry points: 1) Eliminate the training-inefficient decoder and leverage two strong encoders to preserve the accuracy of single-level feature map prediction; 2) Explore low-level semantic features for the detection task with limited computational resources. In particular, we design a novel lightweight detection-oriented transformer backbone that efficiently captures low-level features with rich semantics based on a well-conceived ablation study. Extensive experiments on the MS COCO benchmark demonstrate that DFFT_SMALL outperforms DETR by 2.5% AP with 28% computation cost reduction and more than $10$x fewer training epochs. Compared with the cutting-edge anchor-based detector RetinaNet, DFFT_SMALL obtains over 5.5% AP gain while cutting down 70% computation cost.

A natural usage of ViTs in detection is to replace the CNN-based backbone with a transformer-based backbone, which is straightforward and effective, with the price of bringing considerable computation burden for inference. More subtle usage is the DETR family, which eliminates the need for many hand-designed components in object detection but introduces a decoder demanding an extra-long time to converge. As a result, transformer-based object detection can not prevail in large-scale applications. To overcome these issues, we propose a novel decoder-free fully transformer-based (DFFT) object detector, achieving high efficiency in both training and inference stages, for the first time. We simplify objection detection into an encoder-only single-level anchor-based dense prediction problem by centering around two entry points: 1) Eliminate the training-inefficient decoder and leverage two strong encoders to preserve the accuracy of single-level feature map prediction; 2) Explore low-level semantic features for the detection task with limited computational resources. In particular, we design a novel lightweight detection-oriented transformer backbone that efficiently captures low-level features with rich semantics based on a well-conceived ablation study. Extensive experiments on the MS COCO benchmark demonstrate that DFFT_SMALL outperforms DETR by 2.5% AP with 28% computation cost reduction and more than $10$x fewer training epochs. Compared with the cutting-edge anchor-based detector RetinaNet, DFFT_SMALL obtains over 5.5% AP gain while cutting down 70% computation cost.
abstract_zh: 视觉转换器 (ViT) 正在改变目标检测方法的格局。 ViT 在检测中的一个自然用途是用基于 Transformer 的主干取代基于 CNN 的主干，这种方法简单有效，但代价是给推理带来相当大的计算负担。更微妙的用法是 DETR 系列，它消除了物体检测中许多手工设计组件的需要，但引入了需要超长收敛时间的解码器。因此，基于 Transformer 的目标检测无法在大规模应用中盛行。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了一种新型的无解码器完全基于变换器（DFFT）的目标检测器，首次在训练和推理阶段实现了高效率。我们通过围绕两个入口点，将对象检测简化为仅编码器的单级基于锚的密集预测问题：1）消除训练效率低下的解码器并利用两个强大的编码器来保持单级特征图预测的准确性； 2）利用有限的计算资源探索检测任务的低级语义特征。特别是，我们设计了一种新颖的轻量级面向检测的变压器主干，它基于精心设计的消融研究，有效地捕获具有丰富语义的低级特征。 MS COCO 基准上的大量实验表明，DFFT_SMALL 的性能比 DETR 高出 2.5% AP，计算成本降低了 28%，训练次数减少了 10 美元以上。与最先进的基于anchor的检测器RetinaNet相比，DFFT_SMALL获得了超过5.5%的AP增益，同时降低了70%的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需解码器的全变压器目标检测器DFFT，通过优化编码器结构和利用低级语义特征，在保持检测精度的同时显著提升训练和推理效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于变压器的目标检测方法存在计算负担重、训练周期长或需复杂组件等问题，难以满足大规模应用需求。
AI.method: 通过移除低效解码器并采用双编码器结构保留单级特征图预测精度，设计轻量级检测专用变压器主干网络，结合消融实验优化低级语义特征提取。
AI.result: 在MS COCO数据集上，DFFT_SMALL相较DETR提升2.5% AP且计算成本降低28%，训练轮次减少10倍以上；相较RetinaNet提升5.5% AP并减少70%计算成本。
AI.conclusion: DFFT通过创新性架构设计实现了检测精度与效率的平衡，为大规模目标检测应用提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Patrick Blöbaum,Peter Götz,Kailash Budhathoki,Atalanti A. Mastakouri,Dominik Janzing
title: DoWhy-GCM: An extension of DoWhy for causal inference in graphical causal models
title_zh: DoWhy-GCM：DoWhy 的扩展，用于图形因果模型中的因果推理
abstract: We present DoWhy-GCM, an extension of the DoWhy Python library, which leverages graphical causal models. Unlike existing causality libraries, which mainly focus on effect estimation, DoWhy-GCM addresses diverse causal queries, such as identifying the root causes of outliers and distributional changes, attributing causal influences to the data generating process of each node, or diagnosis of causal structures. With DoWhy-GCM, users typically specify cause-effect relations via a causal graph, fit causal mechanisms, and pose causal queries -- all with just a few lines of code. The general documentation is available at https://www.pywhy.org/dowhy and the DoWhy-GCM specific code at https://github.com/py-why/dowhy/tree/main/dowhy/gcm.
summary: We present DoWhy-GCM, an extension of the DoWhy Python library, which leverages graphical causal models. Unlike existing causality libraries, which mainly focus on effect estimation, DoWhy-GCM addresses diverse causal queries, such as identifying the root causes of outliers and distributional changes, attributing causal influences to the data generating process of each node, or diagnosis of causal structures. With DoWhy-GCM, users typically specify cause-effect relations via a causal graph, fit causal mechanisms, and pose causal queries -- all with just a few lines of code. The general documentation is available at https://www.pywhy.org/dowhy and the DoWhy-GCM specific code at https://github.com/py-why/dowhy/tree/main/dowhy/gcm.
abstract_zh: 我们推出了 DoWhy-GCM，它是 DoWhy Python 库的扩展，它利用图形因果模型。与主要关注效果估计的现有因果关系库不同，DoWhy-GCM 解决了各种因果查询，例如识别异常值和分布变化的根本原因、将因果影响归因于每个节点的数据生成过程或诊断因果结构。使用 DoWhy-GCM，用户通常通过因果图指定因果关系、拟合因果机制并提出因果查询——所有这些都只需几行代码。一般文档可在 https://www.pywhy.org/dowhy 获取，DoWhy-GCM 特定代码可在 https://github.com/py-why/dowhy/tree/main/dowhy/gcm 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DoWhy-GCM库，扩展DoWhy以支持图形因果模型中的多样化因果推断任务。
AI.motivation: 现有因果推理库主要聚焦于效应估计，缺乏对根因分析、分布变化诊断等复杂因果查询的支持。
AI.method: 通过因果图定义变量间关系，拟合节点数据生成机制，并利用图形模型回答多样化的因果问题。
AI.result: 实现了一个支持因果结构诊断、反事实推理等查询的Python库，并提供完整文档和代码示例。
AI.conclusion: DoWhy-GCM通过图形化建模显著提升了因果推理的灵活性和实用性，为复杂因果分析提供新工具。

authors_text: Zhengquan Luo,Yunlong Wang,Zilei Wang,Zhenan Sun,Tieniu Tan
title: Disentangled Federated Learning for Tackling Attributes Skew via Invariant Aggregation and Diversity Transferring
title_zh: 通过不变聚合和多样性转移解决属性偏差的解缠结联邦学习
abstract: Attributes skew hinders the current federated learning (FL) frameworks from consistent optimization directions among the clients, which inevitably leads to performance reduction and unstable convergence. The core problems lie in that: 1) Domain-specific attributes, which are non-causal and only locally valid, are indeliberately mixed into global aggregation. 2) The one-stage optimizations of entangled attributes cannot simultaneously satisfy two conflicting objectives, i.e., generalization and personalization. To cope with these, we proposed disentangled federated learning (DFL) to disentangle the domain-specific and cross-invariant attributes into two complementary branches, which are trained by the proposed alternating local-global optimization independently. Importantly, convergence analysis proves that the FL system can be stably converged even if incomplete client models participate in the global aggregation, which greatly expands the application scope of FL. Extensive experiments verify that DFL facilitates FL with higher performance, better interpretability, and faster convergence rate, compared with SOTA FL methods on both manually synthesized and realistic attributes skew datasets.
summary: Attributes skew hinders the current federated learning (FL) frameworks from consistent optimization directions among the clients, which inevitably leads to performance reduction and unstable convergence. The core problems lie in that: 1) Domain-specific attributes, which are non-causal and only locally valid, are indeliberately mixed into global aggregation. 2) The one-stage optimizations of entangled attributes cannot simultaneously satisfy two conflicting objectives, i.e., generalization and personalization. To cope with these, we proposed disentangled federated learning (DFL) to disentangle the domain-specific and cross-invariant attributes into two complementary branches, which are trained by the proposed alternating local-global optimization independently. Importantly, convergence analysis proves that the FL system can be stably converged even if incomplete client models participate in the global aggregation, which greatly expands the application scope of FL. Extensive experiments verify that DFL facilitates FL with higher performance, better interpretability, and faster convergence rate, compared with SOTA FL methods on both manually synthesized and realistic attributes skew datasets.
abstract_zh: 属性偏差阻碍了当前的联邦学习（FL）框架在客户端之间保持一致的优化方向，这不可避免地导致性能下降和收敛不稳定。核心问题在于：1）领域特定的属性，这些属性是非因果的且仅在局部有效，被故意混入全局聚合中。 2）纠缠属性的一阶段优化不能同时满足两个相互冲突的目标，即泛化和个性化。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了解缠结联邦学习（DFL），将特定领域和交叉不变的属性分解为两个互补的分支，这两个分支通过所提出的交替局部全局优化独立地进行训练。重要的是，收敛分析证明，即使不完整的客户端模型参与全局聚合，FL系统也能稳定收敛，这极大地扩展了FL的应用范围。大量实验证实，与手动合成和真实属性倾斜数据集上的 SOTA FL 方法相比，DFL 使 FL 具有更高的性能、更好的可解释性和更快的收敛速度。

AI.tldr: 提出解耦联邦学习（DFL）方法以解决属性偏斜问题，通过分离领域特定属性与跨领域不变属性，提升联邦学习的性能与稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习框架因属性偏斜导致优化方向不一致，影响模型性能与收敛稳定性，且难以兼顾模型泛化与个性化需求。
AI.method: 提出解耦联邦学习（DFL）框架，将领域特定属性与跨领域不变属性分离至两个分支，采用交替本地-全局优化策略，并通过收敛分析保证部分客户端参与时的稳定性。
AI.result: 实验表明DFL在合成与真实属性偏斜数据集上均优于现有方法，具有更高性能、更好可解释性及更快收敛速度。
AI.conclusion: DFL有效应对属性偏斜问题，提升联邦学习的性能与稳定性，扩展其应用范围。

ai_content.tldr: 提出解耦联邦学习（DFL）方法以解决属性偏斜问题，通过分离领域特定属性与跨领域不变属性，提升联邦学习的性能与稳定性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有联邦学习框架因属性偏斜导致优化方向不一致，影响模型性能与收敛稳定性，且难以兼顾模型泛化与个性化需求。
ai_content.method: 提出解耦联邦学习（DFL）框架，将领域特定属性与跨领域不变属性分离至两个分支，采用交替本地-全局优化策略，并通过收敛分析保证部分客户端参与时的稳定性。
ai_content.result: 实验表明DFL在合成与真实属性偏斜数据集上均优于现有方法，具有更高性能、更好可解释性及更快收敛速度。
ai_content.conclusion: DFL有效应对属性偏斜问题，提升联邦学习的性能与稳定性，扩展其应用范围。

search_text: Disentangled Federated Learning for Tackling Attributes Skew via Invariant Aggregation and Diversity Transferring 通过不变聚合和多样性转移解决属性偏差的解缠结联邦学习 Attributes skew hinders the current federated learning (FL) frameworks from consistent optimization directions among the clients, which inevitably leads to performance reduction and unstable convergence. The core problems lie in that: 1) Domain-specific attributes, which are non-causal and only locally valid, are indeliberately mixed into global aggregation. 2) The one-stage optimizations of entangled attributes cannot simultaneously satisfy two conflicting objectives, i.e., generalization and personalization. To cope with these, we proposed disentangled federated learning (DFL) to disentangle the domain-specific and cross-invariant attributes into two complementary branches, which are trained by the proposed alternating local-global optimization independently. Importantly, convergence analysis proves that the FL system can be stably converged even if incomplete client models participate in the global aggregation, which greatly expands the application scope of FL. Extensive experiments verify that DFL facilitates FL with higher performance, better interpretability, and faster convergence rate, compared with SOTA FL methods on both manually synthesized and realistic attributes skew datasets. 属性偏差阻碍了当前的联邦学习（FL）框架在客户端之间保持一致的优化方向，这不可避免地导致性能下降和收敛不稳定。核心问题在于：1）领域特定的属性，这些属性是非因果的且仅在局部有效，被故意混入全局聚合中。 2）纠缠属性的一阶段优化不能同时满足两个相互冲突的目标，即泛化和个性化。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了解缠结联邦学习（DFL），将特定领域和交叉不变的属性分解为两个互补的分支，这两个分支通过所提出的交替局部全局优化独立地进行训练。重要的是，收敛分析证明，即使不完整的客户端模型参与全局聚合，FL系统也能稳定收敛，这极大地扩展了FL的应用范围。大量实验证实，与手动合成和真实属性倾斜数据集上的 SOTA FL 方法相比，DFL 使 FL 具有更高的性能、更好的可解释性和更快的收敛速度。 提出解耦联邦学习（DFL）方法以解决属性偏斜问题，通过分离领域特定属性与跨领域不变属性，提升联邦学习的性能与稳定性。 Zhengquan Luo,Yunlong Wang,Zilei Wang,Zhenan Sun,Tieniu Tan cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Anastasija Nikiforova
title: Data security as a top priority in the digital world: preserve data value by being proactive and thinking security first
title_zh: 数据安全是数字世界的重中之重：积极主动、安全第一，保护数据价值
comment: This paper is expected to be published in Research and Innovation Forum 2022, edited by Anna Visvizi, Orlando Troisi, Mara Grimaldi, 2022, Springer Nature Switzerland AG (Gewerbestrasse 11, 6330 Cham, Switzerland) reproduced with permission of Springer Nature Switzerland AG. Once the final authenticated version will become available online, this version will be substituted by it
comments: This paper is expected to be published in Research and Innovation Forum 2022, edited by Anna Visvizi, Orlando Troisi, Mara Grimaldi, 2022, Springer Nature Switzerland AG (Gewerbestrasse 11, 6330 Cham, Switzerland) reproduced with permission of Springer Nature Switzerland AG. Once the final authenticated version will become available online, this version will be substituted by it
abstract: Today, large amounts of data are being continuously produced, collected, and exchanged between systems. As the number of devices, systems and data produced grows up, the risk of security breaches increases. This is all the more relevant in times of COVID-19, which has affected not only the health and lives of human beings' but also the lifestyle of society, i.e., the digital environment has replaced the physical. This has led to an increase in cyber security threats of various nature. While security breaches and different security protection mechanisms have been widely covered in the literature, the concept of a primitive artifact such as data management system seems to have been more neglected by researchers and practitioners. But are data management systems always protected by default? Previous research and regular updates on data leakages suggest that the number and nature of these vulnerabilities are high. It also refers to little or no DBMS protection, especially in case of NoSQL, which are thus vulnerable to attacks. The aim of this paper is to examine whether traditional vulnerability registries provide a sufficiently comprehensive view of DBMS security, or they should be intensively and dynamically inspected by DBMS owners by referring to Internet of Things Search Engines moving towards a sustainable and resilient digitized environment. The paper brings attention to this problem and makes the reader think about data security before looking for and introducing more advanced security and protection mechanisms, which, in the absence of the above, may bring no value.

The paper brings attention to this problem and makes the reader think about data security before looking for and introducing more advanced security and protection mechanisms, which, in the absence of the above, may bring no value.
abstract_zh: 如今，大量数据在系统之间不断产生、收集和交换。随着设备、系统和数据数量的增加，安全漏洞的风险也随之增加。这在COVID-19时代显得尤为重要，它不仅影响了人类的健康和生活，还影响了社会的生活方式，即数字环境已经取代了物理环境。这导致各种性质的网络安全威胁增加。虽然安全漏洞和不同的安全保护机制已在文献中广泛涵盖，但诸如数据管理系统之类的原始工件的概念似乎更被研究人员和从业者忽视。但数据管理系统是否总是默认受到保护？之前对数据泄露的研究和定期更新表明，这些漏洞的数量和性质都很高。它还指很少或没有 DBMS 保护，特别是在 NoSQL 的情况下，因此容易受到攻击。本文的目的是检查传统的漏洞注册表是否提供了足够全面的 DBMS 安全视图，或者 DBMS 所有者应该参考物联网搜索引擎向可持续和有弹性的数字化环境迈进，对它们进行集中和动态的检查。本文引起了对这个问题的关注，并让读者在寻找和引入更先进的安全和保护机制之前思考数据安全，如果没有上述，可能不会带来任何价值。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在数字化时代如何通过主动思维和优先考虑安全来保护数据价值，重点分析数据库管理系统（DBMS）的安全漏洞，并提出利用物联网搜索引擎进行动态检查的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 随着数据量激增和数字环境的普及，传统安全机制难以应对新型网络威胁，尤其NoSQL等DBMS存在严重安全漏洞，亟需重新审视数据安全管理策略。
AI.method: 通过分析现有漏洞登记系统与实际数据泄露案例的差异，结合物联网搜索引擎技术，提出对DBMS进行动态安全检测的框架。
AI.result: 发现传统漏洞库无法全面覆盖DBMS风险，NoSQL系统防护薄弱，需通过实时监控和物联网技术实现可持续的安全防护体系。
AI.conclusion: 数据安全应作为数字化建设的核心，需摒弃被动防御思维，建立主动监测机制，通过技术创新实现安全与价值的平衡。
