authors_text: Jingyang Zhang,Peng Xue,Ran Gu,Yuning Gu,Mianxin Liu,Yongsheng Pan,Zhiming Cui,Jiawei Huang,Lei Ma,Dinggang Shen
title: Learning towards Synchronous Network Memorizability and Generalizability for Continual Segmentation across Multiple Sites
title_zh: 学习同步网络可记忆性和通用性，以实现跨多个站点的持续分段
abstract: In clinical practice, a segmentation network is often required to continually learn on a sequential data stream from multiple sites rather than a consolidated set, due to the storage cost and privacy restriction. However, during the continual learning process, existing methods are usually restricted in either network memorizability on previous sites or generalizability on unseen sites. This paper aims to tackle the challenging problem of Synchronous Memorizability and Generalizability (SMG) and to simultaneously improve performance on both previous and unseen sites, with a novel proposed SMG-learning framework. First, we propose a Synchronous Gradient Alignment (SGA) objective, which not only promotes the network memorizability by enforcing coordinated optimization for a small exemplar set from previous sites (called replay buffer), but also enhances the generalizability by facilitating site-invariance under simulated domain shift. Second, to simplify the optimization of SGA objective, we design a Dual-Meta algorithm that approximates the SGA objective as dual meta-objectives for optimization without expensive computation overhead. Third, for efficient rehearsal, we configure the replay buffer comprehensively considering additional inter-site diversity to reduce redundancy. Experiments on prostate MRI data sequentially acquired from six institutes demonstrate that our method can simultaneously achieve higher memorizability and generalizability over state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/jingyzhang/SMG-Learning.
summary: In clinical practice, a segmentation network is often required to continually learn on a sequential data stream from multiple sites rather than a consolidated set, due to the storage cost and privacy restriction. However, during the continual learning process, existing methods are usually restricted in either network memorizability on previous sites or generalizability on unseen sites. This paper aims to tackle the challenging problem of Synchronous Memorizability and Generalizability (SMG) and to simultaneously improve performance on both previous and unseen sites, with a novel proposed SMG-learning framework. First, we propose a Synchronous Gradient Alignment (SGA) objective, which not only promotes the network memorizability by enforcing coordinated optimization for a small exemplar set from previous sites (called replay buffer), but also enhances the generalizability by facilitating site-invariance under simulated domain shift. Second, to simplify the optimization of SGA objective, we design a Dual-Meta algorithm that approximates the SGA objective as dual meta-objectives for optimization without expensive computation overhead. Third, for efficient rehearsal, we configure the replay buffer comprehensively considering additional inter-site diversity to reduce redundancy. Experiments on prostate MRI data sequentially acquired from six institutes demonstrate that our method can simultaneously achieve higher memorizability and generalizability over state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/jingyzhang/SMG-Learning.
abstract_zh: 在临床实践中，由于存储成本和隐私限制，分割网络通常需要不断学习来自多个站点的顺序数据流而不是统一的数据集。然而，在持续学习的过程中，现有方法通常受到先前站点的网络可记忆性或未见过的站点的泛化性的限制。本文旨在通过提出的新颖的 SMG 学习框架来解决同步记忆性和泛化性 (SMG) 的挑战性问题，并同时提高以前和未见过的站点的性能。首先，我们提出了同步梯度对齐（SGA）目标，它不仅通过对先前站点（称为重播缓冲区）的小样本集实施协调优化来提高网络可记忆性，而且还通过促进模拟域转移下的站点不变性来增强泛化性。其次，为了简化 SGA 目标的优化，我们设计了一种双元算法，将 SGA 目标近似为双元目标，以进行优化，而无需昂贵的计算开销。第三，为了高效排练，我们综合考虑额外的站点间多样性来配置重放缓冲区，以减少冗余。对从六个研究所连续获取的前列腺 MRI 数据进行的实验表明，我们的方法可以同时实现比最先进的方法更高的可记忆性和通用性。代码可在 https://github.com/jingyzhang/SMG-Learning 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种SMG学习框架，解决多站点连续分割中网络记忆能力与泛化能力同步提升的挑战。
AI.motivation: 临床实践中因存储成本和隐私限制，分割网络需从多站点顺序数据流中持续学习，但现有方法难以同时保持对旧站点的记忆能力和对新站点的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出同步梯度对齐（SGA）目标函数，结合重放缓冲区协调优化与领域迁移模拟；设计双元元学习算法简化优化过程；配置考虑跨站点多样性的重放缓冲区以减少冗余。
AI.result: 在六个机构的前列腺MRI数据上验证，方法在记忆能力和泛化能力上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: SMG学习框架有效平衡了连续学习中的记忆与泛化需求，为多站点医学影像分割提供了可行解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种SMG学习框架，解决多站点连续分割中网络记忆能力与泛化能力同步提升的挑战。
ai_content.motivation: 临床实践中因存储成本和隐私限制，分割网络需从多站点顺序数据流中持续学习，但现有方法难以同时保持对旧站点的记忆能力和对新站点的泛化能力。
ai_content.method: 提出同步梯度对齐（SGA）目标函数，结合重放缓冲区协调优化与领域迁移模拟；设计双元元学习算法简化优化过程；配置考虑跨站点多样性的重放缓冲区以减少冗余。

ai_content.conclusion: SMG学习框架有效平衡了连续学习中的记忆与泛化需求，为多站点医学影像分割提供了可行解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种SMG学习框架，解决多站点连续分割中网络记忆能力与泛化能力同步提升的挑战。
motivation: 临床实践中因存储成本和隐私限制，分割网络需从多站点顺序数据流中持续学习，但现有方法难以同时保持对旧站点的记忆能力和对新站点的泛化能力。
method: 提出同步梯度对齐（SGA）目标函数，结合重放缓冲区协调优化与领域迁移模拟；设计双元元学习算法简化优化过程；配置考虑跨站点多样性的重放缓冲区以减少冗余。

search_text: Learning towards Synchronous Network Memorizability and Generalizability for Continual Segmentation across Multiple Sites 学习同步网络可记忆性和通用性，以实现跨多个站点的持续分段 In clinical practice, a segmentation network is often required to continually learn on a sequential data stream from multiple sites rather than a consolidated set, due to the storage cost and privacy restriction. However, during the continual learning process, existing methods are usually restricted in either network memorizability on previous sites or generalizability on unseen sites. This paper aims to tackle the challenging problem of Synchronous Memorizability and Generalizability (SMG) and to simultaneously improve performance on both previous and unseen sites, with a novel proposed SMG-learning framework. First, we propose a Synchronous Gradient Alignment (SGA) objective, which not only promotes the network memorizability by enforcing coordinated optimization for a small exemplar set from previous sites (called replay buffer), but also enhances the generalizability by facilitating site-invariance under simulated domain shift. Second, to simplify the optimization of SGA objective, we design a Dual-Meta algorithm that approximates the SGA objective as dual meta-objectives for optimization without expensive computation overhead. Third, for efficient rehearsal, we configure the replay buffer comprehensively considering additional inter-site diversity to reduce redundancy. Experiments on prostate MRI data sequentially acquired from six institutes demonstrate that our method can simultaneously achieve higher memorizability and generalizability over state-of-the-art methods. Code is available at https://github.com/jingyzhang/SMG-Learning. 在临床实践中，由于存储成本和隐私限制，分割网络通常需要不断学习来自多个站点的顺序数据流而不是统一的数据集。然而，在持续学习的过程中，现有方法通常受到先前站点的网络可记忆性或未见过的站点的泛化性的限制。本文旨在通过提出的新颖的 SMG 学习框架来解决同步记忆性和泛化性 (SMG) 的挑战性问题，并同时提高以前和未见过的站点的性能。首先，我们提出了同步梯度对齐（SGA）目标，它不仅通过对先前站点（称为重播缓冲区）的小样本集实施协调优化来提高网络可记忆性，而且还通过促进模拟域转移下的站点不变性来增强泛化性。其次，为了简化 SGA 目标的优化，我们设计了一种双元算法，将 SGA 目标近似为双元目标，以进行优化，而无需昂贵的计算开销。第三，为了高效排练，我们综合考虑额外的站点间多样性来配置重放缓冲区，以减少冗余。对从六个研究所连续获取的前列腺 MRI 数据进行的实验表明，我们的方法可以同时实现比最先进的方法更高的可记忆性和通用性。代码可在 https://github.com/jingyzhang/SMG-Learning 获取。 本文提出一种SMG学习框架，解决多站点连续分割中网络记忆能力与泛化能力同步提升的挑战。 Jingyang Zhang,Peng Xue,Ran Gu,Yuning Gu,Mianxin Liu,Yongsheng Pan,Zhiming Cui,Jiawei Huang,Lei Ma,Dinggang Shen eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Yongtao Wu,Grigorios G Chrysos,Volkan Cevher
title: Adversarial Audio Synthesis with Complex-valued Polynomial Networks
title_zh: 使用复值多项式网络的对抗性音频合成
comment: Accepted as oral presentation in Workshop on Machine Learning for Audio Synthesis at ICML 2022
comments: Accepted as oral presentation in Workshop on Machine Learning for Audio Synthesis at ICML 2022
abstract: Time-frequency (TF) representations in audio synthesis have been increasingly modeled with real-valued networks. However, overlooking the complex-valued nature of TF representations can result in suboptimal performance and require additional modules (e.g., for modeling the phase). To this end, we introduce complex-valued polynomial networks, called APOLLO, that integrate such complex-valued representations in a natural way. Concretely, APOLLO captures high-order correlations of the input elements using high-order tensors as scaling parameters. By leveraging standard tensor decompositions, we derive different architectures and enable modeling richer correlations. We outline such architectures and showcase their performance in audio generation across four benchmarks. As a highlight, APOLLO results in $17.5\%$ improvement over adversarial methods and $8.2\%$ over the state-of-the-art diffusion models on SC09 dataset in audio generation. Our models can encourage the systematic design of other efficient architectures on the complex field.
summary: Time-frequency (TF) representations in audio synthesis have been increasingly modeled with real-valued networks. However, overlooking the complex-valued nature of TF representations can result in suboptimal performance and require additional modules (e.g., for modeling the phase). To this end, we introduce complex-valued polynomial networks, called APOLLO, that integrate such complex-valued representations in a natural way. Concretely, APOLLO captures high-order correlations of the input elements using high-order tensors as scaling parameters. By leveraging standard tensor decompositions, we derive different architectures and enable modeling richer correlations. We outline such architectures and showcase their performance in audio generation across four benchmarks. As a highlight, APOLLO results in $17.5\%$ improvement over adversarial methods and $8.2\%$ over the state-of-the-art diffusion models on SC09 dataset in audio generation. Our models can encourage the systematic design of other efficient architectures on the complex field.
abstract_zh: 音频合成中的时频 (TF) 表示越来越多地使用实值网络进行建模。然而，忽视 TF 表示的复值性质可能会导致性能不佳，并且需要额外的模块（例如，用于对相位进行建模）。为此，我们引入了称为 APOLLO 的复值多项式网络，它以自然的方式集成了此类复值表示。具体来说，APOLLO 使用高阶张量作为缩放参数来捕获输入元素的高阶相关性。通过利用标准张量分解，我们得出不同的架构并能够建模更丰富的相关性。我们概述了此类架构，并展示了它们在四个基准测试中的音频生成性能。值得一提的是，APOLLO 在音频生成方面比对抗方法提高了 17.5\%$，比 SC09 数据集上最先进的扩散模型提高了 8.2\%$。我们的模型可以鼓励复杂领域其他高效架构的系统设计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于复值多项式网络（APOLLO）的对抗音频合成方法，通过利用复值时频表示的特性提升音频生成效果。
AI.motivation: 传统音频合成方法使用实值网络建模时频表示，忽略了其复值特性，导致性能不足且需额外模块处理相位信息。
AI.method: 设计复值多项式网络APOLLO，通过高阶张量作为缩放参数，结合张量分解技术建模更丰富的高阶相关性，实现自然复值表示集成。
AI.result: 在SC09数据集上，APOLLO相较对抗方法提升17.5%，较最先进扩散模型提升8.2%，并在四个基准测试中展现优越性能。
AI.conclusion: APOLLO通过复值建模有效提升了音频生成质量，为复数域高效架构设计提供了系统性方法论指导。

authors_text: Daphne Wang,Mehrnoosh Sadrzadeh
title: The Causal Structure of Semantic Ambiguities
title_zh: 语义歧义的因果结构
abstract: Ambiguity is a natural language phenomenon occurring at different levels of syntax, semantics, and pragmatics. It is widely studied; in Psycholinguistics, for instance, we have a variety of competing studies for the human disambiguation processes. These studies are empirical and based on eye-tracking measurements. Here we take first steps towards formalizing these processes for semantic ambiguities where we identified the presence of two features: (1) joint plausibility degrees of different possible interpretations, (2) causal structures according to which certain words play a more substantial role in the processes. The novel sheaf-theoretic model of definite causality developed by Gogioso and Pinzani in QPL 2021 offers tools to model and reason about these features. We applied this theory to a dataset of ambiguous phrases extracted from Psycholinguistics literature and their human plausibility judgements collected by us using the Amazon Mechanical Turk engine. We measured the causal fractions of different disambiguation orders within the phrases and discovered two prominent orders: from subject to verb in the subject-verb and from object to verb in the verb object phrases. We also found evidence for delay in the disambiguation of polysemous vs homonymous verbs, again compatible with Psycholinguistic findings.
summary: Ambiguity is a natural language phenomenon occurring at different levels of syntax, semantics, and pragmatics. It is widely studied; in Psycholinguistics, for instance, we have a variety of competing studies for the human disambiguation processes. These studies are empirical and based on eye-tracking measurements. Here we take first steps towards formalizing these processes for semantic ambiguities where we identified the presence of two features: (1) joint plausibility degrees of different possible interpretations, (2) causal structures according to which certain words play a more substantial role in the processes. The novel sheaf-theoretic model of definite causality developed by Gogioso and Pinzani in QPL 2021 offers tools to model and reason about these features. We applied this theory to a dataset of ambiguous phrases extracted from Psycholinguistics literature and their human plausibility judgements collected by us using the Amazon Mechanical Turk engine. We measured the causal fractions of different disambiguation orders within the phrases and discovered two prominent orders: from subject to verb in the subject-verb and from object to verb in the verb object phrases. We also found evidence for delay in the disambiguation of polysemous vs homonymous verbs, again compatible with Psycholinguistic findings.
abstract_zh: 歧义是一种发生在句法、语义和语用不同层面的自然语言现象。它被广泛研究；例如，在心理语言学领域，我们对人类消歧过程进行了各种相互竞争的研究。这些研究是实证研究，基于眼球追踪测量。在这里，我们迈出了正式化这些语义歧义过程的第一步，其中我们确定了两个特征的存在：（1）不同可能解释的联合可信度，（2）因果结构，根据因果结构，某些单词在过程中发挥更重要的作用。 Gogioso 和 Pinzani 在 QPL 2021 中开发的新颖的确定因果关系的层理论模型提供了对这些特征进行建模和推理的工具。我们将该理论应用于从心理语言学文献中提取的模糊短语数据集以及我们使用 Amazon Mechanical Turk 引擎收集的人类合理性判断。我们测量了短语中不同消歧顺序的因果分数，发现了两个突出的顺序：主谓动词中从主语到动词，以及动词宾语短语中从宾语到动词。我们还发现了多义动词与同名动词消歧延迟的证据，这再次与心理语言学的发现相一致。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过形式化模型分析语义歧义的因果结构，揭示人类消歧过程中的关键特征。
AI.motivation: 现有心理语言学研究多依赖经验性眼动追踪数据，缺乏对语义歧义消歧过程的形式化理论支持。
AI.method: 应用Gogioso和Pinzani提出的定因果性叠层理论，结合亚马逊土耳其机械人平台收集的歧义短语人类判断数据进行建模分析。
AI.result: 发现主谓短语消歧顺序为'主语→动词'，动宾短语为'宾语→动词'，并证实多义词与同音词的消歧存在时间延迟差异。
AI.conclusion: 形式化模型有效捕捉了心理语言学发现的消歧模式，为理解语义歧义的因果机制提供了新视角。

We applied this theory to a dataset of ambiguous phrases extracted from Psycholinguistics literature and their human plausibility judgements collected by us using the Amazon Mechanical Turk engine. We measured the causal fractions of different disambiguation orders within the phrases and discovered two prominent orders: from subject to verb in the subject-verb and from object to verb in the verb object phrases. We also found evidence for delay in the disambiguation of polysemous vs homonymous verbs, again compatible with Psycholinguistic findings. 歧义是一种发生在句法、语义和语用不同层面的自然语言现象。它被广泛研究；例如，在心理语言学领域，我们对人类消歧过程进行了各种相互竞争的研究。这些研究是实证研究，基于眼球追踪测量。在这里，我们迈出了正式化这些语义歧义过程的第一步，其中我们确定了两个特征的存在：（1）不同可能解释的联合可信度，（2）因果结构，根据因果结构，某些单词在过程中发挥更重要的作用。 Gogioso 和 Pinzani 在 QPL 2021 中开发的新颖的确定因果关系的层理论模型提供了对这些特征进行建模和推理的工具。我们将该理论应用于从心理语言学文献中提取的模糊短语数据集以及我们使用 Amazon Mechanical Turk 引擎收集的人类合理性判断。我们测量了短语中不同消歧顺序的因果分数，发现了两个突出的顺序：主谓动词中从主语到动词，以及动词宾语短语中从宾语到动词。我们还发现了多义动词与同名动词消歧延迟的证据，这再次与心理语言学的发现相一致。 本文旨在通过形式化模型分析语义歧义的因果结构，揭示人类消歧过程中的关键特征。 Daphne Wang,Mehrnoosh Sadrzadeh cs.CL,cs.AI,quant-ph

authors_text: Yuan Feng,Yaojun Hu,Pengfei Fang,Yanhong Yang,Sheng Liu,Shengyong Chen
title: Asymmetric Dual-Decoder U-Net for Joint Rain and Haze Removal
title_zh: 用于联合除雨除霾的非对称双解码器 U-Net
abstract: This work studies the joint rain and haze removal problem. In real-life scenarios, rain and haze, two often co-occurring common weather phenomena, can greatly degrade the clarity and quality of the scene images, leading to a performance drop in the visual applications, such as autonomous driving. However, jointly removing the rain and haze in scene images is ill-posed and challenging, where the existence of haze and rain and the change of atmosphere light, can both degrade the scene information. Current methods focus on the contamination removal part, thus ignoring the restoration of the scene information affected by the change of atmospheric light. We propose a novel deep neural network, named Asymmetric Dual-decoder U-Net (ADU-Net), to address the aforementioned challenge. The ADU-Net produces both the contamination residual and the scene residual to efficiently remove the rain and haze while preserving the fidelity of the scene information. Extensive experiments show our work outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods by a considerable margin in both synthetic data and real-world data benchmarks, including RainCityscapes, BID Rain, and SPA-Data. For instance, we improve the state-of-the-art PSNR value by 2.26/4.57 on the RainCityscapes/SPA-Data, respectively. Codes will be made available freely to the research community.
summary: This work studies the joint rain and haze removal problem. In real-life scenarios, rain and haze, two often co-occurring common weather phenomena, can greatly degrade the clarity and quality of the scene images, leading to a performance drop in the visual applications, such as autonomous driving. However, jointly removing the rain and haze in scene images is ill-posed and challenging, where the existence of haze and rain and the change of atmosphere light, can both degrade the scene information. Current methods focus on the contamination removal part, thus ignoring the restoration of the scene information affected by the change of atmospheric light. We propose a novel deep neural network, named Asymmetric Dual-decoder U-Net (ADU-Net), to address the aforementioned challenge. The ADU-Net produces both the contamination residual and the scene residual to efficiently remove the rain and haze while preserving the fidelity of the scene information. Extensive experiments show our work outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods by a considerable margin in both synthetic data and real-world data benchmarks, including RainCityscapes, BID Rain, and SPA-Data. For instance, we improve the state-of-the-art PSNR value by 2.26/4.57 on the RainCityscapes/SPA-Data, respectively. Codes will be made available freely to the research community.
abstract_zh: 本工作研究雨雾联合去除问题。在现实场景中，雨和雾霾这两种经常同时出现的常见天气现象会极大地降低场景图像的清晰度和质量，导致自动驾驶等视觉应用的性能下降。然而，联合去除场景图像中的雨和雾是不恰当且具有挑战性的，雾和雨的存在以及大气光的变化都会降低场景信息。目前的方法主要关注污染物去除部分，从而忽略了受大气光变化影响的场景信息的恢复。我们提出了一种新颖的深度神经网络，称为非对称双解码器 U-Net (ADU-Net)，来解决上述挑战。 ADU-Net 产生污染残差和场景残差，以有效去除雨雾，同时保持场景信息的保真度。大量实验表明，我们的工作在合成数据和现实世界数据基准（包括 RainCityscapes、BID Rain 和 SPA-Data）方面都远远优于现有的最先进方法。例如，我们将 RainCityscapes/SPA-Data 上的最先进 PSNR 值分别提高了 2.26/4.57。代码将免费提供给研究界。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ADU-Net的新型深度神经网络，用于同时去除图像中的雨和雾霾，以提升场景信息的清晰度和质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅关注去除污染成分，而忽略了大气光变化导致的场景信息退化问题，导致在真实场景中的应用效果不佳，如自动驾驶等视觉任务。
AI.method: 设计了不对称双解码器U-Net（ADU-Net），通过生成污染残差和场景残差，同时去除雨雾并保留场景细节。
AI.result: 在RainCityscapes和SPA-Data等数据集上，PSNR值分别提升2.26/4.57，优于现有最先进的方法。
AI.conclusion: ADU-Net有效解决了雨雾联合去除的挑战，在合成数据和真实场景中均表现出色，代码将公开共享。

authors_text: Juhong Min,Yucheng Zhao,Chong Luo,Minsu Cho
title: Peripheral Vision Transformer
title_zh: 周边视觉变压器
abstract: Human vision possesses a special type of visual processing systems called peripheral vision. Partitioning the entire visual field into multiple contour regions based on the distance to the center of our gaze, the peripheral vision provides us the ability to perceive various visual features at different regions. In this work, we take a biologically inspired approach and explore to model peripheral vision in deep neural networks for visual recognition. We propose to incorporate peripheral position encoding to the multi-head self-attention layers to let the network learn to partition the visual field into diverse peripheral regions given training data. We evaluate the proposed network, dubbed PerViT, on ImageNet-1K and systematically investigate the inner workings of the model for machine perception, showing that the network learns to perceive visual data similarly to the way that human vision does. The performance improvements in image classification over the baselines across different model sizes demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed method.
summary: Human vision possesses a special type of visual processing systems called peripheral vision. Partitioning the entire visual field into multiple contour regions based on the distance to the center of our gaze, the peripheral vision provides us the ability to perceive various visual features at different regions. In this work, we take a biologically inspired approach and explore to model peripheral vision in deep neural networks for visual recognition. We propose to incorporate peripheral position encoding to the multi-head self-attention layers to let the network learn to partition the visual field into diverse peripheral regions given training data. We evaluate the proposed network, dubbed PerViT, on ImageNet-1K and systematically investigate the inner workings of the model for machine perception, showing that the network learns to perceive visual data similarly to the way that human vision does. The performance improvements in image classification over the baselines across different model sizes demonstrate the efficacy of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 人类视觉拥有一种特殊类型的视觉处理系统，称为周边视觉。根据到注视中心的距离将整个视野划分为多个轮廓区域，周边视觉使我们能够感知不同区域的各种视觉特征。在这项工作中，我们采用了受生物学启发的方法，并探索在深度神经网络中对周边视觉进行建模以进行视觉识别。我们建议将外围位置编码合并到多头自注意力层中，让网络学习在给定训练数据的情况下将视野划分为不同的外围区域。我们在 ImageNet-1K 上评估了所提出的名为 PerViT 的网络，并系统地研究了机器感知模型的内部工作原理，表明该网络学习以类似于人类视觉的方式感知视觉数据。不同模型大小的图像分类性能相对于基线的改进证明了所提出方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种受人类周边视觉启发的视觉Transformer模型PerViT，通过引入周边位置编码机制改进图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 人类视觉系统通过将视觉场划分为不同区域实现高效感知，现有深度学习模型缺乏对这种生物视觉机制的模拟。
AI.method: 在多头自注意力层中引入周边位置编码，使网络能自动学习划分视觉场区域，并在ImageNet-1K上验证模型效果。
AI.result: PerViT在不同规模模型上均优于基线方法，且内部机制分析显示其学习到了类似人类视觉的区域感知模式。
AI.conclusion: 生物启发的周边视觉建模有效提升了视觉识别性能，验证了模拟人类视觉机制在深度学习中的价值。

authors_text: Fangqin Zhou,Joaquin Vanschoren
title: Open-Ended Learning Strategies for Learning Complex Locomotion Skills
title_zh: 学习复杂运动技能的开放式学习策略
abstract: Teaching robots to learn diverse locomotion skills under complex three-dimensional environmental settings via Reinforcement Learning (RL) is still challenging. It has been shown that training agents in simple settings before moving them on to complex settings improves the training process, but so far only in the context of relatively simple locomotion skills. In this work, we adapt the Enhanced Paired Open-Ended Trailblazer (ePOET) approach to train more complex agents to walk efficiently on complex three-dimensional terrains. First, to generate more rugged and diverse three-dimensional training terrains with increasing complexity, we extend the Compositional Pattern Producing Networks - Neuroevolution of Augmenting Topologies (CPPN-NEAT) approach and include randomized shapes. Second, we combine ePOET with Soft Actor-Critic off-policy optimization, yielding ePOET-SAC, to ensure that the agent could learn more diverse skills to solve more challenging tasks. Our experimental results show that the newly generated three-dimensional terrains have sufficient diversity and complexity to guide learning, that ePOET successfully learns complex locomotion skills on these terrains, and that our proposed ePOET-SAC approach slightly improves upon ePOET.
summary: Teaching robots to learn diverse locomotion skills under complex three-dimensional environmental settings via Reinforcement Learning (RL) is still challenging. It has been shown that training agents in simple settings before moving them on to complex settings improves the training process, but so far only in the context of relatively simple locomotion skills. In this work, we adapt the Enhanced Paired Open-Ended Trailblazer (ePOET) approach to train more complex agents to walk efficiently on complex three-dimensional terrains. First, to generate more rugged and diverse three-dimensional training terrains with increasing complexity, we extend the Compositional Pattern Producing Networks - Neuroevolution of Augmenting Topologies (CPPN-NEAT) approach and include randomized shapes. Second, we combine ePOET with Soft Actor-Critic off-policy optimization, yielding ePOET-SAC, to ensure that the agent could learn more diverse skills to solve more challenging tasks. Our experimental results show that the newly generated three-dimensional terrains have sufficient diversity and complexity to guide learning, that ePOET successfully learns complex locomotion skills on these terrains, and that our proposed ePOET-SAC approach slightly improves upon ePOET.
abstract_zh: 通过强化学习（RL）教会机器人在复杂的三维环境设置下学习多种运动技能仍然具有挑战性。事实证明，在将智能体转移到复杂的环境之前，先在简单的环境中对其进行训练可以改善训练过程，但到目前为止仅在相对简单的运动技能的情况下进行。在这项工作中，我们采用增强型配对开放式开拓者（ePOET）方法来训练更复杂的智能体在复杂的三维地形上有效行走。首先，为了生成更加崎岖和多样化且复杂性不断增加的三维训练地形，我们扩展了组合模式生成网络 - 增强拓扑的神经进化（CPPN-NEAT）方法并包括随机形状。其次，我们将 ePOET 与 Soft Actor-Critic 离策略优化相结合，产生 ePOET-SAC，以确保代理能够学习更多样化的技能来解决更具挑战性的任务。我们的实验结果表明，新生成的三维地形具有足够的多样性和复杂性来指导学习，ePOET 成功地学习了这些地形上的复杂运动技能，并且我们提出的 ePOET-SAC 方法在 ePOET 的基础上略有改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种开放式的强化学习策略，用于训练机器人在复杂三维环境中高效学习多样化的运动技能。
AI.motivation: 尽管在简单环境中预训练能提升复杂环境下的学习效果，但现有方法仅适用于简单运动技能，难以应对复杂地形的挑战。
AI.method: 扩展CPPN-NEAT生成多样化三维地形，并结合ePOET与Soft Actor-Critic算法（ePOET-SAC）以提升复杂技能学习能力。
AI.result: 生成的地形具备足够复杂度与多样性，ePOET成功学习复杂运动技能，ePOET-SAC相较ePOET略有性能提升。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效支持复杂地形下的运动技能学习，ePOET-SAC在性能上展现边际改进潜力。

search_text: Open-Ended Learning Strategies for Learning Complex Locomotion Skills 学习复杂运动技能的开放式学习策略 Teaching robots to learn diverse locomotion skills under complex three-dimensional environmental settings via Reinforcement Learning (RL) is still challenging. It has been shown that training agents in simple settings before moving them on to complex settings improves the training process, but so far only in the context of relatively simple locomotion skills. In this work, we adapt the Enhanced Paired Open-Ended Trailblazer (ePOET) approach to train more complex agents to walk efficiently on complex three-dimensional terrains. First, to generate more rugged and diverse three-dimensional training terrains with increasing complexity, we extend the Compositional Pattern Producing Networks - Neuroevolution of Augmenting Topologies (CPPN-NEAT) approach and include randomized shapes. Second, we combine ePOET with Soft Actor-Critic off-policy optimization, yielding ePOET-SAC, to ensure that the agent could learn more diverse skills to solve more challenging tasks. Our experimental results show that the newly generated three-dimensional terrains have sufficient diversity and complexity to guide learning, that ePOET successfully learns complex locomotion skills on these terrains, and that our proposed ePOET-SAC approach slightly improves upon ePOET. 通过强化学习（RL）教会机器人在复杂的三维环境设置下学习多种运动技能仍然具有挑战性。事实证明，在将智能体转移到复杂的环境之前，先在简单的环境中对其进行训练可以改善训练过程，但到目前为止仅在相对简单的运动技能的情况下进行。在这项工作中，我们采用增强型配对开放式开拓者（ePOET）方法来训练更复杂的智能体在复杂的三维地形上有效行走。首先，为了生成更加崎岖和多样化且复杂性不断增加的三维训练地形，我们扩展了组合模式生成网络 - 增强拓扑的神经进化（CPPN-NEAT）方法并包括随机形状。其次，我们将 ePOET 与 Soft Actor-Critic 离策略优化相结合，产生 ePOET-SAC，以确保代理能够学习更多样化的技能来解决更具挑战性的任务。我们的实验结果表明，新生成的三维地形具有足够的多样性和复杂性来指导学习，ePOET 成功地学习了这些地形上的复杂运动技能，并且我们提出的 ePOET-SAC 方法在 ePOET 的基础上略有改进。 本文提出了一种开放式的强化学习策略，用于训练机器人在复杂三维环境中高效学习多样化的运动技能。 Fangqin Zhou,Joaquin Vanschoren cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Lucía Gómez Álvarez,Sebastian Rudolph,Hannes Strass
title: How to Agree to Disagree: Managing Ontological Perspectives using Standpoint Logic
title_zh: 如何同意不同意见：使用立场逻辑管理本体论观点
abstract: The importance of taking individual, potentially conflicting perspectives into account when dealing with knowledge has been widely recognised. Many existing ontology management approaches fully merge knowledge perspectives, which may require weakening in order to maintain consistency; others represent the distinct views in an entirely detached way. As an alternative, we propose Standpoint Logic, a simple, yet versatile multi-modal logic "add-on" for existing KR languages intended for the integrated representation of domain knowledge relative to diverse, possibly conflicting standpoints, which can be hierarchically organised, combined and put in relation to each other. Starting from the generic framework of First-Order Standpoint Logic (FOSL), we subsequently focus our attention on the fragment of sentential formulas, for which we provide a polytime translation into the standpoint-free version. This result yields decidability and favourable complexities for a variety of highly expressive decidable fragments of first-order logic. Using some elaborate encoding tricks, we then establish a similar translation for the very expressive description logic SROIQb_s underlying the OWL 2 DL ontology language. By virtue of this result, existing highly optimised OWL reasoners can be used to provide practical reasoning support for ontology languages extended by standpoint modelling.
summary: The importance of taking individual, potentially conflicting perspectives into account when dealing with knowledge has been widely recognised. Many existing ontology management approaches fully merge knowledge perspectives, which may require weakening in order to maintain consistency; others represent the distinct views in an entirely detached way. As an alternative, we propose Standpoint Logic, a simple, yet versatile multi-modal logic "add-on" for existing KR languages intended for the integrated representation of domain knowledge relative to diverse, possibly conflicting standpoints, which can be hierarchically organised, combined and put in relation to each other. Starting from the generic framework of First-Order Standpoint Logic (FOSL), we subsequently focus our attention on the fragment of sentential formulas, for which we provide a polytime translation into the standpoint-free version. This result yields decidability and favourable complexities for a variety of highly expressive decidable fragments of first-order logic. Using some elaborate encoding tricks, we then establish a similar translation for the very expressive description logic SROIQb_s underlying the OWL 2 DL ontology language. By virtue of this result, existing highly optimised OWL reasoners can be used to provide practical reasoning support for ontology languages extended by standpoint modelling.
abstract_zh: 在处理知识时考虑个人的、可能相互冲突的观点的重要性已得到广泛认可。许多现有的本体管理方法完全融合了知识视角，这可能需要弱化以保持一致性；其他人以完全超然的方式表达了不同的观点。作为替代方案，我们提出了立场逻辑，这是一种简单但通用的多模态逻辑“附加组件”，适用于现有的 KR 语言，旨在相对于不同的、可能相互冲突的观点进行领域知识的集成表示，这些观点可以分层组织、组合并相互关联。从一阶立场逻辑（FOSL）的通用框架开始，我们随后将注意力集中在句子公式的片段上，为此我们提供了到无立场版本的多时间翻译。该结果为一阶逻辑的各种高度表达的可判定片段产生了可判定性和有利的复杂性。然后，我们使用一些精心设计的编码技巧，为 OWL 2 DL 本体语言底层的非常富有表现力的描述逻辑 SROIQb_s 建立类似的翻译。凭借这一结果，现有的高度优化的OWL推理机可用于为通过立场建模扩展的本体语言提供实用的推理支持。

AI.tldr: 本文提出立场逻辑（Standpoint Logic）作为多模态逻辑扩展，用于整合不同甚至冲突的本体知识视角，解决现有方法合并或隔离观点的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有本体管理方法或强制合并视角导致信息丢失，或完全隔离视角无法处理冲突，需一种能平衡整合与冲突管理的新框架。
AI.method: 基于一阶立场逻辑（FOSL）框架，针对命题公式片段提供多项式翻译到无立场版本，并通过编码技巧扩展至OWL 2 DL底层的SROIQb_s描述逻辑。
AI.result: 实现立场逻辑到无立场逻辑的多项式转换，确保可判定片段的复杂度可控，并成功集成到现有OWL推理机中提供实践支持。
AI.conclusion: 立场逻辑有效支持本体中多视角知识的层次化整合与推理，为处理本体冲突与多样性提供了理论与实践结合的新方案。

authors_text: Abhejit Rajagopal,Andrew P. Leynes,Nicholas Dwork,Jessica E. Scholey,Thomas A. Hope,Peder E. Z. Larson
title: Physics-driven Deep Learning for PET/MRI
title_zh: 物理驱动的 PET/MRI 深度学习
abstract: In this paper, we review physics- and data-driven reconstruction techniques for simultaneous positron emission tomography (PET) / magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) systems, which have significant advantages for clinical imaging of cancer, neurological disorders, and heart disease. These reconstruction approaches utilize priors, either structural or statistical, together with a physics-based description of the PET system response. However, due to the nested representation of the forward problem, direct PET/MRI reconstruction is a nonlinear problem. We elucidate how a multi-faceted approach accommodates hybrid data- and physics-driven machine learning for reconstruction of 3D PET/MRI, summarizing important deep learning developments made in the last 5 years to address attenuation correction, scattering, low photon counts, and data consistency. We also describe how applications of these multi-modality approaches extend beyond PET/MRI to improving accuracy in radiation therapy planning. We conclude by discussing opportunities for extending the current state-of-the-art following the latest trends in physics- and deep learning-based computational imaging and next-generation detector hardware.
summary: In this paper, we review physics- and data-driven reconstruction techniques for simultaneous positron emission tomography (PET) / magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) systems, which have significant advantages for clinical imaging of cancer, neurological disorders, and heart disease. These reconstruction approaches utilize priors, either structural or statistical, together with a physics-based description of the PET system response. However, due to the nested representation of the forward problem, direct PET/MRI reconstruction is a nonlinear problem. We elucidate how a multi-faceted approach accommodates hybrid data- and physics-driven machine learning for reconstruction of 3D PET/MRI, summarizing important deep learning developments made in the last 5 years to address attenuation correction, scattering, low photon counts, and data consistency. We also describe how applications of these multi-modality approaches extend beyond PET/MRI to improving accuracy in radiation therapy planning. We conclude by discussing opportunities for extending the current state-of-the-art following the latest trends in physics- and deep learning-based computational imaging and next-generation detector hardware.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们回顾了同步正电子发射断层扫描（PET）/磁共振成像（MRI）系统的物理和数据驱动重建技术，该技术在癌症、神经系统疾病和心脏病的临床成像方面具有显着优势。这些重建方法利用结构或统计先验以及 PET 系统响应的基于物理的描述。然而，由于前向问题的嵌套表示，直接PET/MRI重建是一个非线性问题。我们阐明了多方面的方法如何适应混合数据和物理驱动的机器学习来重建 3D PET/MRI，总结了过去 5 年在解决衰减校正、散射、低光子计数和数据一致性方面取得的重要深度学习进展。我们还描述了这些多模态方法的应用如何扩展到 PET/MRI 之外，以提高放射治疗计划的准确性。最后，我们讨论了遵循基于物理和深度学习的计算成像和下一代探测器硬件的最新趋势扩展当前最先进技术的机会。

AI.tldr: 本文回顾了结合物理模型与深度学习的PET/MRI重建技术，总结其在临床成像中的应用及最新进展。
AI.motivation: 传统PET/MRI重建面临非线性问题，需融合物理先验与数据驱动方法以提升图像质量与临床诊断效率。
AI.method: 通过多模态机器学习框架，整合物理模型与深度学习算法，解决衰减校正、散射补偿及数据一致性等关键问题。
AI.result: 系统梳理了近五年深度学习在PET/MRI领域的突破，验证了其在低光子计数与多模态数据融合中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 未来需结合新型探测器硬件与物理驱动的深度学习，进一步优化重建精度并拓展至放疗规划等临床场景。

ai_content.tldr: 本文回顾了结合物理模型与深度学习的PET/MRI重建技术，总结其在临床成像中的应用及最新进展。
ai_content.motivation: 传统PET/MRI重建面临非线性问题，需融合物理先验与数据驱动方法以提升图像质量与临床诊断效率。
ai_content.method: 通过多模态机器学习框架，整合物理模型与深度学习算法，解决衰减校正、散射补偿及数据一致性等关键问题。
ai_content.result: 系统梳理了近五年深度学习在PET/MRI领域的突破，验证了其在低光子计数与多模态数据融合中的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 未来需结合新型探测器硬件与物理驱动的深度学习，进一步优化重建精度并拓展至放疗规划等临床场景。

search_text: Physics-driven Deep Learning for PET/MRI 物理驱动的 PET/MRI 深度学习 In this paper, we review physics- and data-driven reconstruction techniques for simultaneous positron emission tomography (PET) / magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) systems, which have significant advantages for clinical imaging of cancer, neurological disorders, and heart disease. These reconstruction approaches utilize priors, either structural or statistical, together with a physics-based description of the PET system response. However, due to the nested representation of the forward problem, direct PET/MRI reconstruction is a nonlinear problem. We elucidate how a multi-faceted approach accommodates hybrid data- and physics-driven machine learning for reconstruction of 3D PET/MRI, summarizing important deep learning developments made in the last 5 years to address attenuation correction, scattering, low photon counts, and data consistency. We also describe how applications of these multi-modality approaches extend beyond PET/MRI to improving accuracy in radiation therapy planning. We conclude by discussing opportunities for extending the current state-of-the-art following the latest trends in physics- and deep learning-based computational imaging and next-generation detector hardware. 在本文中，我们回顾了同步正电子发射断层扫描（PET）/磁共振成像（MRI）系统的物理和数据驱动重建技术，该技术在癌症、神经系统疾病和心脏病的临床成像方面具有显着优势。这些重建方法利用结构或统计先验以及 PET 系统响应的基于物理的描述。然而，由于前向问题的嵌套表示，直接PET/MRI重建是一个非线性问题。我们阐明了多方面的方法如何适应混合数据和物理驱动的机器学习来重建 3D PET/MRI，总结了过去 5 年在解决衰减校正、散射、低光子计数和数据一致性方面取得的重要深度学习进展。我们还描述了这些多模态方法的应用如何扩展到 PET/MRI 之外，以提高放射治疗计划的准确性。最后，我们讨论了遵循基于物理和深度学习的计算成像和下一代探测器硬件的最新趋势扩展当前最先进技术的机会。 本文回顾了结合物理模型与深度学习的PET/MRI重建技术，总结其在临床成像中的应用及最新进展。 Abhejit Rajagopal,Andrew P. Leynes,Nicholas Dwork,Jessica E. Scholey,Thomas A. Hope,Peder E. Z. Larson eess.IV,cs.LG,eess.SP,physics.med-ph

authors_text: Vivek Parmar,Syed Shakib Sarwar,Ziyun Li,Hsien-Hsin S. Lee,Barbara De Salvo,Manan Suri
title: Memory-Oriented Design-Space Exploration of Edge-AI Hardware for XR Applications
title_zh: XR 应用边缘 AI 硬件的面向内存的设计空间探索
comment: Accepted as a full paper by the TinyML Research Symposium 2023
comments: Accepted as a full paper by the TinyML Research Symposium 2023
abstract: Low-Power Edge-AI capabilities are essential for on-device extended reality (XR) applications to support the vision of Metaverse. In this work, we investigate two representative XR workloads: (i) Hand detection and (ii) Eye segmentation, for hardware design space exploration. For both applications, we train deep neural networks and analyze the impact of quantization and hardware specific bottlenecks. Through simulations, we evaluate a CPU and two systolic inference accelerator implementations. Next, we compare these hardware solutions with advanced technology nodes. The impact of integrating state-of-the-art emerging non-volatile memory technology (STT/SOT/VGSOT MRAM) into the XR-AI inference pipeline is evaluated. We found that significant energy benefits (>=24%) can be achieved for hand detection (IPS=10) and eye segmentation (IPS=0.1) by introducing non-volatile memory in the memory hierarchy for designs at 7nm node while meeting minimum IPS (inference per second). Moreover, we can realize substantial reduction in area (>=30%) owing to the small form factor of MRAM compared to traditional SRAM.
summary: Low-Power Edge-AI capabilities are essential for on-device extended reality (XR) applications to support the vision of Metaverse. In this work, we investigate two representative XR workloads: (i) Hand detection and (ii) Eye segmentation, for hardware design space exploration. For both applications, we train deep neural networks and analyze the impact of quantization and hardware specific bottlenecks. Through simulations, we evaluate a CPU and two systolic inference accelerator implementations. Next, we compare these hardware solutions with advanced technology nodes. The impact of integrating state-of-the-art emerging non-volatile memory technology (STT/SOT/VGSOT MRAM) into the XR-AI inference pipeline is evaluated. We found that significant energy benefits (>=24%) can be achieved for hand detection (IPS=10) and eye segmentation (IPS=0.1) by introducing non-volatile memory in the memory hierarchy for designs at 7nm node while meeting minimum IPS (inference per second). Moreover, we can realize substantial reduction in area (>=30%) owing to the small form factor of MRAM compared to traditional SRAM.
abstract_zh: 低功耗边缘人工智能功能对于设备上扩展现实 (XR) 应用程序支持 Metaverse 愿景至关重要。在这项工作中，我们研究了两个代表性的 XR 工作负载：(i) 手部检测和 (ii) 眼睛分割，用于硬件设计空间探索。对于这两种应用，我们训练深度神经网络并分析量化和硬件特定瓶颈的影响。通过模拟，我们评估了一个 CPU 和两个脉动推理加速器的实现。接下来，我们将这些硬件解决方案与先进技术节点进行比较。评估了将最先进的新兴非易失性存储器技术 (STT/SOT/VGSOT MRAM) 集成到 XR-AI 推理管道中的影响。我们发现，通过在 7nm 节点设计的存储器层次结构中引入非易失性存储器，同时满足最低 IPS（每秒推理次数），可以实现手部检测 (IPS=10) 和眼部分割 (IPS=0.1) 的显着能源效益 (>=24%)。此外，与传统 SRAM 相比，由于 MRAM 的外形尺寸较小，我们可以实现面积的大幅减少 (>=30%)。

AI.tldr: 本文针对XR应用探索边缘AI硬件设计空间，通过引入非易失性内存技术优化能效和面积。
AI.motivation: XR应用需要低功耗边缘AI支持元宇宙愿景，但现有硬件存在能效和面积瓶颈，需探索新型内存技术解决方案。
AI.method: 训练深度网络分析量化影响，模拟CPU及两种加速器实现，对比先进制程节点，并评估STT/SOT/VGSOT MRAM等新型非易失性内存技术的集成效果。
AI.result: 在7nm节点设计中，采用非易失性内存可使手部检测和眼部分割能效提升24%以上，面积减少30%以上，同时满足最低推理性能要求。
AI.conclusion: 非易失性内存技术能显著优化边缘AI硬件设计，为XR应用提供高效能、小体积的解决方案。

authors_text: Javier Rando,Nasib Naimi,Thomas Baumann,Max Mathys
title: Exploring Adversarial Attacks and Defenses in Vision Transformers trained with DINO
title_zh: 探索受 DINO 训练的 Vision Transformer 中的对抗性攻击和防御
comment: ICML 2022 Workshop paper accepted at AdvML Frontiers
comments: ICML 2022 Workshop paper accepted at AdvML Frontiers
abstract: This work conducts the first analysis on the robustness against adversarial attacks on self-supervised Vision Transformers trained using DINO. First, we evaluate whether features learned through self-supervision are more robust to adversarial attacks than those emerging from supervised learning. Then, we present properties arising for attacks in the latent space. Finally, we evaluate whether three well-known defense strategies can increase adversarial robustness in downstream tasks by only fine-tuning the classification head to provide robustness even in view of limited compute resources. These defense strategies are: Adversarial Training, Ensemble Adversarial Training and Ensemble of Specialized Networks.
summary: This work conducts the first analysis on the robustness against adversarial attacks on self-supervised Vision Transformers trained using DINO. First, we evaluate whether features learned through self-supervision are more robust to adversarial attacks than those emerging from supervised learning. Then, we present properties arising for attacks in the latent space. Finally, we evaluate whether three well-known defense strategies can increase adversarial robustness in downstream tasks by only fine-tuning the classification head to provide robustness even in view of limited compute resources. These defense strategies are: Adversarial Training, Ensemble Adversarial Training and Ensemble of Specialized Networks.
abstract_zh: 这项工作首次分析了使用 DINO 训练的自监督视觉变压器对抗对抗攻击的鲁棒性。首先，我们评估通过自我监督学习的特征是否比监督学习中出现的特征更能抵御对抗性攻击。然后，我们提出了潜在空间中攻击所产生的属性。最后，我们评估三种众所周知的防御策略是否可以通过仅微调分类头来提高下游任务中的对抗鲁棒性，以在计算资源有限的情况下提供鲁棒性。这些防御策略是：对抗性训练、集成对抗性训练和专业网络集成。

AI.tldr: 本文首次分析了使用DINO训练的自监督视觉Transformer（ViT）对对抗攻击的鲁棒性，比较了自监督特征与监督学习特征的差异，并评估了三种防御策略在有限计算资源下的有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督学习在视觉Transformer中广泛应用，但其对抗鲁棒性尚未被系统研究，且现有防御策略在资源受限场景下的效果未知。
AI.method: 通过对比实验评估自监督与监督特征的对抗鲁棒性；分析潜在空间攻击特性；在下游任务中仅微调分类头，测试对抗训练、集成对抗训练及专业化网络集成三种防御策略。
AI.result: 自监督特征在对抗攻击下表现与监督特征存在差异；潜在空间攻击呈现特定属性；三种防御策略均能提升下游任务鲁棒性，且微调分类头即可实现。
AI.conclusion: 自监督ViT的对抗鲁棒性需针对性研究，潜在空间攻击特性可为防御提供新方向，微调分类头的轻量防御策略在资源受限场景中有效。

search_text: Exploring Adversarial Attacks and Defenses in Vision Transformers trained with DINO 探索受 DINO 训练的 Vision Transformer 中的对抗性攻击和防御 This work conducts the first analysis on the robustness against adversarial attacks on self-supervised Vision Transformers trained using DINO. First, we evaluate whether features learned through self-supervision are more robust to adversarial attacks than those emerging from supervised learning. Then, we present properties arising for attacks in the latent space. Finally, we evaluate whether three well-known defense strategies can increase adversarial robustness in downstream tasks by only fine-tuning the classification head to provide robustness even in view of limited compute resources. These defense strategies are: Adversarial Training, Ensemble Adversarial Training and Ensemble of Specialized Networks. 这项工作首次分析了使用 DINO 训练的自监督视觉变压器对抗对抗攻击的鲁棒性。首先，我们评估通过自我监督学习的特征是否比监督学习中出现的特征更能抵御对抗性攻击。然后，我们提出了潜在空间中攻击所产生的属性。最后，我们评估三种众所周知的防御策略是否可以通过仅微调分类头来提高下游任务中的对抗鲁棒性，以在计算资源有限的情况下提供鲁棒性。这些防御策略是：对抗性训练、集成对抗性训练和专业网络集成。 本文首次分析了使用DINO训练的自监督视觉Transformer（ViT）对对抗攻击的鲁棒性，比较了自监督特征与监督学习特征的差异，并评估了三种防御策略在有限计算资源下的有效性。 Javier Rando,Nasib Naimi,Thomas Baumann,Max Mathys cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Vidya Sagar Sharma
title: Counting Markov Equivalent Directed Acyclic Graphs Consistent with Background Knowledge
title_zh: 计算与背景知识一致的马尔可夫等效有向无环图
abstract: A polynomial-time exact algorithm for counting the number of directed acyclic graphs in a Markov equivalence class was recently given by Wienöbst, Bannach, and Liśkiewicz (AAAI 2021). In this paper, we consider the more general problem of counting the number of directed acyclic graphs in a Markov equivalence class when the directions of some of the edges are also fixed (this setting arises, for example, when interventional data is partially available). This problem has been shown in earlier work to be complexity-theoretically hard. In contrast, we show that the problem is nevertheless tractable in an interesting class of instances, by establishing that it is ``fixed-parameter tractable''. In particular, our counting algorithm runs in time that is bounded by a polynomial in the size of the graph, where the degree of the polynomial does \emph{not} depend upon the number of additional edges provided as input.
summary: A polynomial-time exact algorithm for counting the number of directed acyclic graphs in a Markov equivalence class was recently given by Wienöbst, Bannach, and Liśkiewicz (AAAI 2021). In this paper, we consider the more general problem of counting the number of directed acyclic graphs in a Markov equivalence class when the directions of some of the edges are also fixed (this setting arises, for example, when interventional data is partially available). This problem has been shown in earlier work to be complexity-theoretically hard. In contrast, we show that the problem is nevertheless tractable in an interesting class of instances, by establishing that it is ``fixed-parameter tractable''. In particular, our counting algorithm runs in time that is bounded by a polynomial in the size of the graph, where the degree of the polynomial does \emph{not} depend upon the number of additional edges provided as input.
abstract_zh: Wienöbst、Bannach 和 Liśkiewicz 最近给出了一种用于计算马尔可夫等价类中有向无环图数量的多项式时间精确算法（AAAI 2021）。在本文中，我们考虑了当某些边的方向也固定时（例如，当介入数据部分可用时出现这种设置）时，计算马尔可夫等价类中有向无环图的数量的更普遍的问题。这个问题在早期的工作中已经被证明是复杂的——理论上是困难的。相比之下，我们通过证明该问题是“固定参数可处理的”，表明该问题在一类有趣的实例中仍然是可处理的。特别是，我们的计数算法运行的时间受到图形大小的多项式的限制，其中多项式的次数 \emph{not} 取决于作为输入提供的附加边的数量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在部分边方向固定的情况下，计算马尔可夫等价类中无环图数量的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法无法高效处理部分边方向固定的情况，而该问题在计算复杂性上被证明是困难的，需寻找新的解决方法。
AI.method: 通过建立固定参数可解性框架，设计了一个运行时间与图规模多项式相关的算法，且多项式次数不依赖输入边数量。
AI.result: 成功证明该问题在特定实例下具有固定参数可解性，并给出了多项式时间计数算法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理部分边方向固定的马尔可夫等价类计数问题提供了高效可行的解决方案。

authors_text: Yuki Inoue,Hiroto Nagayoshi
title: Weakly-Supervised Crack Detection
title_zh: 弱监督裂纹检测
comment: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems
comments: Submitted to IEEE Transactions on Intelligent Transportation Systems
abstract: Pixel-level crack segmentation is widely studied due to its high impact on building and road inspections. While recent studies have made significant improvements in accuracy, they typically heavily depend on pixel-level crack annotations, which are time-consuming to obtain. In earlier work, we proposed to reduce the annotation cost bottleneck by reformulating the crack segmentation problem as a weakly-supervised problem -- i.e. the annotation process is expedited by sacrificing the annotation quality. The loss in annotation quality was remedied by refining the inference with per-pixel brightness values, which was effective when the pixel brightness distribution between cracks and non-cracks are well separated, but struggled greatly for lighter-colored cracks as well as non-crack targets in which the brightness distribution is less articulated. In this work, we propose an annotation refinement approach which takes advantage of the fact that the regions falsely annotated as cracks have similar local visual features as the background. Because the proposed approach is data-driven, it is effective regardless of a dataset's pixel brightness profile. The proposed method is evaluated on three crack segmentation datasets as well as one blood vessel segmentation dataset to test for domain robustness, and the results show that it speeds up the annotation process by factors of 10 to 30, while the detection accuracy stays at a comparable level.
summary: Pixel-level crack segmentation is widely studied due to its high impact on building and road inspections. While recent studies have made significant improvements in accuracy, they typically heavily depend on pixel-level crack annotations, which are time-consuming to obtain. In earlier work, we proposed to reduce the annotation cost bottleneck by reformulating the crack segmentation problem as a weakly-supervised problem -- i.e. the annotation process is expedited by sacrificing the annotation quality. The loss in annotation quality was remedied by refining the inference with per-pixel brightness values, which was effective when the pixel brightness distribution between cracks and non-cracks are well separated, but struggled greatly for lighter-colored cracks as well as non-crack targets in which the brightness distribution is less articulated. In this work, we propose an annotation refinement approach which takes advantage of the fact that the regions falsely annotated as cracks have similar local visual features as the background. Because the proposed approach is data-driven, it is effective regardless of a dataset's pixel brightness profile. The proposed method is evaluated on three crack segmentation datasets as well as one blood vessel segmentation dataset to test for domain robustness, and the results show that it speeds up the annotation process by factors of 10 to 30, while the detection accuracy stays at a comparable level.
abstract_zh: 像素级裂纹分割由于其对建筑和道路检查的巨大影响而被广泛研究。虽然最近的研究在准确性方面取得了显着提高，但它们通常严重依赖于像素级裂纹注释，而获取这些注释非常耗时。在早期的工作中，我们提出通过将裂纹分割问题重新表述为弱监督问题来减少注释成本瓶颈——即通过牺牲注释质量来加快注释过程。通过使用每像素亮度值细化推理来弥补注释质量的损失，当裂纹和非裂纹之间的像素亮度分布很好分离时，这是有效的，但对于颜色较浅的裂纹以及亮度分布不太清晰的非裂纹目标来说，效果就很困难。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种注释细化方法，该方法利用了错误注释为裂缝的区域具有与背景相似的局部视觉特征的事实。由于所提出的方法是数据驱动的，因此无论数据集的像素亮度分布如何，它都是有效的。该方法在三个裂纹分割数据集和一个血管分割数据集上进行了评估，以测试域鲁棒性，结果表明，该方法将标注过程加快了 10 至 30 倍，同时检测精度保持在相当的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督裂纹检测方法，通过减少像素级标注需求来提升裂纹分割效率。
AI.motivation: 现有裂纹分割方法依赖耗时的像素级标注，且基于亮度分布的弱监督方法在浅色裂纹或亮度分布模糊场景下效果不佳。
AI.method: 提出基于局部视觉特征的标注优化方法，利用错误标注的裂纹区域与背景具有相似特征的特性，无需依赖亮度分布即可实现标注精炼。
AI.result: 在三个裂纹分割数据集和一个血管分割数据集上验证，标注效率提升10-30倍且检测精度保持稳定。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过数据驱动的特征优化有效解决了弱监督标注难题，在不同领域均表现出良好的鲁棒性与实用性。

authors_text: Rania Briq,Chuhang Zou,Leonid Pishchulin,Chris Broaddus,Juergen Gall
title: Recurrent Transformer Variational Autoencoders for Multi-Action Motion Synthesis
title_zh: 用于多动作运动合成的循环变压器变分自动编码器
comment: accepted at Transformers for Vision workshop at CVPR 2022
comments: accepted at Transformers for Vision workshop at CVPR 2022
abstract: We consider the problem of synthesizing multi-action human motion sequences of arbitrary lengths. Existing approaches have mastered motion sequence generation in single action scenarios, but fail to generalize to multi-action and arbitrary-length sequences. We fill this gap by proposing a novel efficient approach that leverages expressiveness of Recurrent Transformers and generative richness of conditional Variational Autoencoders. The proposed iterative approach is able to generate smooth and realistic human motion sequences with an arbitrary number of actions and frames while doing so in linear space and time. We train and evaluate the proposed approach on PROX and Charades datasets, where we augment PROX with ground-truth action labels and Charades with human mesh annotations. Experimental evaluation shows significant improvements in FID score and semantic consistency metrics compared to the state-of-the-art.
summary: We consider the problem of synthesizing multi-action human motion sequences of arbitrary lengths. Existing approaches have mastered motion sequence generation in single action scenarios, but fail to generalize to multi-action and arbitrary-length sequences. We fill this gap by proposing a novel efficient approach that leverages expressiveness of Recurrent Transformers and generative richness of conditional Variational Autoencoders. The proposed iterative approach is able to generate smooth and realistic human motion sequences with an arbitrary number of actions and frames while doing so in linear space and time. We train and evaluate the proposed approach on PROX and Charades datasets, where we augment PROX with ground-truth action labels and Charades with human mesh annotations. Experimental evaluation shows significant improvements in FID score and semantic consistency metrics compared to the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑合成任意长度的多动作人体运动序列的问题。现有方法已经掌握了单动作场景中的运动序列生成，但无法推广到多动作和任意长度序列。我们通过提出一种新颖的有效方法来填补这一空白，该方法利用循环变压器的表现力和条件变分自动编码器的生成丰富性。所提出的迭代方法能够在线性空间和时间中生成具有任意数量的动作和帧的平滑且真实的人体运动序列。我们在 PROX 和 Charades 数据集上训练和评估所提出的方法，其中我们使用真实动作标签来增强 PROX，并使用人类网格注释来增强 Charades。实验评估表明，与最先进的技术相比，FID 评分和语义一致性指标有了显着改进。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出一种基于循环变换器变分自编码器的方法，用于生成任意长度的多动作人类运动序列。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在单动作运动序列生成上表现良好，但难以扩展到多动作和任意长度的场景，需填补这一技术空白。
AI.method: 结合循环变换器的表达能力与条件变分自编码器的生成能力，设计迭代生成框架，在线性时空复杂度下生成平滑真实的多动作运动序列。
AI.result: 在PROX和Charades数据集上实验表明，该方法在FID分数和语义一致性指标上显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的循环变换器变分自编码器有效解决了多动作、任意长度运动合成问题，实现了生成质量与效率的平衡。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文提出一种基于循环变换器变分自编码器的方法，用于生成任意长度的多动作人类运动序列。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法在单动作运动序列生成上表现良好，但难以扩展到多动作和任意长度的场景，需填补这一技术空白。
ai_content.method: 结合循环变换器的表达能力与条件变分自编码器的生成能力，设计迭代生成框架，在线性时空复杂度下生成平滑真实的多动作运动序列。
ai_content.result: 在PROX和Charades数据集上实验表明，该方法在FID分数和语义一致性指标上显著优于现有最先进方法。
ai_content.conclusion: 提出的循环变换器变分自编码器有效解决了多动作、任意长度运动合成问题，实现了生成质量与效率的平衡。

search_text: Recurrent Transformer Variational Autoencoders for Multi-Action Motion Synthesis 用于多动作运动合成的循环变压器变分自动编码器 We consider the problem of synthesizing multi-action human motion sequences of arbitrary lengths. Existing approaches have mastered motion sequence generation in single action scenarios, but fail to generalize to multi-action and arbitrary-length sequences. We fill this gap by proposing a novel efficient approach that leverages expressiveness of Recurrent Transformers and generative richness of conditional Variational Autoencoders. The proposed iterative approach is able to generate smooth and realistic human motion sequences with an arbitrary number of actions and frames while doing so in linear space and time. We train and evaluate the proposed approach on PROX and Charades datasets, where we augment PROX with ground-truth action labels and Charades with human mesh annotations. Experimental evaluation shows significant improvements in FID score and semantic consistency metrics compared to the state-of-the-art. 我们考虑合成任意长度的多动作人体运动序列的问题。现有方法已经掌握了单动作场景中的运动序列生成，但无法推广到多动作和任意长度序列。我们通过提出一种新颖的有效方法来填补这一空白，该方法利用循环变压器的表现力和条件变分自动编码器的生成丰富性。所提出的迭代方法能够在线性空间和时间中生成具有任意数量的动作和帧的平滑且真实的人体运动序列。我们在 PROX 和 Charades 数据集上训练和评估所提出的方法，其中我们使用真实动作标签来增强 PROX，并使用人类网格注释来增强 Charades。实验评估表明，与最先进的技术相比，FID 评分和语义一致性指标有了显着改进。 该论文提出一种基于循环变换器变分自编码器的方法，用于生成任意长度的多动作人类运动序列。 Rania Briq,Chuhang Zou,Leonid Pishchulin,Chris Broaddus,Juergen Gall cs.CV

authors_text: Hassan Dbouk,Naresh R. Shanbhag
title: Adversarial Vulnerability of Randomized Ensembles
title_zh: 随机集合的对抗漏洞
comment: Published as a conference paper in ICML 2022
comments: Published as a conference paper in ICML 2022
abstract: Despite the tremendous success of deep neural networks across various tasks, their vulnerability to imperceptible adversarial perturbations has hindered their deployment in the real world. Recently, works on randomized ensembles have empirically demonstrated significant improvements in adversarial robustness over standard adversarially trained (AT) models with minimal computational overhead, making them a promising solution for safety-critical resource-constrained applications. However, this impressive performance raises the question: Are these robustness gains provided by randomized ensembles real? In this work we address this question both theoretically and empirically. We first establish theoretically that commonly employed robustness evaluation methods such as adaptive PGD provide a false sense of security in this setting. Subsequently, we propose a theoretically-sound and efficient adversarial attack algorithm (ARC) capable of compromising random ensembles even in cases where adaptive PGD fails to do so. We conduct comprehensive experiments across a variety of network architectures, training schemes, datasets, and norms to support our claims, and empirically establish that randomized ensembles are in fact more vulnerable to $\ell_p$-bounded adversarial perturbations than even standard AT models. Our code can be found at https://github.com/hsndbk4/ARC.
summary: Despite the tremendous success of deep neural networks across various tasks, their vulnerability to imperceptible adversarial perturbations has hindered their deployment in the real world. Recently, works on randomized ensembles have empirically demonstrated significant improvements in adversarial robustness over standard adversarially trained (AT) models with minimal computational overhead, making them a promising solution for safety-critical resource-constrained applications. However, this impressive performance raises the question: Are these robustness gains provided by randomized ensembles real? In this work we address this question both theoretically and empirically. We first establish theoretically that commonly employed robustness evaluation methods such as adaptive PGD provide a false sense of security in this setting. Subsequently, we propose a theoretically-sound and efficient adversarial attack algorithm (ARC) capable of compromising random ensembles even in cases where adaptive PGD fails to do so. We conduct comprehensive experiments across a variety of network architectures, training schemes, datasets, and norms to support our claims, and empirically establish that randomized ensembles are in fact more vulnerable to $\ell_p$-bounded adversarial perturbations than even standard AT models. Our code can be found at https://github.com/hsndbk4/ARC.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络在各种任务中取得了巨大成功，但它们对难以察觉的对抗性扰动的脆弱性阻碍了它们在现实世界中的部署。最近，随机集成的研究经验证明，与标准对抗训练（AT）模型相比，以最小的计算开销，对抗鲁棒性有了显着提高，这使得它们成为安全关键的资源受限应用程序的有前景的解决方案。然而，这种令人印象深刻的表现提出了一个问题：随机集成提供的这些鲁棒性增益是真实的吗？在这项工作中，我们从理论上和实证上解决了这个问题。我们首先从理论上确定，常用的鲁棒性评估方法（例如自适应 PGD）在这种情况下提供了错误的安全感。随后，我们提出了一种理论上合理且高效的对抗性攻击算法（ARC），即使在自适应 PGD 无法做到这一点的情况下，也能够破坏随机集合。我们对各种网络架构、训练方案、数据集和规范进行了全面的实验来支持我们的主张，并根据经验确定随机集成实际上比标准 AT 模型更容易受到 $\ell_p$ 有限的对抗性扰动的影响。我们的代码可以在 https://github.com/hsndbk4/ARC 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文研究随机集成模型在对抗性攻击下的脆弱性，提出新的攻击方法并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 尽管随机集成模型在对抗训练中表现出更强的鲁棒性，但现有评估方法可能存在偏差，需理论与实验验证其真实安全性。
AI.method: 理论分析现有评估方法缺陷，提出ARC攻击算法，并在多种网络架构、数据集和攻击规范下进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明随机集成模型在ℓ_p约束下比标准对抗训练模型更易受攻击，ARC算法能有效突破现有防御。
AI.conclusion: 随机集成模型的鲁棒性提升有限，ARC算法为评估对抗性鲁棒性提供了更可靠的方法。

authors_text: Quoc Vinh Lai Dang,Sarvar Hussain Nengroo,Hojun Jin
title: Learning Dense Features for Point Cloud Registration Using a Graph Attention Network
title_zh: 使用图注意力网络学习点云配准的密集特征
abstract: Point cloud registration is a fundamental task in many applications such as localization, mapping, tracking, and reconstruction. Successful registration relies on extracting robust and discriminative geometric features. Though existing learning based methods require high computing capacity for processing a large number of raw points at the same time, computational capacity limitation is not an issue thanks to the powerful parallel computing process using GPU. In this paper, we introduce a framework that efficiently and economically extracts dense features using a graph attention network for point cloud matching and registration (DFGAT). The detector of the DFGAT is responsible for finding highly reliable key points in large raw data sets. The descriptor of the DFGAT takes these keypoints combined with their neighbors to extract invariant density features in preparation for the matching. The graph attention network (GAT) uses the attention mechanism that enriches the relationships between point clouds. Finally, we consider this as an optimal transport problem and use the Sinkhorn algorithm to find positive and negative matches. We perform thorough tests on the KITTI dataset and evaluate the effectiveness of this approach. The results show that this method with the efficiently compact keypoint selection and description can achieve the best performance matching metrics and reach the highest success ratio of 99.88% registration in comparison with other state of the art approaches.
summary: Point cloud registration is a fundamental task in many applications such as localization, mapping, tracking, and reconstruction. Successful registration relies on extracting robust and discriminative geometric features. Though existing learning based methods require high computing capacity for processing a large number of raw points at the same time, computational capacity limitation is not an issue thanks to the powerful parallel computing process using GPU. In this paper, we introduce a framework that efficiently and economically extracts dense features using a graph attention network for point cloud matching and registration (DFGAT). The detector of the DFGAT is responsible for finding highly reliable key points in large raw data sets. The descriptor of the DFGAT takes these keypoints combined with their neighbors to extract invariant density features in preparation for the matching. The graph attention network (GAT) uses the attention mechanism that enriches the relationships between point clouds. Finally, we consider this as an optimal transport problem and use the Sinkhorn algorithm to find positive and negative matches. We perform thorough tests on the KITTI dataset and evaluate the effectiveness of this approach. The results show that this method with the efficiently compact keypoint selection and description can achieve the best performance matching metrics and reach the highest success ratio of 99.88% registration in comparison with other state of the art approaches.
abstract_zh: 点云配准是定位、测绘、跟踪和重建等许多应用中的一项基本任务。成功的配准依赖于提取稳健且有辨别力的几何特征。虽然现有的基于学习的方法需要高计算能力来同时处理大量原始点，但由于使用 GPU 强大的并行计算过程，计算能力限制不是问题。在本文中，我们介绍了一种使用图注意力网络进行点云匹配和配准（DFGAT）高效且经济地提取密集特征的框架。 DFGAT 的检测器负责在大型原始数据集中寻找高度可靠的关键点。 DFGAT 的描述符将这些关键点与其邻居相结合，提取不变密度特征，为匹配做好准备。图注意力网络（GAT）使用注意力机制丰富了点云之间的关系。最后，我们将其视为最优传输问题，并使用 Sinkhorn 算法来查找正匹配和负匹配。我们对 KITTI 数据集进行了彻底的测试并评估了这种方法的有效性。结果表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，该方法具有高效紧凑的关键点选择和描述，可以实现最佳的性能匹配指标，并达到 99.88% 的最高配准成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图注意力网络（GAT）的密集特征学习框架DFGAT，用于点云配准任务。
AI.motivation: 现有基于学习的点云配准方法在处理大量点时计算需求高，而DFGAT旨在通过高效紧凑的特征提取方法解决计算效率与配准精度的平衡问题。
AI.method: DFGAT框架包含两个核心模块：检测器用于提取可靠关键点，描述子结合关键点及其邻域通过GAT学习不变密度特征，并利用Sinkhorn算法将配准问题建模为最优传输问题进行匹配。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上的实验表明，DFGAT在配准成功率（99.88%）和匹配指标上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DFGAT通过图注意力机制和最优传输建模，在保证计算效率的同时显著提升了点云配准的精度和鲁棒性。

We perform thorough tests on the KITTI dataset and evaluate the effectiveness of this approach. The results show that this method with the efficiently compact keypoint selection and description can achieve the best performance matching metrics and reach the highest success ratio of 99.88% registration in comparison with other state of the art approaches. 点云配准是定位、测绘、跟踪和重建等许多应用中的一项基本任务。成功的配准依赖于提取稳健且有辨别力的几何特征。虽然现有的基于学习的方法需要高计算能力来同时处理大量原始点，但由于使用 GPU 强大的并行计算过程，计算能力限制不是问题。在本文中，我们介绍了一种使用图注意力网络进行点云匹配和配准（DFGAT）高效且经济地提取密集特征的框架。 DFGAT 的检测器负责在大型原始数据集中寻找高度可靠的关键点。 DFGAT 的描述符将这些关键点与其邻居相结合，提取不变密度特征，为匹配做好准备。图注意力网络（GAT）使用注意力机制丰富了点云之间的关系。最后，我们将其视为最优传输问题，并使用 Sinkhorn 算法来查找正匹配和负匹配。我们对 KITTI 数据集进行了彻底的测试并评估了这种方法的有效性。结果表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，该方法具有高效紧凑的关键点选择和描述，可以实现最佳的性能匹配指标，并达到 99.88% 的最高配准成功率。 本文提出了一种基于图注意力网络（GAT）的密集特征学习框架DFGAT，用于点云配准任务。 Quoc Vinh Lai Dang,Sarvar Hussain Nengroo,Hojun Jin cs.CV

authors_text: Subin Park,Yoon Ki Cha,Soyoung Park,Kyung-Su Kim,Myung Jin Chung
title: Automated Precision Localization of Peripherally Inserted Central Catheter Tip through Model-Agnostic Multi-Stage Networks
title_zh: 通过与模型无关的多级网络自动精确定位外周插入的中心导管尖端
comment: Subin Park and Yoon Ki Cha have contributed equally to this work as the co-first author. Kyung-Su Kim (kskim.doc@gmail.com) and Myung Jin Chung (mj1.chung@samsung.com) have contributed equally to this work as the co-corresponding author
comments: Subin Park and Yoon Ki Cha have contributed equally to this work as the co-first author. Kyung-Su Kim (kskim.doc@gmail.com) and Myung Jin Chung (mj1.chung@samsung.com) have contributed equally to this work as the co-corresponding author
abstract: Peripherally inserted central catheters (PICCs) have been widely used as one of the representative central venous lines (CVCs) due to their long-term intravascular access with low infectivity. However, PICCs have a fatal drawback of a high frequency of tip mispositions, increasing the risk of puncture, embolism, and complications such as cardiac arrhythmias. To automatically and precisely detect it, various attempts have been made by using the latest deep learning (DL) technologies. However, even with these approaches, it is still practically difficult to determine the tip location because the multiple fragments phenomenon (MFP) occurs in the process of predicting and extracting the PICC line required before predicting the tip. This study aimed to develop a system generally applied to existing models and to restore the PICC line more exactly by removing the MFs of the model output, thereby precisely localizing the actual tip position for detecting its disposition. To achieve this, we proposed a multi-stage DL-based framework post-processing the PICC line extraction result of the existing technology. The performance was compared by each root mean squared error (RMSE) and MFP incidence rate according to whether or not MFCN is applied to five conventional models. In internal validation, when MFCN was applied to the existing single model, MFP was improved by an average of 45%. The RMSE was improved by over 63% from an average of 26.85mm (17.16 to 35.80mm) to 9.72mm (9.37 to 10.98mm). In external validation, when MFCN was applied, the MFP incidence rate decreased by an average of 32% and the RMSE decreased by an average of 65\%. Therefore, by applying the proposed MFCN, we observed the significant/consistent detection performance improvement of PICC tip location compared to the existing model.

However, PICCs have a fatal drawback of a high frequency of tip mispositions, increasing the risk of puncture, embolism, and complications such as cardiac arrhythmias. To automatically and precisely detect it, various attempts have been made by using the latest deep learning (DL) technologies. However, even with these approaches, it is still practically difficult to determine the tip location because the multiple fragments phenomenon (MFP) occurs in the process of predicting and extracting the PICC line required before predicting the tip. This study aimed to develop a system generally applied to existing models and to restore the PICC line more exactly by removing the MFs of the model output, thereby precisely localizing the actual tip position for detecting its disposition. To achieve this, we proposed a multi-stage DL-based framework post-processing the PICC line extraction result of the existing technology. The performance was compared by each root mean squared error (RMSE) and MFP incidence rate according to whether or not MFCN is applied to five conventional models. In internal validation, when MFCN was applied to the existing single model, MFP was improved by an average of 45%. The RMSE was improved by over 63% from an average of 26.85mm (17.16 to 35.80mm) to 9.72mm (9.37 to 10.98mm). Therefore, by applying the proposed MFCN, we observed the significant/consistent detection performance improvement of PICC tip location compared to the existing model.
abstract_zh: 外周静脉置入中心静脉导管（PICC）作为具有代表性的中心静脉导管（CVC）之一，由于其血管内通路时间长、感染性低而被广泛应用。然而，PICC有一个致命的缺点，即尖端错位频率高，增加了穿刺、栓塞和心律失常等并发症的风险。为了自动、精确地检测它，人们利用最新的深度学习（DL）技术进行了各种尝试。然而，即使采用这些方法，实际上仍然很难确定尖端位置，因为在预测尖端之前预测和提取所需的PICC线的过程中会发生多碎片现象（MFP）。本研究旨在开发一种普遍适用于现有模型的系统，并通过去除模型输出的 MF 来更准确地恢复 PICC 线，从而精确定位实际尖端位置以检测其处置。为了实现这一目标，我们提出了一种基于深度学习的多阶段框架，对现有技术的 PICC 线路提取结果进行后处理。根据是否将 MFCN 应用于 5 种常规模型，通过各自的均方根误差 (RMSE) 和 MFP 发生率来比较性能。在内部验证中，当MFCN应用于现有单一模型时，MFP平均提高了45%。 RMSE 从平均 26.85 毫米（17.16 至 35.80 毫米）提高到 9.72 毫米（9.37 至 10.98 毫米），提高了 63% 以上。在外部验证中，应用MFCN后，MFP发生率平均下降32%，RMSE平均下降65%。因此，通过应用所提出的 MFCN，我们观察到与现有模型相比，PICC 尖端位置的检测性能得到了显着/一致的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段深度学习框架（MFCN），用于精确定位中心静脉导管（PICC）尖端位置，解决现有模型因多重碎片现象（MFP）导致的定位误差问题。
AI.motivation: PICC尖端位置误置会引发严重并发症，但现有深度学习方法在预测PICC导管时易受多重碎片现象影响，导致定位精度不足。
AI.method: 设计多阶段深度学习后处理框架MFCN，通过去除模型输出中的碎片片段，提升导管线提取精度，最终精确定位尖端位置，并在五种常规模型上验证效果。
AI.result: 内部验证显示，应用MFCN后MFP减少45%，RMSE从26.85mm降至9.72mm；外部验证中MFP减少32%，RMSE降低65%。
AI.conclusion: MFCN显著提升了PICC尖端定位的检测性能，有效解决了多重碎片现象导致的定位偏差问题。

authors_text: Alessandro Sciarra,Soumick Chatterjee,Max Dünnwald,Giuseppe Placidi,Andreas Nürnberger,Oliver Speck,Steffen Oeltze-Jafra
title: Automated SSIM Regression for Detection and Quantification of Motion Artefacts in Brain MR Images
title_zh: 用于检测和量化大脑 MR 图像中运动伪影的自动 SSIM 回归
abstract: Motion artefacts in magnetic resonance brain images can have a strong impact on diagnostic confidence. The assessment of MR image quality is fundamental before proceeding with the clinical diagnosis. Motion artefacts can alter the delineation of structures such as the brain, lesions or tumours and may require a repeat scan. Otherwise, an inaccurate (e.g. correct pathology but wrong severity) or incorrect diagnosis (e.g. wrong pathology) may occur. "\textit{Image quality assessment}" as a fast, automated step right after scanning can assist in deciding if the acquired images are diagnostically sufficient. An automated image quality assessment based on the structural similarity index (SSIM) regression through a residual neural network is proposed in this work. Additionally, a classification into different groups - by subdividing with SSIM ranges - is evaluated. Importantly, this method predicts SSIM values of an input image in the absence of a reference ground truth image. The networks were able to detect motion artefacts, and the best performance for the regression and classification task has always been achieved with ResNet-18 with contrast augmentation. The mean and standard deviation of residuals' distribution were $μ=-0.0009$ and $σ=0.0139$, respectively. Whilst for the classification task in 3, 5 and 10 classes, the best accuracies were 97, 95 and 89\%, respectively. The results show that the proposed method could be a tool for supporting neuro-radiologists and radiographers in evaluating image quality quickly.
summary: Motion artefacts in magnetic resonance brain images can have a strong impact on diagnostic confidence. The assessment of MR image quality is fundamental before proceeding with the clinical diagnosis. Motion artefacts can alter the delineation of structures such as the brain, lesions or tumours and may require a repeat scan. Otherwise, an inaccurate (e.g. correct pathology but wrong severity) or incorrect diagnosis (e.g. wrong pathology) may occur. "\textit{Image quality assessment}" as a fast, automated step right after scanning can assist in deciding if the acquired images are diagnostically sufficient. An automated image quality assessment based on the structural similarity index (SSIM) regression through a residual neural network is proposed in this work. Additionally, a classification into different groups - by subdividing with SSIM ranges - is evaluated. Importantly, this method predicts SSIM values of an input image in the absence of a reference ground truth image. The networks were able to detect motion artefacts, and the best performance for the regression and classification task has always been achieved with ResNet-18 with contrast augmentation. The mean and standard deviation of residuals' distribution were $μ=-0.0009$ and $σ=0.0139$, respectively. Whilst for the classification task in 3, 5 and 10 classes, the best accuracies were 97, 95 and 89\%, respectively. The results show that the proposed method could be a tool for supporting neuro-radiologists and radiographers in evaluating image quality quickly.
abstract_zh: 磁共振脑图像中的运动伪影会对诊断信心产生重大影响。在进行临床诊断之前，MR 图像质量的评估至关重要。运动伪影可能会改变大脑、病变或肿瘤等结构的轮廓，可能需要重复扫描。否则，可能会出现不准确（例如病理学正确但严重程度错误）或错误诊断（例如病理学错误）。 “\textit{图像质量评估}”作为扫描后的快速、自动化步骤，可以帮助确定所获取的图像是否足以进行诊断。这项工作提出了一种基于残差神经网络的结构相似性指数（SSIM）回归的自动图像质量评估。此外，还评估了通过 SSIM 范围细分来划分为不同组的情况。重要的是，该方法在没有参考地面实况图像的情况下预测输入图像的 SSIM 值。该网络能够检测运动伪影，并且通过具有对比度增强功能的 ResNet-18 始终能够实现回归和分类任务的最佳性能。残差分布的平均值和标准差分别为 $μ=-0.0009$ 和 $σ=0.0139$。对于 3、5 和 10 类的分类任务，最佳准确率分别为 97%、95% 和 89%。结果表明，所提出的方法可以成为支持神经放射科医生和放射技师快速评估图像质量的工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于结构相似性指数（SSIM）回归的自动化方法，用于检测和量化脑部MRI中的运动伪影。
AI.motivation: 运动伪影会严重影响MRI诊断的准确性，传统人工评估效率低且主观性强，亟需一种快速自动化的图像质量评估工具。
AI.method: 采用残差神经网络（ResNet-18）结合对比度增强技术，通过SSIM回归预测无参考图像的运动伪影程度，并基于SSIM区间划分进行分类评估。
AI.result: 回归任务残差均值μ=-0.0009、标准差σ=0.0139；分类任务在3/5/10类中分别达到97%/95%/89%的准确率，ResNet-18模型表现最优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可为放射科医生提供快速可靠的MRI图像质量评估工具，辅助判断是否需要重新扫描以确保诊断准确性。

result: 回归任务残差均值μ=-0.0009、标准差σ=0.0139；分类任务在3/5/10类中分别达到97%/95%/89%的准确率，ResNet-18模型表现最优。
conclusion: 该方法可为放射科医生提供快速可靠的MRI图像质量评估工具，辅助判断是否需要重新扫描以确保诊断准确性。
search_text: Automated SSIM Regression for Detection and Quantification of Motion Artefacts in Brain MR Images 用于检测和量化大脑 MR 图像中运动伪影的自动 SSIM 回归 Motion artefacts in magnetic resonance brain images can have a strong impact on diagnostic confidence. The assessment of MR image quality is fundamental before proceeding with the clinical diagnosis. Motion artefacts can alter the delineation of structures such as the brain, lesions or tumours and may require a repeat scan. Otherwise, an inaccurate (e.g. correct pathology but wrong severity) or incorrect diagnosis (e.g. wrong pathology) may occur. "\textit{Image quality assessment}" as a fast, automated step right after scanning can assist in deciding if the acquired images are diagnostically sufficient. An automated image quality assessment based on the structural similarity index (SSIM) regression through a residual neural network is proposed in this work. Additionally, a classification into different groups - by subdividing with SSIM ranges - is evaluated. Importantly, this method predicts SSIM values of an input image in the absence of a reference ground truth image. The networks were able to detect motion artefacts, and the best performance for the regression and classification task has always been achieved with ResNet-18 with contrast augmentation. The mean and standard deviation of residuals' distribution were $μ=-0.0009$ and $σ=0.0139$, respectively. Whilst for the classification task in 3, 5 and 10 classes, the best accuracies were 97, 95 and 89\%, respectively. The results show that the proposed method could be a tool for supporting neuro-radiologists and radiographers in evaluating image quality quickly. 磁共振脑图像中的运动伪影会对诊断信心产生重大影响。在进行临床诊断之前，MR 图像质量的评估至关重要。运动伪影可能会改变大脑、病变或肿瘤等结构的轮廓，可能需要重复扫描。否则，可能会出现不准确（例如病理学正确但严重程度错误）或错误诊断（例如病理学错误）。 “\textit{图像质量评估}”作为扫描后的快速、自动化步骤，可以帮助确定所获取的图像是否足以进行诊断。这项工作提出了一种基于残差神经网络的结构相似性指数（SSIM）回归的自动图像质量评估。此外，还评估了通过 SSIM 范围细分来划分为不同组的情况。重要的是，该方法在没有参考地面实况图像的情况下预测输入图像的 SSIM 值。该网络能够检测运动伪影，并且通过具有对比度增强功能的 ResNet-18 始终能够实现回归和分类任务的最佳性能。残差分布的平均值和标准差分别为 $μ=-0.0009$ 和 $σ=0.0139$。对于 3、5 和 10 类的分类任务，最佳准确率分别为 97%、95% 和 89%。结果表明，所提出的方法可以成为支持神经放射科医生和放射技师快速评估图像质量的工具。 本文提出了一种基于结构相似性指数（SSIM）回归的自动化方法，用于检测和量化脑部MRI中的运动伪影。 Alessandro Sciarra,Soumick Chatterjee,Max Dünnwald,Giuseppe Placidi,Andreas Nürnberger,Oliver Speck,Steffen Oeltze-Jafra eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,physics.med-ph

authors_text: Elivelto Ebermam,Helder Knidel,Renato A. Krohling
title: Development of a hybrid method for stock trading based on TOPSIS, EMD and ELM
title_zh: 基于 TOPSIS、EMD 和 ELM 的混合股票交易方法的开发
abstract: Deciding when to buy or sell a stock is not an easy task because the market is hard to predict, being influenced by political and economic factors. Thus, methodologies based on computational intelligence have been applied to this challenging problem. In this work, every day the stocks are ranked by technique for order preference by similarity to ideal solution (TOPSIS) using technical analysis criteria, and the most suitable stock is selected for purchase. Even so, it may occur that the market is not favorable to purchase on certain days, or even, the TOPSIS make an incorrect selection. To improve the selection, another method should be used. So, a hybrid model composed of empirical mode decomposition (EMD) and extreme learning machine (ELM) is proposed. The EMD decomposes the series into several sub-series, and thus the main omponent (trend) is extracted. This component is processed by the ELM, which performs the prediction of the next element of component. If the value predicted by the ELM is greater than the last value, then the purchase of the stock is confirmed. The method was applied in a universe of 50 stocks in the Brazilian market. The selection made by TOPSIS showed promising results when compared to the random selection and the return generated by the Bovespa index. Confirmation with the EMD-ELM hybrid model was able to increase the percentage of profit tradings.
summary: Deciding when to buy or sell a stock is not an easy task because the market is hard to predict, being influenced by political and economic factors. Thus, methodologies based on computational intelligence have been applied to this challenging problem. In this work, every day the stocks are ranked by technique for order preference by similarity to ideal solution (TOPSIS) using technical analysis criteria, and the most suitable stock is selected for purchase. Even so, it may occur that the market is not favorable to purchase on certain days, or even, the TOPSIS make an incorrect selection. To improve the selection, another method should be used. So, a hybrid model composed of empirical mode decomposition (EMD) and extreme learning machine (ELM) is proposed. The EMD decomposes the series into several sub-series, and thus the main omponent (trend) is extracted. This component is processed by the ELM, which performs the prediction of the next element of component. If the value predicted by the ELM is greater than the last value, then the purchase of the stock is confirmed. The method was applied in a universe of 50 stocks in the Brazilian market. The selection made by TOPSIS showed promising results when compared to the random selection and the return generated by the Bovespa index. Confirmation with the EMD-ELM hybrid model was able to increase the percentage of profit tradings.
abstract_zh: 决定何时买入或卖出股票并不是一件容易的事，因为市场很难预测，受到政治和经济因素的影响。因此，基于计算智能的方法已应用于解决这一具有挑战性的问题。在这项工作中，每天使用技术分析标准，根据与理想解决方案（TOPSIS）的相似性，按照订单偏好技术对股票进行排名，并选择最合适的股票进行购买。即使如此，也可能会出现某些日子市场不利于购买的情况，甚至TOPSIS做出错误的选择。为了改进选择，应该使用另一种方法。因此，提出了经验模态分解（EMD）和极限学习机（ELM）组成的混合模型。 EMD将系列分解为多个子系列，从而提取主要成分（趋势）。该组件由 ELM 处理，ELM 执行组件下一个元素的预测。如果 ELM 预测的值大于最后的值，则确认购买股票。该方法适用于巴西市场 50 只股票。与随机选择和 Bovespa 指数产生的回报相比，TOPSIS 做出的选择显示出有希望的结果。确认 EMD-ELM 混合模型能够提高利润交易的百分比。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合TOPSIS、EMD和ELM的混合方法，用于股票交易决策。
AI.motivation: 股票市场难以预测，受政治和经济因素影响，因此需要借助计算智能方法进行股票买卖决策。
AI.method: 每天使用TOPSIS技术对股票进行排名，选择最合适的股票进行购买；若市场不适宜购买或TOPSIS选择错误，则使用EMD-ELM混合模型进行验证，通过EMD提取趋势成分并用ELM预测未来值。
AI.result: 该方法在巴西市场50只股票中应用，TOPSIS选择结果优于随机选择和Bovespa指数收益，EMD-ELM混合模型进一步提高了交易盈利比例。
AI.conclusion: 结合TOPSIS和EMD-ELM混合模型的方法能够有效提高股票交易的盈利性。
