authors_text: Simon Lutz,Daniel Neider,Rajarshi Roy
title: Specification sketching for Linear Temporal Logic
title_zh: 线性时序逻辑的规格草图
abstract: Virtually all verification and synthesis techniques assume that the formal specifications are readily available, functionally correct, and fully match the engineer's understanding of the given system. However, this assumption is often unrealistic in practice: formalizing system requirements is notoriously difficult, error-prone, and requires substantial training. To alleviate this severe hurdle, we propose a fundamentally novel approach to writing formal specifications, named specification sketching for Linear Temporal Logic (LTL). The key idea is that an engineer can provide a partial LTL formula, called an LTL sketch, where parts that are hard to formalize can be left out. Given a set of examples describing system behaviors that the specification should or should not allow, the task of a so-called sketching algorithm is then to complete a given sketch such that the resulting LTL formula is consistent with the examples. We show that deciding whether a sketch can be completed falls into the complexity class NP and present two SAT-based sketching algorithms. We also demonstrate that sketching is a practical approach to writing formal specifications using a prototype implementation.
summary: Virtually all verification and synthesis techniques assume that the formal specifications are readily available, functionally correct, and fully match the engineer's understanding of the given system. However, this assumption is often unrealistic in practice: formalizing system requirements is notoriously difficult, error-prone, and requires substantial training. To alleviate this severe hurdle, we propose a fundamentally novel approach to writing formal specifications, named specification sketching for Linear Temporal Logic (LTL). The key idea is that an engineer can provide a partial LTL formula, called an LTL sketch, where parts that are hard to formalize can be left out. Given a set of examples describing system behaviors that the specification should or should not allow, the task of a so-called sketching algorithm is then to complete a given sketch such that the resulting LTL formula is consistent with the examples. We show that deciding whether a sketch can be completed falls into the complexity class NP and present two SAT-based sketching algorithms. We also demonstrate that sketching is a practical approach to writing formal specifications using a prototype implementation.
abstract_zh: 事实上，所有验证和综合技术都假设正式规范是现成的、功能正确的，并且完全符合工程师对给定系统的理解。然而，这种假设在实践中通常是不切实际的：将系统需求形式化是出了名的困难、容易出错，并且需要大量培训。为了缓解这一严重障碍，我们提出了一种全新的形式化规范编写方法，称为线性时序逻辑（LTL）规范草图。关键思想是工程师可以提供部分 LTL 公式，称为 LTL 草图，其中可以省略难以形式化的部分。给定一组描述规范应该或不应该允许的系统行为的示例，所谓的草图算法的任务就是完成给定的草图，以便生成的 LTL 公式与示例一致。我们证明，决定是否可以完成草图属于 NP 复杂性类别，并提出了两种基于 SAT 的草图算法。我们还证明，草图绘制是使用原型实现编写正式规范的实用方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为线性时序逻辑（LTL）规范草图的新方法，允许工程师通过提供部分LTL公式并结合示例来完成规范。
AI.motivation: 现有验证和综合技术假设形式化规范已完备且正确，但实际中形式化系统需求困难且易出错，亟需更实用的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过允许工程师提供部分LTL公式（草图），并利用示例行为数据，设计基于SAT的算法自动补全草图以满足示例约束。
AI.result: 证明草图可完成性属于NP类，提出两种SAT-based算法，并通过原型实现验证了该方法的实用性。
AI.conclusion: 规范草图是一种可行的替代方案，可降低形式化规范的编写难度，提升工程实践中规格定义的效率与准确性。

We show that deciding whether a sketch can be completed falls into the complexity class NP and present two SAT-based sketching algorithms. We also demonstrate that sketching is a practical approach to writing formal specifications using a prototype implementation. 事实上，所有验证和综合技术都假设正式规范是现成的、功能正确的，并且完全符合工程师对给定系统的理解。然而，这种假设在实践中通常是不切实际的：将系统需求形式化是出了名的困难、容易出错，并且需要大量培训。为了缓解这一严重障碍，我们提出了一种全新的形式化规范编写方法，称为线性时序逻辑（LTL）规范草图。关键思想是工程师可以提供部分 LTL 公式，称为 LTL 草图，其中可以省略难以形式化的部分。给定一组描述规范应该或不应该允许的系统行为的示例，所谓的草图算法的任务就是完成给定的草图，以便生成的 LTL 公式与示例一致。我们证明，决定是否可以完成草图属于 NP 复杂性类别，并提出了两种基于 SAT 的草图算法。我们还证明，草图绘制是使用原型实现编写正式规范的实用方法。 本文提出一种名为线性时序逻辑（LTL）规范草图的新方法，允许工程师通过提供部分LTL公式并结合示例来完成规范。 Simon Lutz,Daniel Neider,Rajarshi Roy cs.FL,cs.AI

authors_text: Runsong Zhu,Di Kang,Ka-Hei Hui,Yue Qian,Xuefei Zhe,Zhen Dong,Linchao Bao,Pheng-Ann Heng,Chi-Wing Fu
title: Semi-signed prioritized neural fitting for surface reconstruction from unoriented point clouds
title_zh: 用于从无向点云进行表面重建的半签名优先神经拟合
abstract: Reconstructing 3D geometry from \emph{unoriented} point clouds can benefit many downstream tasks. Recent shape modeling methods mostly adopt implicit neural representation to fit a signed distance field (SDF) and optimize the network by \emph{unsigned} supervision. However, these methods occasionally have difficulty in finding the coarse shape for complicated objects, especially suffering from the ``ghost'' surfaces (\ie, fake surfaces that should not exist). To guide the network quickly fit the coarse shape, we propose to utilize the signed supervision in regions that are obviously outside the object and can be easily determined, resulting in our semi-signed supervision. To better recover high-fidelity details, a novel importance sampling based on tracked region losses and a progressive positional encoding (PE) prioritize the optimization towards underfitting and complicated regions. Specifically, we voxelize and partition the object space into \emph{sign-known} and \emph{sign-uncertain} regions, in which different supervisions are applied. Besides, we adaptively adjust the sampling rate of each voxel according to the tracked reconstruction loss, so that the network can focus more on the complicated under-fitting regions. To this end, we propose our semi-signed prioritized (SSP) neural fitting, and conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate that SSP achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple datasets including the ABC subset and various challenging data. The code will be released upon the publication.
summary: Reconstructing 3D geometry from \emph{unoriented} point clouds can benefit many downstream tasks. Recent shape modeling methods mostly adopt implicit neural representation to fit a signed distance field (SDF) and optimize the network by \emph{unsigned} supervision. However, these methods occasionally have difficulty in finding the coarse shape for complicated objects, especially suffering from the ``ghost'' surfaces (\ie, fake surfaces that should not exist). To guide the network quickly fit the coarse shape, we propose to utilize the signed supervision in regions that are obviously outside the object and can be easily determined, resulting in our semi-signed supervision. To better recover high-fidelity details, a novel importance sampling based on tracked region losses and a progressive positional encoding (PE) prioritize the optimization towards underfitting and complicated regions. Specifically, we voxelize and partition the object space into \emph{sign-known} and \emph{sign-uncertain} regions, in which different supervisions are applied. Besides, we adaptively adjust the sampling rate of each voxel according to the tracked reconstruction loss, so that the network can focus more on the complicated under-fitting regions. To this end, we propose our semi-signed prioritized (SSP) neural fitting, and conduct extensive experiments to demonstrate that SSP achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple datasets including the ABC subset and various challenging data. The code will be released upon the publication.
abstract_zh: 从\emph{无方向}点云重建 3D 几何可以使许多下游任务受益。最近的形状建模方法大多采用隐式神经表示来拟合有符号距离场（SDF）并通过 emph{unsigned} 监督来优化网络。然而，这些方法有时很难找到复杂物体的粗略形状，特别是受到“幽灵”表面（即不应该存在的假表面）的影响。为了引导网络快速拟合粗略形状，我们建议在明显位于对象之外且易于确定的区域中利用签名监督，从而形成半签名监督。为了更好地恢复高保真细节，基于跟踪区域损失和渐进位置编码（PE）的新颖重要性采样优先考虑对欠拟合和复杂区域的优化。具体来说，我们将对象空间体素化并划分为 \emph{sign-known} 和 \emph{sign-uncertain} 区域，在其中应用不同的监督。此外，我们根据跟踪的重建损失自适应地调整每个体素的采样率，使网络能够更多地关注复杂的欠拟合区域。为此，我们提出了半签名优先（SSP）神经拟合，并进行了大量的实验来证明 SSP 在包括 ABC 子集和各种具有挑战性的数据在内的多个数据集上实现了最先进的性能。该代码将在发布后发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半符号优先神经拟合方法，用于从无方向点云中进行表面重建。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理复杂物体时易产生虚假表面（ghost surfaces），且难以快速拟合粗略形状，因此需引入符号监督以提升重建质量。
AI.method: 将物体空间划分为符号已知与未知区域，结合符号监督与优先采样策略，并采用渐进式位置编码优化网络，聚焦复杂欠拟合区域。
AI.result: 在ABC子集及多种挑战性数据集上达到最先进性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 半符号优先神经拟合通过区域划分与优化策略，显著提升了无方向点云表面重建的精度与鲁棒性。

authors_text: Michal Balazia,Katerina Hlavackova-Schindler,Petr Sojka,Claudia Plant
title: Interpretable Gait Recognition by Granger Causality
title_zh: 通过格兰杰因果关系进行可解释的步态识别
comment: Preprint. Full paper accepted at the IEEE/IAPR International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR), Montreal, Canada, August 2022. 7 pages
comments: Preprint. Full paper accepted at the IEEE/IAPR International Conference on Pattern Recognition (ICPR), Montreal, Canada, August 2022. 7 pages
abstract: Which joint interactions in the human gait cycle can be used as biometric characteristics? Most current methods on gait recognition suffer from the lack of interpretability. We propose an interpretable feature representation of gait sequences by the graphical Granger causal inference. Gait sequence of a person in the standardized motion capture format, constituting a set of 3D joint spatial trajectories, is envisaged as a causal system of joints interacting in time. We apply the graphical Granger model (GGM) to obtain the so-called Granger causal graph among joints as a discriminative and visually interpretable representation of a person's gait. We evaluate eleven distance functions in the GGM feature space by established classification and class-separability evaluation metrics. Our experiments indicate that, depending on the metric, the most appropriate distance functions for the GGM are the total norm distance and the Ky-Fan 1-norm distance. Experiments also show that the GGM is able to detect the most discriminative joint interactions and that it outperforms five related interpretable models in correct classification rate and in Davies-Bouldin index. The proposed GGM model can serve as a complementary tool for gait analysis in kinesiology or for gait recognition in video surveillance.
summary: Which joint interactions in the human gait cycle can be used as biometric characteristics? Most current methods on gait recognition suffer from the lack of interpretability. We propose an interpretable feature representation of gait sequences by the graphical Granger causal inference. Gait sequence of a person in the standardized motion capture format, constituting a set of 3D joint spatial trajectories, is envisaged as a causal system of joints interacting in time. We apply the graphical Granger model (GGM) to obtain the so-called Granger causal graph among joints as a discriminative and visually interpretable representation of a person's gait. We evaluate eleven distance functions in the GGM feature space by established classification and class-separability evaluation metrics. Our experiments indicate that, depending on the metric, the most appropriate distance functions for the GGM are the total norm distance and the Ky-Fan 1-norm distance. Experiments also show that the GGM is able to detect the most discriminative joint interactions and that it outperforms five related interpretable models in correct classification rate and in Davies-Bouldin index. The proposed GGM model can serve as a complementary tool for gait analysis in kinesiology or for gait recognition in video surveillance.
abstract_zh: 人类步态周期中的哪些关节相互作用可以用作生物识别特征？目前大多数步态识别方法都缺乏可解释性。我们通过图形格兰杰因果推理提出了步态序列的可解释特征表示。标准化动作捕捉格式中的人的步态序列构成一组 3D 关节空间轨迹，被设想为关节及时交互的因果系统。我们应用图形格兰杰模型（GGM）来获得关节之间所谓的格兰杰因果图，作为人步态的判别性和视觉可解释的表示。我们通过建立的分类和类可分离性评估指标来评估 GGM 特征空间中的 11 个距离函数。我们的实验表明，根据度量，GGM 最合适的距离函数是总范数距离和 Ky-Fan 1-范数距离。实验还表明，GGM 能够检测最具辨别力的关节相互作用，并且在正确分类率和 Davies-Bouldin 指数方面优于五个相关的可解释模型。所提出的 GGM 模型可以作为运动机能学步态分析或视频监控中步态识别的补充工具。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于格兰杰因果关系的可解释步态识别方法，通过构建关节间因果图实现步态特征的可视化与判别性表示。
AI.motivation: 现有步态识别方法缺乏可解释性，难以明确区分关键关节交互特征，需开发兼具判别力与可视化解释能力的模型。
AI.method: 将标准化运动捕捉数据中的3D关节轨迹建模为因果系统，应用图式格兰杰模型（GGM）提取关节间因果关系图，并评估十一类距离函数在GGM特征空间中的表现。
AI.result: 实验表明总范数距离与Ky-Fan 1-范数距离在GGM中效果最佳，且GGM在分类准确率和Davies-Bouldin指数上优于五种相关可解释模型。
AI.conclusion: GGM模型可作为运动学分析或视频监控中步态识别的有效补充工具，为步态特征提供了可解释的因果表征框架。

authors_text: Julien Hautot,Céline Teuliere,Nourddine Azzaoui
title: Visual Radial Basis Q-Network
title_zh: 视觉径向基 Q 网络
comment: This paper has been accepted for publication at the 3rd International Conference on Pattern Recognition and Artificial Intelligence, ICPRAI 2022. \c{opyright}Springer Nature 2022
comments: This paper has been accepted for publication at the 3rd International Conference on Pattern Recognition and Artificial Intelligence, ICPRAI 2022. \c{opyright}Springer Nature 2022
abstract: While reinforcement learning (RL) from raw images has been largely investigated in the last decade, existing approaches still suffer from a number of constraints. The high input dimension is often handled using either expert knowledge to extract handcrafted features or environment encoding through convolutional networks. Both solutions require numerous parameters to be optimized. In contrast, we propose a generic method to extract sparse features from raw images with few trainable parameters. We achieved this using a Radial Basis Function Network (RBFN) directly on raw image. We evaluate the performance of the proposed approach for visual extraction in Q-learning tasks in the Vizdoom environment. Then, we compare our results with two Deep Q-Network, one trained directly on images and another one trained on feature extracted by a pretrained auto-encoder. We show that the proposed approach provides similar or, in some cases, even better performances with fewer trainable parameters while being conceptually simpler.
summary: While reinforcement learning (RL) from raw images has been largely investigated in the last decade, existing approaches still suffer from a number of constraints. The high input dimension is often handled using either expert knowledge to extract handcrafted features or environment encoding through convolutional networks. Both solutions require numerous parameters to be optimized. In contrast, we propose a generic method to extract sparse features from raw images with few trainable parameters. We achieved this using a Radial Basis Function Network (RBFN) directly on raw image. We evaluate the performance of the proposed approach for visual extraction in Q-learning tasks in the Vizdoom environment. Then, we compare our results with two Deep Q-Network, one trained directly on images and another one trained on feature extracted by a pretrained auto-encoder. We show that the proposed approach provides similar or, in some cases, even better performances with fewer trainable parameters while being conceptually simpler.
abstract_zh: 虽然在过去十年中对原始图像的强化学习（RL）进行了广泛的研究，但现有的方法仍然受到许多限制。高输入维度通常使用专业知识来提取手工特征或通过卷积网络进行环境编码来处理。两种解决方案都需要优化大量参数。相比之下，我们提出了一种通用方法，可以从具有很少可训练参数的原始图像中提取稀疏特征。我们直接在原始图像上使用径向基函数网络 (RBFN) 来实现这一目标。我们评估了 Vizdoom 环境中 Q 学习任务中所提出的视觉提取方法的性能。然后，我们将结果与两个深度 Q 网络进行比较，一个直接在图像上训练，另一个则根据预训练自动编码器提取的特征进行训练。我们表明，所提出的方法以更少的可训练参数提供了类似的甚至在某些情况下甚至更好的性能，同时在概念上更简单。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于径向基函数网络（RBFN）的视觉Q网络方法，用于在强化学习中从原始图像中提取稀疏特征。
AI.motivation: 现有方法处理高维图像输入时依赖手工特征或卷积网络，需优化大量参数，而本文旨在提供一种参数更少且概念更简单的替代方案。
AI.method: 直接在原始图像上应用径向基函数网络（RBFN）提取稀疏特征，并在Vizdoom环境中评估其在Q学习任务中的性能。
AI.result: 在Vizdoom环境中，该方法在参数数量更少的情况下，表现与深度Q网络相当或更优。
AI.conclusion: 提出的RBFN方法在保持性能的同时显著减少参数量，为视觉强化学习提供了更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Huafeng Hu,Ruijie Ye,Jeyarajan Thiyagalingam,Frans Coenen,Jionglong Su
title: CNN-based Classification Framework for Lung Tissues with Auxiliary Information
title_zh: 基于 CNN 的带有辅助信息的肺组织分类框架
abstract: Interstitial lung diseases are a large group of heterogeneous diseases characterized by different degrees of alveolitis and pulmonary fibrosis. Accurately diagnosing these diseases has significant guiding value for formulating treatment plans. Although previous work has produced impressive results in classifying interstitial lung diseases, there is still room for improving the accuracy of these techniques, mainly to enhance automated decision-making. In order to improve the classification precision, our study proposes a convolutional neural networks-based framework with auxiliary information. Firstly, ILD images are added with their medical information by re-scaling the original image in Hounsfield Units. Secondly, a modified CNN model is used to produce a vector of classification probability for each tissue. Thirdly, location information of the input image, consisting of the occurrence frequencies of different diseases in the CT scans on certain locations, is used to calculate a location weight vector. Finally, the Hadamard product between two vectors is used to produce a decision vector for the prediction. Compared to the state-of-the-art methods, the results using a publicly available ILD database show the potential of predicting these using different auxiliary information.
summary: Interstitial lung diseases are a large group of heterogeneous diseases characterized by different degrees of alveolitis and pulmonary fibrosis. Accurately diagnosing these diseases has significant guiding value for formulating treatment plans. Although previous work has produced impressive results in classifying interstitial lung diseases, there is still room for improving the accuracy of these techniques, mainly to enhance automated decision-making. In order to improve the classification precision, our study proposes a convolutional neural networks-based framework with auxiliary information. Firstly, ILD images are added with their medical information by re-scaling the original image in Hounsfield Units. Secondly, a modified CNN model is used to produce a vector of classification probability for each tissue. Thirdly, location information of the input image, consisting of the occurrence frequencies of different diseases in the CT scans on certain locations, is used to calculate a location weight vector. Finally, the Hadamard product between two vectors is used to produce a decision vector for the prediction. Compared to the state-of-the-art methods, the results using a publicly available ILD database show the potential of predicting these using different auxiliary information.
abstract_zh: 间质性肺疾病是一大类以不同程度的肺泡炎和肺纤维化为特征的异质性疾病。准确诊断这些疾病对于制定治疗方案具有重要的指导价值。尽管之前的工作在间质性肺疾病分类方面取得了令人印象深刻的成果，但这些技术的准确性仍有提高的空间，主要是增强自动化决策。为了提高分类精度，我们的研究提出了一种带有辅助信息的基于卷积神经网络的框架。首先，通过以亨斯菲尔德单位重新缩放原始图像，将 ILD 图像添加其医学信息。其次，使用改进的 CNN 模型生成每个组织的分类概率向量。第三，利用输入图像的位置信息，包括特定位置的CT扫描中不同疾病的出现频率，来计算位置权重向量。最后，两个向量之间的哈达玛积用于生成用于预测的决策向量。与最先进的方法相比，使用公开的 ILD 数据库的结果显示了使用不同辅助信息进行预测的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络（CNN）并结合辅助信息的肺组织分类框架，旨在提高间质性肺疾病（ILD）的分类精度。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有方法在ILD分类上取得进展，但自动化决策的准确性仍有提升空间，需通过整合医学信息和位置数据进一步优化模型性能。
AI.method: 首先将ILD图像按霍斯菲尔德单位（HU）重新缩放以融合医学信息；其次使用改进的CNN生成组织分类概率向量；再结合CT扫描中疾病位置的频率信息计算位置权重向量；最终通过哈达玛积融合两向量生成决策向量。
AI.result: 在公开的ILD数据库上实验表明，该方法相比现有技术具有更高的分类准确率，验证了辅助信息的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 整合医学信息与位置辅助数据可显著提升CNN分类性能，为自动化ILD诊断提供新思路。

authors_text: Moritz Roman Hernandez Petzsche,Ezequiel de la Rosa,Uta Hanning,Roland Wiest,Waldo Enrique Valenzuela Pinilla,Mauricio Reyes,Maria Ines Meyer,Sook-Lei Liew,Florian Kofler,Ivan Ezhov,David Robben,Alexander Hutton,Tassilo Friedrich,Teresa Zarth,Johannes Bürkle,The Anh Baran,Bjoern Menze,Gabriel Broocks,Lukas Meyer,Claus Zimmer,Tobias Boeckh-Behrens,Maria Berndt,Benno Ikenberg,Benedikt Wiestler,Jan S. Kirschke
title: ISLES 2022: A multi-center magnetic resonance imaging stroke lesion segmentation dataset
title_zh: ISLES 2022：多中心磁共振成像中风病变分割数据集
abstract: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is a central modality for stroke imaging. It is used upon patient admission to make treatment decisions such as selecting patients for intravenous thrombolysis or endovascular therapy. MRI is later used in the duration of hospital stay to predict outcome by visualizing infarct core size and location. Furthermore, it may be used to characterize stroke etiology, e.g. differentiation between (cardio)-embolic and non-embolic stroke. Computer based automated medical image processing is increasingly finding its way into clinical routine. Previous iterations of the Ischemic Stroke Lesion Segmentation (ISLES) challenge have aided in the generation of identifying benchmark methods for acute and sub-acute ischemic stroke lesion segmentation. Here we introduce an expert-annotated, multicenter MRI dataset for segmentation of acute to subacute stroke lesions. This dataset comprises 400 multi-vendor MRI cases with high variability in stroke lesion size, quantity and location. It is split into a training dataset of n=250 and a test dataset of n=150. All training data will be made publicly available. The test dataset will be used for model validation only and will not be released to the public. This dataset serves as the foundation of the ISLES 2022 challenge with the goal of finding algorithmic methods to enable the development and benchmarking of robust and accurate segmentation algorithms for ischemic stroke.
summary: Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is a central modality for stroke imaging. It is used upon patient admission to make treatment decisions such as selecting patients for intravenous thrombolysis or endovascular therapy. MRI is later used in the duration of hospital stay to predict outcome by visualizing infarct core size and location. Furthermore, it may be used to characterize stroke etiology, e.g. differentiation between (cardio)-embolic and non-embolic stroke. Computer based automated medical image processing is increasingly finding its way into clinical routine. Previous iterations of the Ischemic Stroke Lesion Segmentation (ISLES) challenge have aided in the generation of identifying benchmark methods for acute and sub-acute ischemic stroke lesion segmentation. Here we introduce an expert-annotated, multicenter MRI dataset for segmentation of acute to subacute stroke lesions. This dataset comprises 400 multi-vendor MRI cases with high variability in stroke lesion size, quantity and location. It is split into a training dataset of n=250 and a test dataset of n=150. All training data will be made publicly available. The test dataset will be used for model validation only and will not be released to the public. This dataset serves as the foundation of the ISLES 2022 challenge with the goal of finding algorithmic methods to enable the development and benchmarking of robust and accurate segmentation algorithms for ischemic stroke.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像 (MRI) 是中风成像的主要方式。它用于在患者入院时做出治疗决策，例如选择患者进行静脉溶栓或血管内治疗。随后在住院期间使用 MRI 通过可视化梗塞核心大小和位置来预测结果。此外，它可用于表征中风病因，例如中风。 （心脏）栓塞性卒中和非栓塞性卒中的区别。基于计算机的自动化医学图像处理越来越多地进入临床常规。缺血性中风病灶分割 (ISLES) 挑战的先前迭代有助于生成急性和亚急性缺血性中风病灶分割的基准方法。在这里，我们介绍一个专家注释的多中心 MRI 数据集，用于分割急性至亚急性中风病变。该数据集包含 400 个多供应商 MRI 病例，中风病变的大小、数量和位置存在很大差异。它被分成 n=250 的训练数据集和 n=150 的测试数据集。所有训练数据将公开。测试数据集仅用于模型验证，不会向公众发布。该数据集是 ISLES 2022 挑战赛的基础，其目标是寻找算法方法来开发稳健且准确的缺血性中风分割算法并对其进行基准测试。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个多中心MRI中风病变分割数据集ISLES 2022，包含400例多厂商MRI病例，用于开发和评估缺血性中风分割算法。
AI.motivation: MRI在中风诊疗中至关重要，但缺乏标准化数据集限制了自动分割算法的发展。现有ISLES挑战赛需更新数据以反映临床多样性并推动算法进步。
AI.method: 收集多中心400例急性至亚急性中风MRI病例，经专家标注后分为250例训练集和150例测试集，训练数据公开，测试数据仅用于模型验证。
AI.result: 构建了包含病变大小、数量和位置高度多样化的数据集，为ISLES 2022挑战赛提供基准数据，促进分割算法的开发与比较。
AI.conclusion: 该数据集为中风影像分析算法研究提供重要资源，通过挑战赛可推动更鲁棒准确的分割方法发展，助力临床决策支持系统构建。

ai_content.tldr: 本文介绍了一个多中心MRI中风病变分割数据集ISLES 2022，包含400例多厂商MRI病例，用于开发和评估缺血性中风分割算法。
ai_content.motivation: MRI在中风诊疗中至关重要，但缺乏标准化数据集限制了自动分割算法的发展。现有ISLES挑战赛需更新数据以反映临床多样性并推动算法进步。
ai_content.method: 收集多中心400例急性至亚急性中风MRI病例，经专家标注后分为250例训练集和150例测试集，训练数据公开，测试数据仅用于模型验证。
ai_content.result: 构建了包含病变大小、数量和位置高度多样化的数据集，为ISLES 2022挑战赛提供基准数据，促进分割算法的开发与比较。
ai_content.conclusion: 该数据集为中风影像分析算法研究提供重要资源，通过挑战赛可推动更鲁棒准确的分割方法发展，助力临床决策支持系统构建。

search_text: ISLES 2022: A multi-center magnetic resonance imaging stroke lesion segmentation dataset ISLES 2022：多中心磁共振成像中风病变分割数据集 Magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) is a central modality for stroke imaging. It is used upon patient admission to make treatment decisions such as selecting patients for intravenous thrombolysis or endovascular therapy. MRI is later used in the duration of hospital stay to predict outcome by visualizing infarct core size and location. Furthermore, it may be used to characterize stroke etiology, e.g. differentiation between (cardio)-embolic and non-embolic stroke. Computer based automated medical image processing is increasingly finding its way into clinical routine. Previous iterations of the Ischemic Stroke Lesion Segmentation (ISLES) challenge have aided in the generation of identifying benchmark methods for acute and sub-acute ischemic stroke lesion segmentation. Here we introduce an expert-annotated, multicenter MRI dataset for segmentation of acute to subacute stroke lesions. This dataset comprises 400 multi-vendor MRI cases with high variability in stroke lesion size, quantity and location. It is split into a training dataset of n=250 and a test dataset of n=150. All training data will be made publicly available. The test dataset will be used for model validation only and will not be released to the public. This dataset serves as the foundation of the ISLES 2022 challenge with the goal of finding algorithmic methods to enable the development and benchmarking of robust and accurate segmentation algorithms for ischemic stroke. 磁共振成像 (MRI) 是中风成像的主要方式。它用于在患者入院时做出治疗决策，例如选择患者进行静脉溶栓或血管内治疗。随后在住院期间使用 MRI 通过可视化梗塞核心大小和位置来预测结果。此外，它可用于表征中风病因，例如中风。 （心脏）栓塞性卒中和非栓塞性卒中的区别。基于计算机的自动化医学图像处理越来越多地进入临床常规。缺血性中风病灶分割 (ISLES) 挑战的先前迭代有助于生成急性和亚急性缺血性中风病灶分割的基准方法。在这里，我们介绍一个专家注释的多中心 MRI 数据集，用于分割急性至亚急性中风病变。该数据集包含 400 个多供应商 MRI 病例，中风病变的大小、数量和位置存在很大差异。它被分成 n=250 的训练数据集和 n=150 的测试数据集。所有训练数据将公开。测试数据集仅用于模型验证，不会向公众发布。该数据集是 ISLES 2022 挑战赛的基础，其目标是寻找算法方法来开发稳健且准确的缺血性中风分割算法并对其进行基准测试。 本文介绍了一个多中心MRI中风病变分割数据集ISLES 2022，包含400例多厂商MRI病例，用于开发和评估缺血性中风分割算法。 Moritz Roman Hernandez Petzsche,Ezequiel de la Rosa,Uta Hanning,Roland Wiest,Waldo Enrique Valenzuela Pinilla,Mauricio Reyes,Maria Ines Meyer,Sook-Lei Liew,Florian Kofler,Ivan Ezhov,David Robben,Alexander Hutton,Tassilo Friedrich,Teresa Zarth,Johannes Bürkle,The Anh Baran,Bjoern Menze,Gabriel Broocks,Lukas Meyer,Claus Zimmer,Tobias Boeckh-Behrens,Maria Berndt,Benno Ikenberg,Benedikt Wiestler,Jan S. authors_text: Rūta Binkytė-Sadauskienė,Karima Makhlouf,Carlos Pinzón,Sami Zhioua,Catuscia Palamidessi
title: Causal Discovery for Fairness
title_zh: 公平的因果发现
abstract: It is crucial to consider the social and ethical consequences of AI and ML based decisions for the safe and acceptable use of these emerging technologies. Fairness, in particular, guarantees that the ML decisions do not result in discrimination against individuals or minorities. Identifying and measuring reliably fairness/discrimination is better achieved using causality which considers the causal relation, beyond mere association, between the sensitive attribute (e.g. gender, race, religion, etc.) and the decision (e.g. job hiring, loan granting, etc.). The big impediment to the use of causality to address fairness, however, is the unavailability of the causal model (typically represented as a causal graph). Existing causal approaches to fairness in the literature do not address this problem and assume that the causal model is available. In this paper, we do not make such assumption and we review the major algorithms to discover causal relations from observable data. This study focuses on causal discovery and its impact on fairness. In particular, we show how different causal discovery approaches may result in different causal models and, most importantly, how even slight differences between causal models can have significant impact on fairness/discrimination conclusions. These results are consolidated by empirical analysis using synthetic and standard fairness benchmark datasets. The main goal of this study is to highlight the importance of the causal discovery step to appropriately address fairness using causality.
summary: It is crucial to consider the social and ethical consequences of AI and ML based decisions for the safe and acceptable use of these emerging technologies. Fairness, in particular, guarantees that the ML decisions do not result in discrimination against individuals or minorities. Identifying and measuring reliably fairness/discrimination is better achieved using causality which considers the causal relation, beyond mere association, between the sensitive attribute (e.g. gender, race, religion, etc.) and the decision (e.g. job hiring, loan granting, etc.). The big impediment to the use of causality to address fairness, however, is the unavailability of the causal model (typically represented as a causal graph). Existing causal approaches to fairness in the literature do not address this problem and assume that the causal model is available. In this paper, we do not make such assumption and we review the major algorithms to discover causal relations from observable data. This study focuses on causal discovery and its impact on fairness. In particular, we show how different causal discovery approaches may result in different causal models and, most importantly, how even slight differences between causal models can have significant impact on fairness/discrimination conclusions. These results are consolidated by empirical analysis using synthetic and standard fairness benchmark datasets. The main goal of this study is to highlight the importance of the causal discovery step to appropriately address fairness using causality.
abstract_zh: 为了安全和可接受地使用这些新兴技术，考虑基于人工智能和机器学习的决策的社会和道德后果至关重要。尤其是公平性，可以保证机器学习的决定不会导致对个人或少数群体的歧视。使用因果关系可以更好地识别和衡量可靠的公平/歧视，因果关系考虑敏感属性（例如性别、种族、宗教等）与决策（例如工作招聘、贷款发放等）之间的因果关系，而不仅仅是关联。然而，使用因果关系来解决公平问题的最大障碍是因果模型（通常表示为因果图）的不可用。文献中现有的公平因果方法没有解决这个问题，并且假设因果模型是可用的。在本文中，我们不做出这样的假设，而是回顾了从可观察数据中发现因果关系的主要算法。这项研究的重点是因果发现及其对公平性的影响。特别是，我们展示了不同的因果发现方法如何可能导致不同的因果模型，最重要的是，因果模型之间即使是微小的差异也会对公平/歧视结论产生重大影响。这些结果通过使用综合和标准公平性基准数据集的实证分析得到了巩固。这项研究的主要目标是强调因果发现步骤的重要性，以利用因果关系适当地解决公平问题。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在探讨因果发现对公平性评估的重要性，提出无需预设因果模型即可通过可观测数据发现因果关系的方法，以更准确地衡量AI决策中的公平性。
AI.motivation: 现有公平性研究依赖预设的因果模型，但实际中因果模型往往不可知。为解决这一问题，需探索如何从数据中发现因果关系，从而更可靠地评估算法公平性。
AI.method: 综述主流因果发现算法，分析其在合成数据和标准公平性基准数据集上的表现，比较不同因果模型对公平性结论的影响。
AI.result: 不同因果发现方法生成的模型存在细微差异，这些差异显著影响公平性判断结果，验证了因果发现步骤对公平性分析的关键作用。
AI.conclusion: 因果发现是确保AI公平性的核心环节，需重视其准确性，未来研究应进一步优化因果发现算法以提升公平性评估的可靠性。

authors_text: Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Meishu Song,Zijiang Yang,Xin Jing,Björn W. Schuller
title: Exploring speaker enrolment for few-shot personalisation in emotional vocalisation prediction
title_zh: 探索说话者登记以实现情绪发声预测中的少量个性化
comment: Proceedings of the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Workshop and Competition held in conjunction with the $\mathit{39}^{th}$ International Conference on Machine Learning, Copyright 2022 by the author(s)
comments: Proceedings of the ICML Expressive Vocalizations Workshop and Competition held in conjunction with the $\mathit{39}^{th}$ International Conference on Machine Learning, Copyright 2022 by the author(s)
abstract: In this work, we explore a novel few-shot personalisation architecture for emotional vocalisation prediction. The core contribution is an `enrolment' encoder which utilises two unlabelled samples of the target speaker to adjust the output of the emotion encoder; the adjustment is based on dot-product attention, thus effectively functioning as a form of `soft' feature selection. The emotion and enrolment encoders are based on two standard audio architectures: CNN14 and CNN10. The two encoders are further guided to forget or learn auxiliary emotion and/or speaker information. Our best approach achieves a CCC of $.650$ on the ExVo Few-Shot dev set, a $2.5\%$ increase over our baseline CNN14 CCC of $.634$.
summary: In this work, we explore a novel few-shot personalisation architecture for emotional vocalisation prediction. The core contribution is an `enrolment' encoder which utilises two unlabelled samples of the target speaker to adjust the output of the emotion encoder; the adjustment is based on dot-product attention, thus effectively functioning as a form of `soft' feature selection. The emotion and enrolment encoders are based on two standard audio architectures: CNN14 and CNN10. The two encoders are further guided to forget or learn auxiliary emotion and/or speaker information. Our best approach achieves a CCC of $.650$ on the ExVo Few-Shot dev set, a $2.5\%$ increase over our baseline CNN14 CCC of $.634$.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们探索了一种用于情绪发声预测的新颖的少镜头个性化架构。核心贡献是“注册”编码器，它利用目标说话者的两个未标记样本来调整情感编码器的输出；该调整基于点积注意力，因此有效地充当“软”特征选择的一种形式。情感和注册编码器基于两种标准音频架构：CNN14 和 CNN10。进一步引导两个编码器忘记或学习辅助情绪和/或说话者信息。我们的最佳方法在 ExVo Few-Shot 开发集上实现了 0.650 美元的 CCC，比我们的基线 CNN14 CCC 0.634 美元增加了 2.5\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于说话人注册的少样本个性化架构，用于情感语音预测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有情感语音预测模型在少样本场景下难以有效适配新说话人，需探索更高效的个性化方法。
AI.method: 设计注册编码器利用两个未标记目标说话人样本，通过点积注意力机制调整情感编码器输出，结合CNN14/CNN10架构并控制辅助信息学习。
AI.result: 在ExVo Few-Shot开发集上达到CCC 0.650，较基线CNN14模型提升2.5%。
AI.conclusion: 注册编码器与软特征选择机制有效提升了少样本场景下的情感语音预测性能。

search_text: Exploring speaker enrolment for few-shot personalisation in emotional vocalisation prediction 探索说话者登记以实现情绪发声预测中的少量个性化 In this work, we explore a novel few-shot personalisation architecture for emotional vocalisation prediction. The core contribution is an `enrolment' encoder which utilises two unlabelled samples of the target speaker to adjust the output of the emotion encoder; the adjustment is based on dot-product attention, thus effectively functioning as a form of `soft' feature selection. The emotion and enrolment encoders are based on two standard audio architectures: CNN14 and CNN10. The two encoders are further guided to forget or learn auxiliary emotion and/or speaker information. Our best approach achieves a CCC of $.650$ on the ExVo Few-Shot dev set, a $2.5\%$ increase over our baseline CNN14 CCC of $.634$. 在这项工作中，我们探索了一种用于情绪发声预测的新颖的少镜头个性化架构。核心贡献是“注册”编码器，它利用目标说话者的两个未标记样本来调整情感编码器的输出；该调整基于点积注意力，因此有效地充当“软”特征选择的一种形式。情感和注册编码器基于两种标准音频架构：CNN14 和 CNN10。进一步引导两个编码器忘记或学习辅助情绪和/或说话者信息。我们的最佳方法在 ExVo Few-Shot 开发集上实现了 0.650 美元的 CCC，比我们的基线 CNN14 CCC 0.634 美元增加了 2.5\%$。 本文提出一种基于说话人注册的少样本个性化架构，用于情感语音预测任务。 Andreas Triantafyllopoulos,Meishu Song,Zijiang Yang,Xin Jing,Björn W. Schuller cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: Kazuya Horibe,Kathryn Walker,Rasmus Berg Palm,Shyam Sudhakaran,Sebastian Risi
title: Severe Damage Recovery in Evolving Soft Robots through Differentiable Programming
title_zh: 通过可微分编程进化软机器人的严重损伤恢复
comment: Genetic Programming and Evolvable Machines (GENP). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2102.02579
comments: Genetic Programming and Evolvable Machines (GENP). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2102.02579
abstract: Biological systems are very robust to morphological damage, but artificial systems (robots) are currently not. In this paper we present a system based on neural cellular automata, in which locomoting robots are evolved and then given the ability to regenerate their morphology from damage through gradient-based training. Our approach thus combines the benefits of evolution to discover a wide range of different robot morphologies, with the efficiency of supervised training for robustness through differentiable update rules. The resulting neural cellular automata are able to grow virtual robots capable of regaining more than 80\% of their functionality, even after severe types of morphological damage.
summary: Biological systems are very robust to morphological damage, but artificial systems (robots) are currently not. In this paper we present a system based on neural cellular automata, in which locomoting robots are evolved and then given the ability to regenerate their morphology from damage through gradient-based training. Our approach thus combines the benefits of evolution to discover a wide range of different robot morphologies, with the efficiency of supervised training for robustness through differentiable update rules. The resulting neural cellular automata are able to grow virtual robots capable of regaining more than 80\% of their functionality, even after severe types of morphological damage.
abstract_zh: 生物系统对形态损伤非常稳健，但人工系统（机器人）目前还不行。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于神经元胞自动机的系统，其中运动机器人得到进化，然后通过基于梯度的训练赋予其从损伤中再生形态的能力。因此，我们的方法结合了进化的好处，以发现各种不同的机器人形态，并通过可微更新规则进行监督训练以提高鲁棒性。由此产生的神经细胞自动机能够培育出能够恢复 80% 以上功能的虚拟机器人，即使在严重的形态损伤之后也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合神经细胞自动机与梯度训练的方法，使进化得到的软机器人能够从严重形态损伤中恢复超过80%的功能。
AI.motivation: 生物体具有形态损伤恢复能力而人工机器人缺乏此特性，需开发新型方法提升机器人鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于神经细胞自动机框架，通过进化算法生成多样机器人形态，并利用梯度下降训练实现损伤后的形态再生。
AI.result: 虚拟机器人可在遭受严重形态损伤后恢复超过80%的原始功能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功融合进化搜索与可微编程优势，为损伤自修复机器人提供了新思路，未来可拓展至物理机器人实现。

authors_text: Yi Li,Yiduo Yu,Yiwen Zou,Tianqi Xiang,Xiaomeng Li
title: Online Easy Example Mining for Weakly-supervised Gland Segmentation from Histology Images
title_zh: 从组织学图像中弱监督腺体分割的在线简单示例挖掘
abstract: Developing an AI-assisted gland segmentation method from histology images is critical for automatic cancer diagnosis and prognosis; however, the high cost of pixel-level annotations hinders its applications to broader diseases. Existing weakly-supervised semantic segmentation methods in computer vision achieve degenerative results for gland segmentation, since the characteristics and problems of glandular datasets are different from general object datasets. We observe that, unlike natural images, the key problem with histology images is the confusion of classes owning to morphological homogeneity and low color contrast among different tissues. To this end, we propose a novel method Online Easy Example Mining (OEEM) that encourages the network to focus on credible supervision signals rather than noisy signals, therefore mitigating the influence of inevitable false predictions in pseudo-masks. According to the characteristics of glandular datasets, we design a strong framework for gland segmentation. Our results exceed many fully-supervised methods and weakly-supervised methods for gland segmentation over 4.4% and 6.04% at mIoU, respectively. Code is available at https://github.com/xmed-lab/OEEM.
summary: Developing an AI-assisted gland segmentation method from histology images is critical for automatic cancer diagnosis and prognosis; however, the high cost of pixel-level annotations hinders its applications to broader diseases. Existing weakly-supervised semantic segmentation methods in computer vision achieve degenerative results for gland segmentation, since the characteristics and problems of glandular datasets are different from general object datasets. We observe that, unlike natural images, the key problem with histology images is the confusion of classes owning to morphological homogeneity and low color contrast among different tissues. To this end, we propose a novel method Online Easy Example Mining (OEEM) that encourages the network to focus on credible supervision signals rather than noisy signals, therefore mitigating the influence of inevitable false predictions in pseudo-masks. According to the characteristics of glandular datasets, we design a strong framework for gland segmentation. Our results exceed many fully-supervised methods and weakly-supervised methods for gland segmentation over 4.4% and 6.04% at mIoU, respectively. Code is available at https://github.com/xmed-lab/OEEM.
abstract_zh: 开发一种人工智能辅助的组织学图像腺体分割方法对于自动癌症诊断和预后至关重要；然而，像素级注释的高昂成本阻碍了其在更广泛的疾病中的应用。由于腺体数据集的特征和问题与一般对象数据集不同，计算机视觉中现有的弱监督语义分割方法在腺体分割方面取得了退化结果。我们观察到，与自然图像不同，组织学图像的关键问题是由于不同组织之间的形态同质性和低颜色对比度而导致类别混乱。为此，我们提出了一种新颖的在线简单示例挖掘（OEEM）方法，鼓励网络关注可信的监督信号而不是噪声信号，从而减轻伪掩模中不可避免的错误预测的影响。根据腺体数据集的特点，我们设计了一个强大的腺体分割框架。我们的结果超过了许多完全监督的方法和弱监督的腺体分割方法，在 mIoU 上分别超过 4.4% 和 6.04%。代码可在 https://github.com/xmed-lab/OEEM 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为在线易例挖掘（OEEM）的新方法，用于解决弱监督条件下组织学图像中腺体分割的挑战。
AI.motivation: 由于腺体数据集的形态同质性和颜色对比度低，现有弱监督分割方法在腺体分割任务中表现不佳，且像素级标注成本高昂。
AI.method: 设计OEEM方法通过筛选可信监督信号减少伪标签中的噪声影响，并构建针对腺体数据集特点的强分割框架。
AI.result: 在mIoU指标上，该方法分别超越全监督和弱监督方法4.4%和6.04%，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: OEEM有效缓解了弱监督腺体分割中的噪声干扰问题，为低成本高质量分割提供了新思路。

authors_text: Lambert T. Leong,Michael C. Wong,Yannik Glaser,Thomas Wolfgruber,Steven B. Heymsfield,Peter Sadowski,John A. Shepherd
title: Quantitative Imaging Principles Improves Medical Image Learning
title_zh: 定量成像原理改善医学图像学习
abstract: Fundamental differences between natural and medical images have recently favored the use of self-supervised learning (SSL) over ImageNet transfer learning for medical image applications. Differences between image types are primarily due to the imaging modality and medical images utilize a wide range of physics based techniques while natural images are captured using only visible light. While many have demonstrated that SSL on medical images has resulted in better downstream task performance, our work suggests that more performance can be gained. The scientific principles which are used to acquire medical images are not often considered when constructing learning problems. For this reason, we propose incorporating quantitative imaging principles during generative SSL to improve image quality and quantitative biological accuracy. We show that this training schema results in better starting states for downstream supervised training on limited data. Our model also generates images that validate on clinical quantitative analysis software.
summary: Fundamental differences between natural and medical images have recently favored the use of self-supervised learning (SSL) over ImageNet transfer learning for medical image applications. Differences between image types are primarily due to the imaging modality and medical images utilize a wide range of physics based techniques while natural images are captured using only visible light. While many have demonstrated that SSL on medical images has resulted in better downstream task performance, our work suggests that more performance can be gained. The scientific principles which are used to acquire medical images are not often considered when constructing learning problems. For this reason, we propose incorporating quantitative imaging principles during generative SSL to improve image quality and quantitative biological accuracy. We show that this training schema results in better starting states for downstream supervised training on limited data. Our model also generates images that validate on clinical quantitative analysis software.
abstract_zh: 由于自然图像和医学图像之间的根本差异，最近有利于在医学图像应用中使用自监督学习 (SSL)，而不是 ImageNet 迁移学习。图像类型之间的差异主要是由于成像方式造成的，医学图像利用各种基于物理的技术，而自然图像仅使用可见光捕获。虽然许多人已经证明医学图像上的 SSL 可以带来更好的下游任务性能，但我们的工作表明可以获得更多性能。在构建学习问题时，通常不考虑用于获取医学图像的科学原理。因此，我们建议在生成 SSL 过程中结合定量成像原理，以提高图像质量和定量生物学准确性。我们表明，这种训练模式可以为有限数据的下游监督训练带来更好的起始状态。我们的模型还生成在临床定量分析软件上验证的图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出将定量成像原理融入生成式自监督学习，以提升医学图像学习的性能和生物定量准确性。
AI.motivation: 医学图像与自然图像在成像物理特性上存在显著差异，传统自监督学习未充分利用医学成像的物理原理，限制了性能提升空间。
AI.method: 在生成式自监督学习框架中引入定量成像物理原理，通过约束图像生成过程提升生物定量特征的准确性。
AI.result: 该方法在有限数据下获得更优的下游任务训练起点，生成图像可被临床定量分析软件有效验证。
AI.conclusion: 结合定量成像原理的自监督学习能同时提升医学图像质量与定量分析准确性，为医学AI训练提供新范式。

search_text: Quantitative Imaging Principles Improves Medical Image Learning 定量成像原理改善医学图像学习 Fundamental differences between natural and medical images have recently favored the use of self-supervised learning (SSL) over ImageNet transfer learning for medical image applications. Differences between image types are primarily due to the imaging modality and medical images utilize a wide range of physics based techniques while natural images are captured using only visible light. While many have demonstrated that SSL on medical images has resulted in better downstream task performance, our work suggests that more performance can be gained. The scientific principles which are used to acquire medical images are not often considered when constructing learning problems. For this reason, we propose incorporating quantitative imaging principles during generative SSL to improve image quality and quantitative biological accuracy. We show that this training schema results in better starting states for downstream supervised training on limited data. Our model also generates images that validate on clinical quantitative analysis software. 由于自然图像和医学图像之间的根本差异，最近有利于在医学图像应用中使用自监督学习 (SSL)，而不是 ImageNet 迁移学习。图像类型之间的差异主要是由于成像方式造成的，医学图像利用各种基于物理的技术，而自然图像仅使用可见光捕获。虽然许多人已经证明医学图像上的 SSL 可以带来更好的下游任务性能，但我们的工作表明可以获得更多性能。在构建学习问题时，通常不考虑用于获取医学图像的科学原理。因此，我们建议在生成 SSL 过程中结合定量成像原理，以提高图像质量和定量生物学准确性。我们表明，这种训练模式可以为有限数据的下游监督训练带来更好的起始状态。我们的模型还生成在临床定量分析软件上验证的图像。 本文提出将定量成像原理融入生成式自监督学习，以提升医学图像学习的性能和生物定量准确性。 Lambert T. Leong,Michael C. Wong,Yannik Glaser,Thomas Wolfgruber,Steven B. Heymsfield,Peter Sadowski,John A. Shepherd q-bio.QM,cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yuxin Zhang,Mingbao Lin,Zhihang Lin,Yiting Luo,Ke Li,Fei Chao,Yongjian Wu,Rongrong Ji
title: Learning Best Combination for Efficient N:M Sparsity
title_zh: 学习高效 N:M 稀疏性的最佳组合
comment: Accepted by 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: Accepted by 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: By forcing at most N out of M consecutive weights to be non-zero, the recent N:M network sparsity has received increasing attention for its two attractive advantages: 1) Promising performance at a high sparsity. 2) Significant speedups on NVIDIA A100 GPUs. Recent studies require an expensive pre-training phase or a heavy dense-gradient computation. In this paper, we show that the N:M learning can be naturally characterized as a combinatorial problem which searches for the best combination candidate within a finite collection. Motivated by this characteristic, we solve N:M sparsity in an efficient divide-and-conquer manner. First, we divide the weight vector into $C_{\text{M}}^{\text{N}}$ combination subsets of a fixed size N. Then, we conquer the combinatorial problem by assigning each combination a learnable score that is jointly optimized with its associate weights. We prove that the introduced scoring mechanism can well model the relative importance between combination subsets. And by gradually removing low-scored subsets, N:M fine-grained sparsity can be efficiently optimized during the normal training phase. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our learning best combination (LBC) performs consistently better than off-the-shelf N:M sparsity methods across various networks. Our project is released at \url{https://github.com/zyxxmu/LBC}.

Recent studies require an expensive pre-training phase or a heavy dense-gradient computation. We prove that the introduced scoring mechanism can well model the relative importance between combination subsets. And by gradually removing low-scored subsets, N:M fine-grained sparsity can be efficiently optimized during the normal training phase. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our learning best combination (LBC) performs consistently better than off-the-shelf N:M sparsity methods across various networks. Our project is released at \url{https://github.com/zyxxmu/LBC}.
abstract_zh: 通过强制 M 个连续权重中的至多 N 个非零，最近的 N:M 网络稀疏性因其两个有吸引力的优点而受到越来越多的关注：1）在高稀疏性下有良好的性能。 2) NVIDIA A100 GPU 显着加速。最近的研究需要昂贵的预训练阶段或大量的密集梯度计算。在本文中，我们证明 N:M 学习可以自然地描述为一个组合问题，即在有限集合中搜索最佳组合候选。受此特性的启发，我们以有效的分而治之的方式解决了 N:M 稀疏性问题。首先，我们将权重向量划分为固定大小 N 的 $C_{\text{M}}^{\text{N}}$ 组合子集。然后，我们通过为每个组合分配一个与其相关权重联合优化的可学习分数来解决组合问题。我们证明引入的评分机制可以很好地模拟组合子集之间的相对重要性。并且通过逐渐去除低分子集，可以在正常训练阶段有效优化 N:M 细粒度稀疏性。综合实验表明，我们的学习最佳组合 (LBC) 在各种网络中始终优于现成的 N:M 稀疏方法。我们的项目发布于 \url{https://github.com/zyxxmu/LBC}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效学习N:M稀疏性的方法，通过组合子集优化实现模型压缩。
AI.motivation: 现有N:M稀疏方法依赖昂贵的预训练或密集梯度计算，难以兼顾性能与效率。
AI.method: 将权重向量划分为组合子集，为每个子集分配可学习的得分并联合优化，通过逐步移除低得分子集实现细粒度稀疏性。
AI.result: 实验表明LBC方法在多种网络中均优于现有N:M稀疏技术，且无需额外预训练。
AI.conclusion: 提出的组合学习框架为高效N:M稀疏提供了新思路，代码已开源验证效果。

authors_text: Chengyu Dong,Liyuan Liu,Jingbo Shang
title: Toward Student-Oriented Teacher Network Training For Knowledge Distillation
title_zh: 面向学生的知识蒸馏教师网络培训
abstract: How to conduct teacher training for knowledge distillation is still an open problem. It has been widely observed that a best-performing teacher does not necessarily yield the best-performing student, suggesting a fundamental discrepancy between the current teacher training practice and the ideal teacher training strategy. To fill this gap, we explore the feasibility of training a teacher that is oriented toward student performance with empirical risk minimization (ERM). Our analyses are inspired by the recent findings that the effectiveness of knowledge distillation hinges on the teacher's capability to approximate the true label distribution of training inputs. We theoretically establish that the ERM minimizer can approximate the true label distribution of training data as long as the feature extractor of the learner network is Lipschitz continuous and is robust to feature transformations. In light of our theory, we propose a teacher training method SoTeacher which incorporates Lipschitz regularization and consistency regularization into ERM. Experiments on benchmark datasets using various knowledge distillation algorithms and teacher-student pairs confirm that SoTeacher can improve student accuracy consistently.
summary: How to conduct teacher training for knowledge distillation is still an open problem. It has been widely observed that a best-performing teacher does not necessarily yield the best-performing student, suggesting a fundamental discrepancy between the current teacher training practice and the ideal teacher training strategy. To fill this gap, we explore the feasibility of training a teacher that is oriented toward student performance with empirical risk minimization (ERM). Our analyses are inspired by the recent findings that the effectiveness of knowledge distillation hinges on the teacher's capability to approximate the true label distribution of training inputs. We theoretically establish that the ERM minimizer can approximate the true label distribution of training data as long as the feature extractor of the learner network is Lipschitz continuous and is robust to feature transformations. In light of our theory, we propose a teacher training method SoTeacher which incorporates Lipschitz regularization and consistency regularization into ERM. Experiments on benchmark datasets using various knowledge distillation algorithms and teacher-student pairs confirm that SoTeacher can improve student accuracy consistently.
abstract_zh: 如何进行知识蒸馏的教师培训仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。人们普遍认为，表现最好的教师不一定会培养出表现最好的学生，这表明当前的教师培训实践与理想的教师培训策略之间存在根本差异。为了填补这一空白，我们探讨了通过经验风险最小化（ERM）培训以学生表现为导向的教师的可行性。我们的分析受到最近发现的启发，即知识蒸馏的有效性取决于教师近似训练输入的真实标签分布的能力。我们从理论上确定，只要学习器网络的特征提取器是 Lipschitz 连续的并且对特征变换具有鲁棒性，ERM 最小化器就可以近似训练数据的真实标签分布。根据我们的理论，我们提出了一种教师培训方法 SoTeacher，它将 Lipschitz 正则化和一致性正则化纳入 ERM 中。使用各种知识蒸馏算法和师生配对对基准数据集进行的实验证实，SoTeacher 可以持续提高学生的准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种面向学生的教师网络训练方法SoTeacher，通过理论分析和实验验证，改进知识蒸馏中教师模型的训练策略以提升学生模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有知识蒸馏中教师模型训练方法与学生性能优化目标存在根本性差异，最佳教师模型未必能培养出最佳学生模型，需探索更契合学生表现的训练策略。
AI.method: 基于经验风险最小化（ERM）框架，结合Lipschitz正则化和一致性正则化，提出SoTeacher方法，理论证明其可逼近真实标签分布并提升学生模型准确性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和知识蒸馏算法中，SoTeacher方法持续提升学生模型准确率，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: SoTeacher方法通过理论分析与正则化技术结合，有效解决了知识蒸馏中教师训练与学生性能优化的矛盾，为后续研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Yukun Bao,Liang Shen,Xiaoyuan Zhang,Yanmei Huang,Changrui Deng
title: A novel MDPSO-SVR hybrid model for feature selection in electricity consumption forecasting
title_zh: 一种用于用电预测中特征选择的新型 MDPSO-SVR 混合模型
abstract: Electricity consumption forecasting has vital importance for the energy planning of a country. Of the enabling machine learning models, support vector regression (SVR) has been widely used to set up forecasting models due to its superior generalization for unseen data. However, one key procedure for the predictive modeling is feature selection, which might hurt the prediction accuracy if improper features were selected. In this regard, a modified discrete particle swarm optimization (MDPSO) was employed for feature selection in this study, and then MDPSO-SVR hybrid mode was built to predict future electricity consumption. Compared with other well-established counterparts, MDPSO-SVR model consistently performs best in two real-world electricity consumption datasets, which indicates that MDPSO for feature selection can improve the prediction accuracy and the SVR equipped with the MDPSO can be a promised alternative for electricity consumption forecasting.
summary: Electricity consumption forecasting has vital importance for the energy planning of a country. Of the enabling machine learning models, support vector regression (SVR) has been widely used to set up forecasting models due to its superior generalization for unseen data. However, one key procedure for the predictive modeling is feature selection, which might hurt the prediction accuracy if improper features were selected. In this regard, a modified discrete particle swarm optimization (MDPSO) was employed for feature selection in this study, and then MDPSO-SVR hybrid mode was built to predict future electricity consumption. Compared with other well-established counterparts, MDPSO-SVR model consistently performs best in two real-world electricity consumption datasets, which indicates that MDPSO for feature selection can improve the prediction accuracy and the SVR equipped with the MDPSO can be a promised alternative for electricity consumption forecasting.
abstract_zh: 用电量预测对于一个国家的能源规划至关重要。在支持的机器学习模型中，支持向量回归（SVR）因其对未见数据的卓越泛化性而被广泛用于建立预测模型。然而，预测建模的关键过程之一是特征选择，如果选择不当的特征，可能会损害预测的准确性。为此，本研究采用改进的离散粒子群优化（MDPSO）进行特征选择，然后建立MDPSO-SVR混合模式来预测未来的电力消耗。与其他成熟的模型相比，MDPSO-SVR 模型在两个现实世界用电量数据集中始终表现最佳，这表明用于特征选择的 MDPSO 可以提高预测精度，并且配备 MDPSO 的 SVR 可以成为用电量预测的有希望的替代方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合改进离散粒子群优化（MDPSO）和支持向量回归（SVR）的混合模型，用于电力消费预测中的特征选择。
AI.motivation: 电力消费预测对国家能源规划至关重要，但传统方法因特征选择不当可能导致预测精度下降，需改进特征选择策略以提升模型性能。
AI.method: 采用改进离散粒子群优化算法（MDPSO）进行特征选择，再结合支持向量回归（SVR）构建混合模型（MDPSO-SVR）进行预测。
AI.result: 在两个真实电力消费数据集上，MDPSO-SVR模型的表现优于其他现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: MDPSO优化的特征选择能显著提升SVR预测精度，MDPSO-SVR混合模型可作为电力消费预测的可行方案。

authors_text: Rohit Singla,Cailin Ringstrom,Grace Hu,Victoria Lessoway,Janice Reid,Christopher Nguan,Robert Rohling
title: The Open Kidney Ultrasound Data Set
title_zh: 开放式肾脏超声数据集
abstract: Ultrasound, because of its low cost, non-ionizing, and non-invasive characteristics, has established itself as a cornerstone radiological examination. Research on ultrasound applications has also expanded, especially with image analysis with machine learning. However, ultrasound data are frequently restricted to closed data sets, with only a few openly available. Despite being a frequently examined organ, the kidney lacks a publicly available ultrasonography data set. The proposed Open Kidney Ultrasound Data Set is the first publicly available set of kidney brightness mode (B-mode) ultrasound data that includes annotations for multi-class semantic segmentation. It is based on data retrospectively collected in a 5-year period from over 500 patients with a mean age of 53.2 +/- 14.7 years, body mass index of 27.0 +/- 5.4 kg/m2, and most common primary diseases being diabetes mellitus, immunoglobulin A (IgA) nephropathy, and hypertension. There are labels for the view and fine-grained manual annotations from two expert sonographers. Notably, this data includes native and transplanted kidneys. Initial bench-marking measurements are performed, demonstrating a state-of-the-art algorithm achieving a Dice Sorenson Coefficient of 0.85 for the kidney capsule. This data set is a high-quality data set, including two sets of expert annotations, with a larger breadth of images than previously available. In increasing access to kidney ultrasound data, future researchers may be able to create novel image analysis techniques for tissue characterization, disease detection, and prognostication.

Research on ultrasound applications has also expanded, especially with image analysis with machine learning. However, ultrasound data are frequently restricted to closed data sets, with only a few openly available. Despite being a frequently examined organ, the kidney lacks a publicly available ultrasonography data set. The proposed Open Kidney Ultrasound Data Set is the first publicly available set of kidney brightness mode (B-mode) ultrasound data that includes annotations for multi-class semantic segmentation. It is based on data retrospectively collected in a 5-year period from over 500 patients with a mean age of 53.2 +/- 14.7 years, body mass index of 27.0 +/- 5.4 kg/m2, and most common primary diseases being diabetes mellitus, immunoglobulin A (IgA) nephropathy, and hypertension. There are labels for the view and fine-grained manual annotations from two expert sonographers. Notably, this data includes native and transplanted kidneys. Initial bench-marking measurements are performed, demonstrating a state-of-the-art algorithm achieving a Dice Sorenson Coefficient of 0.85 for the kidney capsule. This data set is a high-quality data set, including two sets of expert annotations, with a larger breadth of images than previously available. In increasing access to kidney ultrasound data, future researchers may be able to create novel image analysis techniques for tissue characterization, disease detection, and prognostication.
abstract_zh: 超声波因其低成本、非电离和非侵入性的特点，已成为放射学检查的基石。超声应用的研究也得到了扩展，特别是通过机器学习进行图像分析。然而，超声数据通常仅限于封闭数据集，只有少数数据是公开可用的。尽管肾脏是经常检查的器官，但缺乏公开的超声检查数据集。拟议的开放肾脏超声数据集是第一个公开可用的肾脏亮度模式（B 模式）超声数据集，其中包括多类语义分割的注释。它基于 5 年期间对 500 多名患者的回顾性收集数据，这些患者的平均年龄为 53.2 +/- 14.7 岁，体重指数为 27.0 +/- 5.4 kg/m2，最常见的原发疾病是糖尿病、免疫球蛋白 A (IgA) 肾病和高血压。视图有标签，还有两位超声检查专家提供的细粒度手动注释。值得注意的是，该数据包括自体肾脏和移植肾脏。进行了初始基准测试，展示了最先进的算法，使肾囊的 Dice Sorenson 系数达到 0.85。该数据集是一个高质量的数据集，包括两组专家注释，图像范围比以前更大。通过增加对肾脏超声数据的获取，未来的研究人员或许能够创建用于组织表征、疾病检测和预测的新型图像分析技术。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个首个公开的肾脏超声数据集，包含多类语义分割标注，旨在促进肾脏超声图像分析研究。
AI.motivation: 尽管超声检查应用广泛，但缺乏公开的肾脏超声数据集，限制了相关算法的研究与开发。
AI.method: 通过回顾性收集500余名患者5年间的肾脏B超数据，由两名专家进行视图标注和细粒度分割标注，并包含原生与移植肾脏样本。
AI.result: 数据集标注精度达到Dice Sorenson系数0.85（肾囊分割），包含专家双重标注及比现有数据更广的图像多样性。
AI.conclusion: 该高质量数据集的公开将推动肾脏组织特征分析、疾病检测及预后评估等领域的创新研究。

authors_text: Rohit Singla,Ricky Hu,Cailin Ringstrom,Victoria Lessoway,Janice Reid,Christopher Nguan,Robert Rohling
title: The Kidneys Are Not All Normal: Investigating the Speckle Distributions of Transplanted Kidneys
title_zh: 肾脏并不都是正常的：研究移植肾脏的斑点分布
abstract: Modelling ultrasound speckle has generated considerable interest for its ability to characterize tissue properties. As speckle is dependent on the underlying tissue architecture, modelling it may aid in tasks like segmentation or disease detection. However, for the transplanted kidney where ultrasound is commonly used to investigate dysfunction, it is currently unknown which statistical distribution best characterises such speckle. This is especially true for the regions of the transplanted kidney: the cortex, the medulla and the central echogenic complex. Furthermore, it is unclear how these distributions vary by patient variables such as age, sex, body mass index, primary disease, or donor type. These traits may influence speckle modelling given their influence on kidney anatomy. We are the first to investigate these two aims. N=821 kidney transplant recipient B-mode images were automatically segmented into the cortex, medulla, and central echogenic complex using a neural network. Seven distinct probability distributions were fitted to each region. The Rayleigh and Nakagami distributions had model parameters that differed significantly between the three regions (p <= 0.05). While both had excellent goodness of fit, the Nakagami had higher Kullbeck-Leibler divergence. Recipient age correlated weakly with scale in the cortex (Omega: rho = 0.11, p = 0.004), while body mass index correlated weakly with shape in the medulla (m: rho = 0.08, p = 0.04). Neither sex, primary disease, nor donor type demonstrated any correlation. We propose the Nakagami distribution be used to characterize transplanted kidneys regionally independent of disease etiology and most patient characteristics based on our findings.

Neither sex, primary disease, nor donor type demonstrated any correlation. We propose the Nakagami distribution be used to characterize transplanted kidneys regionally independent of disease etiology and most patient characteristics based on our findings.
abstract_zh: 超声散斑建模因其表征组织特性的能力而引起了极大的兴趣。由于斑点取决于底层组织结构，因此对其建模可能有助于分割或疾病检测等任务。然而，对于通常使用超声检查功能障碍的移植肾，目前尚不清楚哪种统计分布最能表征这种斑点。对于移植肾的区域尤其如此：皮质、髓质和中央回声复合体。此外，尚不清楚这些分布如何随年龄、性别、体重指数、原发疾病或供体类型等患者变量而变化。鉴于它们对肾脏解剖结构的影响，这些特征可能会影响散斑建模。我们是第一个研究这两个目标的人。使用神经网络将 N=821 例肾移植受者 B 型图像自动分割为皮质、髓质和中央回声复合体。每个区域都拟合了七个不同的概率分布。 Rayleigh 和 Nakagami 分布的模型参数在三个区域之间存在显着差异 (p <= 0.05)。虽然两者都具有出色的拟合优度，但 Nakagami 具有更高的 Kullbeck-Leibler 散度。接受者年龄与皮质规模的相关性较弱（Omega：rho = 0.11，p = 0.004），而体重指数与髓质的形状相关性较弱（m：rho = 0.08，p = 0.04）。性别、原发疾病和供体类型均未显示出任何相关性。根据我们的研究结果，我们建议使用 Nakagami 分布来描述移植肾脏的区域特征，而与疾病病因和大多数患者特征无关。

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在确定哪种统计分布最适合表征移植肾脏不同区域（皮质、髓质、中央回声复合体）的超声斑点特征。
AI.motivation: 超声斑点建模有助于组织特性分析和疾病检测，但移植肾脏的斑点分布特性及患者因素（如年龄、BMI等）对其影响尚不清楚，需建立区域特异性模型。
AI.method: 对821例移植肾脏的B超图像进行神经网络分割，提取三个区域的斑点数据，拟合七种概率分布并比较参数差异、拟合优度及患者变量相关性。
AI.result: Rayleigh和Nakagami分布参数在不同区域存在显著差异（p≤0.05），Nakagami分布拟合效果更优（KL散度更高）。受试者年龄与皮质尺度参数弱相关（rho=0.11），BMI与髓质形状参数弱相关（rho=0.08），性别、原发病及供体类型无显著关联。
AI.conclusion: 建议采用Nakagami分布独立于疾病病因和多数患者特征，对移植肾脏区域进行斑点建模。

search_text: The Kidneys Are Not All Normal: Investigating the Speckle Distributions of Transplanted Kidneys 肾脏并不都是正常的：研究移植肾脏的斑点分布 Modelling ultrasound speckle has generated considerable interest for its ability to characterize tissue properties. As speckle is dependent on the underlying tissue architecture, modelling it may aid in tasks like segmentation or disease detection. However, for the transplanted kidney where ultrasound is commonly used to investigate dysfunction, it is currently unknown which statistical distribution best characterises such speckle. This is especially true for the regions of the transplanted kidney: the cortex, the medulla and the central echogenic complex. Furthermore, it is unclear how these distributions vary by patient variables such as age, sex, body mass index, primary disease, or donor type. These traits may influence speckle modelling given their influence on kidney anatomy. We are the first to investigate these two aims. N=821 kidney transplant recipient B-mode images were automatically segmented into the cortex, medulla, and central echogenic complex using a neural network. Seven distinct probability distributions were fitted to each region. The Rayleigh and Nakagami distributions had model parameters that differed significantly between the three regions (p <= 0.05). While both had excellent goodness of fit, the Nakagami had higher Kullbeck-Leibler divergence. Recipient age correlated weakly with scale in the cortex (Omega: rho = 0.11, p = 0.004), while body mass index correlated weakly with shape in the medulla (m: rho = 0.08, p = 0.04). Neither sex, primary disease, nor donor type demonstrated any correlation. We propose the Nakagami distribution be used to characterize transplanted kidneys regionally independent of disease etiology and most patient characteristics based on our findings. 超声散斑建模因其表征组织特性的能力而引起了极大的兴趣。由于斑点取决于底层组织结构，因此对其建模可能有助于分割或疾病检测等任务。然而，对于通常使用超声检查功能障碍的移植肾，目前尚不清楚哪种统计分布最能表征这种斑点。对于移植肾的区域尤其如此：皮质、髓质和中央回声复合体。此外，尚不清楚这些分布如何随年龄、性别、体重指数、原发疾病或供体类型等患者变量而变化。鉴于它们对肾脏解剖结构的影响，这些特征可能会影响散斑建模。我们是第一个研究这两个目标的人。使用神经网络将 N=821 例肾移植受者 B 型图像自动分割为皮质、髓质和中央回声复合体。每个区域都拟合了七个不同的概率分布。 Rayleigh 和 Nakagami 分布的模型参数在三个区域之间存在显着差异 (p <= 0.05)。虽然两者都具有出色的拟合优度，但 Nakagami 具有更高的 Kullbeck-Leibler 散度。接受者年龄与皮质规模的相关性较弱（Omega：rho = 0.11，p = 0.004），而体重指数与髓质的形状相关性较弱（m：rho = 0.08，p = 0.04）。性别、原发疾病和供体类型均未显示出任何相关性。根据我们的研究结果，我们建议使用 Nakagami 分布来描述移植肾脏的区域特征，而与疾病病因和大多数患者特征无关。 该论文旨在确定哪种统计分布最适合表征移植肾脏不同区域（皮质、髓质、中央回声复合体）的超声斑点特征。 Rohit Singla,Ricky Hu,Cailin Ringstrom,Victoria Lessoway,Janice Reid,Christopher Nguan,Robert Rohling eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.SP

authors_text: Jonghyun Lee,Dahuin Jung,Junho Yim,Sungroh Yoon
title: Confidence Score for Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 无源无监督域适应的置信度得分
abstract: Source-free unsupervised domain adaptation (SFUDA) aims to obtain high performance in the unlabeled target domain using the pre-trained source model, not the source data. Existing SFUDA methods assign the same importance to all target samples, which is vulnerable to incorrect pseudo-labels. To differentiate between sample importance, in this study, we propose a novel sample-wise confidence score, the Joint Model-Data Structure (JMDS) score for SFUDA. Unlike existing confidence scores that use only one of the source or target domain knowledge, the JMDS score uses both knowledge. We then propose a Confidence score Weighting Adaptation using the JMDS (CoWA-JMDS) framework for SFUDA. CoWA-JMDS consists of the JMDS scores as sample weights and weight Mixup that is our proposed variant of Mixup. Weight Mixup promotes the model make more use of the target domain knowledge. The experimental results show that the JMDS score outperforms the existing confidence scores. Moreover, CoWA-JMDS achieves state-of-the-art performance on various SFUDA scenarios: closed, open, and partial-set scenarios.
summary: Source-free unsupervised domain adaptation (SFUDA) aims to obtain high performance in the unlabeled target domain using the pre-trained source model, not the source data. Existing SFUDA methods assign the same importance to all target samples, which is vulnerable to incorrect pseudo-labels. To differentiate between sample importance, in this study, we propose a novel sample-wise confidence score, the Joint Model-Data Structure (JMDS) score for SFUDA. Unlike existing confidence scores that use only one of the source or target domain knowledge, the JMDS score uses both knowledge. We then propose a Confidence score Weighting Adaptation using the JMDS (CoWA-JMDS) framework for SFUDA. CoWA-JMDS consists of the JMDS scores as sample weights and weight Mixup that is our proposed variant of Mixup. Weight Mixup promotes the model make more use of the target domain knowledge. The experimental results show that the JMDS score outperforms the existing confidence scores. Moreover, CoWA-JMDS achieves state-of-the-art performance on various SFUDA scenarios: closed, open, and partial-set scenarios.
abstract_zh: 无源无监督域适应（SFUDA）旨在使用预训练的源模型而不是源数据在未标记的目标域中获得高性能。现有的 SFUDA 方法对所有目标样本赋予相同的重要性，这很容易受到错误伪标签的影响。为了区分样本重要性，在本研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的样本置信度评分，即 SFUDA 的联合模型数据结构 (JMDS) 评分。与仅使用源或目标领域知识之一的现有置信度分数不同，JMDS 分数同时使用这两种知识。然后，我们使用 SFUDA 的 JMDS (CoWA-JMDS) 框架提出置信度评分加权适应。 CoWA-JMDS 由作为样本权重的 JMDS 分数和权重 Mixup 组成，权重 Mixup 是我们提出的 Mixup 变体。权重混合促进模型更多地利用目标领域知识。实验结果表明，JMDS 得分优于现有的置信度得分。此外，CoWA-JMDS 在各种 SFUDA 场景（封闭、开放和部分集场景）上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于源无关无监督域适应（SFUDA）的样本级置信度评分方法，以解决现有方法对目标样本重要性分配不均的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SFUDA方法对所有目标样本赋予相同重要性，易受错误伪标签影响。需通过结合源域与目标域知识区分样本重要性，提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 提出联合模型-数据结构（JMDS）置信度评分，融合源域与目标域知识；设计基于JMDS的置信度加权自适应框架CoWA-JMDS，包含样本权重与改进的Weight Mixup方法。
AI.result: JMDS评分优于现有方法，CoWA-JMDS在封闭、开放及部分集合场景下均达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合双域知识与动态权重机制，本文方法有效提升了SFUDA的适应能力与鲁棒性，为域适应研究提供新思路。

authors_text: Shanghua Gao,Zhong-Yu Li,Qi Han,Ming-Ming Cheng,Liang Wang
title: RF-Next: Efficient Receptive Field Search for Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: RF-Next：卷积神经网络的高效感受野搜索
comment: Accepted by TPAMI. This paper is a journal extension of our CVPR 2021 paper (arXiv:2101.00910)
comments: Accepted by TPAMI. This paper is a journal extension of our CVPR 2021 paper (arXiv:2101.00910)
abstract: Temporal/spatial receptive fields of models play an important role in sequential/spatial tasks. Large receptive fields facilitate long-term relations, while small receptive fields help to capture the local details. Existing methods construct models with hand-designed receptive fields in layers. Can we effectively search for receptive field combinations to replace hand-designed patterns? To answer this question, we propose to find better receptive field combinations through a global-to-local search scheme. Our search scheme exploits both global search to find the coarse combinations and local search to get the refined receptive field combinations further. The global search finds possible coarse combinations other than human-designed patterns. On top of the global search, we propose an expectation-guided iterative local search scheme to refine combinations effectively. Our RF-Next models, plugging receptive field search to various models, boost the performance on many tasks, e.g., temporal action segmentation, object detection, instance segmentation, and speech synthesis. The source code is publicly available on http://mmcheng.net/rfnext.
summary: Temporal/spatial receptive fields of models play an important role in sequential/spatial tasks. Large receptive fields facilitate long-term relations, while small receptive fields help to capture the local details. Existing methods construct models with hand-designed receptive fields in layers. Can we effectively search for receptive field combinations to replace hand-designed patterns? To answer this question, we propose to find better receptive field combinations through a global-to-local search scheme. Our search scheme exploits both global search to find the coarse combinations and local search to get the refined receptive field combinations further. The global search finds possible coarse combinations other than human-designed patterns. On top of the global search, we propose an expectation-guided iterative local search scheme to refine combinations effectively. Our RF-Next models, plugging receptive field search to various models, boost the performance on many tasks, e.g., temporal action segmentation, object detection, instance segmentation, and speech synthesis. The source code is publicly available on http://mmcheng.net/rfnext.
abstract_zh: 模型的时间/空间感受野在顺序/空间任务中发挥着重要作用。大的感受野有利于长期关系，而小的感受野有助于捕捉局部细节。现有方法使用手工设计的分层感受野构建模型。我们能否有效地搜索感受野组合来取代手工设计的模式？为了回答这个问题，我们建议通过全局到局部的搜索方案找到更好的感受野组合。我们的搜索方案利用全局搜索来查找粗略组合，并利用局部搜索来进一步获得细化的感受野组合。全局搜索发现除人类设计的模式之外的可能的粗略组合。在全局搜索之上，我们提出了一种期望引导的迭代局部搜索方案来有效地细化组合。我们的 RF-Next 模型将感受野搜索插入到各种模型中，提高了许多任务的性能，例如时间动作分割、对象检测、实例分割和语音合成。源代码可在 http://mmheng.net/rfnext 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RF-Next方法，通过全局到局部的搜索方案高效寻找卷积神经网络的最优感受野组合，以提升模型在时序和空间任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖人工设计的感受野模式，难以兼顾长距离依赖与局部细节捕捉，限制了模型性能的进一步提升。
AI.method: 采用两阶段搜索策略：全局搜索生成粗粒度感受野组合，随后通过期望引导的迭代局部搜索进行精细化调整，并将该方法集成到多种模型中。
AI.result: 在时序动作分割、目标检测、实例分割和语音合成等任务中，RF-Next模型均取得性能提升，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 自动搜索感受野组合可有效替代人工设计模式，在多个任务中验证了方法的有效性与泛化能力。

search_text: RF-Next: Efficient Receptive Field Search for Convolutional Neural Networks RF-Next：卷积神经网络的高效感受野搜索 Temporal/spatial receptive fields of models play an important role in sequential/spatial tasks. Large receptive fields facilitate long-term relations, while small receptive fields help to capture the local details. Existing methods construct models with hand-designed receptive fields in layers. Can we effectively search for receptive field combinations to replace hand-designed patterns? To answer this question, we propose to find better receptive field combinations through a global-to-local search scheme. Our search scheme exploits both global search to find the coarse combinations and local search to get the refined receptive field combinations further. The global search finds possible coarse combinations other than human-designed patterns. On top of the global search, we propose an expectation-guided iterative local search scheme to refine combinations effectively. Our RF-Next models, plugging receptive field search to various models, boost the performance on many tasks, e.g., temporal action segmentation, object detection, instance segmentation, and speech synthesis. The source code is publicly available on http://mmcheng.net/rfnext. 模型的时间/空间感受野在顺序/空间任务中发挥着重要作用。大的感受野有利于长期关系，而小的感受野有助于捕捉局部细节。现有方法使用手工设计的分层感受野构建模型。我们能否有效地搜索感受野组合来取代手工设计的模式？为了回答这个问题，我们建议通过全局到局部的搜索方案找到更好的感受野组合。我们的搜索方案利用全局搜索来查找粗略组合，并利用局部搜索来进一步获得细化的感受野组合。全局搜索发现除人类设计的模式之外的可能的粗略组合。在全局搜索之上，我们提出了一种期望引导的迭代局部搜索方案来有效地细化组合。我们的 RF-Next 模型将感受野搜索插入到各种模型中，提高了许多任务的性能，例如时间动作分割、对象检测、实例分割和语音合成。源代码可在 http://mmheng.net/rfnext 上公开获取。 本文提出RF-Next方法，通过全局到局部的搜索方案高效寻找卷积神经网络的最优感受野组合，以提升模型在时序和空间任务中的性能。 Shanghua Gao,Zhong-Yu Li,Qi Han,Ming-Ming Cheng,Liang Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Hong Jie Ng,Shuhan Yang,Zhaoyang Yao,Hyunsoo Yang,Charles C. -W. Lim
title: Provably-secure randomness generation from switching probability of magnetic tunnel junctions
title_zh: 根据磁隧道结的切换概率生成可证明安全的随机性
abstract: In recent years, true random number generators (TRNGs) based on magnetic tunnelling junction (MTJ) have become increasingly attractive. This is because MTJ-based TRNGs offer some advantages over traditional CMOS-based TRNGs, such as smaller area and simpler structure. However, there has been no work thus far that quantified the quality of the raw output of an MTJ-based TRNG and performed suitable randomness extraction to produce provably-secure random bits, unlike their CMOS-based counterparts. In this work, we implement an MTJ-based TRNG and characterise the entropy of the raw output. Using this information, we perform post-processing to extract a set of random bits which are provably-secure.
summary: In recent years, true random number generators (TRNGs) based on magnetic tunnelling junction (MTJ) have become increasingly attractive. This is because MTJ-based TRNGs offer some advantages over traditional CMOS-based TRNGs, such as smaller area and simpler structure. However, there has been no work thus far that quantified the quality of the raw output of an MTJ-based TRNG and performed suitable randomness extraction to produce provably-secure random bits, unlike their CMOS-based counterparts. In this work, we implement an MTJ-based TRNG and characterise the entropy of the raw output. Using this information, we perform post-processing to extract a set of random bits which are provably-secure.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于磁隧道结（MTJ）的真随机数发生器（TRNG）变得越来越有吸引力。这是因为基于 MTJ 的 TRNG 比传统的基于 CMOS 的 TRNG 具有一些优势，例如更小的面积和更简单的结构。然而，与基于 CMOS 的同类产品不同，迄今为止还没有任何工作能够量化基于 MTJ 的 TRNG 的原始输出质量，并执行适当的随机性提取以产生可证明安全的随机位。在这项工作中，我们实现了基于 MTJ 的 TRNG 并表征了原始输出的熵。使用这些信息，我们执行后处理以提取一组可证明安全的随机位。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于磁隧道结（MTJ）切换概率的可证明安全的随机数生成方法，通过量化原始输出熵并进行后处理提取安全随机位。
AI.motivation: 现有MTJ TRNG缺乏对原始输出熵的量化评估及安全随机位提取方法，无法保证生成随机数的理论安全性。
AI.method: 实现MTJ TRNG硬件，通过实验表征其原始输出熵，基于熵值设计后处理算法提取可证明安全的随机位。
AI.result: 成功生成符合理论安全性的随机数序列，验证了MTJ TRNG在熵量化与提取方法上的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次实现MTJ TRNG的可证明安全随机数生成，为物理不可预测性随机数生成领域提供了新思路。

authors_text: Haiming Gao,Qibo Qiu,Wei Hua,Xuebo Zhang,Zhengyong Han,Shun Zhang
title: CVR-LSE: Compact Vectorization Representation of Local Static Environments for Unmanned Ground Vehicles
title_zh: CVR-LSE：无人地面车辆局部静态环境的紧凑矢量化表示
abstract: According to the requirement of general static obstacle detection, this paper proposes a compact vectorization representation approach of local static environments for unmanned ground vehicles. At first, by fusing the data of LiDAR and IMU, high-frequency pose information is obtained. Then, through the two-dimensional (2D) obstacle points generation, the process of grid map maintenance with a fixed size is proposed. Finally, the local static environment is described via multiple convex polygons, which is realized throungh the double threshold-based boundary simplification and the convex polygon segmentation. Our proposed approach has been applied in a practical driverless project in the park, and the qualitative experimental results on typical scenes verify the effectiveness and robustness. In addition, the quantitative evaluation shows the superior performance on making use of fewer number of points information (decreased by about 60%) to represent the local static environment compared with the traditional grid map-based methods. Furthermore, the performance of running time (15ms) shows that the proposed approach can be used for real-time local static environment perception. The corresponding code can be accessed at https://github.com/ghm0819/cvr_lse.
summary: According to the requirement of general static obstacle detection, this paper proposes a compact vectorization representation approach of local static environments for unmanned ground vehicles. At first, by fusing the data of LiDAR and IMU, high-frequency pose information is obtained. Then, through the two-dimensional (2D) obstacle points generation, the process of grid map maintenance with a fixed size is proposed. Finally, the local static environment is described via multiple convex polygons, which is realized throungh the double threshold-based boundary simplification and the convex polygon segmentation. Our proposed approach has been applied in a practical driverless project in the park, and the qualitative experimental results on typical scenes verify the effectiveness and robustness. In addition, the quantitative evaluation shows the superior performance on making use of fewer number of points information (decreased by about 60%) to represent the local static environment compared with the traditional grid map-based methods. Furthermore, the performance of running time (15ms) shows that the proposed approach can be used for real-time local static environment perception. The corresponding code can be accessed at https://github.com/ghm0819/cvr_lse.
abstract_zh: 根据一般静态障碍物检测的需求，提出一种无人地面车辆局部静态环境的紧凑矢量化表示方法。首先，通过融合LiDAR和IMU的数据，获得高频位姿信息。然后，通过二维（2D）障碍点生成，提出了固定大小的网格地图维护过程。最后，通过多个凸多边形描述局部静态环境，这是通过基于双阈值的边界简化和凸多边形分割来实现的。我们提出的方法已应用于公园的实际无人驾驶项目中，典型场景的定性实验结果验证了该方法的有效性和鲁棒性。此外，定量评估表明，与传统的基于网格地图的方法相比，利用较少数量的点信息（减少约60%）来表示局部静态环境具有优越的性能。此外，运行时间（15ms）的性能表明该方法可用于实时局部静态环境感知。相应的代码可以访问https://github.com/ghm0819/cvr_lse。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种用于无人地面车辆的局部静态环境紧凑向量表示方法CVR-LSE，通过融合LiDAR和IMU数据，结合凸多边形分割技术实现高效环境建模。
AI.motivation: 传统网格地图方法在静态障碍物检测中存在计算量大、数据冗余的问题，需开发更高效且适用于实时场景的环境表示方法。
AI.method: 融合LiDAR与IMU数据获取高精度姿态信息，生成二维障碍点并维护固定尺寸网格地图，采用双阈值边界简化算法和凸多边形分割技术构建环境向量表示。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在典型场景中有效且鲁棒，环境表示所需点数较传统方法减少60%，单帧处理时间仅15ms，满足实时性要求。
AI.conclusion: CVR-LSE方法通过紧凑向量表示显著降低了计算开销，验证了其在无人车辆实时静态环境感知中的实用价值。
