search_text: CVR-LSE: Compact Vectorization Representation of Local Static Environments for Unmanned Ground Vehicles CVR-LSE：无人地面车辆局部静态环境的紧凑矢量化表示 According to the requirement of general static obstacle detection, this paper proposes a compact vectorization representation approach of local static environments for unmanned ground vehicles. At first, by fusing the data of LiDAR and IMU, high-frequency pose information is obtained. Then, through the two-dimensional (2D) obstacle points generation, the process of grid map maintenance with a fixed size is proposed. Finally, the local static environment is described via multiple convex polygons, which is realized throungh the double threshold-based boundary simplification and the convex polygon segmentation. Our proposed approach has been applied in a practical driverless project in the park, and the qualitative experimental results on typical scenes verify the effectiveness and robustness. In addition, the quantitative evaluation shows the superior performance on making use of fewer number of points information (decreased by about 60%) to represent the local static environment compared with the traditional grid map-based methods. Furthermore, the performance of running time (15ms) shows that the proposed approach can be used for real-time local static environment perception. The corresponding code can be accessed at https://github.com/ghm0819/cvr_lse. 根据一般静态障碍物检测的需求，提出一种无人地面车辆局部静态环境的紧凑矢量化表示方法。首先，通过融合LiDAR和IMU的数据，获得高频位姿信息。然后，通过二维（2D）障碍点生成，提出了固定大小的网格地图维护过程。最后，通过多个凸多边形描述局部静态环境，这是通过基于双阈值的边界简化和凸多边形分割来实现的。我们提出的方法已应用于公园的实际无人驾驶项目中，典型场景的定性实验结果验证了该方法的有效性和鲁棒性。此外，定量评估表明，与传统的基于网格地图的方法相比，利用较少数量的点信息（减少约60%）来表示局部静态环境具有优越的性能。此外，运行时间（15ms）的性能表明该方法可用于实时局部静态环境感知。相应的代码可以访问https://github.com/ghm0819/cvr_lse。 本文提出一种用于无人地面车辆的局部静态环境紧凑向量表示方法CVR-LSE，通过融合LiDAR和IMU数据，结合凸多边形分割技术实现高效环境建模。 Haiming Gao,Qibo Qiu,Wei Hua,Xuebo Zhang,Zhengyong Han,Shun Zhang cs.RO

authors_text: Wang Lu,Jindong Wang,Yiqiang Chen,Sinno Jialin Pan,Chunyu Hu,Xin Qin
title: Semantic-Discriminative Mixup for Generalizable Sensor-based Cross-domain Activity Recognition
title_zh: 用于可推广的基于传感器的跨域活动识别的语义判别混合
comment: To be presented at UbiComp 2022; Accepted by Proceedings of the ACM on Interactive, Mobile, Wearable and Ubiquitous Technologies (IMWUT)
comments: To be presented at UbiComp 2022; Accepted by Proceedings of the ACM on Interactive, Mobile, Wearable and Ubiquitous Technologies (IMWUT)
abstract: It is expensive and time-consuming to collect sufficient labeled data to build human activity recognition (HAR) models. Training on existing data often makes the model biased towards the distribution of the training data, thus the model might perform terribly on test data with different distributions. Although existing efforts on transfer learning and domain adaptation try to solve the above problem, they still need access to unlabeled data on the target domain, which may not be possible in real scenarios. Few works pay attention to training a model that can generalize well to unseen target domains for HAR. In this paper, we propose a novel method called Semantic-Discriminative Mixup (SDMix) for generalizable cross-domain HAR. Firstly, we introduce semantic-aware Mixup that considers the activity semantic ranges to overcome the semantic inconsistency brought by domain differences. Secondly, we introduce the large margin loss to enhance the discrimination of Mixup to prevent misclassification brought by noisy virtual labels. Comprehensive generalization experiments on five public datasets demonstrate that our SDMix substantially outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches with 6% average accuracy improvement on cross-person, cross-dataset, and cross-position HAR.
summary: It is expensive and time-consuming to collect sufficient labeled data to build human activity recognition (HAR) models. Training on existing data often makes the model biased towards the distribution of the training data, thus the model might perform terribly on test data with different distributions. Although existing efforts on transfer learning and domain adaptation try to solve the above problem, they still need access to unlabeled data on the target domain, which may not be possible in real scenarios. Few works pay attention to training a model that can generalize well to unseen target domains for HAR. In this paper, we propose a novel method called Semantic-Discriminative Mixup (SDMix) for generalizable cross-domain HAR. Firstly, we introduce semantic-aware Mixup that considers the activity semantic ranges to overcome the semantic inconsistency brought by domain differences. Secondly, we introduce the large margin loss to enhance the discrimination of Mixup to prevent misclassification brought by noisy virtual labels. Comprehensive generalization experiments on five public datasets demonstrate that our SDMix substantially outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches with 6% average accuracy improvement on cross-person, cross-dataset, and cross-position HAR.
abstract_zh: 收集足够的标记数据来构建人类活动识别（HAR）模型既昂贵又耗时。对现有数据的训练通常会使模型偏向于训练数据的分布，因此模型可能在不同分布的测试数据上表现不佳。尽管现有的迁移学习和领域适应努力试图解决上述问题，但它们仍然需要访问目标领域上的未标记数据，这在实际场景中可能是不可能的。很少有工作关注训练一个能够很好地推广到 HAR 看不见的目标域的模型。在本文中，我们提出了一种称为语义判别混合（SDMix）的新方法，用于可泛化的跨域 HAR。首先，我们引入语义感知的 Mixup，它考虑活动语义范围，以克服领域差异带来的语义不一致。其次，我们引入了大的边际损失来增强Mixup的辨别力，以防止噪声虚拟标签带来的错误分类。对五个公共数据集的综合泛化实验表明，我们的 SDMix 大大优于最先进的方法，在跨人员、跨数据集和跨位置 HAR 上平均准确度提高了 6%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为语义判别Mixup（SDMix）的新方法，用于实现具有广泛适用性的跨域活动识别。
AI.motivation: 由于收集足够的标记数据成本高且耗时，现有的模型往往偏向于训练数据的分布，导致在不同分布的测试数据上表现不佳。现有的迁移学习和领域适应方法需要目标领域的未标记数据，这在实际场景中可能不可行。
AI.method: 首先，引入语义感知的Mixup，考虑活动语义范围以克服领域差异带来的语义不一致。其次，引入大边距损失以增强Mixup的判别能力，防止由噪声虚拟标签引起的误分类。
AI.result: 在五个公开数据集上的全面泛化实验表明，SDMix在跨人、跨数据集和跨位置的活动识别任务中，平均准确率比现有最先进的方法提高了6%。
AI.conclusion: SDMix方法有效提升了跨域活动识别模型的泛化能力，为实际应用提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Xiangyu Li,Xinjie Liang,Gongning Luo,Wei Wang,Kuanquan Wang,Shuo Li
title: ULTRA: Uncertainty-aware Label Distribution Learning for Breast Tumor Cellularity Assessment
title_zh: ULTRA：用于乳腺肿瘤细胞评估的不确定性标签分布学习
abstract: Neoadjuvant therapy (NAT) for breast cancer is a common treatment option in clinical practice. Tumor cellularity (TC), which represents the percentage of invasive tumors in the tumor bed, has been widely used to quantify the response of breast cancer to NAT. Therefore, automatic TC estimation is significant in clinical practice. However, existing state-of-the-art methods usually take it as a TC score regression problem, which ignores the ambiguity of TC labels caused by subjective assessment or multiple raters. In this paper, to efficiently leverage the label ambiguities, we proposed an Uncertainty-aware Label disTRibution leArning (ULTRA) framework for automatic TC estimation. The proposed ULTRA first converted the single-value TC labels to discrete label distributions, which effectively models the ambiguity among all possible TC labels. Furthermore, the network learned TC label distributions by minimizing the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence between the predicted and ground-truth TC label distributions, which better supervised the model to leverage the ambiguity of TC labels. Moreover, the ULTRA mimicked the multi-rater fusion process in clinical practice with a multi-branch feature fusion module to further explore the uncertainties of TC labels. We evaluated the ULTRA on the public BreastPathQ dataset. The experimental results demonstrate that the ULTRA outperformed the regression-based methods for a large margin and achieved state-of-the-art results. The code will be available from https://github.com/PerceptionComputingLab/ULTRA
summary: Neoadjuvant therapy (NAT) for breast cancer is a common treatment option in clinical practice. Tumor cellularity (TC), which represents the percentage of invasive tumors in the tumor bed, has been widely used to quantify the response of breast cancer to NAT. Therefore, automatic TC estimation is significant in clinical practice. However, existing state-of-the-art methods usually take it as a TC score regression problem, which ignores the ambiguity of TC labels caused by subjective assessment or multiple raters. In this paper, to efficiently leverage the label ambiguities, we proposed an Uncertainty-aware Label disTRibution leArning (ULTRA) framework for automatic TC estimation. The proposed ULTRA first converted the single-value TC labels to discrete label distributions, which effectively models the ambiguity among all possible TC labels. Furthermore, the network learned TC label distributions by minimizing the Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence between the predicted and ground-truth TC label distributions, which better supervised the model to leverage the ambiguity of TC labels. Moreover, the ULTRA mimicked the multi-rater fusion process in clinical practice with a multi-branch feature fusion module to further explore the uncertainties of TC labels. We evaluated the ULTRA on the public BreastPathQ dataset. The experimental results demonstrate that the ULTRA outperformed the regression-based methods for a large margin and achieved state-of-the-art results. The code will be available from https://github.com/PerceptionComputingLab/ULTRA
abstract_zh: 乳腺癌新辅助治疗（NAT）是临床实践中常见的治疗选择。肿瘤细胞构成（TC）代表肿瘤床中侵袭性肿瘤的百分比，已被广泛用于量化乳腺癌对 NAT 的反应。因此，自动TC估计在临床实践中具有重要意义。然而，现有的最先进的方法通常将其视为TC分数回归问题，忽略了由主观评估或多位评估者引起的TC标签的模糊性。在本文中，为了有效地利用标签模糊性，我们提出了一种用于自动 TC 估计的不确定性感知标签分布学习（ULTRA）框架。所提出的 ULTRA 首先将单值 TC 标签转换为离散标签分布，从而有效地对所有可能的 TC 标签之间的歧义进行建模。此外，网络通过最小化预测和真实 TC 标签分布之间的 Kullback-Leibler (KL) 差异来学习 TC 标签分布，这更好地监督模型以利用 TC 标签的模糊性。此外，ULTRA通过多分支特征融合模块模仿了临床​​实践中的多评估者融合过程，以进一步探索TC标签的不确定性。我们在公共 BreastPathQ 数据集上评估了 ULTRA。实验结果表明，ULTRA 的性能大幅优于基于回归的方法，并取得了最先进的结果。该代码可从 https://github.com/PerceptionComputingLab/ULTRA 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出ULTRA框架，通过不确定性感知的标签分布学习方法，解决乳腺肿瘤细胞率（TC）评估中的标签模糊性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法将TC估计视为回归问题，忽略了主观评估或多位评分者导致的标签模糊性，影响模型性能。
AI.method: 将单值TC标签转换为离散分布，通过最小化预测与真实分布的KL散度进行监督，并引入多分支特征融合模块模拟多评分者融合过程。
AI.result: 在BreastPathQ数据集上，ULTRA显著优于回归方法，达到SOTA性能。
AI.conclusion: ULTRA通过建模标签分布和不确定性，有效提升了乳腺肿瘤细胞率评估的准确性。

We evaluated the ULTRA on the public BreastPathQ dataset. The experimental results demonstrate that the ULTRA outperformed the regression-based methods for a large margin and achieved state-of-the-art results. The code will be available from https://github.com/PerceptionComputingLab/ULTRA 乳腺癌新辅助治疗（NAT）是临床实践中常见的治疗选择。肿瘤细胞构成（TC）代表肿瘤床中侵袭性肿瘤的百分比，已被广泛用于量化乳腺癌对 NAT 的反应。因此，自动TC估计在临床实践中具有重要意义。然而，现有的最先进的方法通常将其视为TC分数回归问题，忽略了由主观评估或多位评估者引起的TC标签的模糊性。在本文中，为了有效地利用标签模糊性，我们提出了一种用于自动 TC 估计的不确定性感知标签分布学习（ULTRA）框架。所提出的 ULTRA 首先将单值 TC 标签转换为离散标签分布，从而有效地对所有可能的 TC 标签之间的歧义进行建模。此外，网络通过最小化预测和真实 TC 标签分布之间的 Kullback-Leibler (KL) 差异来学习 TC 标签分布，这更好地监督模型以利用 TC 标签的模糊性。此外，ULTRA通过多分支特征融合模块模仿了临床​​实践中的多评估者融合过程，以进一步探索TC标签的不确定性。我们在公共 BreastPathQ 数据集上评估了 ULTRA。实验结果表明，ULTRA 的性能大幅优于基于回归的方法，并取得了最先进的结果。该代码可从 https://github.com/PerceptionComputingLab/ULTRA 获取 本文提出ULTRA框架，通过不确定性感知的标签分布学习方法，解决乳腺肿瘤细胞率（TC）评估中的标签模糊性问题。 Xiangyu Li,Xinjie Liang,Gongning Luo,Wei Wang,Kuanquan Wang,Shuo Li eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Rang Meng,Weijie Chen,Shicai Yang,Jie Song,Luojun Lin,Di Xie,Shiliang Pu,Xinchao Wang,Mingli Song,Yueting Zhuang
title: Slimmable Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 可精简域适应
comment: To appear in CVPR 2022. Code is coming soon: https://github.com/hikvision-research/SlimDA
comments: To appear in CVPR 2022. Code is coming soon: https://github.com/hikvision-research/SlimDA
abstract: Vanilla unsupervised domain adaptation methods tend to optimize the model with fixed neural architecture, which is not very practical in real-world scenarios since the target data is usually processed by different resource-limited devices. It is therefore of great necessity to facilitate architecture adaptation across various devices. In this paper, we introduce a simple framework, Slimmable Domain Adaptation, to improve cross-domain generalization with a weight-sharing model bank, from which models of different capacities can be sampled to accommodate different accuracy-efficiency trade-offs. The main challenge in this framework lies in simultaneously boosting the adaptation performance of numerous models in the model bank. To tackle this problem, we develop a Stochastic EnsEmble Distillation method to fully exploit the complementary knowledge in the model bank for inter-model interaction. Nevertheless, considering the optimization conflict between inter-model interaction and intra-model adaptation, we augment the existing bi-classifier domain confusion architecture into an Optimization-Separated Tri-Classifier counterpart. After optimizing the model bank, architecture adaptation is leveraged via our proposed Unsupervised Performance Evaluation Metric. Under various resource constraints, our framework surpasses other competing approaches by a very large margin on multiple benchmarks. It is also worth emphasizing that our framework can preserve the performance improvement against the source-only model even when the computing complexity is reduced to $1/64$. Code will be available at https://github.com/hikvision-research/SlimDA.
summary: Vanilla unsupervised domain adaptation methods tend to optimize the model with fixed neural architecture, which is not very practical in real-world scenarios since the target data is usually processed by different resource-limited devices. It is therefore of great necessity to facilitate architecture adaptation across various devices. In this paper, we introduce a simple framework, Slimmable Domain Adaptation, to improve cross-domain generalization with a weight-sharing model bank, from which models of different capacities can be sampled to accommodate different accuracy-efficiency trade-offs. The main challenge in this framework lies in simultaneously boosting the adaptation performance of numerous models in the model bank. To tackle this problem, we develop a Stochastic EnsEmble Distillation method to fully exploit the complementary knowledge in the model bank for inter-model interaction. Nevertheless, considering the optimization conflict between inter-model interaction and intra-model adaptation, we augment the existing bi-classifier domain confusion architecture into an Optimization-Separated Tri-Classifier counterpart. After optimizing the model bank, architecture adaptation is leveraged via our proposed Unsupervised Performance Evaluation Metric. Under various resource constraints, our framework surpasses other competing approaches by a very large margin on multiple benchmarks. It is also worth emphasizing that our framework can preserve the performance improvement against the source-only model even when the computing complexity is reduced to $1/64$. Code will be available at https://github.com/hikvision-research/SlimDA.
abstract_zh: 普通的无监督域适应方法倾向于使用固定的神经架构来优化模型，这在现实场景中不太实用，因为目标数据通常由不同的资源有限设备处理。因此，非常有必要促进跨各种设备的架构适配。在本文中，我们介绍了一个简单的框架——Slimmable Domain Adaptation，通过权重共享模型库来改进跨域泛化，可以从中采样不同容量的模型以适应不同的精度-效率权衡。该框架的主要挑战在于同时提高模型库中众多模型的适应性能。为了解决这个问题，我们开发了一种随机 EnsEmble Distillation 方法，以充分利用模型库中的互补知识进行模型间交互。尽管如此，考虑到模型间交互和模型内适应之间的优化冲突，我们将现有的双分类器域混淆架构增强为优化分离的三分类器对应结构。优化模型库后，通过我们提出的无监督性能评估指标来利用架构适应。在各种资源限制下，我们的框架在多个基准测试中远远超过了其他竞争方法。还值得强调的是，即使计算复杂度降低到 $1/64$，我们的框架也可以保持相对于纯源模型的性能改进。代码可在 https://github.com/hikvision-research/SlimDA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可扩展的领域自适应框架，通过共享权重的模型库适应不同设备的资源限制，提升跨领域泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督领域自适应方法使用固定神经网络架构，难以适配实际场景中资源受限设备的多样化需求。
AI.method: 构建共享权重的模型库，结合随机集成蒸馏方法与优化分离的三分类器架构，并引入无监督性能评估指标进行架构适应。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中显著超越现有方法，计算复杂度降低至1/64时仍保持对源模型的性能优势。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡了模型精度与计算效率，在资源受限场景下实现优越的跨领域自适应效果。

search_text: Slimmable Domain Adaptation 可精简域适应 Vanilla unsupervised domain adaptation methods tend to optimize the model with fixed neural architecture, which is not very practical in real-world scenarios since the target data is usually processed by different resource-limited devices. It is therefore of great necessity to facilitate architecture adaptation across various devices. In this paper, we introduce a simple framework, Slimmable Domain Adaptation, to improve cross-domain generalization with a weight-sharing model bank, from which models of different capacities can be sampled to accommodate different accuracy-efficiency trade-offs. The main challenge in this framework lies in simultaneously boosting the adaptation performance of numerous models in the model bank. To tackle this problem, we develop a Stochastic EnsEmble Distillation method to fully exploit the complementary knowledge in the model bank for inter-model interaction. Nevertheless, considering the optimization conflict between inter-model interaction and intra-model adaptation, we augment the existing bi-classifier domain confusion architecture into an Optimization-Separated Tri-Classifier counterpart. After optimizing the model bank, architecture adaptation is leveraged via our proposed Unsupervised Performance Evaluation Metric. Under various resource constraints, our framework surpasses other competing approaches by a very large margin on multiple benchmarks. It is also worth emphasizing that our framework can preserve the performance improvement against the source-only model even when the computing complexity is reduced to $1/64$. authors_text: Jiajun Deng,Zhengyuan Yang,Daqing Liu,Tianlang Chen,Wengang Zhou,Yanyong Zhang,Houqiang Li,Wanli Ouyang
title: TransVG++: End-to-End Visual Grounding with Language Conditioned Vision Transformer
title_zh: TransVG++：使用语言条件视觉转换器进行端到端视觉基础
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.08541
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2104.08541
abstract: In this work, we explore neat yet effective Transformer-based frameworks for visual grounding. The previous methods generally address the core problem of visual grounding, i.e., multi-modal fusion and reasoning, with manually-designed mechanisms. Such heuristic designs are not only complicated but also make models easily overfit specific data distributions. To avoid this, we first propose TransVG, which establishes multi-modal correspondences by Transformers and localizes referred regions by directly regressing box coordinates. We empirically show that complicated fusion modules can be replaced by a simple stack of Transformer encoder layers with higher performance. However, the core fusion Transformer in TransVG is stand-alone against uni-modal encoders, and thus should be trained from scratch on limited visual grounding data, which makes it hard to be optimized and leads to sub-optimal performance. To this end, we further introduce TransVG++ to make two-fold improvements. For one thing, we upgrade our framework to a purely Transformer-based one by leveraging Vision Transformer (ViT) for vision feature encoding. For another, we devise Language Conditioned Vision Transformer that removes external fusion modules and reuses the uni-modal ViT for vision-language fusion at the intermediate layers. We conduct extensive experiments on five prevalent datasets, and report a series of state-of-the-art records.
summary: In this work, we explore neat yet effective Transformer-based frameworks for visual grounding. The previous methods generally address the core problem of visual grounding, i.e., multi-modal fusion and reasoning, with manually-designed mechanisms. Such heuristic designs are not only complicated but also make models easily overfit specific data distributions. To avoid this, we first propose TransVG, which establishes multi-modal correspondences by Transformers and localizes referred regions by directly regressing box coordinates. We empirically show that complicated fusion modules can be replaced by a simple stack of Transformer encoder layers with higher performance. However, the core fusion Transformer in TransVG is stand-alone against uni-modal encoders, and thus should be trained from scratch on limited visual grounding data, which makes it hard to be optimized and leads to sub-optimal performance. To this end, we further introduce TransVG++ to make two-fold improvements. For one thing, we upgrade our framework to a purely Transformer-based one by leveraging Vision Transformer (ViT) for vision feature encoding. For another, we devise Language Conditioned Vision Transformer that removes external fusion modules and reuses the uni-modal ViT for vision-language fusion at the intermediate layers. We conduct extensive experiments on five prevalent datasets, and report a series of state-of-the-art records.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们探索了简洁而有效的基于 Transformer 的视觉基础框架。以前的方法通常通过手动设计的机制来解决视觉基础的核心问题，即多模态融合和推理。这种启发式设计不仅复杂，而且很容易使模型过度拟合特定的数据分布。为了避免这种情况，我们首先提出 TransVG，它通过 Transformer 建立多模态对应，并通过直接回归框坐标来定位引用区域。我们凭经验表明，复杂的融合模块可以被具有更高性能的简单的 Transformer 编码器层堆栈所取代。然而，TransVG 中的核心融合 Transformer 是独立于单模态编码器的，因此应该在有限的视觉基础数据上从头开始训练，这使得它很难优化并导致性能次优。为此，我们进一步引入 TransVG++ 进行两倍的改进。一方面，我们利用 Vision Transformer (ViT) 进行视觉特征编码，将我们的框架升级为纯粹基于 Transformer 的框架。另一方面，我们设计了语言条件视觉变换器，它删除了外部融合模块，并在中间层重用单模态 ViT 进行视觉语言融合。我们对五个流行的数据集进行了广泛的实验，并报告了一系列最新的记录。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TransVG++框架，通过语言条件化的视觉Transformer实现端到端的视觉定位任务。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉定位方法依赖人工设计的多模态融合机制，存在模型复杂且易过拟合的问题，需探索更高效且通用的Transformer架构。
AI.method: 提出TransVG++框架：1) 采用Vision Transformer(ViT)进行视觉特征编码；2) 设计语言条件化的视觉Transformer，在中间层直接实现视觉-语言融合，无需外部融合模块。
AI.result: 在五个主流数据集上取得多项最先进(SOTA)性能记录，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 纯Transformer架构结合语言条件化设计能显著提升视觉定位性能，为多模态任务提供高效解决方案。

We conduct extensive experiments on five prevalent datasets, and report a series of state-of-the-art records. 在这项工作中，我们探索了简洁而有效的基于 Transformer 的视觉基础框架。以前的方法通常通过手动设计的机制来解决视觉基础的核心问题，即多模态融合和推理。这种启发式设计不仅复杂，而且很容易使模型过度拟合特定的数据分布。为了避免这种情况，我们首先提出 TransVG，它通过 Transformer 建立多模态对应，并通过直接回归框坐标来定位引用区域。我们凭经验表明，复杂的融合模块可以被具有更高性能的简单的 Transformer 编码器层堆栈所取代。然而，TransVG 中的核心融合 Transformer 是独立于单模态编码器的，因此应该在有限的视觉基础数据上从头开始训练，这使得它很难优化并导致性能次优。为此，我们进一步引入 TransVG++ 进行两倍的改进。一方面，我们利用 Vision Transformer (ViT) 进行视觉特征编码，将我们的框架升级为纯粹基于 Transformer 的框架。另一方面，我们设计了语言条件视觉变换器，它删除了外部融合模块，并在中间层重用单模态 ViT 进行视觉语言融合。我们对五个流行的数据集进行了广泛的实验，并报告了一系列最新的记录。 本文提出TransVG++框架，通过语言条件化的视觉Transformer实现端到端的视觉定位任务。 Jiajun Deng,Zhengyuan Yang,Daqing Liu,Tianlang Chen,Wengang Zhou,Yanyong Zhang,Houqiang Li,Wanli Ouyang cs.CV

authors_text: Harshad Khadilkar
title: Solving the capacitated vehicle routing problem with timing windows using rollouts and MAX-SAT
title_zh: 使用 rollouts 和 MAX-SAT 通过定时窗口解决容量限制车辆路径问题
abstract: The vehicle routing problem is a well known class of NP-hard combinatorial optimisation problems in literature. Traditional solution methods involve either carefully designed heuristics, or time-consuming metaheuristics. Recent work in reinforcement learning has been a promising alternative approach, but has found it difficult to compete with traditional methods in terms of solution quality. This paper proposes a hybrid approach that combines reinforcement learning, policy rollouts, and a satisfiability solver to enable a tunable tradeoff between computation times and solution quality. Results on a popular public data set show that the algorithm is able to produce solutions closer to optimal levels than existing learning based approaches, and with shorter computation times than meta-heuristics. The approach requires minimal design effort and is able to solve unseen problems of arbitrary scale without additional training. Furthermore, the methodology is generalisable to other combinatorial optimisation problems.
summary: The vehicle routing problem is a well known class of NP-hard combinatorial optimisation problems in literature. Traditional solution methods involve either carefully designed heuristics, or time-consuming metaheuristics. Recent work in reinforcement learning has been a promising alternative approach, but has found it difficult to compete with traditional methods in terms of solution quality. This paper proposes a hybrid approach that combines reinforcement learning, policy rollouts, and a satisfiability solver to enable a tunable tradeoff between computation times and solution quality. Results on a popular public data set show that the algorithm is able to produce solutions closer to optimal levels than existing learning based approaches, and with shorter computation times than meta-heuristics. The approach requires minimal design effort and is able to solve unseen problems of arbitrary scale without additional training. Furthermore, the methodology is generalisable to other combinatorial optimisation problems.
abstract_zh: 车辆路径问题是文献中众所周知的一类 NP 难组合优化问题。传统的解决方法要么涉及精心设计的启发法，要么涉及耗时的元启发法。最近的强化学习工作是一种很有前途的替代方法，但发现在解决方案质量方面很难与传统方法竞争。本文提出了一种混合方法，结合了强化学习、策略推出和可满足性求解器，以实现计算时间和解决方案质量之间的可调权衡。流行的公共数据集的结果表明，该算法能够产生比现有的基于学习的方法更接近最佳水平的解决方案，并且计算时间比元启发式更短。该方法需要最少的设计工作，并且能够解决任意规模的看不见的问题，而无需额外的培训。此外，该方法可推广到其他组合优化问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合方法，结合强化学习、策略展开和MAX-SAT求解器，解决带时间窗的容量车辆路径问题，实现计算时间和解质量的可调平衡。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在求解质量或计算效率上存在局限，强化学习方法难以与传统方法竞争，需探索更优的混合策略以兼顾效率与质量。
AI.method: 融合强化学习策略展开、政策迭代与可满足性求解器（MAX-SAT），通过可调参数平衡计算时间与解质量，无需额外训练即可处理任意规模问题。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上优于现有学习方法的解质量，计算时间短于元启发式算法，且设计成本低、泛化性强，适用于其他组合优化问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在解质量与效率间取得良好平衡，具有低设计成本和强泛化能力，为组合优化问题提供了一种通用且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Luckeciano C. Melo
title: Transformers are Meta-Reinforcement Learners
title_zh: 变形金刚是元强化学习者
comment: Published at the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2022
comments: Published at the International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) 2022
abstract: The transformer architecture and variants presented remarkable success across many machine learning tasks in recent years. This success is intrinsically related to the capability of handling long sequences and the presence of context-dependent weights from the attention mechanism. We argue that these capabilities suit the central role of a Meta-Reinforcement Learning algorithm. Indeed, a meta-RL agent needs to infer the task from a sequence of trajectories. Furthermore, it requires a fast adaptation strategy to adapt its policy for a new task -- which can be achieved using the self-attention mechanism. In this work, we present TrMRL (Transformers for Meta-Reinforcement Learning), a meta-RL agent that mimics the memory reinstatement mechanism using the transformer architecture. It associates the recent past of working memories to build an episodic memory recursively through the transformer layers. We show that the self-attention computes a consensus representation that minimizes the Bayes Risk at each layer and provides meaningful features to compute the best actions. We conducted experiments in high-dimensional continuous control environments for locomotion and dexterous manipulation. Results show that TrMRL presents comparable or superior asymptotic performance, sample efficiency, and out-of-distribution generalization compared to the baselines in these environments.
summary: The transformer architecture and variants presented remarkable success across many machine learning tasks in recent years. This success is intrinsically related to the capability of handling long sequences and the presence of context-dependent weights from the attention mechanism. We argue that these capabilities suit the central role of a Meta-Reinforcement Learning algorithm. Indeed, a meta-RL agent needs to infer the task from a sequence of trajectories. Furthermore, it requires a fast adaptation strategy to adapt its policy for a new task -- which can be achieved using the self-attention mechanism. In this work, we present TrMRL (Transformers for Meta-Reinforcement Learning), a meta-RL agent that mimics the memory reinstatement mechanism using the transformer architecture. It associates the recent past of working memories to build an episodic memory recursively through the transformer layers. We show that the self-attention computes a consensus representation that minimizes the Bayes Risk at each layer and provides meaningful features to compute the best actions. We conducted experiments in high-dimensional continuous control environments for locomotion and dexterous manipulation. Results show that TrMRL presents comparable or superior asymptotic performance, sample efficiency, and out-of-distribution generalization compared to the baselines in these environments.
abstract_zh: 近年来，变压器架构和变体在许多机器学习任务中取得了显着的成功。这种成功本质上与处理长序列的能力以及注意力机制中上下文相关权重的存在有关。我们认为这些功能适合元强化学习算法的核心作用。事实上，元强化学习智能体需要从一系列轨迹中推断任务。此外，它需要一个快速适应策略来调整其策略以适应新任务——这可以使用自注意力机制来实现。在这项工作中，我们提出了 TrMRL（元强化学习变压器），这是一种使用变压器架构模仿记忆恢复机制的元强化学习代理。它将最近的工作记忆关联起来，通过变压器层递归地构建情景记忆。我们证明了自注意力计算了一个共识表示，该表示可以最小化每一层的贝叶斯风险，并提供有意义的特征来计算最佳动作。我们在高维连续控制环境中进行了运动和灵巧操作的实验。结果表明，与这些环境中的基线相比，TrMRL 具有相当或更好的渐近性能、样本效率和分布外泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TrMRL，一种基于Transformer架构的元强化学习代理，用于处理需要快速适应新任务的高维连续控制问题。
AI.motivation: Transformer架构在处理长序列和上下文相关权重方面的能力，使其适合元强化学习（meta-RL）中从轨迹序列推断任务并快速适应新任务的需求。
AI.method: 设计TrMRL通过Transformer层递归构建情景记忆，利用自注意力机制计算最小化贝叶斯风险的共识表征，生成有效动作特征。
AI.result: 在运动控制和灵巧操作的高维环境中，TrMRL在渐近性能、样本效率和分布外泛化能力上优于或媲美基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Transformer架构能有效支持元强化学习，TrMRL验证了其在复杂任务中的适应性与泛化优势，为相关研究提供新方向。

authors_text: Binbin Chen,Weijie Chen,Shicai Yang,Yunyi Xuan,Jie Song,Di Xie,Shiliang Pu,Mingli Song,Yueting Zhuang
title: Label Matching Semi-Supervised Object Detection
title_zh: 标签匹配半监督目标检测
comment: To appear in CVPR 2022. Code is coming soon: https://github.com/hikvision-research/SSOD
comments: To appear in CVPR 2022. Code is coming soon: https://github.com/hikvision-research/SSOD
abstract: Semi-supervised object detection has made significant progress with the development of mean teacher driven self-training. Despite the promising results, the label mismatch problem is not yet fully explored in the previous works, leading to severe confirmation bias during self-training. In this paper, we delve into this problem and propose a simple yet effective LabelMatch framework from two different yet complementary perspectives, i.e., distribution-level and instance-level. For the former one, it is reasonable to approximate the class distribution of the unlabeled data from that of the labeled data according to Monte Carlo Sampling. Guided by this weakly supervision cue, we introduce a re-distribution mean teacher, which leverages adaptive label-distribution-aware confidence thresholds to generate unbiased pseudo labels to drive student learning. For the latter one, there exists an overlooked label assignment ambiguity problem across teacher-student models. To remedy this issue, we present a novel label assignment mechanism for self-training framework, namely proposal self-assignment, which injects the proposals from student into teacher and generates accurate pseudo labels to match each proposal in the student model accordingly. Experiments on both MS-COCO and PASCAL-VOC datasets demonstrate the considerable superiority of our proposed framework to other state-of-the-arts. Code will be available at https://github.com/hikvision-research/SSOD.
summary: Semi-supervised object detection has made significant progress with the development of mean teacher driven self-training. Despite the promising results, the label mismatch problem is not yet fully explored in the previous works, leading to severe confirmation bias during self-training. In this paper, we delve into this problem and propose a simple yet effective LabelMatch framework from two different yet complementary perspectives, i.e., distribution-level and instance-level. For the former one, it is reasonable to approximate the class distribution of the unlabeled data from that of the labeled data according to Monte Carlo Sampling. Guided by this weakly supervision cue, we introduce a re-distribution mean teacher, which leverages adaptive label-distribution-aware confidence thresholds to generate unbiased pseudo labels to drive student learning. For the latter one, there exists an overlooked label assignment ambiguity problem across teacher-student models. To remedy this issue, we present a novel label assignment mechanism for self-training framework, namely proposal self-assignment, which injects the proposals from student into teacher and generates accurate pseudo labels to match each proposal in the student model accordingly. Experiments on both MS-COCO and PASCAL-VOC datasets demonstrate the considerable superiority of our proposed framework to other state-of-the-arts. Code will be available at https://github.com/hikvision-research/SSOD.
abstract_zh: 随着平均教师驱动的自我训练的发展，半监督目标检测取得了重大进展。尽管结果有希望，但在之前的工作中尚未充分探讨标签不匹配问题，导致自我训练过程中出现严重的确认偏差。在本文中，我们深入研究了这个问题，并从分布级和实例级两个不同但互补的角度提出了一个简单而有效的 LabelMatch 框架。对于前一种情况，根据蒙特卡洛采样从标记数据的类别分布中近似未标记数据的类别分布是合理的。在这种弱监督线索的指导下，我们引入了重新分布均值教师，它利用自适应标签分布感知置信度阈值来生成无偏伪标签来推动学生学习。对于后一种情况，师生模型中存在一个被忽视的标签分配模糊问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于自训练框架的新颖的标签分配机制，即提案自分配，它将学生的提案注入教师，并生成准确的伪标签以相应地匹配学生模型中的每个提案。 MS-COCO 和 PASCAL-VOC 数据集上的实验证明了我们提出的框架相对于其他最先进的框架具有相当大的优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/hikvision-research/SSOD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LabelMatch的半监督目标检测框架，通过解决标签不匹配问题提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有半监督目标检测方法在自训练过程中存在标签不匹配导致的确认偏差问题，尚未充分探索该问题的解决方案。
AI.method: 从分布级和实例级两个角度出发：1) 通过蒙特卡洛采样近似无标签数据类别分布，引入重分布均值教师模型生成无偏伪标签；2) 提出提案自分配机制，将学生模型提案注入教师模型以生成精确伪标签。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和PASCAL-VOC数据集上的实验表明，该框架显著优于现有最先进方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: LabelMatch通过双视角解决标签不匹配问题，有效提升了半监督目标检测的性能，为相关研究提供了新思路。

search_text: Label Matching Semi-Supervised Object Detection 标签匹配半监督目标检测 Semi-supervised object detection has made significant progress with the development of mean teacher driven self-training. Despite the promising results, the label mismatch problem is not yet fully explored in the previous works, leading to severe confirmation bias during self-training. In this paper, we delve into this problem and propose a simple yet effective LabelMatch framework from two different yet complementary perspectives, i.e., distribution-level and instance-level. For the former one, it is reasonable to approximate the class distribution of the unlabeled data from that of the labeled data according to Monte Carlo Sampling. Guided by this weakly supervision cue, we introduce a re-distribution mean teacher, which leverages adaptive label-distribution-aware confidence thresholds to generate unbiased pseudo labels to drive student learning. For the latter one, there exists an overlooked label assignment ambiguity problem across teacher-student models. To remedy this issue, we present a novel label assignment mechanism for self-training framework, namely proposal self-assignment, which injects the proposals from student into teacher and generates accurate pseudo labels to match each proposal in the student model accordingly. Experiments on both MS-COCO and PASCAL-VOC datasets demonstrate the considerable superiority of our proposed framework to other state-of-the-arts. Code will be available at https://github.com/hikvision-research/SSOD. 随着平均教师驱动的自我训练的发展，半监督目标检测取得了重大进展。尽管结果有希望，但在之前的工作中尚未充分探讨标签不匹配问题，导致自我训练过程中出现严重的确认偏差。在本文中，我们深入研究了这个问题，并从分布级和实例级两个不同但互补的角度提出了一个简单而有效的 LabelMatch 框架。对于前一种情况，根据蒙特卡洛采样从标记数据的类别分布中近似未标记数据的类别分布是合理的。在这种弱监督线索的指导下，我们引入了重新分布均值教师，它利用自适应标签分布感知置信度阈值来生成无偏伪标签来推动学生学习。对于后一种情况，师生模型中存在一个被忽视的标签分配模糊问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于自训练框架的新颖的标签分配机制，即提案自分配，它将学生的提案注入教师，并生成准确的伪标签以相应地匹配学生模型中的每个提案。 MS-COCO 和 PASCAL-VOC 数据集上的实验证明了我们提出的框架相对于其他最先进的框架具有相当大的优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/hikvision-research/SSOD 获取。 本文提出了一种名为LabelMatch的半监督目标检测框架，通过解决标签不匹配问题提升模型性能。 Binbin Chen,Weijie Chen,Shicai Yang,Yunyi Xuan,Jie Song,Di Xie,Shiliang Pu,Mingli Song,Yueting Zhuang cs.CV

authors_text: Tianyi Yan,Kuan Zhu,Haiyun guo,Guibo Zhu,Ming Tang,Jinqiao Wang
title: Plug-and-Play Pseudo Label Correction Network for Unsupervised Person Re-identification
title_zh: 用于无人监督人员重新识别的即插即用伪标签校正网络
abstract: Clustering-based methods, which alternate between the generation of pseudo labels and the optimization of the feature extraction network, play a dominant role in both unsupervised learning (USL) and unsupervised domain adaptive (UDA) person re-identification (Re-ID). To alleviate the adverse effect of noisy pseudo labels, the existing methods either abandon unreliable labels or refine the pseudo labels via mutual learning or label propagation. However, a great many erroneous labels are still accumulated because these methods mostly adopt traditional unsupervised clustering algorithms which rely on certain assumptions on data distribution and fail to capture the distribution of complex real-world data. In this paper, we propose the plug-and-play graph-based pseudo label correction network (GLC) to refine the pseudo labels in the manner of supervised clustering. GLC is trained to perceive the varying data distribution at each epoch of the self-training with the supervision of initial pseudo labels generated by any clustering method. It can learn to rectify the initial noisy labels by means of the relationship constraints between samples on the k Nearest Neighbor (kNN) graph and early-stop training strategy. Specifically, GLC learns to aggregate node features from neighbors and predict whether the nodes should be linked on the graph. Besides, GLC is optimized with 'early stop' before the noisy labels are severely memorized to prevent overfitting to noisy pseudo labels. Consequently, GLC improves the quality of pseudo labels though the supervision signals contain some noise, leading to better Re-ID performance. Extensive experiments in USL and UDA person Re-ID on Market-1501 and MSMT17 show that our method is widely compatible with various clustering-based methods and promotes the state-of-the-art performance consistently.
summary: Clustering-based methods, which alternate between the generation of pseudo labels and the optimization of the feature extraction network, play a dominant role in both unsupervised learning (USL) and unsupervised domain adaptive (UDA) person re-identification (Re-ID). To alleviate the adverse effect of noisy pseudo labels, the existing methods either abandon unreliable labels or refine the pseudo labels via mutual learning or label propagation. However, a great many erroneous labels are still accumulated because these methods mostly adopt traditional unsupervised clustering algorithms which rely on certain assumptions on data distribution and fail to capture the distribution of complex real-world data. In this paper, we propose the plug-and-play graph-based pseudo label correction network (GLC) to refine the pseudo labels in the manner of supervised clustering. GLC is trained to perceive the varying data distribution at each epoch of the self-training with the supervision of initial pseudo labels generated by any clustering method. It can learn to rectify the initial noisy labels by means of the relationship constraints between samples on the k Nearest Neighbor (kNN) graph and early-stop training strategy. Specifically, GLC learns to aggregate node features from neighbors and predict whether the nodes should be linked on the graph. Besides, GLC is optimized with 'early stop' before the noisy labels are severely memorized to prevent overfitting to noisy pseudo labels. Consequently, GLC improves the quality of pseudo labels though the supervision signals contain some noise, leading to better Re-ID performance. Extensive experiments in USL and UDA person Re-ID on Market-1501 and MSMT17 show that our method is widely compatible with various clustering-based methods and promotes the state-of-the-art performance consistently.
abstract_zh: 基于聚类的方法在伪标签的生成和特征提取网络的优化之间交替，在无监督学习（USL）和无监督域自适应（UDA）行人重新识别（Re-ID）中发挥着主导作用。为了减轻噪声伪标签的不利影响，现有方法要么放弃不可靠的标签，要么通过相互学习或标签传播来细化伪标签。然而，由于这些方法大多采用传统的无监督聚类算法，依赖于对数据分布的某些假设，无法捕获复杂的真实数据的分布，因此仍然积累了大量错误标签。在本文中，我们提出了即插即用的基于图的伪标签校正网络（GLC），以监督聚类的方式细化伪标签。 GLC 经过训练，可以在任何聚类方法生成的初始伪标签的监督下感知自训练每个时期的不同数据分布。它可以通过 k 最近邻 (kNN) 图上样本之间的关系约束和提前停止训练策略来学习纠正初始噪声标签。具体来说，GLC 学习聚合来自邻居的节点特征并预测节点是否应该在图上链接。此外，GLC 在噪声标签被严格记忆之前通过“提前停止”进行优化，以防止过度拟合噪声伪标签。因此，尽管监督信号包含一些噪声，GLC 仍提高了伪标签的质量，从而带来更好的 Re-ID 性能。 Market-1501 和 MSMT17 上的 USL 和 UDA 人员 Re-ID 的大量实验表明，我们的方法与各种基于聚类的方法广泛兼容，并始终如一地提升了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的伪标签校正网络（GLC），用于改进无监督行人重识别中的伪标签质量。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖传统聚类算法生成伪标签，但难以处理复杂真实数据分布，导致大量错误标签积累。
AI.method: 设计GLC网络通过k近邻图的样本关系约束和早停策略，利用初始伪标签监督信号校正噪声标签。
AI.result: 在Market-1501和MSMT17数据集上，GLC显著提升无监督和领域自适应行人重识别性能，且兼容多种聚类方法。
AI.conclusion: GLC通过图结构约束和早停机制有效减少噪声伪标签影响，为无监督Re-ID提供更鲁棒的解决方案。

authors_text: Toshio Irino
title: WHIS: Hearing impairment simulator based on the gammachirp auditory filterbank
title_zh: WHIS：基于 gammachirp 听觉滤波器组的听力障碍模拟器
comment: This preprint was an original version that was unsuccessfully submitted to Trends in Hearing on June 5, 2022. The revised version has been accepted for publication in IEEE access. See https://doi.org/10.1109/ACCESS.2023.3298673 ( https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10193769 )
comments: This preprint was an original version that was unsuccessfully submitted to Trends in Hearing on June 5, 2022. The revised version has been accepted for publication in IEEE access. See https://doi.org/10.1109/ACCESS.2023.3298673 ( https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/10193769 )
abstract: A new version of a hearing impairment simulator (WHIS) was implemented based on a revised version of the gammachirp filterbank (GCFB), which incorporates fast frame-based processing, absolute threshold (AT), an audiogram of a hearing-impaired (HI) listener, and a parameter to control the cochlear input-output (IO) function. The parameter referred to as the compression health $α$ controlled the slope of the IO function to range from normal hearing (NH) listeners to HI listeners, without largely changing the total hearing loss (HL). The new WHIS was designed provide an NH listener the same EPs as those of a target HI listener.The analysis part of WHIS was almost the same as that of the revised GCFB, except that the IO function was used instead of the gain function. We proposed two synthesis methods: a direct time-varying filter for perceptually small distortion and a filterbank analysis-synthesis for further HI simulations including temporal smearing. We evaluated the WHIS family and a Cambridge version of the HL simulator (CamHLS) in terms of differences in the IO function and spectral distance. The IO functions were simulated fairly well at $α$ less than 0.5 but not at $α$ equal to 1. Thus, it is difficult to simulate the HL when the IO function is sufficiently healthy. This is a fundamental limit of any existing HL simulator as well as WHIS. The new WHIS yielded a smaller spectral distortion than CamHLS and was fairly compatible with the previous version.
summary: A new version of a hearing impairment simulator (WHIS) was implemented based on a revised version of the gammachirp filterbank (GCFB), which incorporates fast frame-based processing, absolute threshold (AT), an audiogram of a hearing-impaired (HI) listener, and a parameter to control the cochlear input-output (IO) function. The parameter referred to as the compression health $α$ controlled the slope of the IO function to range from normal hearing (NH) listeners to HI listeners, without largely changing the total hearing loss (HL). The new WHIS was designed provide an NH listener the same EPs as those of a target HI listener.The analysis part of WHIS was almost the same as that of the revised GCFB, except that the IO function was used instead of the gain function. We proposed two synthesis methods: a direct time-varying filter for perceptually small distortion and a filterbank analysis-synthesis for further HI simulations including temporal smearing. We evaluated the WHIS family and a Cambridge version of the HL simulator (CamHLS) in terms of differences in the IO function and spectral distance. The IO functions were simulated fairly well at $α$ less than 0.5 but not at $α$ equal to 1. Thus, it is difficult to simulate the HL when the IO function is sufficiently healthy. This is a fundamental limit of any existing HL simulator as well as WHIS. The new WHIS yielded a smaller spectral distortion than CamHLS and was fairly compatible with the previous version.
abstract_zh: 新版本的听力障碍模拟器 (WHIS) 是基于伽马线性调频滤波器组 (GCFB) 的修订版本实现的，该模拟器结合了基于快速帧的处理、绝对阈值 (AT)、听力障碍 (HI) 听者的听力图以及控制耳蜗输入输出 (IO) 功能的参数。称为压缩健康 $α$ 的参数控制 IO 函数的斜率，范围从正常听力 (NH) 听众到 HI 听众，而不会大幅改变总听力损失 (HL)。新的WHIS被设计为NH听者提供与目标HI听者相同的EP。WHIS的分析部分与修订后的GCFB的分析部分几乎相同，除了使用IO函数而不是增益函数。我们提出了两种合成方法：用于感知小失真的直接时变滤波器和用于进一步 HI 模拟（包括时间拖尾）的滤波器组分析合成。我们根据 IO 函数和光谱距离的差异评估了 WHIS 系列和剑桥版 HL 模拟器 (CamHLS)。当 $α$ 小于 0.5 时，IO 功能模拟得相当好，但在 $α$ 等于 1 时则不然。因此，当 IO 功能足够健康时，很难模拟 HL。这是任何现有 HL 模拟器以及 WHIS 的基本限制。新的 WHIS 产生的光谱失真比 CamHLS 更小，并且与之前的版本相当兼容。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于改进的gammachirp滤波器组的听力障碍模拟器WHIS，通过调整耳蜗输入输出函数参数α来模拟不同听力损失程度的听觉特性。
AI.motivation: 现有听力损失模拟器在模拟健康耳蜗输入输出函数时存在局限性，需开发更精确且能兼容正常听力与听力障碍听者的模拟工具。
AI.method: 基于改进的gammachirp滤波器组，引入绝对阈值、听力障碍者听力图及压缩健康参数α控制IO函数斜率，提出两种合成方法：时变直接滤波器与滤波器组分析-合成法，并与CamHLS进行对比评估。
AI.result: WHIS在α<0.5时能较好模拟IO函数，但α=1时效果不佳，且其频谱失真小于CamHLS，与旧版兼容性良好。
AI.conclusion: WHIS在听力损失模拟中表现优于现有方法，但当IO函数过于健康时存在根本性模拟限制，需进一步优化模型以突破此瓶颈。

search_text: WHIS: Hearing impairment simulator based on the gammachirp auditory filterbank WHIS：基于 gammachirp 听觉滤波器组的听力障碍模拟器 A new version of a hearing impairment simulator (WHIS) was implemented based on a revised version of the gammachirp filterbank (GCFB), which incorporates fast frame-based processing, absolute threshold (AT), an audiogram of a hearing-impaired (HI) listener, and a parameter to control the cochlear input-output (IO) function. The parameter referred to as the compression health $α$ controlled the slope of the IO function to range from normal hearing (NH) listeners to HI listeners, without largely changing the total hearing loss (HL). The new WHIS was designed provide an NH listener the same EPs as those of a target HI listener.The analysis part of WHIS was almost the same as that of the revised GCFB, except that the IO function was used instead of the gain function. We proposed two synthesis methods: a direct time-varying filter for perceptually small distortion and a filterbank analysis-synthesis for further HI simulations including temporal smearing. We evaluated the WHIS family and a Cambridge version of the HL simulator (CamHLS) in terms of differences in the IO function and spectral distance. The IO functions were simulated fairly well at $α$ less than 0.5 but not at $α$ equal to 1. Thus, it is difficult to simulate the HL when the IO function is sufficiently healthy. This is a fundamental limit of any existing HL simulator as well as WHIS. The new WHIS yielded a smaller spectral distortion than CamHLS and was fairly compatible with the previous version. 新版本的听力障碍模拟器 (WHIS) 是基于伽马线性调频滤波器组 (GCFB) 的修订版本实现的，该模拟器结合了基于快速帧的处理、绝对阈值 (AT)、听力障碍 (HI) 听者的听力图以及控制耳蜗输入输出 (IO) 功能的参数。称为压缩健康 $α$ 的参数控制 IO 函数的斜率，范围从正常听力 (NH) 听众到 HI 听众，而不会大幅改变总听力损失 (HL)。新的WHIS被设计为NH听者提供与目标HI听者相同的EP。WHIS的分析部分与修订后的GCFB的分析部分几乎相同，除了使用IO函数而不是增益函数。我们提出了两种合成方法：用于感知小失真的直接时变滤波器和用于进一步 HI 模拟（包括时间拖尾）的滤波器组分析合成。我们根据 IO 函数和光谱距离的差异评估了 WHIS 系列和剑桥版 HL 模拟器 (CamHLS)。当 $α$ 小于 0.5 时，IO 功能模拟得相当好，但在 $α$ 等于 1 时则不然。因此，当 IO 功能足够健康时，很难模拟 HL。这是任何现有 HL 模拟器以及 WHIS 的基本限制。新的 WHIS 产生的光谱失真比 CamHLS 更小，并且与之前的版本相当兼容。 本文提出了一种基于改进的gammachirp滤波器组的听力障碍模拟器WHIS，通过调整耳蜗输入输出函数参数α来模拟不同听力损失程度的听觉特性。 Toshio Irino cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Rodrigo Santa Cruz,Léo Lebrat,Darren Fu,Pierrick Bourgeat,Jurgen Fripp,Clinton Fookes,Olivier Salvado
title: CorticalFlow$^{++}$: Boosting Cortical Surface Reconstruction Accuracy, Regularity, and Interoperability
title_zh: CorticalFlow$^{++}$：提高皮质表面重建的准确性、规律性和互操作性
abstract: The problem of Cortical Surface Reconstruction from magnetic resonance imaging has been traditionally addressed using lengthy pipelines of image processing techniques like FreeSurfer, CAT, or CIVET. These frameworks require very long runtimes deemed unfeasible for real-time applications and unpractical for large-scale studies. Recently, supervised deep learning approaches have been introduced to speed up this task cutting down the reconstruction time from hours to seconds. Using the state-of-the-art CorticalFlow model as a blueprint, this paper proposes three modifications to improve its accuracy and interoperability with existing surface analysis tools, while not sacrificing its fast inference time and low GPU memory consumption. First, we employ a more accurate ODE solver to reduce the diffeomorphic mapping approximation error. Second, we devise a routine to produce smoother template meshes avoiding mesh artifacts caused by sharp edges in CorticalFlow's convex-hull based template. Last, we recast pial surface prediction as the deformation of the predicted white surface leading to a one-to-one mapping between white and pial surface vertices. This mapping is essential to many existing surface analysis tools for cortical morphometry. We name the resulting method CorticalFlow$^{++}$. Using large-scale datasets, we demonstrate the proposed changes provide more geometric accuracy and surface regularity while keeping the reconstruction time and GPU memory requirements almost unchanged.
summary: The problem of Cortical Surface Reconstruction from magnetic resonance imaging has been traditionally addressed using lengthy pipelines of image processing techniques like FreeSurfer, CAT, or CIVET. These frameworks require very long runtimes deemed unfeasible for real-time applications and unpractical for large-scale studies. Recently, supervised deep learning approaches have been introduced to speed up this task cutting down the reconstruction time from hours to seconds. Using the state-of-the-art CorticalFlow model as a blueprint, this paper proposes three modifications to improve its accuracy and interoperability with existing surface analysis tools, while not sacrificing its fast inference time and low GPU memory consumption. First, we employ a more accurate ODE solver to reduce the diffeomorphic mapping approximation error. Second, we devise a routine to produce smoother template meshes avoiding mesh artifacts caused by sharp edges in CorticalFlow's convex-hull based template. Last, we recast pial surface prediction as the deformation of the predicted white surface leading to a one-to-one mapping between white and pial surface vertices. This mapping is essential to many existing surface analysis tools for cortical morphometry. We name the resulting method CorticalFlow$^{++}$. Using large-scale datasets, we demonstrate the proposed changes provide more geometric accuracy and surface regularity while keeping the reconstruction time and GPU memory requirements almost unchanged.
abstract_zh: 磁共振成像的皮质表面重建问题传统上是通过使用 FreeSurfer、CAT 或 CIVET 等图像处理技术的冗长流程来解决的。这些框架需要很长的运行时间，这对于实时应用来说是不可行的，对于大规模研究来说也是不切实际的。最近，引入了监督深度学习方法来加速这项任务，将重建时间从几小时缩短到几秒钟。本文以最先进的 CorticalFlow 模型为蓝图，提出了三项修改，以提高其准确性以及与现有表面分析工具的互操作性，同时不牺牲其快速推理时间和低 GPU 内存消耗。首先，我们采用更精确的 ODE 求解器来减少微分同胚映射近似误差。其次，我们设计了一个例程来生成更平滑的模板网格，避免 CorticalFlow 的基于凸包的模板中的锐边引起的网格伪影。最后，我们将软脑膜表面预测重新定义为预测的白色表面的变形，从而导致白色和软脑膜表面顶点之间的一对一映射。这种映射对于许多现有的皮质形态测量表面分析工具至关重要。我们将生成的方法命名为 CorticalFlow$^{++}$。使用大规模数据集，我们证明了所提出的更改提供了更高的几何精度和表面规律性，同时保持重建时间和 GPU 内存要求几乎不变。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的CorticalFlow++方法，在保持快速推理和低显存消耗的同时，提升皮层表面重建的精度、规则性和与现有工具的兼容性。
AI.motivation: 传统皮层重建工具运行时间长，深度学习方法虽提速但存在精度不足和兼容性问题，需在效率与质量间寻求平衡。
AI.method: 采用更精确的ODE求解器、设计平滑模板网格生成方案、将皮层表面预测转化为白质表面变形映射，实现白质与皮层顶点的一一对应。
AI.result: 在大规模数据集验证中，CorticalFlow++显著提升几何精度和表面规则性，同时保持重建时间和显存需求几乎不变。
AI.conclusion: 通过三项改进，CorticalFlow++在保证效率的前提下优化了重建质量与兼容性，为临床和大规模研究提供更实用的解决方案。

authors_text: B. R. Manoj,Meysam Sadeghi,Erik G. Larsson
title: Downlink Power Allocation in Massive MIMO via Deep Learning: Adversarial Attacks and Training
title_zh: 通过深度学习实现大规模 MIMO 中的下行链路功率分配：对抗性攻击和训练
comment: 13 pages, 14 figures, published in IEEE Transactions on Cognitive Communications and Networking
comments: 13 pages, 14 figures, published in IEEE Transactions on Cognitive Communications and Networking
abstract: The successful emergence of deep learning (DL) in wireless system applications has raised concerns about new security-related challenges. One such security challenge is adversarial attacks. Although there has been much work demonstrating the susceptibility of DL-based classification tasks to adversarial attacks, regression-based problems in the context of a wireless system have not been studied so far from an attack perspective. The aim of this paper is twofold: (i) we consider a regression problem in a wireless setting and show that adversarial attacks can break the DL-based approach and (ii) we analyze the effectiveness of adversarial training as a defensive technique in adversarial settings and show that the robustness of DL-based wireless system against attacks improves significantly. Specifically, the wireless application considered in this paper is the DL-based power allocation in the downlink of a multicell massive multi-input-multi-output system, where the goal of the attack is to yield an infeasible solution by the DL model. We extend the gradient-based adversarial attacks: fast gradient sign method (FGSM), momentum iterative FGSM, and projected gradient descent method to analyze the susceptibility of the considered wireless application with and without adversarial training. We analyze the deep neural network (DNN) models performance against these attacks, where the adversarial perturbations are crafted using both the white-box and black-box attacks.
summary: The successful emergence of deep learning (DL) in wireless system applications has raised concerns about new security-related challenges. One such security challenge is adversarial attacks. Although there has been much work demonstrating the susceptibility of DL-based classification tasks to adversarial attacks, regression-based problems in the context of a wireless system have not been studied so far from an attack perspective. The aim of this paper is twofold: (i) we consider a regression problem in a wireless setting and show that adversarial attacks can break the DL-based approach and (ii) we analyze the effectiveness of adversarial training as a defensive technique in adversarial settings and show that the robustness of DL-based wireless system against attacks improves significantly. Specifically, the wireless application considered in this paper is the DL-based power allocation in the downlink of a multicell massive multi-input-multi-output system, where the goal of the attack is to yield an infeasible solution by the DL model. We extend the gradient-based adversarial attacks: fast gradient sign method (FGSM), momentum iterative FGSM, and projected gradient descent method to analyze the susceptibility of the considered wireless application with and without adversarial training. We analyze the deep neural network (DNN) models performance against these attacks, where the adversarial perturbations are crafted using both the white-box and black-box attacks.
abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）在无线系统应用中的成功出现引起了人们对新的安全相关挑战的担忧。其中一项安全挑战是对抗性攻击。尽管已经有很多工作证明了基于深度学习的分类任务对对抗性攻击的敏感性，但迄今为止还没有从攻击的角度研究无线系统背景下基​​于回归的问题。本文的目的有两个：（i）我们考虑无线环境中的回归问题，并表明对抗性攻击可以破坏基于深度学习的方法；（ii）我们分析对抗性训练作为对抗性环境中防御技术的有效性，并表明基于深度学习的无线系统针对攻击的鲁棒性显着提高。具体来说，本文考虑的无线应用是多小区大规模多输入多输出系统下行链路中基于DL的功率分配，其中攻击的目标是通过DL模型产生不可行的解决方案。我们扩展了基于梯度的对抗性攻击：快速梯度符号法（FGSM）、动量迭代 FGSM 和投影梯度下降法，以分析有或没有对抗性训练的无线应用的敏感性。我们分析了深度神经网络（DNN）模型针对这些攻击的性能，其中对抗性扰动是使用白盒和黑盒攻击精心设计的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了深度学习在无线系统下行功率分配中的应用，并分析了对抗攻击对其的影响及防御方法。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在无线系统中的应用引发安全担忧，尤其对抗攻击对回归问题的影响尚未被充分研究，需填补这一领域空白。
AI.method: 扩展基于梯度的对抗攻击方法（如FGSM、PGD），结合白盒与黑盒攻击测试深度学习模型的鲁棒性，并通过对抗训练进行防御分析。
AI.result: 对抗攻击可导致深度学习模型生成不可行解，而对抗训练显著提升了模型在攻击环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 对抗训练能有效增强深度学习在无线系统中的安全性，为未来防御对抗攻击提供了可行方向。

search_text: Downlink Power Allocation in Massive MIMO via Deep Learning: Adversarial Attacks and Training 通过深度学习实现大规模 MIMO 中的下行链路功率分配：对抗性攻击和训练 The successful emergence of deep learning (DL) in wireless system applications has raised concerns about new security-related challenges. One such security challenge is adversarial attacks. Although there has been much work demonstrating the susceptibility of DL-based classification tasks to adversarial attacks, regression-based problems in the context of a wireless system have not been studied so far from an attack perspective. The aim of this paper is twofold: (i) we consider a regression problem in a wireless setting and show that adversarial attacks can break the DL-based approach and (ii) we analyze the effectiveness of adversarial training as a defensive technique in adversarial settings and show that the robustness of DL-based wireless system against attacks improves significantly. Specifically, the wireless application considered in this paper is the DL-based power allocation in the downlink of a multicell massive multi-input-multi-output system, where the goal of the attack is to yield an infeasible solution by the DL model. We extend the gradient-based adversarial attacks: fast gradient sign method (FGSM), momentum iterative FGSM, and projected gradient descent method to analyze the susceptibility of the considered wireless application with and without adversarial training. We analyze the deep neural network (DNN) models performance against these attacks, where the adversarial perturbations are crafted using both the white-box and black-box attacks. 深度学习（DL）在无线系统应用中的成功出现引起了人们对新的安全相关挑战的担忧。其中一项安全挑战是对抗性攻击。尽管已经有很多工作证明了基于深度学习的分类任务对对抗性攻击的敏感性，但迄今为止还没有从攻击的角度研究无线系统背景下基​​于回归的问题。本文的目的有两个：（i）我们考虑无线环境中的回归问题，并表明对抗性攻击可以破坏基于深度学习的方法；（ii）我们分析对抗性训练作为对抗性环境中防御技术的有效性，并表明基于深度学习的无线系统针对攻击的鲁棒性显着提高。具体来说，本文考虑的无线应用是多小区大规模多输入多输出系统下行链路中基于DL的功率分配，其中攻击的目标是通过DL模型产生不可行的解决方案。我们扩展了基于梯度的对抗性攻击：快速梯度符号法（FGSM）、动量迭代 FGSM 和投影梯度下降法，以分析有或没有对抗性训练的无线应用的敏感性。我们分析了深度神经网络（DNN）模型针对这些攻击的性能，其中对抗性扰动是使用白盒和黑盒攻击精心设计的。 本文研究了深度学习在无线系统下行功率分配中的应用，并分析了对抗攻击对其的影响及防御方法。 B. authors_text: Kounianhua Du,Weinan Zhang,Ruiwen Zhou,Yangkun Wang,Xilong Zhao,Jiarui Jin,Quan Gan,Zheng Zhang,David Wipf
title: Learning Enhanced Representations for Tabular Data via Neighborhood Propagation
title_zh: 通过邻域传播学习表格数据的增强表示
abstract: Prediction over tabular data is an essential and fundamental problem in many important downstream tasks. However, existing methods either take a data instance of the table independently as input or do not fully utilize the multi-rows features and labels to directly change and enhance the target data representations. In this paper, we propose to 1) construct a hypergraph from relevant data instance retrieval to model the cross-row and cross-column patterns of those instances, and 2) perform message Propagation to Enhance the target data instance representation for Tabular prediction tasks. Specifically, our specially-designed message propagation step benefits from 1) fusion of label and features during propagation, and 2) locality-aware high-order feature interactions. Experiments on two important tabular data prediction tasks validate the superiority of the proposed PET model against other baselines. Additionally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of the model components and the feature enhancement ability of PET via various ablation studies and visualizations. The code is included in https://github.com/KounianhuaDu/PET.
summary: Prediction over tabular data is an essential and fundamental problem in many important downstream tasks. However, existing methods either take a data instance of the table independently as input or do not fully utilize the multi-rows features and labels to directly change and enhance the target data representations. In this paper, we propose to 1) construct a hypergraph from relevant data instance retrieval to model the cross-row and cross-column patterns of those instances, and 2) perform message Propagation to Enhance the target data instance representation for Tabular prediction tasks. Specifically, our specially-designed message propagation step benefits from 1) fusion of label and features during propagation, and 2) locality-aware high-order feature interactions. Experiments on two important tabular data prediction tasks validate the superiority of the proposed PET model against other baselines. Additionally, we demonstrate the effectiveness of the model components and the feature enhancement ability of PET via various ablation studies and visualizations. The code is included in https://github.com/KounianhuaDu/PET.
abstract_zh: 在许多重要的下游任务中，表格数据的预测是一个重要且基本的问题。然而，现有的方法要么独立地将表的数据实例作为输入，要么没有充分利用多行特征和标签来直接改变和增强目标数据表示。在本文中，我们建议 1）从相关数据实例检索构建超图，以对这些实例的跨行和跨列模式进行建模，2）执行消息传播以增强表格预测任务的目标数据实例表示。具体来说，我们专门设计的消息传播步骤受益于 1) 传播过程中标签和特征的融合，以及 2) 局部感知的高阶特征交互。对两个重要表格数据预测任务的实验验证了所提出的 PET 模型相对于其他基线的优越性。此外，我们通过各种消融研究和可视化展示了模型组件的有效性以及 PET 的特征增强能力。代码包含在 https://github.com/KounianhuaDu/PET 中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过邻域传播学习增强表格数据表示的方法，以提升表格数据预测任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有表格数据预测方法未能充分建模跨行/列模式，且未有效利用多行特征和标签直接增强目标数据表示。
AI.method: 构建超图建模跨实例关系，设计融合标签与特征的传播机制，并引入局部感知的高阶特征交互进行表示增强。
AI.result: 在两个重要表格预测任务中，PET模型优于其他基线方法，且通过消融实验和可视化验证了组件有效性。
AI.conclusion: PET模型通过超图邻域传播有效增强了表格数据表示，代码已开源。
